Name: IMG Golf Course Services
Description:
IMG provides golf course design and golf management services to leading clubs across the world. 

Management services include clubhouse design support, pre-opening technical services, sales & marketing, membership planning, course maintenance and operational management.

Our industry leading team is located in offices across the globe, providing international and local support. 

IMG has designed over 100 golf courses globally and currently manages and consults to an exceptional collection of high quality clubs and resorts.

Name: Abu Dhabi Golf Club
Description:
An oasis of tranquility carved out of the desert, Abu Dhabi Golf Club offers one of the most luxurious golf resort experiences in the Middle East and a facility of excellence.

Overlooking the lakes from the far end of the course, the Falcon Clubhouse dominates the scene. Inside and out, the superbly designed building creates an atmosphere of relaxed elegance, one of the key characteristic of the design was to ensure that all three floors of the iconic clubhouse would be able to enjoy prominent and unhindered views across the 9th & 18th holes of our championship course designed by Peter Harradine. Constructed in 1995 the Falcon Clubhouse was built to be one of the most is not only instantly recognizable designs in the world.

The 27 hole championship course, home to the Abu Dhabi HSBC Championship presented by EGA a Rolex series event, provides a tough but fair challenge, with lush fairways, strategically placed bunkers and generous greens. Described as a "super course" by leading sections of the golfing press, the 162 hectares of the Abu Dhabi Golf Club features one of the finest world-class 27-hole championship golfing facility in the Middle East.
Location: Sas Al Nakhl, Abu Dhabi , Abu Dhabi

Name: Trump International, Scotland
Description:
Championship Golf Course -

The central focus of the development is the golf course designed by Dr. Martin Hawtree, the acknowledged master of links golf course architecture. The championship golf course is a classical Scottish links.  The course has a Par of 72 and a maximum length of just over 7400 yards.  The golf course follows a classical pattern of two out-and-back loops of nine holes. All 18 holes thread their way engagingly through the dunes, rising to find views of the sea and coastline, plunging into secluded valleys, offering a sequence of superlative topography, landscape, alternating spaciousness and enclosure, panoramic views, a rich texture of vegetation and wildlife habitats surrounding the golf holes.

Luxury Accommodation -

The five-star historic Scottish mansion and lodge is set amid mature woodland in the heart of the magnificent Trump International estate. This opulent boutique house hotel provides exquisite superior and grand deluxe guestrooms, intimate bar and dining facilities, and is the ultimate setting for dinner, bed and breakfast, private parties or exclusive use. 
 
With its secret stairways, traditional log fires, whisky snug and spectacular grounds, MacLeod House & Lodge offers luxury and comfort in a secluded and dramatic location. Both historic buildings are located in close proximity to each other and are designed to the highest specifications. Boasting many charming characteristics and period features each guest room within MacLeod House & Lodge is special and unique. Guests at MacLeod House & Lodge will benefit from exclusive personal guest services including assistance with travel itineraries and priority booking for other venues and clubs.

Name: Close House Golf Club LTD
Description:
Home of the British Masters 2017 & 2020 and set in the beautiful and serene Tyne Valley, minutes from Newcastle and nestled on the banks of the River Tyne and the ancient remains of Hadrian’s Wall, the 250-year-old Close House estate grounds have been lovingly teased into two of the best courses in the country, with the Lee Westwood Colt Course gaining entry to the UK Top 100 courses club almost as soon as it opened.

With two 18-hole Lee Westwood Championship Colt and Filly courses and the 9 hole Yearling course, Close House provides one of the most varied golfing challenges anywhere on the golfing map today. This European Tour venue is designed to appeal to players at every level of skill and reward first-time visitors and the year-round member evenly. The Golf Academy provides the opportunity to polish and develop your golfing ability using the latest technology to analyse your game.

In addition, our modern, purpose-built No.19 clubhouse is a stunning setting for your post-round drink. Providing first-class dining, the restaurant caters for all occasions and we also provide a private dining service for those events you would like to host yourselves. With the luxurious accommodation we have in our sumptuous Courtyard rooms, membership at Close House provides everything you will need.

If golf is your game, Close House is a dream come true.

Name: Bobby Jones Links
Description:
Recognized as one of the National Golf Foundation's Top 100 Businesses in Golf, Bobby Jones Links is a premier manager and developer of private, public, and resort clubs in the United States.

Join one of the many golf leagues at Fort Dodge Country Club this year. It’s the perfect way to enjoy golf with your friends and fellow golfers throughout the season.

For your annual golf events, Fort Dodge Country Club should be your first choice. Planning a golf outing or tournament can be a handful. Let our professional staff be your guides to an unforgettable golf experience.

Name: Five Iron Golf UAE
Description:
Introducing the epitome of indoor golfing luxury in the heart of Dubai: Five Iron Golf, where the ultimate golfing experience meets entertainment extravaganza. Originally born amidst the vibrant streets of New York City, we've transcended borders to bring our groundbreaking concept to the opulent landscape of Dubai.

Spanning an impressive 32,000 square feet, our Dubai location stands as a testament to innovation and excellence, boasting 17 state-of-the-art indoor simulators that redefine the golfing landscape. But Five Iron Golf is more than just a haven for golf enthusiasts; it's a sanctuary for those seeking a fusion of leisure and wellness.

Imagine a haven where golf-specific gyms invigorate your swing, saunas melt away stress, and a licensed food and beverage experience tantalises your taste buds. Picture a sports-bar-style ambience pulsating with excitement, featuring entertainment delights like pool tables and much more, ensuring every visit transcends the ordinary.

Our story began with a dream shared by Mike Doyle and Jared Solomon, emerging from a modest men's clothing store in Manhattan in 2015. Fuelled by an insatiable demand for quality golfing experiences, the visionaries embarked on a journey to revolutionise golf culture, welcoming all into a space where learning, leisure, and community converge.

Guided by co-founders Nora Dunnan and Katherine Solomon, Five Iron Golf became a reality in 2017, pioneering a transformation in urban golfing culture. From our humble origins, we've expanded our footprint from Manhattan to cities like Chicago, Baltimore, and Philadelphia, redefining the golfing landscape for enthusiasts and novices alike.

For the passionate golfer, our Dubai haven offers unparalleled amenities - best-in-class simulators, Trackman lesson studios, expert teaching professionals, leagues, club storage, showers, and complimentary use of top-of-the-line clubs during your booking. Immerse yourself in an elite golfing destination.

Name: La Hacienda Links Golf Resort
Description: Located in one of the most privileged enclaves on the Costa del Sol, just minutes from iconic locations such as Valderrama and Sotogrande, La Hacienda Links Golf Resort is an exclusive golf destination that offers guests the opportunity to play two spectacular world-class courses: Links and Heathland. With a total of 36 holes, both courses have established themselves as benchmarks in the world of golf, not only for their exceptional design, but also for their breathtaking views. Our Links course, one of the few links-style courses in southern Spain and the only one on the Costa del Sol, offers an unrivalled experience with panoramic views of the Mediterranean Sea, Gibraltar and the African coast. Recognised as ‘Best Golf Course in Spain’ at the World Golf Awards 2023, this course is a jewel for golf lovers. In addition, its exclusive Halfway House, located between holes 9 and 10, has been awarded as the ‘Best Halfway House in the World’ at the World Golf Awards 2024, making it a benchmark for luxury golf.

Name: Saucon Valley Country Club
Description: Saucon Valley Country Club is a picturesque private club retreat offering a myriad of exceptional recreational and social experiences with an emphasis on golf. Three 18-hole championship golf courses provide unique and varied play, while a six-hole course introduces the novice. Seven dining venues and nine banquet venues deliver the most diverse culinary experience in and beyond the Lehigh Valley. The outstanding racquets and fitness programming, and 18th century Guest House, further enhance the exceptional member experience. Cool off during the summer months in the four swimming pools the entire family will enjoy. Founded in 1920 by 16 business leaders from Bethlehem Steel, the Club has evolved gracefully over the past 100 years and today encompasses 850 acres that serve as a timeless retreat from the everyday hustle and bustle where families enjoy new experiences and create memories.

Name: BGL Golf (Burhill Golf & Leisure Limited)
Description:
Privately owned by members of the Guinness Family Burhill Group Limited (BGL), formerly Burhill Estates Company Limited,  was founded in 1926 to manage the estates of the then Lord Iveagh.

Over the years the Company has diversified and now has three divisions:

BGL Golf, BGL Leisure and BGL Estates.

BGL Golf is one of the largest golf course operators in the UK, with 22 golf courses across 10 locations currently in the group.  

Each BGL Golf venue is unique, with its own style and character.  What makes BGL venues so special is their individuality, combined with the group commitment to deliver consistently high levels of service, quality and value in everything we do.

Golf is a great sport and we believe that it should be accessible to everyone.  Whether you are new to the game or an experienced golfer, we can provide options to suit and are delighted to welcome you.

Name: Bel-Air Bay Club
Description:
Bel-Air Bay Club was built in 1927 as part of a 31-acre project conceived by  Alphonzo Bell, one of the primary developers of Los Angeles.  The Club was incorporated on June 2, 1927. 

Mr. Bell seemed to have a special talent for developing this type of project, and his promotion of athletics was a knowledgeable one, having ranked as one of the nation's top ten tennis players in 1904.  It is an appropriate legacy to Mr. Bell, who also served as Club President from 1927 through 1945, that the Bel-Air Bay Club is, to this day, known as "the paddle tennis club," having spawned several national champion players.

The Club was such a center of social activity during the 1920's, 1930's, and 1940's that many celebrities frequented Club functions, along with other prominent local citizens. Today, the Club is a popular destination for family and social gatherings, as well as paddle tennis, volleyball, beach activities, and Bridge.

Bel-Air Bay Club consists of two facilities separated by Pacific Coast Highway. The grounds are located on one-quarter mile of beachfront, with a total of 14 acres including picturesque bluffs overlooking the sea. Mr. Bell situated the Upper Clubhouse to offer an unsurpassed view of Santa Monica Bay and Catalina Island. 

Many visitors have commented that the Bel-Air Bay Club provides one of the finest views in the world.

Name: Denver Country Club
Description:
The Denver Country Club is one the oldest and most exclusive private clubs in the United States. Founded in 1887, it originally centered around horse racing but soon expanded to tennis, polo, golf and a myriad of other sports.The DCC is the oldest country club west of the Mississippi. The Club held its first men's golf championship the same year (1895) as the United States Open and United States Amateur. The Club's first women's champion was held two years later in 1897.

The Denver Country Club moved from its original location at Overland Park to its present location astride Cherry Creek in 1905. The Club's Cherry Creek course was designed and modified by a veritable  "Who's Who" of golf architects including James Foulis, Donald Ross, William Flynn, A.W. Tillinghast, Bill Coore and most recently Gil Hanse, 2009 Golf Architect of the Year, who was selected in a world-wide competition to design and build the 2016 Olympic golf venue in Rio de Janeiro.

Name: Houston Golf Association
Description:
The Houston Golf Association (HGA) is dedicated to enriching communities through golf by preserving the historic Gus Wortham Park Golf Course, supporting youth development at First Tee – Greater Houston, and promoting amateur golf competitions.

Since 1946, HGA has been a not-for-profit, tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization driven by passionate volunteers. Membership ensures the continued growth of these initiatives and strengthens HGA’s lasting impact on the Greater Houston area.

Name: Golf & Country Club Brunn
Description:
Am südlichen Stadtrand von Wien, eingebettet in eine abwechslungsreiche Gartenlandschaft, befindet sich unsere nach letztem Stand der Technik adaptierte 18-Loch-Golfanlage, seit 2024 stolzes Mitglied der Leading Golf Courses. Egal ob Anfänger oder Könner, unser niveauvoller Golfparcours bietet sowohl Gästen als auch Mitgliedern Freizeitvergnügen, Erholung und sportliche Herausforderungen

 Golf spielen mit Freunden
In unserem familiär geführten Golfclub sind Sie nicht einfach nur ein Club-, sondern ein Familienmitglied. Spielen Sie mit Freunden und Geschäftspartnern, nehmen Sie Platz in unserem Clubhaus-Restaurant mit wunderschöner Terrasse oder entspannen Sie in unserem Wellness-Bereich. Ein Besuch in unserer Anlage ist wie ein Kurzurlaub – direkt vor den Toren Wiens!

 Kommen Sie zum Golfen – bleiben Sie fürs Business!
Bei keinem anderen Sport kann man sein Gegenüber so gut kennenlernen wie beim Golfen. Nutzen Sie deshalb eine Runde Golf, um sich mit Ihren potenziellen Geschäftspartnern besser vertraut zu machen oder neue Business-Kontakte zu knüpfen.

Gerne unterstützen wir Sie bei Ihrem „Netzwerken“ und teilen Sie mit Gleichgesinnten in Flights oder Spielgruppen ein. Spätestens am sogenannten „19. Loch“, unserem Golf-Restaurant mit traumhafter Terrasse, werden Ihre Partner zu Geschäftsfreunden!

 Mitten in meinem Leben
Die Mitgliedschaft in unserem Club bietet Ihnen mehr: Mehrwert. Egal, ob Sie sportliche Herausforderung, Freizeitvergnügen oder Erholung suchen – bei uns und unseren Partnern sind Sie immer richtig.

 Als Initiator der Dachmarke Golf Hot Spots haben wir uns mit folgenden Clubs zusammengeschlossen: Golfclub Föhrenwald, Golfclub Schönfeld, Golfclub Wels, Linzer Golfclub Luftenberg, Golf & Country Club Ennstal (Golf- & Landclub Ennstal) und Golfclub Klopeinersee.

WERTE, WO ICH MICH ZU HAUSE FÜHLE.

Name: Six 12 Golf LLC
Description:
Six12 Golf LLC offers innovative, full-scope solutions for golf course design, construction, marketing and agronomic. We specialize in creating 6- and 12-hole regulation loops that provide flexibility for players and efficiency for owners—allowing rounds of 6, 9, 12, or 18 holes on less land and with reduced maintenance.

As the golf industry adapts to new challenges, these modern layouts offer a smart alternative by meeting today’s player expectations while helping developers and operators control costs and increase engagement.

From concept to launch and beyond, Six12 Golf delivers strategic design, expert construction management, and marketing guidance to help courses thrive by ensuring each course performs as beautifully as it plays.

Let us help you bring your next golf project to life with creativity, efficiency, and a vision for the future of the game.

Name: Seymour Golf and Country Club
Description:
Seymour Golf and Country Club is North Vancouver’s original social network.  We’ve been an integral part of the North Vancouver and North Shore community since 1953, when our course was formed out of the wilderness to create a community for Members who love the game of golf.

Much of that wilderness forest still surrounds our golf course, providing a retreat from the noise and hectic pace of city life.  You can leave downtown Vancouver and be here in 20 minutes, but when you step onto the first tee, you’ll feel many miles away.

Known for its superb conditioning, treed fairways and tough greens,  Seymour has allowed generations of Members and their children and grandchildren to learn and enjoy the game of golf together while forging life-long friendships with other North Shore golfers.

With a beautiful clubhouse that overlooks the forested fairways and practice areas, Seymour also provides North Shore and Lower Mainland groups with catering for special events such as tournaments, meetings, weddings, and celebrations of life.

-MYC provides a site for dining, private parties, weddings  and business meetings.
-Member benefits include the heated pool, complimentary paddle boards, kayaks and bikes. 
-No boat? No problem! A pontoon boat and dinghy are available to rent for nominal fees. For sailors, we have two Ideal 18s and a Catalina 30 available at no charge.
-Generous reciprocity program which allows access to yacht clubs around Lake Michigan and all across the U.S. We also have dining reciprocity at many area country/city clubs (including the Wisconsin Club and the University Clubs in Milwaukee and Chicago).

Name: The Ancient Links Golf Company
Description:
The Ancient Links Golf Company was established in 2025 with a clear purpose: to protect and elevate golf’s most historic Scottish links by ensuring they remain relevant, playable, and sustainable for future generations. Through a carefully curated portfolio of Scotland’s most significant and historic golf courses, The Ancient Links act as long-term custodians, preserving heritage while supporting modern standards of presentation, performance, and participation. Their ambition is to ensure these courses are not only preserved, but actively played, deeply valued, and experienced by golfers from around the world. 

The Ancient Links' first acquisition is Scotscraig Golf Club, and the group will continue to build its portfolio of historically significant community clubs throughout 2026.

Name: Kankaisten Golf
Description: 27 reikäinen golfkenttä Maskussa, vain 15 minuutin ajomatkan päässä Turusta. Mielenkiintoinen ja vaihteleva kolmen yhdeksän reiän kokonaisuus. Klubitalon modernit ja viihtyisät tilat täydentävät viihtyvyyden kaikille golfareille.

Name: Tangle Creek Golf & Country Club
Description:
Everything about Tangle Creek Golf & Country Club has been designed with one thing in mind—giving you the best golf experience possible.

Tee-off on 200 gorgeous acres of rolling terrain designed by legendary course architect Rene Muylaert. Windswept fairways are defined by strategic bunkering, mounding, grassy hollows, and fescue…heavily forested holes, ponds, and environmentally protected areas…all with immaculate course conditions. Tangle Creek offers something for even the most discerning golfer.

Relax in our beautiful 22,000 sq. ft. clubhouse complete with a licensed lounge, fine dining restaurant, and extensive patio overlooking the 9th and 18th holes.

Named a Premiere Golf Facility right from tee-off, Tangle Creek was nominated “Best New Golf Course” in Canada – Golf Digest, 2003. And the awards keep coming: 
•	Canada’s Top 100 Golf Courses – Globe and Mail
•	Barrie’s Favourite Golf Club – Barrie Advance Readers’ Poll
•	Best Value Golf Course in GTA – Toronto Sun Readers’ Choice
•	Junior Golf Opportunity Award Finalist

At Tangle, we do more than just golf. With a simple phone call, we’ll remove the stress from planning your wedding. Our in-house wedding planner looks after every detail, so all you have to do is enjoy your day.

Take your vows under our beautiful garden arbour. Celebrate in our elegant banquet hall. Have an intimate family affair on our spacious patio terrace. However you imagine it, our award-winning Executive Chef and staff await to make your special day a dream come true.

Name: Bryngfjorden Golf AB
Description: Naturskön golfbana vid Klarälven i Karlstad, varmt välkomna!

Name: AMS Caddy Academy
Description: AMS Caddy Academy: Pioneering caddy education for career growth in golf. We specialise in equipping individuals with the skills and knowledge needed for a successful career in golf caddying. Connect with us for insights into the world of professional caddying.

Name: Juniper Hill Golf Course, Inc.
Description: Juniper Hill Golf Course is a more than 90 year old 36 hole, public, daily fee, family run golf course in central Massachusetts offering two different 18 hole golf experiences-Riverside and Lakeside courses.  Juniper also has facilities to host up to 300 people in our outdoor pavilion space.

Name: Twin Lakes Golf & Swim Club
Description:
Twin Lakes Golf & Swim Club is a premier 27 Hole Public Golf Course and Event Venue located in Oakland Township, MI.  

Our four-star Golf Course designed by Jerry Matthews features wide sweeping fairways and huge contoured putting surfaces. This links influenced layout traverses mildly undulating terrain with numerous wetlands and water hazards along the way.

Name: Plover Cove Golf Club 香港船灣高爾夫球會
Description: The best golf course in Asia, coupled with the most dynamic clubhouse so that you, your friends, and your family can prevail in unity.

Name: Centro México Libanés de Guadalajara
Description: Somos un grupo de descendientes libaneses establecidos en México. Buscamos compartir nuestra cultura con el mundo a través de distintas dinámicas y eventos, además de reunir a nuestra comunidad.

Name: Gorse & Thistle
Description: Gorse & Thistle curates luxury golf tours beyond the fairway, offering world-class courses, exceptional hospitality, and an authentic taste of Scotland and Ireland.

Name: Hamptworth Golf
Description:
Our aim is to be the best we can be with a warm welcome guaranteed and fresh approach to golf. You’ll find none of the formalities of a traditional golf club here.

We have no separate sections, captains or committees ensuring all members have equal standing. Membership is currently available, with a limit of 300 7 day members to ensure the course is not overplayed, and tee times are always available to club members.

The Golf Course is one of the finest in the South of England and offers headspace that is hard to come by.

Previous hosts to the Jamega Professional Tour we offer pristine conditions. Our Green keeping team love their golf and this is evident in the attention to detail.

Beautifully situated in the New Forest, we offer you some of England’s most enjoyable Golf.

The Course gently weaves its way through ancient woodland, with nothing but your playing partners, birdsong and the occasional herd of deer to keep you company.

Our Academy boasts an excellent coaching team including the formidable Adam Freeman, he’s dedicated to helping golfers enjoy their game and works hard to grow our junior participation. We also have not one but two Golf Monthly Top 50 coaches, Katie Dawkins and Nathan Cook. The team are available for lessons and to help you make the most of your golf. Experts in their fields we guarantee after a lesson here at Hamptworth you’ll be skipping down the middle of those fairways.

Our junior coaching is really growing with lessons every Sunday and golf camps in the holidays.

Corporate golf is a big part of what we excel at here at the club. The stunning newly renovated clubhouse has been transformed to appeal to a much wider clientele than just our fabulous golfers. We host many corporate days, launches, events and seminars here and take pride in delivering an impressive venue for a range of different activities to offer your clients and staff. 

Come and immerse yourself in the Hamptworth experience. We look forward to seeing you soon.

Name: The Rose Golf Club
Description: The Rose, an exclusive members-only golf club with the course located just 10 minutes north of Athens, GA and the downtown club on East Broad Street.

Name: Golf Sainte Baume
Description:
Situé, à Nans les Pins, au cœur de la Provence verte, entre Aix en Provence, Marseille, Brignoles et Toulon, le Golf Sainte Baume offre un cadre unique et incomparable, de renommée internationale.


Le parcours 18 Trous - PAR 72 de 5982 mètres - conçu en 1988, au pied du majestueux massif de la Sainte-Baume, par Robert Berthet, dispose d’un environnement paisible et typiquement provençal, prisé pour la qualité exceptionnelle de son patrimoine botanique.

Dans cet écrin de nature préservée, le dessin du parcours, sur un terrain vallonné, s’accorde et souligne les caractéristiques paysagères du site intégrant restanques, ruisseaux, garrigue sauvage, pins, plantes aromatiques et chênes verts. Départs en surplomb, greens surélevés et encore obstacles d’eau offrent un jeu attractif, varié et ouvert à tous les niveaux.

Le Golf de la Sainte Baume appartient à la chaîne Resonance Golf Collection.

Name: Eagle Ranch Resort
Description:
Eagle Ranch Resort is in the untamed beauty of British Columbia’s Columbia Valley, and stands as Invermere’s premier luxury resort destination. With breathtaking views of the river valley and the Purcell Mountains, it features a renowned par 72 golf course, Caddie Program, premier accommodations, and dining. 

Eagle Ranch is operated by Stone Creek Resorts, a well-established company based in Alberta and a leader in luxury resort real estate development, renowned for delivering exceptionalhospitality and luxury lifestyle experiences. Learn more: https://www.stonecreekresorts.com/

Name: Golf du Château de la Bawette
Description:
Niché en plein cœur du Brabant Wallon à quelques kilomètres seulement au sud de Bruxelles, le Golf du Château de la Bawette s’étend dans un parc prestigieux de 65 hectares, parsemé de coteaux boisés, de ruisseaux et de pièces d’eau.

Son parcours « Le Parc », très agréablement vallonné, se fond harmonieusement dans le décor et présente une grande variété d’obstacles naturels qui en font un 18 trous de haut niveau, réputé bien au-delà des frontières.

Le Golf du Château de la Bawette situé à Wavre offre la possibilité de se retrouver en très peu de temps dans une des plus belles propriétés de la région. A proximité de la sortie 5 Bis Bierges sur l’autoroute Bruxelles-Namur E411, on y accède en 15 minutes à peine du sud de Bruxelles ou de Waterloo, et en moins de 20 minutes de Namur par la sortie 5.

Cette situation privilégiée, très centrale, est un avantage décisif pour tous ceux qui cherchent à associer sport et détente, dans un cadre propice à la vie de famille comme aux relations d’affaires.

Name: Golfclub Schloss Myllendonk e. V.
Description:
Der Golfclub Schloss Myllendonk e.V. wurde 1965 aus dem Kreis einiger Familien und Freunde gegründet und ist bis heute ein rein privater Mitgliederclub. Wir sind stolz auf unsere Tradition, auf unseren wunderschönen, parkähnlichen Golfplatz, dessen 18 Bahnen einmal rund um das mittelalterliche Wasserschloss Myllendonk führen. 

Unser Ziel ist es, dass sich die Mitglieder und auch unsere Gäste in Myllendonk wohlfühlen und alle, ob sportlich ambitioniert oder eher Entspannung suchend, mit Freude einen Tag im GC Schloss Myllendonk verbringen können.

Name: Paul Lawrie Golf Centre
Description:
Set within the beautiful Royal Deeside, the Paul Lawrie Golf Centre caters for the needs of all golfers. Boasting a nine hole par three golf course, a 26 bay driving range and a world class short game area, the Centre also has three PGA Coaching Professionals on hand to provide instruction in fully equipped private coaching bays.
The Paul Lawrie Golf Centre experience is further enhanced by the bespoke custom fitting bay, well equipped shop and friendly Clarets coffee shop with views over the golf course and beyond.

Name: Týčko Tour
Description:
Týčko Tour – golfová tour pro hráče a firemní partnery od roku 2025.

Týčko Tour propojuje golfisty všech úrovní a přináší do Česka sérii turnajů, která spojuje soutěživost, komunitu, férovou hru a prostor pro nový typ B2B networkingu.

Každý týden nové hřiště.
Každý turnaj nový příběh.
Každá sezóna nové příležitosti ke spojení s lidmi, se kterými se vyplatí být v kontaktu.

 Co získají hráči
- možnost hrát na předních českých hřištích a sledovat svůj progres v aplikaci Týčko
- férové soutěže podle HCP i speciální výzvy (nearest to pin, longest drive, týmové hry)
- komunitu více než 40 000 aktivních golfistů
- možnost snadno najít partnery do flightu i nové přátele
- zážitky, které propojují sport, atmosféru a radost ze hry

 Co získají firmy a partneři
- oslovení komunity 40 000+ aktivních golfistů a firemních rozhodovatelů
- viditelnost značky v prémiovém sportovním prostředí
- příležitost pořádat firemní flighty, setkání se zákazníky i interní akce
- možnost budovat vztahy v prostředí, kde vznikají lepší rozhovory i lepší spolupráce
- podpora well-beingu zaměstnanců a firemní kultury
- propojení s novou golfovou komunitou, která rychle roste

 Proč Týčko Tour dává smysl
Golf je férový sport, který spojuje lidi.
Vytváří prostředí, kde se dají řešit věci, na které není v kanceláři čas.
A kde vznikají nové kontakty, partnerství i přátelství.

 Týčko Tour: Tam, kde se značka stává součástí hry.

Stáhněte si aplikaci Týčko pro přehled turnajů, výsledků a statistik: https://lnkd.in/e52TkeDN 
https://lnkd.in/eVuE-dYU

Name: Needham Golf Club
Description: Needham Golf Club was founded in 1923 and designed by professional golf architect Wayne Stiles, a contemporary of the legendary Donald Ross and A.W. Tillinghast. Mr. Stiles designed over 30 courses during his career including Woodland Golf Club in Newton and Taconic Golf Club in Williamstown. NGC challenges the skilled golfer yet is fair and enjoyable for the recreational, junior or senior player. The course is known for its lush, tree-lined fairways, challenging greens and excellent condition.

Name: RMT Equipment
Description:
Our Mission, Core Values, Employee promise and the RMT Way are not things we developed to hang on a wall, instead we believe the only way for us to be successful, is if it is weaved into the fabric of who we are and the services we deliver.

The Stan Bonham company was founded in 1958 and sold tractor dynamometers for M&W gear to tractor dealers in UT, WY, NV. and sold the first aftermarket M&W turbo kit for tractors in the state of Idaho. The Company started doing retail business as RMT Equipment in the mid 80’s. RMT Equipment quickly became known in the industry as forward thinking, dynamic, progressive and eager to serve customers across multiple business segments. Today we serve the Agricultural, Construction, Professional Lawn Care, Golf and Turf and Rental segments in Utah, ID, WY, OR, WA. We believe in the service 1st approach and specialization in each segment is foundational to our future.

Name: Oulton Hall Hotel Golf Club - Leeds
Description:
Oulton Hall Hotel Golf Club is set among lush parkland, the well-groomed fairways and greens of our Calverley and Hall courses are a test for golfers of every skill level. 

Located only 5 miles from Leeds city centre and with easy access from the M62/M1/A1, our 27 Hole course is the perfect place to enjoy golf.

- Fully covered TrackMan Driving Range
- Practice green for improving your putting 
- Golf academy and tuition from PGA-qualified coaches 
- Custom fitting service to find your perfect set of clubs 
- Professional Golf shop adjoining the Claret Club Bar & Restaurant

Name: Odense Eventyr Golf
Description:
Eventyr Golf har cirka 1700 medlemmer og er meget aktiv på den elitemæssige side og en stor ungdomsafdeling. 
Af resultater kan nævnes at vi blev Danmarksmestre i 2011, og spillede i finalen i 2012.

På den veltrimmede 27 hullers bane, har der været afviklet flere store turneringer, såsom Lady's European Tour og både i 2018 og igen i 2019 havde vi besøg af EccoTouren.


Udover de 27 fuldgyldige huller har vi også en Pay & Play bane samt store træningsområder med bl.a oplyst driving range, to puttegreens og indspildsområde. 

Odense Eventyr Golf er også kendt for at afvikle én af Danmarks største turneringer, nemlig Eventyrugen, som altid afvikles uge 28, hvor der kommer spillere fra hele Danmark og store dele af Norden.

Name: Tamarina Golf Club
Description: Inaugurated in 2006, Tamarina Golf Club is an 18-hole championship Par 72 course designed by the architect Rodney Wright. The course combines technical challenges with a splendid view on the Rempart Mountain and the crisp blue of Tamarin Bay, visible on the 7th hole.

Name: Portlethen Golf Club
Description:
2021 Scottish Amateur Mens Championship Co-Host Club and Scottish PGA Northern Open Host.

The course has matured into one of the best parkland courses in the North East of Scotland and has been recognised at District and now National level as a top venue for numerous prestigious events.
Having been blessed with natural features, the principal being the Findon burn which, lined with mature broadleaf trees, crosses five of the holes on the first nine influencing either tee or approach shots.

There is an extensive practice area including a 4 bay driving range and short game facility. A substantial putting green is conveniently sited near the first tee.

Golf trolleys, power trollies and buggies are available for hire from the Club Professional.

Name: San Roque Golf & Resort
Description: Un campo de golf legendario, diseñado por Perry Dye y Severiano Ballesteros, te espera para vivir el golf en su máxima expresión.

Name: University Park Country Club
Description: Life Well Played. University Park Country Club is a premier semi-private club in Sarasota-Manatee featuring 27 holes of championship golf, award-winning dining, tennis, pickleball, fitness, and a boutique Pro Shop. We host elegant weddings, private events, and community partnerships, all designed to create a welcoming environment crafted for you to live, dine, and play.

Name: Itaguará Country Clube
Description: Itaguara Country Clube is a company based out of Brazil.

Name: Coveleigh Club
Description: Coveleigh Club is a private club located at 459 Stuyvesant Avenue, Rye, New York, United States.

Name: GOLF DE WIMEREUX
Description:
Le golf de Wimereux est un golf situé dans la station balnéaire de Wimereux dans le Pas-de-Calais. Ouvert en 1901, il est l'un des plus anciens parcours de golf français.
Véritable links à l'écossaise, le golf de Wimereux comporte un parcours de 18 trous, long de 6 179 m, par 72. Il est divisé en deux : une partie au bord de la mer et une autre dans la campagne.

Name: Arzaga Golf
Description: Within a 355 acres park upon the Lake Garda hills are located the Arzaga Golf courses, the signature made by two golf legend ensure the beauty of the 18 holes PAR 72 designed by Jack Nicklaus II and the 9 holes PAR 36 by Gary Player. Both the Club House and its wide terrace, overlooking the Golf courses, create a unique natural environment. For those who wish to start or refine your technique the Club offers a Driving Range with a brand new Pitch&Putt powered by our professional Academy managed by the Italian Golf Academy.

Name: Neighborhood National
Description:
Neighborhood National is a member-based high-end golf simulator sharing community providing easy and inclusive access to world class golf with the most convenient, affordable, and fun golf membership available anywhere.

Imagine Airbnb meets a world class golf simulator and it's wrapped up into a fun and laid back club right down your block - that's Neighborhood National.

Extremely excited with the feedback received here in Greensboro where our Neighborhood National No. 1 location is at +15 members and counting. 
 Members book unlimited use tee times online and come and go as they please.  In 1 hour door-to-door members can easily spend 45 minutes playing or practicing at Neighborhood National.

Name: Dail Golf
Description:
Dail Golf is a comprehensive golf course management, construction, and consulting company dedicated to enhancing the world of golf. With a passion for excellence and a commitment to delivering top-notch services, Dail Golf provides a full spectrum of solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of golf courses.

As a golf course management expert, Dail Golf excels in overseeing and optimizing the day-to-day operations of golf facilities. From meticulous maintenance practices to complete oversight of your club, the company ensures that every aspect of a golf course functions seamlessly, creating an unparalleled experience for golfers and visitors alike.

In addition to management services, Dail Golf specializes in golf course construction, leveraging expertise to design and build courses that captivate players and elevate the overall aesthetic and functionality of the facility. The company's construction projects are characterized by precision, innovation, and a keen understanding of the game's nuances.

Name: Associazione Italiana Tecnici di Golf
Description:
L’Associazione ad oggi vanta più di 300 iscritti suddivisi tra 155 Club Manager e 155 Course Manager, ossia quasi l’80% delle figure dirigenti dei Circoli Italiani. Figure che sono inserite nell’Albo Professionale riconosciuto dalla FIG, Federazione Italiana Golf, sotto la denominazione di “Tecnici”.

La mission di AITG è quella di offrire agli Associati la possibilità di rimanere aggiornati sulle novità offerte dal mercato commerciale e lavorativo, confrontandosi personalmente per sviluppare una maggiore crescita professionale, indispensabile in un mondo del lavoro in costante cambiamento e crescita.

L’Associazione offre ai suoi Associati la possibilità di formarsi e crescere attraverso contatti diretti: Meeting nazionali, riunioni Macro-Regionali e giornate a tema, ma anche numerosi webinar e attività digitali online. Proprio la forte voglia di evolversi e di restare al passo coi tempi ha spinto AITG a creare nell’inverno 2019/20 il progetto AITG ACADEMY! L’Academy nasce dalla necessità di confrontarsi e implementare le proprie conoscenze, incontrandosi attraverso seminari, lezioni ed appuntamenti organizzati ad hoc ed in diretta web. Una fitta collaborazione tra Sponsor, Partner Tecnici e Scuola Nazionale di Golf. Il 2020 ha visto sorgere, e fortificare, l’esigenza di offrire agli Associati ed agli Sponsor la calendarizzazione di questi webinar anche a fronte del complicato momento che noi tutti stiamo vivendo, a causa ovviamente della pandemia del Covid-19. Questi incontri, tramite le piattaforme digitali più utilizzate, hanno permesso ad AITG di mantenere vivi, rafforzandoli, i contatti tra gli Associati, oltre ad aver offerto molteplici e fondamentali spunti per ottimizzare la gestione dei Circoli in un momento così complesso e straordinario.

Name: Thai Country Club, Bangkok
Description:
Thai Country Club was developed as one of the finest golf clubs in Asia and opened to the golfing world in December 1996. The golf course was designed to United States Golf Association specifications by Dennis Griffiths, the then President of the world renowned American Society of Golf Course Architects. The design adapts from everyday casual play up to a very tough challenge for the finest players in the world. The 7,097-yards course was first seriously tested during the 1997 Asian Honda Classic won by Tiger Woods. This picturesque course is renowned for its immaculate conditions, a neo-classic design and its variety of holes, along with an abundance of water as well as fauna and flora – offering a constant challenge and hours of pleasure. 

Off the course, you’ll find the friendliest staff of professionals in the Kingdom, committed to making your golfing experience a memorable one. So, whether you play from the tees for 7,097 yards, or prefer a more leisurely round at 6,034 yards or somewhere in between… Thai Country Club has… 
                                 …The Ultimate Golfing Experience…

Name: Holliday Farms
Description: Beautiful Pete Dye Golf Course Community in the heart of Zionsville, Indiana developed by Henke Development Group.

Name: X-Golf Methuen
Description:
X-Golf’s state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators offer players unparalleled accuracy and realism. Through a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impacts sensors and advanced gaming software. Our dedicated space combine virtual reality gaming, food and beverages, competitions, golf lessons, memberships and social events. These services provide visitors the ultimate golfing entertainment experience.

Our relaxed, welcoming atmosphere makes it perfect for players of all ages, men and women. Fun for golfers of all levels regardless of ability, X-Golf is ideal for work events, birthday parties, corporate functions, men’s or ladies’ nights, and bachelor/bachelorette parties.

Name: Ekholmsnäs Golf Lidingö
Description: Golfbana på Lidingö

Name: Catalina Club
Description: Catalina Club is a unique 27-hole championship golf course and clubhouse home to an award-winning restaurant, bars and a cafe dining space. Since 1920, our Club has been celebrating and elevating our local community, members and visitors.

Name: Puslinch Golf Club
Description:
Puslinch Golf Club is a hidden gem among Southern Ontario’s public courses. Renowned for its impeccable conditioning and some of the best greens in the province, our course delivers a top-notch golfing experience that proves quality matters more than length.

At PGC, we pair top-tier golf with a warm, community-focused atmosphere. Whether you’re a seasoned golfer or just starting out, you’ll find a place to connect, enjoy the game, and feel right at home.

Come see for yourself why we’re a local favorite—great golf, great greens, and great vibes await!

Name: Lubbock Country Club
Description: Lubbock Country Club is a premiere private country club located in Lubbock, Texas; established in 1921.

Name: Champions Golf Club
Description: Champions Golf Club is a recreational facilities and services company based out of 13722 Champions Dr, Houston, Texas, United States.

Name: Jeremy Ranch Golf & Country Club
Description: A Private Golf Club nestled in the Upper East Canyon of the Wasatch Mountains near Park City, Jeremy Ranch Golf & Country Club is the only Arnold Palmer Signature course in Utah.

Name: Golf Terramar
Description:
Club de Golf Terramar, situado a 35 kilómetros al sur de Barcelona, en la Costa de Garraf a 5 minutos de centro de Sitges. Gracias al microclima permite jugar a golf todo el año y con vistas al mar Mediterráneo. Club de Golf Terramar, segundo campo más antiguo de Cataluña es uno de los clubes de golf con más historia y tradición de España, inaugurado en 1927, desde entonces, sucesivas remodelaciones lo han convertido en un club y en un campo de cinco estrellas para disfrutar con los cinco sentidos, un lugar que, a orillas del mar Mediterráneo, combina el sol, el mar y la montaña. Club de Golf Terramar ofrece a todos los visitantes un recorrido de 18 hoyos, alquiler de material, zonas de prácticas. Campo ecológico y sostenible: desde 2019 el campo se riega con agua regenerada de la depuradora de Sitges-Sant Pere de Ribes, de esta manera un pequeño porcentaje del agua regenerada que iba a parar al mar, se capta y se le da un tratamiento terciario para hacerla apta para el riego. 

Club de Golf Terramar, situat a 35 quilòmetres a sud de Barcelona, a la Costa de Garraf a 5 minuts de centre de Sitges. Gràcies al microclima permet jugar a golf tot l'any i amb vista a la mar Mediterrània. Club de Golf Terramar, segon camp més antic de Catalunya, és un dels clubs de golf amb més història i tradició d'Espanya, inaugurat el 1927, des de llavors, successives remodelacions l'han convertit en un club i en un camp de cinc estrelles per a gaudir amb els cinc sentits, un lloc que, a la vora de la mar Mediterrani, combina el sol, el mar i la muntanya. Club Golf Terramar ofereix a tots els visitants un recorregut de 18 forats, lloguer de material, zones de pràctiques. Camp ecològic i sostenible: des 2019 el camp es rega amb aigua regenerada de la depuradora de Sitges-Sant Pere de Ribes, d'aquesta manera un petit percentatge de l'aigua regenerada que anava a parar a la mar, es capta i se li dona un tractament terciari per fer-la apta per al reg.

Name: Dutch Kids Golf
Description:
Dutch Kids Open Golf Tour door heel Nederland
Ook in 2025 geweldige banen!
Boys & Girls van 5 t/m 21 jaar 
Kijk op de website voor de speel categorieën 

Wil je Dutch Kids Golf ondersteunen of heb je vragen? 
Neem dan contact met ons op via harald@dutchkidsgolf.nl

Name: Alberta Golf Superintendents Association
Description: We are the Alberta Golf Superintendents Association. Our membership consists of individuals dedicated to the sport of golf and have a passion to ensure Alberta courses are professionally maintained. Currently, we have 191 active members and represent 125 courses across Alberta, which equals 18,000 acres maintained by our association and it's standards and practices.

Name: Aldwickbury Park GC
Description:
Established in 1995 Aldwickbury Park Golf Club is one of the most welcoming golf clubs in Hertfordshire.  Nestled in picturesque parkland on the outskirts of Harpenden, Aldwickbury Park is one of only a handful of clubs in the area that offer two golf courses.  In recent years the Club has earned an excellent reputation for the condition of its golf courses, in particular the greens, that are recorded as some of the truest in the county.  

Aldwickbury Park Golf Club has a thriving membership and welcomes new members to join. Its superb facilities, including the large Fenwick-Ames function suite, make for a popular corporate golf day, wedding and function destination.

Name: The Architects Golf Club
Description:
In 2001, owners Dennis and Larry Turco had a vision to open one of the most renowned golf courses in the world -- one that paid tribute to the great design styles of the game's most prolific architects. Together, they partnered with golf course architect Stephen Kay and Golf Digest Architectural Editor, Ron Whitten, to unveil New Jersey's only legacy course and name it, "The Architects Golf Club." The Architects embodies 70 years of great design styles and is the only course to offer a history lesson in golf course architecture as guests play through their round.

Set alongside Warren County’s luscious, rolling hills, The Architects Golf Club is known for its links-style golf play and beautiful panoramic landscape views and natural imagery. Architects pays tribute to the great golf course architects spanning a golden age of golf course design that spanned from 1885 to 1955. Esteemed golf course architect Stephen Kay, alongside Golf Digest architectural editor Ron Whitten, created the concept, which was then executed and completed by course builders and owners/operators, Larry and Dennis Turco. 

In 2007, another chapter in The Architects Golf Club began with the opening of a new state-of-the-art clubhouse and banquet facility. The spectacular 16,000 square foot clubhouse boasts luxurious space for large social events, golf outings and weddings. In 2019, the clubhouse will be home to the all-new Architects Bar & Grill, which is open to the public year-round, and offers a American cuisine in a pub-style casual dining experience.

Name: Marco Simone Golf & Country Club
Description:
The Marco Simone Golf & Country Club, located just 17 km from the center of Rome, is an ambitious project created by the Biagiotti family. 

As the official venue of the 2023 Ryder Cup, the DS Automobiles Open d'Italia in 2021, 2022, and 2023, and prestigious international competitions, the Marco Simone Golf & Country Club is considered one of the best courses in the world.

Name: The Ancient Links Golf Company
Description:
The Ancient Links Golf Company was established in 2025 with a clear purpose: to protect and elevate golf’s most historic Scottish links by ensuring they remain relevant, playable, and sustainable for future generations. Through a carefully curated portfolio of Scotland’s most significant and historic golf courses, The Ancient Links act as long-term custodians, preserving heritage while supporting modern standards of presentation, performance, and participation. Their ambition is to ensure these courses are not only preserved, but actively played, deeply valued, and experienced by golfers from around the world. 

The Ancient Links' first acquisition is Scotscraig Golf Club, and the group will continue to build its portfolio of historically significant community clubs throughout 2026.

Name: Campo Olímpico de Golfe
Description: O Campo sediou os Jogos Olímpicos 2016, sendo o único Campo Olímpico de golfe do mundo, contando com uma área de 1 milhão de metros quadrados. O campo tem 18 buracos com greens cuidadosamente mantidos, aluguel de carrinhos, driving range, aulas de golfe gratuitas, restaurante, bar e toda estrutura necessária para grandes eventos.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Chapel-en-le-Frith Golf Club
Description:
Welcome to Chapel-en-le-Frith Golf Club

Founded in 1905, Chapel was a challenging 9-hole course until the early 1970s when legendary golf architects, Peter Alliss and Dave Thomas, combined to produce the design for a further 9 holes. With the later acquisition of even more land enabling the original nine holes to be revamped, the resulting 18-hole par 72 course is a real hidden gem. The course is surprisingly flat, being situated in the bottom of the valley with stunning views of the surrounding peak district hills from every hole.

Close to Buxton and picturesque Castleton, Chapel Golf Club is in the heart of the High Peak in Derbyshire.

Name: Arrowood Golf Course
Description:
Arrowood Golf Course is a public facility located in Oceanside, CA. Many holes are bordered by undeveloped riparian habitat, which give the course a feeling of natural seclusion. While the open spaces conduce to a sense of relaxation, the golf holes are not there for the taking; this course will challenge players of all abilities. It’s a concentration roller-coaster. At one instance it invites the player to swing away with abandonment, while the next shot may bring elevation changes, strategic bunkering or a stern breeze to consider. The final four holes, reverently dubbed The Quandary, will test a player’s concentration and fortitude.

In addition to 18 holes of magnificent golf, Arrowood offers upscale amenities for an amazing day with friends and family. With a modernly designed bar and dining area, the luscious views of the golf course are conducive for a memorable pre-golf or 19th hole experience alike. 

For a more relaxed environment, our newest amenity - the Flight Deck - features a Topgolf simulator powered by Toptracer, along with the Hangar Bar, including a rooftop lounge! Play virtual St. Andrews and Pebble Beach while watching your favorite sports team on your designated TV in your bay, and enjoy F&B service and daily drink specials!

Name: Club Valet
Description:
We offer a bespoke mobile ultrasonic golf club valet service to a broad range of golf events across the UK.

With a combination of our state-of-the-art ultrasonic equipment and degreaser,  we provide golfers with a 'good as new' finish before every round of golf in just under 3 minutes!

Name: Sommerfeld AG
Description:
Mit System und Leidenschaft
Das System Sommerfeld ist die Summe unserer fachlichen Leistungen und schafft die Basis, um für unsere Kunden den größtmöglichen Nutzen auf höchstem Niveau zu realisieren. Um dieses Niveau kontinuierlich garantieren zu können, setzen wir auf die Leidenschaft unserer Mitarbeiter für ihre Arbeit – sie ist der wichtigste Baustein unseres Unternehmenserfolges. Unsere ständig weiterqualifizierten Mitarbeiter schaffen es durch ihren persönlichen Einsatz und ihre Kompetenz, nachweislich das Beste aus jedem Golfplatz zu machen und die Verbesserungen zu sichern.

Name: Lancashire Golf

Name: Huddersfield Golf Club
Description: HUDDERSFIELD GOLF CLUB LIMITED is a leading Golf club, based at Fixby Hall in Huddersfield, United Kingdom. Rated in the Top 100 Parkland courses in the UK and current hosts of the DP European Tour Qualifying School.

Name: Worthington Hills Country Club
Description:
Welcome to Worthington Hills — Central Ohio’s Premier Member-Owned Country Club

Experience club life redefined: championship golf, tennis & swim, fine dining, and lifelong friendships — all within a welcoming, member-owned community.

Name: Heron Creek Golf and Country Club
Description:
Nothing Compares to Heron Creek's Country Club Lifestyle.

An active life style within a natural oasis awaits you at Heron Creek. Finding your place in this secure, gated community is quite easy. An extraordinary selection of homes, by prestigious, award-winning home builders, created on spacious home sites, and bordered by shimmering lakes, exquisite fairways, or natural preserves is available for your immediate enjoyment. Once you're here, finding the time to enjoy everything could be your biggest challenge

27-holes of Arthur Hills Designed Championship Golf Course is central to the lifestyle at Heron Creek. Membership plans are available for year-round access to 27 holes of glorious championship golf. With limits on the number of memberships, Heron Creek’s members are afforded the individual attention and access to amenities that their select status deserves. Your golfing experience at Heron Creek will be greatly enhanced by the state-of-the-art Golf Learning Center, where six practice areas and five practice greens allow golfers to perfect all elements of their game.

The Clubhouse is located on a high point at the end of Heron Creek Boulevard, is the focal point of social and golfing activities at the Heron Creek Golf & Country Club. This elegant structure, opened in May, 2005, is the culmination of years of planning and design and of considerable input from Members. It is the finest facility of its kind in North Port and the South Sarasota County area. The Clubhouse is a two-level design encompassing about 21,000 square feet of space. The Upper Level Main Floor, adjacent to the covered main entry, includes the Dining Room, Private Dining Room, Grille Room, kitchen, meeting rooms, restrooms, and administrative offices. Patios and decks adjoin the dining areas. The Lower Level houses the Golf Pro Shop, Men’s and Ladies’ Restrooms & Locker Rooms, and golf cart storage. 

Come see why nothing compares...

Name: OTEPÄÄ GOLF & COUNTRY CLUB
Description:
Golf course at Otepää Golf Center is a full-size PAR 73, that sits in enchanting Southern-Estonian landscape. We are offering You a truly fun to play diverse terrain and the Par 6 hole, rare in Scandinavia. Whenever returning from a round, there is possibility to enjoy warm saunas, glass of favoured drink, nice meal and scenic views to Nature Park and picturesque golf course. 
Our cozy and impressive Clubhouse include all you need for perfect golf day:
- Conference rooms for up to 50 people
- Dressing rooms and saunas
- Pro-shop
- Lounge
- Party tent for up to 200 people.
- Restaurant with 130 seats and terraces

- Golfing lessons in Finnish, English, Estonian and Russian

Challenge us to organize your company's marketing event with perfect program, nice food and competition arrangements.
(ask for tailor made offer info@otepaagolf.com).

Come and play!

Name: Golfen met korting (.nl)
Description: Golfenmetkorting.nl, de website voor golfers, golfbanen en andere bedrijven. Voor de eerlijkste beoordelingen van golfbanen, de beste actuele aanbiedingen en alle faciliteiten en golfbanen van Nederland in èèn overzicht.

Name: GOLF DE LA WANTZENAU
Description:
Situé à une dizaine de kilomètres de Strasbourg, ville siège du Conseil de l’Europe et du Parlement Européen, dont le centre-ville est entièrement classé patrimoine mondial de l’humanité par l’Unesco, le golf de la Wantzenau s’étend sur une région bordée de forêts à proximité du Rhin.

Dessiné par Jeremy Pern, architecte anglais de renom, et assisté de Jean Garaïalde, l’un des meilleurs professionnels que le golf français ait connu, le Golf de La Wantzenau propose un 18 trous très varié où l’eau fait partie intégrante du parcours.

Un espace d’entraînement totalement ouvert au public réunit un parcours 12 trous école, un practice couvert, un practice sur herbe, une aire réservée au petit jeu et deux putting greens.
Dans ce cadre verdoyant de 72 hectares, le club-house résume dans son architecture le remarquable patrimoine alsacien et renferme en son sein un restaurant et un pro-shop aussi chaleureux qu’accueillants.

Name: Bloom Golf Management
Description:
Bloom Golf specializes in golf course management, course acquisitions, capital funding and consulting.

Bloom Golf Management is a talented group of professionals dedicated to providing spectacular golf-related experiences.  Bloom Golf Management is headquartered in Pass Christian, MS on the beautiful Mississippi Gulf Coast. Our current projects are located in Mississippi, Louisiana, and Alabama. We offer full-service golf course management, pursue opportunities for course acquisition, and provide consulting in golf course management, acquisition, agronomy, and sales/marketing.

Our company began in 2014, when Russ Bloom, our President/COO, had the opportunity to purchase The Oaks Golf Club, in Pass Christian, MS. Through the experience of developing the ownership structure, raising capital to pay cash for the club and starting operations without the support of The Oaks’ longtime management company, OB Sports, Bloom Golf Management was created. Since that time, Bloom Golf Management has grown to six courses. Four of the courses are a combination of ownership, using a similar ownership structure to The Oaks Golf Club, and Professional Golf Course Management contracts. The fifth and sixth course are third party Professional Golf Course Management contracts. This unique portfolio gives Bloom Golf Management a connection to owners looking for support. We have personally invested in each ownership projects, we have family and friends who have invested in our projects, and we are fully dedicated to proving everyone a return on their investment. It’s the only way we know how to operate. We will focus on People, Products, and Profit in that order. We learned from the best management company in the business, OB Sports, for 10 years. Combining many of their successful business practices with our own has created a versatile and unique company. Our courses are all success stories, and we plan to keep it this way.

Name: Winghaven Country Club
Description: WingHaven Country Club is a private country club established in 1999, and offers the only Jack Nicklaus Design golf course in St. Louis. A true lifestyle club, you will enjoy large golf practice facilities, Jr. Olympic swimming pool, five dining areas and full calendar of social and golf events for everyone in the family to enjoy.

Name: Cedar Creek Club
Description: Resting on 50 gorgeous lakeside acres, Cedar Creek Club is one of the best-kept secrets in the Cashiers-Highlands area. At 3500 feet, we are the perfect place to unplug from the everyday and reconnect with friends, family and loved ones. We are conveniently located just minutes from Cashiers and a short drive from Highlands and are surrounded by lush national forest. From antique shopping to zip lining above the canopy, Cedar Creek Club sits at the center of it all.

Name: Aspley Guise & Woburn Sands Golf Club
Description:
Aspley Guise & Woburn Sands Golf Club established in 1914, is located between the two villages of Aspley Guise and Woburn Sands on the south side of Milton Keynes on the border between Bedfordshire & Buckinghamshire.
Our mature heathland / parkland course is supported by a modern clubhouse, featuring beautiful curved lines which blend into the natural surroundings. The bar, lounge and restaurant take full advantage of the views with the full-length wrap around balcony on the first floor, offering spectacular views over the course. Our Club and its associated facilities is ideal for golf; society, corporate, business events and internal and external functions.

Name: Berliner Golf & Country Club am Motzener See
Description:
Willkommen beim Berliner Golf & Country Club am Motzener See – einer der renommiertesten Golfclubs in der Hauptstadtregion.
Nur 30 Minuten südlich von Berlin gelegen, bieten wir eine erstklassige 27-Loch-Golfanlage, ein lebendiges Clubleben, sportliche Herausforderungen und entspannte Atmosphäre inmitten wunderschöner Natur.
Ob Mitglieder, Gäste, Turnierveranstalter oder Partner – bei uns steht Qualität, Gastfreundschaft und Professionalität im Mittelpunkt.

Name: The Caversham
Description:
Nestling on the borders of Berkshire and Oxfordshire, near Reading, in the grounds of the historic Mapledurham Estate, lies The Caversham. Boasting a truly challenging Championship Length course of 7,151 yards, superb clubhouse and function facilities.

The Caversham is a unique location for rewarding golf and friendly hospitality. For more information about the golf club, course or Mapledurham Estate, please phone 0118 947 8600 or email: events@thecaversham.co.uk for full details.

Name: Ohio Golf Course Owners Association
Description:
The Ohio Golf Course Owners Association (OGCOA) is committed to supporting, educating, & advocating for golf course owners throughout Ohio.
We offer an array of tools, & professional networking to help you optimize operations, grow your business, & succeed in the golf industry.

Name: Penfield Country Club
Description:
Penfield Country Club is a Private Club that offers 18 holes of Championship Golf, Simulators, Swimming, Tennis, and Formal/Casual Dining Facilities and events for Members and their Guests.  We also offer Banquet Facilities for up to 250 people for private parties and weddings.

As a member owned club, the goal is to provide an outstanding, family oriented recreational experience through a professional staff dedicated to a respectful and considerate atmosphere. Our membership strives for camaraderie and pride in quality programs and services. We assure our financial self sufficiency through cooperative attention to full membership satisfaction, continuous improvement and fiscal prudence

Name: Spring Lake Bath & Tennis Club

Located adjacent to the beautiful Spring Lake beach and boardwalk, the Club is one of the most unique venues of its kind. It boasts spectacular facilities, including a Club House with a ballroom and other dining and banquet rooms, 10 world-class Har-Tru tennis courts, an Olympic-sized saltwater pool, and private access to the beach and ocean.

Name: Wailea Golf LLC
Description: Located at the world renowned Wailea Resort along Maui’s southern coast, Wailea Golf Club is home to three award-winning championship golf courses – the Gold, Emerald and the Blue. Designed by world-renowned architects Robert Trent Jones Jr. and Arthur Jack Snyder, Wailea’s accolades include over 170 honors of achievement; and has proudly welcomed some of golf’s greatest as host of the PGA’s Champions Skins Game and LPGA Skins Game. Wailea Golf Club also includes a premier tennis facility, practice and teaching facility and impressive golf retail shops. Within Wailea Resort, you will find 8 luxury hotel properties, vacation rental townhouses, villas, and penthouses, over 45 dining experiences, five crescent-shaped golden sand beaches, spas, shopping and more.

Name: SureGolf
Description: SureGolf is a leading golf academy dedicated to helping golfers of all skill levels elevate their game and achieve their golfing goals ! SureGolf is owned by Certified Coach Amit Dube :#NationalGolfAcademyOfIndia , Specialized in @mytpi & @u.s.kidsgolf training ! - Our golf lessons are tailored to individuals and groups, focusing on swing mechanics, short game skills, course management, and mental approach. We provide swing analysis using advanced video analysis tools to offer personalized feedback and improvement strategies. Discover the SureGolf experience and join us in elevating your game to new heights. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced golfer

Name: T-O Mirabel
Description:
T‑O Mirabel, c’est une destination unique où le golf rencontre le divertissement, la gastronomie et l’expérience sociale.
Pensé comme un lieu de rencontre moderne et accessible, T‑O propose bien plus qu’un simple centre de loisirs.

Sous un même toit — ou sur le toit — vous trouverez :

 un bar d’ambiance,

T‑O Mirabel a été conçu pour rassembler : les passionnés de sport, les groupes d’amis, les familles et les entreprises en quête d’un moment original, dynamique.

Name: TIDEWATER
Description:
TIDEWATER is a member only club located in Downtown Charleston featuring a cocktail bar, indoor golf simulators, pickleball, and private events throughout the year for members and their guests. 

TIDEWATER is an enclave for the next generation of leaders. We are fostering a community of members that come together to play, compete, and connect. We are cultivating a space where camaraderie thrives and ambitions are shared, creating an environment that blends the pursuit of excellence and the joy of belonging.  

We're building a community of the next generation of leaders in Charleston.

Name: Inicio Solutions
Description:
Inicio comes from the Latin to Inspire.  We believe that in working together we will inspire solutions to your business through a broad range of consulting and management services.

Our inspiration comes from over 25 years of experience across multiple venues providing specialist assistance to improve, grow and develop Golf, Health and Fitness, Wellness, Hotel, Spa and Hospitality business.  

From the ground up, a detailed understanding of the needs of the customer, identification of opportunities, best practice and the delivery of growth from an entrepreneurial standpoint.  

Years of discovering opportunities with appropriate solutions, strategic growth and providing the breadth of knowledge that will help your business realise its potential.

Description: ALPINE HILLS TENNIS & SWIMMING CLUB is a company based out of 4139 ALPINE ROAD, PORTOLA VALLEY, California, United States.

Name: Granite Bay Golf Club
Description: Granite Bay Golf Club is Northern California’s premier golf facility. Granite Bay is a Certified Audubon International Signature Sanctuary with a championship golf course designed by Robert Trent Jones Jr. and Kyle Phillips.

Name: Galway Bay Golf
Description:
Championship Golf on Ireland’s Atlantic Edge
Nestled along the spectacular shores of Galway Bay, our 18-hole championship course is regarded as one of the finest golfing experiences in Ireland. Designed by Ryder Cup legend Christy O’Connor Jnr., the course blends the natural beauty of the west coast with a challenge worthy of the game’s most discerning players. Every round is shaped by the ever-changing Atlantic winds, ensuring no two days are ever the same.
From the first tee to the final green, players are treated to panoramic views of Galway Bay, the rugged Clare hills, and the Wild Atlantic Way coastline. Mature trees, concealed bunkers, water hazards, and acclaimed putting surfaces combine to create a course that is as visually inspiring as it is technically rewarding. At 7,308 yards from the championship tees, it is a true and fair test for golfers of every level.

Christy O’Connor Jnr.’s vision was to craft a course that captures the spirit of Irish golf, dramatic landscapes, strategic challenges, and an intimate connection to nature. 
Whether you’re visiting Galway for the first time or returning to test yourself again, our team ensures every golfer receives a warm Irish welcome. Tee times can be booked easily online, with rental clubs, buggies, and trolleys available on site.

A New Era: The Hawthorn by Galway Bay
Opening in Spring 2026, The Hawthorn by Galway Bay will redefine luxury hospitality on Ireland’s west coast – and it will be right here on our grounds.
This five-star luxury hotel will bring together world-class hospitality and the natural serenity of Galway Bay. At Galway Bay Golf, we are committed to delivering exceptional golfing experiences while preserving and celebrating the natural beauty of our surroundings. With the opening of The Hawthorn by Galway Bay, we are entering a new chapter – one where championship golf and five-star luxury hospitality meet on the edge of the Atlantic.

Name: Golfclub Lauswolt
Description:
Golf & Country Club Lauswolt is een prachtige 18-holes golfbaan, heeft een gezellig restaurant en een driving range en ligt op het Friese landgoed Lauswolt in Beetsterzwaag. Op de golfbaan heerst een weldadige rustige sfeer. Het enige dat er te horen is, zijn de geluiden uit de natuur. U zult hier genieten van de golfsport.

De golfbaan bestaat uit twee lussen van negen holes die afwisselend door bos, open weide en waterpartijen lopen. De baan ligt op een terrein van ruim 100 hectare naast het Bilderberghotel Lauswolt. Bos en water zijn in het golfspel steeds aanwezig en recht slaan is een noodzaak. De greens zijn lastiger dan ze op het eerste gezicht lijken maar zijn schitterend.

Na het golfen, is het goed vertoeven in het sfeervolle restaurant in het clubhuis waar een drankje en een heerlijke maaltijd genuttigd kan worden.
 
Sinds 2014 is Golf & Country Club Lauswolt volledig GEO-gecertificeerd. Dit houdt in dat er bij het beheer van de baan veel aandacht is voor natuur en milieu. De golfclub gaat duurzaam om met watergebruik, kunstmest en energie. 

Voor vragen en reserveringen kunt u contact opnemen via 0512 38 35 90.

Website www.golfclublauswolt.nl | Email algemeen@golfclublauswolt.nl | Twitter en Facebook @gclauwolt.

Name: The Hertfordshire Golf and Country Club
Description:
At the Hertfordshire, golf isn't just a game; it's a way of life. We have dedicated ourselves to the extraordinary game of golf since the year 1995. Our magnificent 18-hole golf course was designed by renowned course designer Jack Nicklaus II, who inherited his exceptional skills, talent and dedication from his celebrated father Jack Nicklaus I.

We welcome members and non-members to play golf at The Hertfordshire. We also have an extensive driving range that is also open to non-members. We look forward to seeing you at The Hertfordshire.

El Macero, a Country Club for today, welcoming all to enjoy our relaxed, family friendly lifestyle. Choose your experience; golf, swimming, tennis, food, wine, friends and laughter. 

Enjoy championship golf testing the professionals and easy on the recreational golfer. 

El Macero Country Club is a singular country club experience like no other in Northern California. Social activities ensure fun for everyone with a committed staff that caters to your experience. 

El Macero Country Club, is a home away from home where we invite our members to relax and enjoy life and join us.

Name: Sycamore Creek Country Club
Description:
Welcome to Sycamore Creek Country Club, the premier private club in the south Dayton region.  

Founded in 1959, Sycamore Creek Country Club is home to a community of members from Springboro, Centerville and surrounding areas. We specialize in providing an exceptional country club experience for families, couples, individuals and business professionals through our dynamic programming, warm hospitality and expertly maintained facilities. Club amenities include golf, tennis, swimming, fine and casual dining and a variety of social events...there is truly something for everyone here.

Name: Willow Creek Country Club
Description:
Willow Creek Country Club is a premier family friendly club in Sandy, Utah. Nestled against the dramatic Wasatch Mountains, just 30 minutes from downtown Salt Lake City.

The 150 acre, 18-hole golf course is tended with utmost care and kept groomed to full lushness. Members enjoy dramatic views of the Wasatch Mountains while playing golf on our long, challenging, but playable course.

Name: Studio Golf
Description: Your All-in-one Private Golf Club Experience

Name: Legends’ MyShop
Description:
Legends' MyShop is the e-commerce solution of choice for public and private clubs (golf, tennis, maritime) to leverage and offer club-logoed apparel and accessories that can be sent directly to club members and customers. 
In partnership with the PGA of America, the MyShop e-commerce platform allows clubs to introduce new apparel and accessory brands to their members on their websites, without incurring incremental capital costs associated with building retail space or the inventory risk linked to carrying new product lines. Club partners can select from high-end boutique lines to more well-known value brands, catering to a variety of budgets. The MyShop platform is seamlessly integrated into any club's website, allowing members and customers to simply click on a designated tab on the club's homepage and be taken to a new and enhanced shopping experience that is available year-round.

Name: TPC Colorado
Description:
Located in Berthoud, Colorado, the 18-hole championship golf course features sweeping views of Longs Peak and the full range of the Rocky Mountains and is designed around the natural landscape of Lonetree, McNeil and Welch Reservoirs.

The 865-acre property is encompassed by the Heron Lakes master-planned residential community and features a grand Clubhouse with two restaurants, seven private event locations, a resort-style pool, golf simulator hitting bays and fitness facility. The property also contains a marina with access to the Lonetree Lake Club.

TPC Colorado is host to the Korn Ferry TOUR’s The Ascendant presented by Blue since its inauguration in 2019.

Name: The Golf Group

We’re here to grow the game through innovative new formats, events that drive inclusivity and accessibility and digital marketing.
