compact driving range, inclusive of
sheltered bays and lighting, all delivered in
just 30 metres. Incorporating the latest ball
tracer technology within a fully enclosed
net and with an astro surface.

Name: Copt Heath Golf Club
Description: Copt Heath Golf Club combines the history and tradition of a golf course that first opened in 1907 with modern facilities and a unfriendly, welcoming atmosphere. Each year the club stages the Peter McEvoy Trophy, an open tournament for junior boys and girls.

Name: Pinewoods Golf Club By Exhicon
Description: Passionate about golf? Join us at Pinewoods Golf Club By EXHICON, where every swing is a chance to elevate your game and connect with fellow enthusiasts. Whether you're a seasoned pro or just starting, our pristine courses offer the perfect backdrop for unforgettable rounds. Experience top-notch facilities, expert coaching, and a vibrant community of like-minded individuals. Take your love for golf to new heights with us! #GolfLife #Community #SwingIntoAction

Name: The Club at Pasadera
Description: The Club at Pasadera is an exclusive country club set away in the Monterey Peninsula's sunbelt on a 575-acre gated residential community. Pasadera is home to first-rate tennis, swimming, and exercise facilities, a Jack Nicklaus Signature Golf Course, and a 38,000-square-foot modern clubhouse.

Name: STERF (Scandinavian Turfgrass and Environment Research Foundation)
Description: Leading international center of expertise within golf course and turfgrass management/Nordic golf federations joint research body.

Name: Royal Auckland and Grange Golf Club
Description: Auckland's premier private club facility boasting a world-class 27 hole Nicklaus designed golf course

Name: Grosse Pointe Yacht Club
Description: At Grosse Pointe Yacht Club, we take immense pride in offering our members an exclusive community where camaraderie thrives. Through our premier programs and amenities, expertly delivered by our dedicated, professional hospitality team, we ensure long-term member engagement. Our commitment to excellence creates a premier yachting and waterfront lifestyle, where every member enjoys unparalleled experiences and lasting connections.

Name: Kristianstads Golfklubb och Destination
Description:
Kristianstad Golfclub and destination operates two golf courses and offers first class facilities: driving range, instructors, padel and restaurant. 

East Course
East Course in Åhus is considered by many as one of the best golf courses in Sweden and was ranked #3 in Sweden 2020.

West Course
West Course is a golf course planned for all categories of golfers.

The golf club was founded in 1924 and had at the time 9 holes on the firing range in Rinkaby. In 1938 the golf club moved its 38 members to Åhus and the foundation of today’s East Course was built with 9 holes. In 1969 the golf course expanded to 18 holes and had 343 members. The first renovation of East Course was made in 1992. The second renovation was made in 2016 with the help of golf course architects Pierre Fulke och Adam Mednickson. In 2017 the new East Course was inaugurated.

Name: Laguna National Golf Resort Club
Description:
A prominent club in the local and regional golf scene since its inauguration in 1993, Laguna National is one of Singapore’s premier golf and country clubs. Laguna National boasts two 18-hole championship courses that have won prestigious accolades and hosted international championships, including the European Tour’s Singapore Masters, the Korean LPGA’s ADT Caps Tour Championship and European and Asian Tour co-sanctioned event, The Championship at Laguna National.

Following a multimillion-dollar facelift, Laguna National has developed a state-of-the-art union of a world-class golf club and a 206-room and golfer chalet Dusit Thai-branded hotel with full facilities including a spa, a learning and practice facility, a fitness centre, as well as Member-exclusive areas with private locker rooms, Members’ lounges and country club facilities.

Strategically located in proximity to the airport, beach, malls and with a multimillion-dollar private clubhouse and hotel, golfers will find the world at their fingertips at Laguna National Golf Resort Club.

Laguna National Golf Resort Club have won various prestigious accolades and hosted events including the Singapore Masters, Korean LPGA ADT Caps Tour Championship, Prudential Causeway Trophy and The Championship at Laguna National.

• A European Tour-Asian Tour co-sanctioned event – The Championship at Laguna National

• Second edition of the Prudential Causeway Trophy at Laguna National

• Inaugural Prudential Junior Causeway Trophy at Laguna National

Name: Domaine du Mont-Saint-Jean
Description:
Le Domaine du Mont-Saint-Jean est situé dans le Haut-Jura, au cœur de la station des Rousses, à deux kilomètres de la frontière Suisse.

Ce site de 60 hectares fondé sur les terres d’une ancienne ferme jurassienne, bénéficie d’une situation géographique unique, proposant des vues exceptionnelles sur les plus grands massifs jurassiens, à proximité de Genève et de Lausanne.

Il propose à ses membres et visiteurs un golf de montagne 18 trous qui enchantera l’ensemble des joueurs par sa diversité et son atmosphère.

Au-delà de son parcours, le Domaine du Mont-Saint-Jean c’est aussi une table de qualité et un Hôtel*** lui permettant de vous accompagner au rythme des saisons.

L’Équipe est impatiente de vous accueillir prochainement dans ce lieu unique et atypique offrant une véritable bouffée d’oxygène.

Name: La Gorce Country Club
Description: La Gorce Country Club is one of the most exclusive country clubs in South Florida.  Membership is by invitation only. Only individuals nominated by existing members are able to apply.

Name: Wellesley Country Club
Description: Wellesley Country Club is a family-oriented club whose members enjoy a wide variety of recreational and social opportunities. Founded in 1910, our club combines the best of both one hundred years of tradition and modern country club life.

Name: Middle Atlantic PGA
Description:
The Middle Atlantic Section of The PGA (MAPGA), located in Stafford, Virginia, is one of 41 Sections of The Professional Golfers’ Association of America, headquartered in Frisco, Texas.

The MAPGA has been a part of The PGA since 1925, and consists of over 1,100 members and apprentices in Maryland, Virginia, the District of Columbia, and small portions of Pennsylvania and West Virginia. Over 900,000 golfers play more than 16.5 million rounds of golf a season in the Middle Atlantic region.

As player development remains a driving force in the golf industry, the MAPGA provides a wide variety of programs and assistance to support its members who teach the game, promote goodwill and share the game’s values with their golfing customers and communities in general. Locally, MAPGA Professionals assist in raising over $6 million annually for charities.

Contact Us
Phone: (540) 720-7420
Email: midatl@pgahq.com
Address: 1 PGA Drive, Stafford, VA, 22554

Name: Jupiter Island Club
Description:
Jupiter Island Club is one of the most distinguished private clubs in the country, proudly recognized as a Platinum Club of America. The Club offers an unmatched setting where tradition, understated elegance, and warm hospitality come together. 

Our Members enjoy world-class amenities, including an oceanfront Beach Club, an 18-hole golf course along the Intracoastal Waterway, a yacht basin, tennis and croquet courts, a spa and fitness center, a 200-seat theater, multiple dining venues, and beautifully appointed accommodations. Behind these offerings is a team of exceptional employees who bring the Club to life each day. 

At the Jupiter Island Club, our culture is collaborative, family-focused, and hospitality-driven. We believe our Employees are our greatest asset, and we are committed to providing a supportive environment where people can learn, grow, and achieve their professional goals. With a highly seasonal operation and a strong emphasis on teamwork, flexibility, and excellence, our Employees have the opportunity to be part of something special, delivering unique experiences to our Members while developing rewarding careers in hospitality. 

If you’re looking for a workplace that values professionalism, respect, and pride in service, we invite you to explore opportunities with the Jupiter Island Club. Join us and discover why we are consistently ranked among the very best clubs in the world.

Name: Hillsborough Golf Club Limited
Description:
Founded in 1920, Hillsborough Golf Club is celebrating its Centenary Year. 

Renowned as being one of the best golfing venues in the North of England and set in the beautiful hills of Sheffield, the course gives some truly fantastic and panoramic views over the Steel City and surrounding countryside.

Name: Norges Dijon Bourgogne Country Club
Description:
Bienvenue au Country Club de Norges Dijon Bourgogne !

Situés aux portes de Dijon, les 160 hectares de forêt du Golf de Norges vous offrent un cadre exceptionnel à seulement quelques kilomètres du centre ville et de sa célèbre Cité internationale de la gastronomie et du vin. Créé en 1971 par le célèbre architecte Mickaël Fenn, le parcours dit des "Grands Crus" composait de 9 trous, puis dans les années 80 sous l'impulsion de Jacques Laffite, se transforma en 18 trous, épousant parfaitement la forêt de Norges la Ville. 

Séminaires en Bourgogne ? Réunions près de Dijon ou encore conférences en Côte d’Or ? 
Le Country Club de Norges Dijon Bourgogne vous offre une alternative dépaysante tout en changeant d’air pour organiser vos réunions dans un cadre exceptionnel : celui du Country Club de Norges où tous vos événements d’entreprise prennent vie et changent d’envergure.

À bientôt sur le parcours des "Grands Crus"

L'Équipe du Country Club de Norges Dijon Bourgogne

Name: Golf District
Description:
Golf courses lose revenue to no-shows and last-minute cancellations—while golfers miss out on the tee times they actually want or are left stuck when plans change.

Golf District fixes both with a prepaid, non refundable course-controlled platform embedded directly on the course’s own website. It locks in revenue and gives golfers the flexibility to resell their tee time if plans change—so another golfer can book it instead of it going unused.

Built by industry veterans and backed by leaders across golf, ticketing, and hospitality, Golf District redefines modern demand in public golf and puts operators back in control.

With Golf District, courses can:
	•	Eliminate no-shows with prepaid, non-refundable bookings
	•	Earn 100% on each round plus revenue share on every resale
	•	Reduce pro shop calls with no-cost support and automated tools
	•	Grow customer lifetime value with data-driven upsells and direct relationships

Golf District delivers a win-win: more revenue and control for courses—directly on their own site—and more flexibility and access for golfers. 

Officially launched July 2024, the team is made up of golf, technology and hospitality industry vets.

Name: Silkeborg Golfklub
Description: Silkeborg Golfklub provides some of the best golf facilities in Denmark, and was hosting the European Tour event Made in Denmark in 2018, along with the regular hosting of the Ecco Tour and Danish International Amateur Championship DIAC. The club is situated in central Jutland in the heart of the Lake District. In Silkeborg you will find a 27 hole classic forest course which has hosted numerous international golf events. The club has 1650 members and offers business program of great value, Company Days, inhouse golf and fitness training facilities, restaurant as well as a pro-center with shop, club fitting and training possibilities on an international level.

Name: Pine Lake Country Club
Description: Pine Lake Country Club is proud to be the premier family club in Southeast Michigan that has it all. Featuring a Willie Park Jr Design, 18-Hole Championship Golf Course, newly updated Indoor and Outdoor Tennis Courts, Olympic Size Swimming Pool, state of the art Fitness Center. Our magnificent clubhouse overlooks beautiful, private Pine Lake and offers a Lounge, Lake Room, Formal Dining Room and Members Grill, all highlighting dazzling lake views. Our lakefront dining options also include an expansive Patio, Terrace and Deck area. Join the PLCC family today!

Name: Amata Spring Country Club
Description:
Amata Spring Country Club was established in 2005 with the vision of creating the Kingdom of Thailand’s first world-class, private members golf club.

Renowned golf course architect Lee Schmidt from Schmidt-Curley Design designed the tournament standard layout which has been awarded numerous accolades including Thailand’s Best Golf Course.

Routing takes players through a varied array of distinctive holes requiring a full range of thoughtful shot-making. The signature hole is the famous 17th, a daunting and memorable par three featuring Asia’s only floating island green which is only accessible by boat.

Amata prides itself on peerless course conditions with perfectly manicured tee-to-green surfaces and has hosted numerous international professional events with no fewer than 20 major winners facing the challenges of the testing 7500-yard course.

Name: Golf Club de Kinshasa
Description: An 18 hole golf course and country club in Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of Congo. Amenities include tennis courts, Padel courts and squash courts and a restaurant : "Le Cercle Gourmand" with fine French and world cuisine.

Name: The National Golf Club
Description: The National is a private members golf club comprising of four championship courses all ranked inside Australia’s top 45.

Name: Club de Golf Chapultepec
Description: Club de Golf

Name: Lisbon Sports Club
Description:
The Lisbon Sports Club (LSC), founded in 1861, has its origins in the Lisbon Cricket Club, which started within the British community resident in the region of Lisbon and mostly linked to the Railway Industry.

The construction, ten years later, of the bullfighting ring in Campo Pequeno (where LSC had been created), led to its first change of place and the abandonment of Lisbon.  Its next home was a property in Algés, where for the first time it boasted a 6-hole golf course.  This was however a temporary solution, and in 1914 LSC was transferred to the Eastern Telegraph Company property in Carcavelos.  This is where the Lisbon Golf Cup was created (it is still contested today).  LSC itself was only officially founded in 1922, when it acquired a land in Alto da Ajuda and 9 holes with greens made of sand mixed with oil.

When in the early 1960's, the Lisbon City Council began a process of expropriation of land in the Alto da Ajuda, the Club was forced to seek a new place to settle, and moved to the Casal da Carregueira in Belas, opening its first 9 holes in 1964.

Later on five more holes were added and LSC survived for many years with only 14 holes (to complete 18, holes numbers 2,3,4 and 5 were played once again – not a successful solution).  In 1992 the last four holes were finally opened.

Name: Glen Oaks Club
Description: Glen Oaks Club is a private country club in Old Westbury, New York

Name: Bastide de la Salette
Description:
La Bastide de la Salette est idéalement située aux portes de la cité phocéenne, 70 hectares de verdure nichés dans les collines de Marcel Pagnol, à 10 min du Vieux Port. La Bastide de la Salette fait partie du réseau Open Golf Club.

Pour les golfeurs:
Venez découvrir le parcours court et vallonné de 18 trous – PAR 72 de 5402 mètres – tracé dans un jardin provençal, qui offre des vues spectaculaires sur le massif du Garlaban et la ville de Marseille.

Un practice public, deux putting green et un parcours compact sont à votre disposition pour permettre à tous de s’entraîner et de s’initier au golf dans les meilleures conditions.

Dans ce cadre unique et loin du bruit de la ville, le restaurant avec terrasse ombragée de la Bastide de la Salette avec terrasse ombragée est implantée au pied du green, idéal pour vos déjeuners d'affaire.

Vous recherchez un lieu, pour organiser votre journée d'étude, formation, présentation de produits ou autres évènements professionnels, la Bastide de la Salette dispose  de 7 salles de réceptions, de 25 m² à 270 m², toutes à la lumière du jour, avec accès gratuit au WIFI, et peuvent accueillir jusqu’à 250 personnes.

La Bastide de la Salette peut également accueillir vos événements familiaux. L'Equipe du golf est heureuse de vous accueillir dans ces moments forts et met son expérience au service de votre manifestation.

Name: Windsong Farm Golf Club
Description:
Newly renowned as the only private club in Minnesota to offer not one, but two meticulously crafted courses. Each uniquely designed course has been expertly crafted to challenge and inspire.  Members are treated to an extraordinary golfing experience across both the North and South courses, each offering its own distinct charm, challenge, and character. Surrounded by panoramic vistas and embraced by the tranquil beauty of the Midwest, Windsong Farm Golf Club transcends mere recreation.

North Course
Designed by renowned course architect John Fought, the North Course at Windsong Farm is the perfect addition to the golf landscape of the upper Midwest.

South Course
Host to countless USGA events, the Trans-Mississippi Amateur Championship, and a great test of golf for all ages, the South Course at Windsong Farm is ready for your best.

Name: Castle Pines Golf Club
Description: Castle Pines Golf Club is a nationally ranked private golf club located in Castle Rock, Colorado. Positioned among the top 50 golf clubs in the United States, we pride ourselves on providing The Best Day of Golf in America and an overall exceptional caliber of service and experience for our Members and their guests.

Name: Cedar Brae Golf Club
Bokskogens Golfclub
Description:
Bokskogens Golf Club, one of the finest in the country, offering two unique courses, each in a different environment. The entrance to the course have often been selected most beautiful golfentrance in Sweden. Driving into the beech forest and follow it into the club and then walk out into this nature with old beech and oak trees and holes by the lake Yddingen.

The Old Course with its generous fairways, water hazards and large immaculate putting surfaces, challenges club players and professionals alike. With six tees, there is a choice for all players. The Kings Course has slightly narrower fairways and smaller greens and puts the focus on accuracy of the short game. The Bokskogen Old Course has hosted European Tour events on several occasions, such as the PLM Open and the SEO. The course record is held by Jose Maria Olazabal. Bokskogen has also hosted The Boys European Championship and in 2011, the first Team World Championship for Disabled Golfers. It was the venue for the Tour Championship on the Scandinavian Tour in 2013 and 2014. It hosted the Annika Invitational Europe 2016. A must play for all golfers. Bokskogens GK is the home of two time Ryder Cup player Peter Hanson.

With a few steps back in time, it is easy to realize that Bokskogens GK is located on historic ground. At the Kings course 6th hole, King Karl XII and his horse rested under the large oaktree. In year 1845 the Crown prince Karl, who was later crowned King Karl XV, visited and a memorial stone was raised by Duke Stig Thott from Skabersjö castle.

Name: Beyond The Baselines
Description:
Beyond The Baselines is a full-service consultancy aimed at educating and advising country club and club governing bodies and committees.at every level. Drawing on the world-wide experience of our team members in the club, tennis, fitness marketing and advertising industries, we provide a peripheral yet substantial viewpoint of all club operations. We look to improve both the member and guest experience while educating the governing body, general manager and directors in best business practices to create a “best-in-class” program and staff.

Far too often we find that club managers, search and tennis committees and governing boards do not understand the true business behind the tennis and fitness departments. From employment practices and law through to marketing and communications, club governing bodies are not truly knowledgeable in the businesses of tennis and fitness and our aim is to educated and advise these bodies. Improving communication between Directors of Tennis and Fitness with Boards and Committees along with educating clubs in regard to the business of tennis and fitness is our priority.

Name: Clear Creek Tahoe
Description:
Clear Creek is on the eastern slope of the Carson Range, conveniently just 20 minutes from both Incline Village and the ski slopes of Heavenly. Yet it is spectacularly unspoiled – 2,136 acres surrounded by the six million acres of the largest national forest in the lower 48. Golf designed by Coore & Crenshaw, ranked the #1 private course in Nevada and #131 in the country by Golf Digest.

Your home here will be a natural refuge … forever. Clear Creek is also reassuringly private – a private community and club since its inception. Homesites currently available.

Name: Golftourismus - Dein Guide für Golfreisen
Description:
Für Reisebüros und Reiseveranstalter:
Ebenfalls unterstützt das Buch bei der Produktentwicklung für Golfreisen, gibt Einblicke in buchungsstarke Destinationen wie Mallorca, Portugal, Südafrika oder die Türkei und bietet Checklisten für die Zusammenstellung von Golfurlaub mit Flug, Hotel und Greenfee. Reisebüros profitieren von Verkaufsargumenten, die sich an den realen Bedürfnissen von Golfurlaubern orientieren.

Für Golfurlauber:
Das Buch bietet Orientierung für alle, die einen Golfurlaub planen, neue Golfreiseziele entdecken oder ihren Aufenthalt mit Wellness, Kulinarik und Kultur verbinden möchten. Es hilft bei der Auswahl von Golfhotels mit Greenfeeangeboten, liefert Empfehlungen für Golfresorts am Meer und bietet konkrete Tipps für Golfurlaub mit Hund, für Anfänger, für Paare oder für Senioren.

Für Golf-Pros:
Professionelle PGA-Trainer finden im Buch "Golftourismus - Dein Guide für Golfreisen" Anregungen zur Gestaltung von Golfreisen mit Trainingsprogramm, Empfehlungen für Standorte mit guter Infrastruktur für Golfunterricht und Hinweise, welche Destinationen besonders bei Anfängern oder ambitionierten Freizeitspielern gefragt sind.

Name: Golf La Tempête
Description:
Le Club de Golf La Tempête de Lévis est le tout premier parcours de golf de calibre international de la région de Québec.

Conçu par un architecte de réputation, Darrell J. Huxham, le parcours est construit sur une superficie totale de 200 acres, dont plus de 40 acres de bent grass, un gazon de qualité supérieure.

Le design unique de 7 203 verges, le chalet somptueux, le service de restauration et de bar signé par le Bonne Entente, font en sorte que La Tempête est, sans contredit, le club de golf le plus spectaculaire de la région.

//

The La Tempête Golf Club in Lévis is the Québec City area’s very first world-class golf course.

Designed by renowned architect Darrell J. Huxham, the course layout covers 200 acres, including 40 acres of premium-quality bent grass.

With its unique 7,203-yard design, lavish clubhouse, restaurant and bar managed by the Bonne Entente, La Tempête is without a doubt the region’s most spectacular golf course.

Name: KBG Club
Description: " Elevate Life at KBG Club  | Sports, Dining, Wellness & More! | State-of-the-art facilities, trendy cafes, rejuvenating wellness, and a kids zone!  | Host events in style at our banquets & lawns.  #KBGClub #LuxuryLiving"

Name: Golf y Turf S.A.S
Description: Líder en la importación y distribución de carros eléctricos, maquinaria, sistema de riego y accesorios para campos de golf

Name: Caddies Europe
Description:
Caddies Europe is a golf group structured as an investment company, operating in four countries with more than 100,000 golfers as customers and partnerships with over 300 golf facilities.

Our largest portfolio company, GolfStar, is Northern Europe’s leading Multi-Course Operator (MCO), active across 30 golf courses and 26 facilities: 20 in Sweden, 5 in Finland, and 1 in Spain.

Name: Windermere Golf and Country Club
Description:
Created in 1957, the Club selected Clifford “Robbie” Robinson as the designer for its course. Robinson, a former associate for the legendary Canadian golf architect Stanley Thompson—the man behind Jasper and Banff—was thrilled by the fascinating land selected by the nascent club and was convinced he could create something timeless. It turned out he was correct. 

Two years later, with more than 250 new members anxiously awaiting the opening of the course, the first nine holes opened for play and Windermere built a new clubhouse, which would be destroyed in a fire in 1964.

Over time Windermere became known as a “golfer’s club” in Edmonton, and its course, which stretches to nearly 6,800 yards from the tips, was recognized as one of the strongest in Western Canada. Now in the Top 100 in Canada, according to SCOREGolf magazine, Windermere has been tested regularly by the top golfers on PGA Tour Canada, and was one of the favourites of the players, many of whom now play on the PGA Tour. 

In recent years the course has been under the watchful eye of Doug Carrick, the Toronto architect known throughout for his smart designs in places ranging from Newfoundland to Scotland. Carrick is enthusiastic about Windermere’s future: “You’re always trying to make a course better, but that’s not easy with Windermere because it is already a very solid test of golf in a really incredible setting.”

In 2009 members voted to support the creation of a new clubhouse where the traditions of the game were met with modern amenities. The clubhouse opened to much fanfare two years later.

Throughout it all Windermere remains true to its roots. It is a golf club where the game is taken seriously, but where golf brings about fun and enjoyment. A place to test your abilities with friends in an atmosphere where members respect the sport and each other.

Windermere—serious golf for serious golfers.

Name: Golf Sustainability
Description: Golf Sustainability is dedicated to serving the industry with information, connections and inspiration to advance sustainability of the environment and the game of golf for future generations. We’re committed to forming a coalition of industry leaders and organizations who are aligned with our mission. Follow us for daily insights on golf sustainability.

Name: Palm Beach Country Club
Description:
Palm Beach Country Club was established in 1953 and is located on the island of Palm Beach.  Our membership embraces a sense of shared tradition, civility, high standards of personal conduct and commitment to excellent staff, services, and facilities. 
 
Our staff is comprised of some of the best-in-class hospitality service providers, and we pride ourselves on having happy, healthy, long-term employment relationships with our team.  We are honored to work with professionals that are highly motivated, passionate, knowledgeable, and dedicated to the art of creating lasting memories for our members.  We offer competitive benefits, pay, and a work environment built on teamwork and genuine camaraderie. 
 
It is our goal to offer a diverse environment where your individual aspirations are fulfilled and your quality of life enhanced. 

Please note that the Club is closed from June-September each year.  During this period, the only hourly positions available for immediate hire are in the outside Golf Maintenance department.  Candidates who are seeking visa sponsorship should look for available opportunities online through the state website.

Name: Bela Vista Country Club
Description: O Clube Bela Vista apresenta um ambiente rico de beleza, com uma grande área verde cuidadosamente conservada. Áreas disponíveis para o esporte, para cuidar da saúde, para eventos e lazer, sem esquecer das delícias gastronômicas nos restaurantes do local. Você tem toda a estrutura para usufruir, onde é possível encontrar amigos para dias de entretenimento, assar um churrasco, desfrutar da piscina, fazer atividades físicas, relaxar na sauna, entre tantas outras opções.

Name: UGolf International
Description: UGolf International is a golf management company, extension of Ugolf, to expand our operations worldwide.

Name: ClubGrub
Description: From golf courses and halfway houses to pools and ToGo orders, ClubGrub delivers modern, on-demand hospitality that boosts profitability, reduces costs, speeds up pace of play, and elevates dining experiences—with minimal effort. Innovate your operation in minutes, not days. Featured in Golf Digest, Forbes, Golf Inc., and Club + Resort Business.

Name: PT Karabha Digdaya
Description:
PT Karabha Digdaya, berdiri sejak 1989 merupakan perusahaan yang bergerak dibidang penyedia lapangan Golf eksklusif (Emeralda Golf) dan Properti (Cimanggis Golf Estate dan Umma Arsa Estate)

Kami bangga menjadi bagian dari ekosistem yang lebih besar, dengan Kementerian Keuangan sebagai pemegang saham utama, yang mendukung visi kami untuk pertumbuhan berkelanjutan.

Kami menjunjung tinggi nilai-nilai perusahaan kami (PASTI: Profesional, Adaptif, Sinergi, Teamwork, dan Integritas). Nilai-nilai ini membimbing setiap langkah kami dalam memberikan layanan terbaik kepada pelanggan dan mitra.

Mari bergabung dalam perjalanan kami untuk membangun masa depan yang lebih baik dan harmonis!

Name: Driving the Green
Description:
Driving the Green shares stories, ideas and solutions to create a more inclusive, regenerative, fun and sustainable world in and around golf.

Our Vision:
A future where golf provides a foundation to create equity, prosperity and sustainability for the communities where the game lives.

How We Win:
- By creating a community and educational platform where passions for social and environmental justice intertwine with golf, sports and sustainability.
- By exploring golf's economic, social and ecological impact to highlight existing harmonies and discover potential opportunities that link the golf industry to its supporting communities.
- By empowering golf industry leaders to circulate sustainable solutions and best practices to bring regenerative opportunities to the mainstream.

Name: Espiche Campo de Golfe
Description:
Located within a nature reserve and just ten minutes from Lagos, Espiche Clubhouse & Golf is an eco-resort which has been perfectly integrated into the surrounding natural environment and offers a unique and authentic experience in the western Algarve.

Preservation, conservation and innovation of resource management are at the heart of Espiche Golf & Clubhouse.  The 18 hole, par 72 golf course was designed to integrate effortlessly into the surrounding Algarve countryside and the indigenous flora and fauna of the area have been preserved, in keeping with the company ethos of nature preservation and conservation.  This commitment to maintaining natural resources is one that we believe will allow Espiche Clubhouse & Golf to continuously contribute to a sustainable future.

The Espiche Golf Clubhouse, which is also home to the Gecko restaurant, has been awarded internationally for its architecture, design and environmental efficiency, in reference to both the choice of materials used for the building and in its resource management.  The exceptional location of the Clubhouse, situated on top of a hill overlooking the resort, offers breathtaking views across the golf course and the nature reserve.  The views, coupled with the exceptional quality of the food available, makes the Clubhouse a reference for both lovers of golf and those who value the tranquility and beauty of nature itself.

Name: Swing City Golf
Description:
The newest golfing + entertainment venue now open in Bella Vista. 

Bringing you a state-of-the-art golf experience, featuring 40 driving range bays, an 18-hole mini golf course, and classic arcade amusement games. This destination is perfect for golf enthusiasts of all ages and skill levels. You can indulge in a bistro-style dining experience, relax at our bar, or challenge your friends to a game of mini golf. Swing City welcomes group bookings, corporate events, birthday parties, and even offers activities for a memorable date night. Stay updated and make bookings at swingcitygolf.com.au.

Name: Mariner Sands Country Club Inc.
Description: Mariner Sands is a beautiful private community home to two of Southeast Florida’s best golf courses. Our brand-new clubhouse is now open, offering stunning spaces to gather, dine, and celebrate. Make a splash in our beach-entry pool, participate in our top-rated tennis community, get active in our fitness center, and delight in each of our three exceptional dining experiences

Name: SERREZUELA Country Club
Description: Somos un Club joven y dinámico, que ofrece a sus asociados, familiares e invitados una mejor calidad de vida, brindando bienestar, comodidad, descanso y privacidad en medio de la naturaleza, apoyados en un grupo humano altamente comprometido que garantiza la calidad total en todos sus servicios.

Name: Forest Lake Club
Description: Established in 1923, Forest Lake Club has proudly served as Columbia’s premier private club for over a century. Rooted in tradition and driven by innovation, we offer a best-in-class experience shaped by our core values and a passionate, talented team. From championship golf and racquet sports to fine dining and unforgettable events, we create exceptional moments for our members and guests every day. As we continue to grow, our focus remains on excellence, community, and a hospitality experience like no other.

Name: Golfbaan het Woold
Description:
Golfbaan het Woold is gelegen in de rustige omgeving van Asten-Heusden, een dorp aan de rand van Nationaal Park  De Groote Peel. Golfspelers kunnen terecht op twee uitdagende banen.

De Vier Eijckenbaan is een 18-holes PAR-72 championship course, die sinds 1 juli 2011 is geopend. Binnen vier maanden is de A-status door de NGF toegekend. Daarnaast is er de verlichte 9-holes PAR-3 Gezandebaan en zijn er uitgebreide trainingsfaciliteiten op nationaal topniveau, zowel binnen als buiten.

Sport en gezelligheid vormen samen het perfecte plaatje voor een dagje uit. In het nieuwe clubhuis en Golfrestaurant Volentieri wordt u gastvrij ontvangen met Brabantse gemoedelijkheid.

Name: RAKIURA
Description:
En el año 2005 nace RAKIURA Resort para posicionarse en el mercado como una nueva alternativa de diversión, esparcimiento, deportes y vida sana.

Este nuevo equipo de trabajo, además de no tener relación con el emprendimiento anterior situado en el mismo predio; implementó una nueva visión y misión, brindando mejor infraestructura y variedad de servicios a sus MIEMBROS.

Name: Garl Nix Golf Course Design
Description: Started in 1972 Ron Garl Golf Course Design is now Garl Nix Golf Course Design

Name: DayParGolf
Description:
Our web-app is called DayParGolf! It is a simple but revolutionary application that will enable your players to challenge themselves by measuring themselves against all the golfers on your course. 
- You want to increase your players' loyalty and attract new ones 
- You want to communicate with your players during their round 
- You want to offer challenges and bets to your players 
- You want to animate the days at the Club House, develop the sales of the Proshop 
- You want to promote your course and your infrastructures with pictures, a dematerialized course book... 

You were dreaming about it... DayParGolf has developed it for you!

Name: Golf de La Prée La Rochelle
Description:
Entre terre & mer, découvrez un cadre exceptionnel
Face à l’île de Ré et la baie de l’Aiguillon, le Golf de La Prée propose un magnifique parcours 18 trous, le seul de La Rochelle. 
Le Golf de La Prée est également une école de golf réputée et propose à ses nombreux adhérents ou aux joueurs de passage de pouvoir améliorer leur swing ou tout simplement de passer un agréable moment autour du green.
Avec le club-house, la boutique, le bar, le restaurant et les salles de réception, le Golf de La Prée est également un lieu chaleureux et convivial, ouvert aussi bien aux golfeurs initiés qu’aux amateurs de bons et beaux moments de partage.

Name: David Golf Australia
Description: David Golf are Australia's largest supplier of Golf Course and Driving Range accessories.

Name: The Mulligan Factory
Description:
We are a company SPECIALIZED in the TRANSFORMATION of the GOLF sector through the application of all types of TECHNOLOGIES 

We are especially known for being the creators of Clapphouse, the mobile app for golf clubs most popular in Spain 

At the moment our efforts are focused exclusively on the development and growth of Clapphouse, and in particular on 1) the consolidation of the new recently launched digital scorecard  and 2) the internationalization of the solution

Name: Hollandsche Greenkeeping Maatschappij (HGM)
Description:
De Hollandsche Greenkeeping Maatschappij (HGM) is een waardevolle partner van meer dan 25 golfbanen en golfclubs voor de aanleg, renovatie en onderhoud van hun accommodatie.

Sinds 2010 nemen wij voor onze opdrachtgevers zorgen uit handen met onze deskundige aanpak en transparante wijze van werken. Speelkwaliteit, veiligheid en duurzaamheid staan bij ons centraal.

Wij hebben een passie voor golf en natuur. We gunnen zoveel mogelijk mensen het plezier dat golf biedt en we vinden het fantastisch om daaraan te kunnen bijdragen. Het leveren van onderhoudskwaliteit en zorg voor de natuurlijke omgeving gaan bij ons hand in hand.

Name: Bury St Edmunds Golf Club
Description:
Members Golf Club
 18-hole Championship & 9-hole Courses
 Exquisite Hospitality & Venue Hire
 Pro Shop, Swing Studio & Fitting

Name: Sankaty Head Golf Club
Description: Sankaty Head Golf Club is a private golf club with tennis and beach facilities that provide its members and their families with first-rate recreational and social activities in an understated and informal atmosphere.

Name: Golfbaan de Herkenbosche
Description:
Graag heten we u van harte welkom op onze schitterende bosbaan.

De Herkenbosche werd in 1992 geopend en is ongetwijfeld een van de allermooiste banen van Nederland.

De fraaie 18-holes bosbaan sluit direct aan, aan het natuurreservaat de “Meinweg”. De combinatie die ontstaan is tussen de van nature aanwezige hoogteverschillen en de authentieke bosrijke omgeving zorgt er voor dat u zich in het buitenland waant. Golf en natuur, zoals golf in zijn oorspronkelijke vorm bedoeld moet zijn. De bomen in de rough staan dicht op elkaar en benemen het zicht op andere holes. U waant zich volkomen alleen. Veel rododendrons geven in het voorjaar kleur aan deze mooie baan. Vanuit het clubhuis en restaurant en vanaf het terras, waar het overigens zeer goed toeven is, kijkt u over de golfbaan uit.

Golfers, fietsers, wandelaars, families en zakenlieden, kortom iedereen is van harte welkom op golfbaan de Herkenbosche! U kunt bij ons heerlijk lunchen, borrelen of dineren in het restaurant, in het clubhuis of op het zonovergoten terras waar u een werkelijk schitterend zicht op meerdere holes van de baan heeft.

De Herkenbosche ligt in Herkenbosch, Midden Limburg, nabij Roermond en op slechts 5 minuten afstand van de snelweg.

Name: Lakeside Country Club
Description: Founded in 1951, Lakeside Country Club is a top-tier private member-owned country club in the West Houston area. Lakeside is a family-oriented country club that provides outstanding social and recreational services to its membership.

Name: Bærum Golfklubb
Description: BÆRUM GOLFKLUBB kan i dag fremvise et av landets mest komplette golfanlegg. I tillegg til en 18 hulls bane i naturskjønne omgivelser, disponerer klubben også en 9 hulls korthullbane og et eget stort treningsområde med en flott driving range og nærspillsområder. Bærum GK tilbyr også helårsaktivitet med fire TrackMan simulatorer og et performance svingstudio for undervisning, custom fitting og private selskaper. Du finner oss i Lommedalen!

Name: Stensballegaard Golf
Description:
Stensballegaard Golfklub er beliggende i udkanten af Horsens i naturskønne omgivelser tæt på Horsens Fjord.
Golfbanen blev kåret som "Verdens bedste nyanlagte bane" i 2010 og er nu også optaget i "The Rolex worlds top 1000 golf courses" og var vært for "European Challenge Tour" i 2012.
Golfanlægget er velegnet til afvikling af store turneringer og virksomheds events.

Name: The Country Club Of Birmingham
Description: Country Club Of Birmingham is a food & beverages company based out of 3325 Country Club Rd, Birmingham, AL, United States.

Name: Ciputra Golf Club & Hotel Surabaya
Description:
Ciputra Golf Club & Hotel Surabaya is a hospitality company based out of Indonesia.
Ciputra Golf covering 125 hectares of beautifully sculpted fairways and greens, designed to be the venue for regional and international tournaments. It is 27 holes, par 108 with length of 9145 meters  that will offer many unforgettable moments of achievement. The Golf Club opens 7 days a week to give more time to play.

Ciputra Golf challenges each player, amateurs and professionals, to strive for excellence. Each tee box, landing area, fairway, bunker, green rough, grass, tree and bush is landscaped I a way to that compels players to think strategically for deriving the maximum enjoyment from the game. The course provides flexibility to players to set their own standards, with different tee boxes on each hole.

Name: Scotscraig Golfing Club
Description:
Founded in 1817 by members of The Society of St Andrews Golfers - the group that was to become The Royal & Ancient Golf Club - Scotscraig holds a genuine place in the game's history.

Designed by Old Tom Morris and later refined by James Braid, the course offers a classic test, blending traditional links and heathland character. A six-time Open Qualifying venue and host of the Scottish PGA Championship in 2023 and 2025, Scotscraig has long challenged Scotland's best, while remaining a course for everyday golfers.

Just 15 minutes along the Fife coast from St Andrews, Scotscraig is a continuation of golf's story, both filled with heritage, and rejuvenated for today's modern golfer.

Recent acquisition by The Ancient Links Golf Company has led to significant investment and thoughtful restoration, enhancing conditions and playability, ensuring the course continues to meet modern expectations without losing its heritage.

Name: Canterbury Golf Club
Description:
Canterbury Golf Club stands proudly among the top 100 classic golf courses in the U.S. and is celebrated as one of Ohio’s finest. Designed by renowned architect Herbert Strong, this classic Scottish-style course harmonizes with the area’s natural terrain, offering players a challenging yet rewarding experience with a diverse array of holes.

Established in 1921, Canterbury boasts a prestigious legacy of hosting major championships, including the U.S. Open, PGA Championship, Senior Open, U.S. Amateur Championship, and Senior PGA Championship. Notably, it is only the second club in the nation to have hosted all five of these premier events.

Today, Canterbury continues to earn accolades, consistently ranking among America’s Top 100 courses as recognized by Golf Digest, Golf, and Golfweek magazines.

Name: Golf Balcony LLC
Description: Golf Balcony Suites are the future. Guests can now experience the luxury of a driving range right off their hotel room balcony. Morning, afternoon, and evening, guests can enjoy the pleasure of hitting golf balls, competing against friends and neighboring rooms, and daily | weekly | and monthly Golf Balcony Suites challenges. Guests can prep for their rounds from the comfort of their hotel rooms. They can order room service while enjoying a long drive contest. Even guests who weren’t fortunate enough to book a golf balcony suite are able to enjoy a visually appealing driving range and the shot-making of guests. Give your resort guests what they want, endless golf for the entirety of their stay.

Name: Rams Hill Golf Club
Description: We are a team dedicated to providing neighbors and destination vacation guests with a first-class golf, restaurant, and lodging experience. We are known for excellent customer service and for the nationally admired course conditions of our highly ranked Fazio course. We are one of the largest employers in the micro-economy of eastern San Diego County, committed to our community, our team members, and the sustainability of this special place.

Name: Colonial Country Club, Fort Myers
Description:
World class golf, delicious food served in a comfortable setting, state of the art fitness and exercise amenities, social events, activities, nature trail with boardwalk, tennis, bocce, pickleball, swimming and sun bathing in a gated community.

Proudly managed by Troon Prive

Name: Las Ramblas Golf
Description:
El campo de Golf Las Ramblas fue diseñado por el famoso diseñador Pepe Gancedo, siempre dotando a sus diseños de características creativas e innovadoras con una calidad que le ha valido su reputación nacional e internacional. 
El campo de golf de Las Ramblas tiene una belleza incomparable y se ha desarrollado en un terreno escarpado, aquí en la Comunidad Valenciana.
La vegetación que rodea el campo está formada por frondosos pinos que crean un telón de fondo inolvidable para el campo. Además, el campo de golf de Las Ramblas ofrece magníficas vistas al mar Mediterráneo. 
Se requiere precisión, el campo es un reto cada día de juego.
El equipo de Las Ramblas Golf le da la bienvenida y estamos seguros que su paso por nuestro campo de golf será una gran experiencia.

Name: The Country Club of Rochester
Description:
One of the oldest private golf clubs in America, The Country Club of Rochester was founded in 1895 by a group of golfers interested in starting a family club. The Club is located in Rochester, New York and features a Donald Ross designed 18-hole golf course. Other amenities at the Club include a golf simulator, tennis, swimming, platform tennis, ice skating, cross-country skiing and a newly renovated fitness center.

The Club offers its members both fine and casual dining, family events, themed dinners, fitness classes, speakers, happy hours, summer sports clinics and more.

The Country Club of Rochester is proudly recognized as a 5-Star Platinum Club of America and Distinguished Club.

Name: Pro5Networking
Description: Our mission is simple: to bring together individuals who share a love for golf and a drive to succeed. Whether you're closing a business deal, expanding your professional circle, or simply enjoying a day on the greens, The Pro 5 Network provides the perfect setting to build meaningful relationships while embracing the challenges of the sport.

Name: Sunset Ridge Country Club
Description: Private Club located in Northfield, IL. Founded in 1923 feat. a 6,752 yard 18-hole course

Name: Ladd's - A US Golf Car Company
Description: Grand Rapids, MI  |  Memphis, TN  |  Knoxville, TN  |  Canton, MS  |  Baton Rouge, LA  |  Little Rock, AR

Name: Fontanals Golf Club
Description:
Ubicado en el corazón de un entorno natural privilegiado, Fontanals Golf es mucho más que un club: es un estilo de vida. Diseñado para los amantes del golf y los buscadores de experiencias únicas, nuestro club combina instalaciones de primera categoría con un diseño de campo impecable, pensado para retar y deleitar a jugadores de todos los niveles.

¿Qué nos hace únicos?

Un campo de golf de clase mundial: nuestro campo ofrece un desafío técnico inigualable en un marco paisajístico impresionante.
Exclusividad y comunidad: Un espacio para conectar, compartir y disfrutar en un ambiente elegante y acogedor.
Eventos de alto nivel: Torneos, competiciones y experiencias personalizadas que nos sitúan como un referente del golf en España y Europa.
Compromiso con la calidad: Instalaciones de vanguardia y un servicio exquisito que superan las expectativas de nuestros socios y visitantes.

En Fontanals Golf, creemos que cada golpe cuenta, tanto en el juego como en la experiencia que ofrecemos.

Nuestro centro DIR Wellness, ubicado en las instalaciones del club de golf, es referente a nivel europeo como centro de bienestar y salud, contando además con una piscina olímpica interior, piscina exterior, sauna, salas de masaje...

Un lugar de ensueño para los amantes del golf pero también de la naturaleza y las aventuras al aire libre.

Name: Golf de l’île fleurie
Description: Véritable oasis de calme et de verdure, à seulement 10 min de Paris, le Golf de l’Ile Fleurie vous accueille tous les jours de l’année. Son parcours 9 trous s’inscrit avec naturel sur l’Ile des Impressionnistes et se joue en 1h30. Profitez également des infrastructures et services adaptés tant à l’apprentissage, qu’à l’entrainement : académie, practice de 150 postes couverts et éclairés, zones d’approches et putting green.  Au club house, le restaurant le Rhino’s Club, vous servira à toute heure de la journée dans une atmosphère cosy au coin de la cheminée, ou sur les terrasses aux beaux jours.

Name: Tiburon Peninsula Club
Description: The Tiburon Peninsula Club is known as Marin’s premier Athletic & Social Club. We like to think of it as an energizing gathering place for friends and families. Whether you are passionate about tennis or aquatics, fitness or wellness, youth programs or fine dining, each experience at TPC is part of an active, family-focused lifestyle enjoyed as part of our welcoming community of friends and neighbors.

Name: Singing Hills Golf Club at Sycuan
Description: Singing Hills Golf Club is located in the serene Dehesa Valley, just 30 minutes east of Downtown San Diego. Our relaxing property features 36 holes of Ted Robinson-designed golf and our award-winning Red Tail Bar & Grill.

Name: Essex County Country Club
Description:
Founded in May 1887, Essex County Country Club is the oldest club in the state of New Jersey and the sixth oldest in the country. The original charter established the club "for the encouragement of athletic exercises and sports." An original member of the MGA and NJSGA, ECCC was also one of the 25 founding clubs of the USGA. The highly-acclaimed golf course is a composite of golden age of golf designers Tillinghast, Raynor and Banks and is consistently rated as one of the Met area's best.

Despite being known for its long and challenging golf course, ECCC has always been committed to "promoting a diverse family membership with activities for all ages." The ECCC pool, new Har-Tru tennis courts and full golf practice facilities provide great resources to members and their families. We host one of the finest children's Summer Sports Camps and Junior Golf programs in the state. The active house schedule includes Family Barbecues and Pool Parties for all to enjoy.

Name: Saunton Golf Club
Description:
Welcome to Saunton. The finest 36 holes of links golf in England. 
#SauntonGolfClub
R&A/England Golf/PGA Host Venue

Name: ÖSTERÅKERS GOLF AB
Description: Österåkers Golfklubb - mer än bara golf!

Name: Golf d'Hardelot
Description:
Situé dans le Pas-de-Calais, au cœur de la station balnéaire d’Hardelot-Plage, le Golf d’Hardelot vous accueille toute l’année sur ses deux magnifiques parcours 18 trous : Les Dunes et Les Pins.

Le Golf d'Hardelot fait partie du Groupe Resonance Golf Collection.
 
Notre golf des Dunes abrite le club house, un restaurant offrant une vue panoramique sur le green du 18, une salle de séminaire équipée pour accueillir vos réunions professionnelles et organiser vos évènements pour vos collaborateurs, partenaires ou clients. Organiser votre séminaire au Golf d’Hardelot offre plusieurs avantages :
- Véhiculer l’image de marque de votre entreprise en faisant le choix d’un lieu prestigieux.
- Créer une ambiance conviviale et décontractée, par l’alliance du travail et du sport.
- Dépayser vos invités en proposant une destination au vert, dans un cadre calme et apaisant.

Nous organisons également, en complément de ces journées de travail, des initiations au golf pour les novices ou des parties sur nos parcours de golf pour les joueurs expérimentés.

Le parcours des Pins (18 trous), dessiné en 1934 par le célèbre architecte britannique Tom Simpson, est une référence en France et à l’étranger. Sillonnant à travers une superbe forêt, son tracé enchanteur incarne un style qui survit aux générations.

Le parcours des Dunes (18 trous), ouvert en 1991, propose des panoramas impressionnants entre lacs, buttes dunaires et vallons boisés. Son tracé moderne et son environnement unique contribuent largement à sa réputation.

Name: Silver Springs Golf and Country Club
Description:
Experience unparalleled golf at Silver Springs Golf and Country Club, conveniently located just 15 minutes from downtown Calgary. 

As the premier private club destination in North Calgary, we take pride in offering more than just an exceptional golf course – we provide a warm community, impeccable services, and top-notch facilities that instill a sense of pride and belonging for our members.

From your first tee-off shot to the post-round celebratory drink, Silver Springs is not just a place to play golf; it's a club for life. Come and discover what truly sets Silver Springs apart from the rest.

Name: LANDERYD GOLF AB
Description:
Landeryd är en av Sveriges största golfklubb. Två anläggningar, Landeryd och Vesterby, som alltid erbjuder något nytt att upptäcka. Tre natursköna, varierade och utmanande 18-hålsbanor strax utanför Linköping. Vi erbjuder boende, restaurang och konferens samt hälsa och träning. Framförallt erbjuder vi en känsla av gemenskap som du inte hittar någon annanstans. 
Kom för golfen, stanna för livsstilen.

Name: Northview Golf & Country Club
Description:
OUR HISTORY 

In the early 1990s, Chick and Marilyn Stewart teamed up with the former General Manager of the Vancouver Golf Club, Pat Duffey, to pursue developing the finest 36 hole PUBLIC golf facility in British Columbia. Hiring world-renowned golf course architect and seven-time major tournament champion Arnold Palmer, to design two 18 hole courses, was the first step in achieving this dream.

Breaking ground in 1992 and setting a grand opening date of July 1st 1994, the team began with a clean slate of over 400 acres of Arnold-Palmer-WebMay10_92-06various terrains… and tribulations. The soil make-up and elevation changes of the terrain challenged the design group but ultimately a suitable routing for the courses began to unfold. As work progressed, new and more inventive ideas presented themselves and Mr. Palmer took advantage of every opportunity to create exciting vistas and exceptional golf holes. Bringing his ” go for broke ” style of playing golf to his course designs, Mr. Palmer, (or “the Boss ” as his employee’s affectionately call him) developed several signature holes on both courses, now officially named “The Ridge” and “The Canal“. With the two courses shaping up well, the clubhouse portion of the project began. Featuring a classic west coast design, with it’s soaring post and beam western cedar and granite motif, the upper level of the building contains two restaurants, meeting rooms and banquet space that can accommodate 300 people. The lower level features the Golf shop (with the latest in golf fashions and equipment), locker rooms with full shower facilities and still more meeting rooms!

Name: OSGC - Ostschweizerischer Golf Club Niederbüren
Description:
Der 1948 gegründete Club ist im Besitz von rund 450 Mitgliedern. Dank seiner zentralen Lage zwischen St. Gallen und Wil ist er sehr gut erreichbar und trotzdem mitten in der Natur.

Der Golfplatz liegt eingebettet zwischen Thur und einer waldreichen Hügellandschaft. 

Mit seinen 5918 Metern Länge ist der 18-Loch-Championship-Course Par 72 relativ kurz. Seine engen Fairways, die vielseitigen Geländeübergänge, unterschiedlichen Gewässer und kleinen, ondulierten Greens machen ihn jedoch zu einem äusserst anspruchsvollen Platz. 

Nebst dem abwechslungsreichen Parcours schätzen die Besucher auch die Ruhe der Natur sowie die vielfältige Tier- und Pflanzenwelt.

Seit 2021 ist der Ostschweizerische Golf Club Geo-zertifiziert und zählt damit zu den wenigen naturnahen Golfplätzen der Schweiz mit einem nachhaltigen Golfbetrieb. Zudem wurde der Ostschweizerische Golf Club 2022 mit dem Swisstainable-Zertifikat ausgezeichnet.

Es ist uns eine besondere Freude unsere geschätzten Gäste DI-SO jeweils ab 9.00 Uhr im neu gestalteten Restaurant zu begrüssen. Geniessen Sie die wunderbare Atmosphäre mit Freunden. Wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Interessieren Sie sich für eine Mitgliedschaft im OSGC? Wir heissen Sie herzlich willkommen!
Um den unterschiedlichen Bedürfnissen optimal gerecht zu werden, bieten wir verschiedene Mitgliederkategorien an. Weitere Informationen zur Mitgliedschaft finden Sie auf unserer Website: https://www.osgc.ch/mitglied-werden/

Gerne steht Ihnen unser Geschäftsführer Daniel Schweizer für ein Gespräch zur Verfügung. Wir freuen uns über Ihre Kontaktaufnahme: Tel. 071 422 18 56, info@osgc.ch.

Name: Parkland Golf & Country Club
Description: Parkland Golf & Country Club is a 790-acre private community featuring Tuscan-Mediterranean inspired homes within a lush, resort-style setting. Intentionally designed to be just the right size, the community features under 900 homes including 60 condominium villas, creating a perfect balance of privacy, beauty, and connection. Membership is required for homeowners, providing access to an exceptional collection of amenities, social experiences, and an active, family-focused lifestyle that defines the Parkland experience.

Name: TenGolf Group
Description:
TenGolf Group manages and operates premier golf courses and a winery in Western Australia, providing a range of exceptional golfing, dining, and event experiences. Our venues include:

1. Secret Harbour Golf Links
A true links-style course designed by Graham Marsh, with coastal scenery and a welcoming clubhouse.
www.secretsgolf.com.au

3. The Cut Golf Course
An oceanfront 18-hole course, known for its challenging layout and breathtaking views, offering dining, function facilities, and stunning views for a range of events.
www.thecutgolf.com.au

A picturesque 18-hole course by the Swan River, featuring city views, a modern clubhouse, and event spaces.
www.maylandsgolf.com.au

www.embletongolf.com.au

5. Aravina Estate
An award-winning winery in Margaret River, renowned for fine dining and versatile event spaces.
www.aravinaestate.com

Name: Club Design Studio
Description:
Club Design Studio assists behind the scenes at private clubs with graphic design, email marketing, and social media projects. 

Our team has become a powerful resource for directors in leadership positions that combine both marketing and membership. We take on the artwork task while your team member focuses on more lucrative aspects such as interfacing with members, building a pipeline, and sales.

We help bring the club's branding to life, ensuring all collateral and communications look cohesive and spark engagement with your members. Since we work with so many clubs, we can also assist with questions about best practices, new trends, and strategies.

Here is a short list of collateral and tasks clubs ask us to create:

- Membership Brochures & New Member Orientation Brochures

- Activities Brochures and Season Guides/Calendars

- Menus, Flyers, and Posters

- Email Templates and Assistance with Strategy

- Instagram Planning and Graphics (IG Feed Planning, Stories, Posts and Captions, Templates)

- Website Development Project Assistance

Name: TPC Twin Cities
Description:
Minnesota's only PGA TOUR owned and operated facility located just minutes north of Minneapolis and St. Paul. Designed by the legendary Arnold Palmer and player consultant, Tom Lehman. 

TPC Twin Cities offers a variety of membership products to fit the needs and interests of our prospective Members, including: Family Memberships, Corporate Memberships, Social Memberships and Non-Resident Memberships.

We are the proud host of the PGA TOUR's 3M Open.

Name: Esbjerg Golfklub
Description:
ET FYRTÅRN FOR GOLFSPORTEN

I Esbjerg Golfklub er vi bundet sammen af den glæde og stolthed, der vokser ud af succesoplevelser og sportslige udfordringer. Her danner passionen og interessen i golfsporten rammen for en levende og rummelig klub, hvor alle skal føle sig velkomne og blive mødt med et smil og en hjælpende hånd. For hos os handler golf i høj grad om fællesskab – et fællesskab skabt gennem generationer og formet af ildsjæle.

Vores dybe rødder i historien og naturen omkring os giver os et stærkt og et særligt fundament at stå på. Med et visionært og innovativt mindset løfter vi arven og ambitionerne inden for golf videre ved at sikre, at vi er en tidssvarende og moderne klub, der fortsætter med at være relevant og skabe interesse for golf.

Alt hvad vi gør, bliver gjort med det formål at investere tilbage ind i os selv for at forbedre golfoplevelsen – både på klubniveau og for sporten som helhed. For vi vil være et fyrtårn inden for golfsporten - en velanset klub, der er med til at sætte den nationale standard - og med en stolt klub i udvikling skabe en platform for glæden ved golf.

Name: Golfbaan Het Rijk van Nijmegen
Description: Golfbaan Het Rijk van Nijmegen is voor iedereen toegankelijk, voor zowel golfers (startende en ervaren) als niet-golfers. We streven er naar iedereen te voorzien van een zorgeloze dag in een prachtige omgeving. Ook bedrijven zijn bij ons van harte welkom. De ontspannen sfeer op de golfbaan vormt het ideale klimaat voor een vergadering, brainstormsessie, teambuildingbijeenkomst of bedrijfsborrel.

Name: Het Rijk Golfbanen
Description: Het Rijk Golfbanen bestaat uit vier prachtige golfbanen: Het Rijk van Nijmegen, Het Rijk van Nunspeet, Het Rijk van Margraten en Het Rijk van Sybrook. Het Rijk Golfbanen staat voor kwaliteit, duurzaamheid en gastvrijheid. Op alle golfbanen van Het Rijk geniet je van een schitterende omgeving, een uitdagende golfbaan en een ongedwongen sfeer.

Name: APA Golf Design
Description: Process improvement, waste mitigation, and golf.

Name: The Retreat at Silvies Valley Ranch
Description:
The Retreat at Silvies Valley Ranch is a luxury guest retreat nestled within a historic working cattle ranch in the Blue Mountains of Central Oregon. Guests enjoy award-winning links-style golf, horseback riding, fishing, cattle wrangling, ATV rides, a destination spa, pistol shooting and much more. The Retreat’s custom-designed rooms and cabins evoke authentic Western chic and overlook stunning vistas, and cuisine is centered around preparations of the ranch’s own grass-fed beef and chevon (goat), and locally sourced vegetables. The Retreat delivers the ultimate escape where guests can embrace the storied traditions of the West, embark on new adventures, getaway from the fast paced city to enjoy corporate retreats and enjoy the group team building aspects of our experiences. 

Founded in 1883, Silvies Valley Ranch is an ecologically sustainable Western cattle ranch with 4,500 cattle, 3,000 goats, abundant healthy wildlife, waterways, mountain meadows and Ponderosa pine forest. Made up of 150,000 acres of deeded and leased forest lands, Silvies aims to set the standard for sustainable ranching and environmental stewardship in the high desert. It recently launched the Camp Creek Ranch Development, the first opportunity for nature lovers to own their own new-construction, eco-friendly homes right on The Ranch. For more information visit www.silvies.us or call 1-800-SILVIES

Name: Victoria Golf Resort - Sri Lanka
Description: Hidden away from the whirlwind of city life, Victoria Golf Resort is the perfect location to kickback, unwind and relax

Name: Andover Country Club
Description:
The Andover Country Club is an elegant, luxury, family oriented golf and country club with strong ties to tradition and history. For over 100 years, we have continued to offer our members and guests the highest level of service and hospitality.

As the premier club in Andover, Massachusetts, Andover Country Club provides a meticulously manicured championship golf course for members and their guests, an elegant fine dining restaurant and lounge, a lively members bar, and the ideal place for any special event.

Visit www.andovercountryclub.com to learn more about Golf, Memberships or our Event Planning Services.

Name: Earlybirdie AG
Description: 24/7 Indoor-Golf spielen in Baden, Aarau & Chur: Privat im eigenen Raum, mit modernster Trackman-Technologie und 4k-Beamer, Getränken und Snacks.

Name: Ilkley Golf Club
Description:
Ilkley Golf Club is one of the best courses in the UK for golf days.
It's a great test for good golfers but not too long or arduous for less frequent players.
Getting round is quicker than most courses, with greens close to tees, and no thick rough, so ball searching is kept to a minimum. The course is also flat so the players will not be exhausted at the end of the round.
It is one of the most picturesque courses in the country with fabulous scenery, and breathtaking views of the famous Ilkley Moor from the clubhouse terrace.

Name: Friends In Golf
Description:
DÉ BEDRIJFSLEDENCLUB VAN DE HOLLANDSCHE GOLFCLUB

Wil je netwerken, ontspannen en golfen in een unieke omgeving? De golfparken van de Hollandsche Golfclub bieden ondernemers de perfecte mix van sport en zakelijk ontmoeten. Even weg van kantoor, frisse buitenlucht en waardevolle contacten opdoen in een Gewoon Gezellige sfeer.

We bieden bedrijfsspeelrechten, ideaal voor ondernemers die:
 Vaker willen golfen
 Maandelijks een gezellige wedstrijd willen spelen
 Hun netwerk willen uitbreiden

 WAAROM FRIENDS IN GOLF?

 Golf op 12 golfparken – Met collega’s of relaties
 Netwerk lokaal en landelijk – Ontmoet andere bedrijven
 Meedoen aan bedrijfsledendagen – Zowel lokaal als landelijk

 Clubactiviteiten – Gezellige en sportieve wedstrijden
 Brasserie-momenten – Lunch, borrel of diner met relaties

 Golfclinics – Ideaal voor collega’s of zakelijke contacten
 Golflessen voor bedrijven – Samen leren en verbeteren
 Beginnerspakketten – Laat collega’s kennismaken met golf
 Flexibel speelrecht – Golf wanneer het jou uitkomt

Wil je weten wat Friends in Golf voor jouw bedrijf kan betekenen? Stuur dan een bericht of kijk op onze website: https://hollandschegolfclub.nl/zakelijk/

Name: Nakoma Golf Club
Description: Nakoma Golf Club offers unique Membership Opportunities designed to fit your lifestyle. Nakoma is a private golf and social club located in the heart of Madison, WI. Membership at Nakoma provides not only exceptional golf and dining experiences, but perhaps more importantly, a warm and personal level of service. We strive to exceed our Members expectations to create a Club experience that feels like their home away from home.

Name: Smart Golf Club
Description:
Golf Jako Narzędzie Budowania Wartościowych Relacji Biznesowych.

Pola golfowe łączą biznes na całym świecie, a wśród golfistów znajdziesz przedsiębiorców, polityków, lekarzy, gwiazdy czy byłych sportowców. Tworzymy przestrzeń do czerpania korzyści biznesowych z potencjału, jaki oferuje nam ta dyscyplina sportowa.

Name: MacGregor Downs Country Club
Description:
The private MacGregor Downs Country Club combines history and heritage with the modern amenities of today.

The Club is nestled on the shores of Lake MacGregor within the tranquil setting of the MacGregor Downs neighborhood in Cary, North Carolina. Mere minutes from Raleigh, the Club offers championship golf and tennis facilities, a large pool area, private dining, and a year-round social calendar for the entire family.

Since the Club opened in 1967, it has continued to build on its legacy of being one of the most prestigious private clubs in the state. MacGregor is defined by its history, but also its close-knit, friendly, and loyal members. We invite you to become a part of this family, and to experience the service, attention to detail, and commitment to excellence that characterize the membership experience at MacGregor Downs.

Name: Golf Goes Classic
Description: Exclusive Event where Golf meets Classical Music

Name: Broken Top Club
Description: Broken Top Club is Bend's Premier Private Club.

Name: Golfclub Rhein-Main e.V.
Description:
Golfclub Rhein-Main e.V. in Wiesbaden
Der Rheinblick Golf Course zählt zu den schönsten Golfanlagen in Hessen und darüber hinaus. Er ist eingebettet in einem schönen, bewaldeten und leicht hügeligen Gelände. Gepflegte Grüns und anspruchsvolle Fairways charakterisieren diese Golfanlage. Natur pur, reine Luft, ein fantastischer Blick von unserer Terrasse in das Rheintal und viele andere Gründe machen Golfsport hier zu einem großen Erlebnis und Genuß.

Name: studio berlin
Description: Studio Berlin operates in stealth mode. For more details please contact buenaonda@studioberlin.art

Name: Círculo Mercantil e Industrial de Sevilla
Description:
Desde su fundación por un grupo de industriales y comerciantes encabezados por D. Simón Martínez Martínez en el año 1868, el Círculo Mercantil e Industrial de Sevilla ha sido un actor destacado en la Historia de Sevilla, de sus gentes y de sus costumbres.

Durante sus primeros cien años de vida, el Círculo Mercantil se caracterizó por sus fines culturales, sociales y recreativos, pero sobre todo económicos, pasando a convertirse también en los años 70 del pasado siglo XX, en una entidad deportiva. 

El Círculo Mercantil ha evolucionado junto a la sociedad sevillana, de cuya historia forma parte como fue reconocido por el Ayuntamiento el 31 de mayo de 2013 con su máxima distinción, la Medalla de la Ciudad. Actualmente cuenta con dos sedes fijas, el Edificio Social de la calle Sierpes y las Instalaciones Deportivas, en continua renovación, en la avenida Presidente Adolfo Suárez; y otra efímera, la Caseta de la Feria de Abril, la más grande de todo el Real.

Name: Piney Branch Golf Club, Inc.
Description: Piney Branch Golf Club is a privately owned golf facility located in Upperco, Maryland. It serves members, corporate clients, golf outings, and special events. Our portfolio includes an 18-hole par-71 championship course designed by Edmund B. Ault, first-class amenities, and a dedicated events team supporting weddings, receptions, and corporate hospitality. We are committed to delivering a premium experience for golfers, members, and guests alike.

Name: Birdie and Brews
Description:
Birdie and Brews is Northwest Arkansas’ premier indoor golf and entertainment lounge—offering the perfect blend of cutting-edge technology, local craft beverages, and unforgettable private events.

Located in Rogers, Arkansas, our facility features four Full Swing Golf simulators—the same technology trusted by PGA Tour pros like Tiger Woods and Jon Rahm. But we’re not just for golfers. Our simulators support a variety of interactive games including football, baseball, soccer, dodgeball, carnival challenges, zombie dodgeball, and more, making it easy to keep everyone engaged—no matter their sport or skill level.

We also feature a PuttView putting green for immersive short-game fun and a 30-tap self-pour beer and wine wall, showcasing favorites from breweries and wineries across the Ozarks.

Looking for food options? We’ve got you covered. Our in-house Pickleman’s sandwich kiosk allows you to order ahead and have meals ready on arrival, and our on-site Cachis taco truck adds even more flavor to your event. From casual bites to full catering packages, your team won’t go hungry.

Whether you’re hosting a corporate party, team-building event, client appreciation night, or private celebration, we offer excellent facility rental options. You can even reserve the entire space for your group. Our indoor lounge comfortably hosts up to 85 guests, providing an intimate yet energetic atmosphere your team will remember.

Flexible booking, turnkey event support, and entertainment for everyone—
Birdie and Brews – Putter in hand, beer on demand.

Name: GOLFSHOP4YOU
Description:
Golfshop4you je víc než obchod – jsme komunita golfistů a partner pro firmy, které chtějí spojit svůj brand s elegancí golfu. 

 Pro hráče nabízíme prémiové golfové značky (PING, Titleist, J.Lindeberg, Under Armour) – originální vybavení, fitting na míru a servis, který dává smysl.

 Pro firmy a korporace připravujeme golfové dárky s potiskem, originální firemní sety a branding pro turnaje či eventy. Od personalizovaných míčků až po kompletní outfit s logem.

Naším cílem je, aby se golf stal nejen sportem, ale i prostředím, kde vznikají vztahy, příběhy a příležitosti. Proto kombinujeme eshop, showroom a komunitu.

 Pokud hledáte partnera pro váš golf – ať už osobně, nebo pro vaši firmu – jsme tu pro vás.

Name: Covesea Links
Description:
Tucked along the stunning Moray coastline, Covesea Links is a family-run, pay-and-play golf course offering a truly unforgettable experience. With spectacular views over the Moray Firth and a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all levels, it’s more than just a round of golf – it’s coastal calm, natural beauty, and pure Scottish golf at its finest.

Whether you're a seasoned player, a curious beginner or simply out to enjoy the scenery, Covesea Links is a place to relax, unwind and make memories. We’re open to visitors, local golfers, and group bookings – and we’re always happy to chat about hosting events or collaborations.

Come for the views, stay for the experience.

Led by visionary founder Andrew Brooks, we combine passion, expertise, and creativity to redefine the future of golf.

The community amenities include a large multi-purpose Club House, General Store, 9 Hole Golf Course, 6 Tennis Courts, Marina, Beaches, Swimming Pool, Basketball Courts, Bowling Alley, Pickleball courts, Archery Pit, Nature Lab and very popular Children’s Summer Camp Program.  Fields exist throughout the community for Lacrosse, Soccer, Football, Softball, Volleyball and Badminton.  The outer forest has more than 5 miles of walking and mountain biking trails through the beautiful natural wooded scenery.  There is a 2-mile loop around the waterfront with views of the Severn River and Brewers Pond.  Golf Carts are the transportation of choice throughout the community.  The social calendar offers many activities such as the 3rd of July Fireworks, 4th of July Parade, Summer Dances, 5K Race, Corn Roast, Clam Bake, Golf and Tennis Tournaments and much more

**Why Sponsor the HD GOLF Circuit?**

- **Digital Integration:** The HD GOLF Circuit goes beyond the physical event, offering sponsors a year-long digital communication plan to maximize brand exposure.

Dominion Meadows Golf Course is a terrific choice for your regular rounds of golf or a new destination for you and your friends when visiting Colville.

Name: Belle Meade Country Club
Description: Belle Meade Country Club, located in Thomson, GA, offers a welcoming environment with top-notch amenities. Known for its beautiful golf course and quality dining options, the club provides a range of recreational facilities. We are committed to ensuring that members and guests have memorable experiences, whether enjoying a meal, participating in events, or relaxing by the pool. At Belle Meade Country Club, tradition meets modern convenience, creating a unique community.

Name: Fågelbro Golf & Country Club
Description: Fågelbro är en unik upplevelse, inte bara för golfspelare. Förutom en 18-hålsbana i fantastisk kondition kan vi erbjuda förstklassiga Country Club-aktiviteter såsom korthålsbana, tennis, padel, squash, gym, yoga, massage, bridge, ridning, eller ett dopp i vår uppvärmda utomhuspool. Name: Midtown Golf
Description:
Midtown Golf is Oakville's premier golf simulator and recreational club, offering top-of-the-line technology and a state-of-the-art facility. Our location in the heart of midtown Oakville, just off the QEW, provides convenient access to our spacious facility. With five premium simulator bays, including one executive/private bay, and a well-designed putting/chipping area, we strive to create an impressive experience for our valued members.



At Midtown Golf, we offer more than just golf. Alongside our exceptional golfing amenities, we provide a variety of options to cater to different interests and preferences. For golf enthusiasts, we organize men's and women's leagues, as well as exciting competitions such as long drive and closest to the pin. But we also go beyond golf, offering a diverse range of sports on our simulators, including cricket, soccer, football, lacrosse, hockey, and even zombie dodgeball.



Our facility is designed to be more than just an active space. We have strategically placed TVs throughout the club, so you can catch your favorite football team playing on a Sunday or watch hockey games in the evening. Whether you're an avid golfer or simply looking for a social outing, Midtown Golf provides a welcoming environment for everyone.



As we continue to prioritize the needs and interests of our members, we have exciting plans for the 2024 winter golf season with exciting leagues, events and even date nights planned.



Our vision is to provide the great town of Oakville and its surrounding areas with a versatile venue where individuals can stay active, socialize, carry out work-related tasks, and meet new friends. At Midtown Golf, we are committed to providing a well-rounded experience that goes beyond traditional indoor golf simulators.

Name: Dorset Field Club
Description: Nestled in a beautiful valley in the Green Mountains of Vermont, the Dorset Field Club is the oldest, continuously-operating golf course in the United States. Since 1886, our singular goal has been unwavering: we strive to create the most enjoyable country club experience for our members, their families and guests.

Name: Net Par
Description: Net Par was an idea cultivated amongst friends with a passion for golf and a heart for Northwest Indiana. We deliver the most powerful and accurate golf technology in an inviting, upscale atmosphere. Whether you’re a golf enthusiast looking to play some of the world’s best courses, or a spectator more inclined to take advantage of a spirited game of closest to the pin, we are committed to curating an on-par experience for our guests. At Net Par, it’s not like the game. It is the game.

Name: The Dunes Golf & Winter Club
Description:
Lush fairways complemented by immaculate greens and edged with elegant spires of jackpine and spruce define The Dunes – northern Alberta’s premier golf course. With views of the Wapiti River valley and glimpses of natural wildlife, this 18-hole public course is as picturesque as it is challenging.

From long fairways that let you release a full, relaxing swing to our short, 122-yard third hole that sees the most golfers leaping with glee as they join our Hole-in-One Club, The Dunes has opportunities for everyone to enjoy a perfect day on the course.

Located on Resources Road, just four kilometres south of Grande Prairie’s city limits, The Dunes has multiple tee boxes that offer four lengths of play – gold, blue, white, and red. And, when the day is done, you can unwind further with a beverage, snack or meal in our fully-licensed club house or on one of our pleasant balconies overlooking either the 9th or 18th greens.
