Description:
Với sứ mệnh "đem lại những giá trị tốt đẹp vì sự phát triển của xã hội" trong gần 30 năm qua, Tập đoàn T&T Group đã chính thức bước vào ngành công nghiệp Golf với mong muốn mang đến những giá trị thiết thực nhất cho xã hội.

Khởi đầu cho sứ mệnh này, T&T Group đã cho ra mắt thương hiệu T&T Golf – đơn vị quản lý và vận hành toàn bộ hệ thống sân Golf theo tiêu chuẩn “World Class”. T&T Golf hướng đến việc trở thành đơn vị quản lý và vận hành hệ thống sân Golf đẳng cấp quốc tế hàng đầu Việt Nam, mang lại những giá trị mới, tiêu chuẩn mới, chuyên nghiệp hơn cho ngành công nghiệp Golf.

Mục tiêu của T&T Golf là trở thành thương hiệu hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực Golf tại Việt Nam, vươn tầm thế giới. Và dự án sân Golf đầu tiên được thực hiện bởi T&T Golf đã thực hiện hóa mục tiêu ấy - Dự án sân Văn Lang Empire Golf Club.

Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm những người đồng đội có đủ phẩm chất, năng lực  để thực hiện sứ mệnh đã được giao

Name: Golfkamari
Description:
Trackman 4 -simulaattoreilla varustettu jokaisen golfarin olohuone huippusijainneilla Vantaalla, Kauniaisissa, Klaukkalassa ja Järvenpäässä.

Kaiken ikäisille ja tasoisille golfareille suunnattu oleskelutila, jossa voi pelata maailman huippukenttiä yksin tai porukalla, kuten Pebble Beach ja St. Andrews Old Course.

Trackman lyöntitutka on myös erinomainen laite harjoitteluun. Se analysoi lyönnistä kaiken, kuten mailanpään nopeus, mailan liikerata, pallon nopeus, spinni, osumakohta ja paljon muuta. Trackman on markkinoiden paras laite niin pelaamiseen kuin harjoitteluun ja sitä käyttää myös PGA-tourin huiput.

Täällä vietät pimenevät syys- ja talvipäivät sekä treenaat kesällä svingiä paremmaksi! Avoinna läpi vuorokauden.

Name: Northern Ohio GCSA
Description:
Promoting the profession of the golf course superintendent through education, comaraderie and cooperation among fellow members in Northern Ohio since 1923.

Today's golf course superintendent must be a scientist, an economist, a business manager, a personnel manager, and more. It is a very challenging profession. To help meet this challenge, superintendents need a strong, professional association. Founded in the early 1923, the Northern Ohio GCSA was just a handful of individuals who met to exchange ideas. This small group has grown into an association with more than 150 members. A Board of Directors and Standing Committees direct the external and internal workings of the Association. We are affiliated with the Golf Course Superintendents Association of America (GCSAA) which serves superintendents internationally. Northern Ohio GCSA members are leading the way as Environmental Stewards to address such timely issues as water conservation, ground water protection, pesticide use and safety, and environmental protection.

The Northern Ohio GCSA has meetings that include informative education speakers. Education topics range from technical turfgrass subjects to business management to personal self-improvement. The demands and technical aspects of the golf course superintendent’s profession are changing rapidly. As a superintendent, continuing education is vital to your future success.

Each year the NOGCSA hosts a GCSAA seminar. These seminars are comprehensive in their coverage of technical and business subjects. Topics range from Renovation and Reconstruction to the Microbiology of Turf Soils to Managerial Productivity. All participants receive CEU credits upon the passing of a seminar test. 

The NOGCSA offers help to those members who have lost their jobs or are looking for advancement through the local listing of available jobs on www.mvsupt.com and through its job referral service. An NOGCSA employment representative will update members who have lost their jobs wit

Name: Sunnmøre Golfklubb (SGK)
Description:
Sunnmøre Golfklubb ligger i Hareid kommune, ca. 4,5 kilometer fra Hareid sentrum langs Riksvei 61. 

Bana, som er designet av Tor Eia, er ei åpen og fin parkbane i fine omgivelser. Fra klubbhuset er det utsikt mot Sunnmørsalpene i sørøst og deler av banen. Fra uteområdet på framsiden har man utsikt mot green på hol 9, hol 7 og øvingsområdet som er tilrettelagt like ved klubbhuset. Driving rangen ligger like ved parkeringsplassen på baksiden av klubbhuset, og inne på klubbhuset finner du golf-simulatoren. I tillegg til tradisjonell golf har klubben også 9-hulls fotballgolfbane med ulike hinder. 

Banen har 8 vatten i spill, samt flere elver og sidevannshinder, noe som er med på å øke banens vanskelighetsgrad. 3 av hullene er par 5, noe som resulterer i at banens par er 74. Verdt å merke seg at hull 6 er banens signaturhull, samt hull 7 med vakker utsikt mot klubbhuset og Sunnmørsalpene i bakgrunnen. 

Klubben ble stiftet som Ulstein Pitch and Putt klubb i 1989, men skiftet senere navn til Sunnmøre golfklubb under prosjekteringen av banen i år 2000. Klubben kan tilby ei vakker 9-hulls golf- og fotballgolfbane, proshop, driving range og gode treningsfasiliteter. I klubbhuset finner du Café Tap-In, kontor, konferanserom og golf-simulator. I kjelleren på klubbhuset er det garderobe, med nødvendige fasiliteter og mulighet til å leie skapplass. 

Velkommen! 

Sparebank1 er Sunnmøre Golfklubb sin hovedsponsor i 2023!

Name: Quixote Club
Description:
Quixote Club is a members-only, premier social haven for seekers of modern luxury, activity, and philanthropy. Located in Sumter, South Carolina, Quixote Club has the best of all worlds, straddling the Sandhills, Pee Dee, and Lowcountry regions.

Inspired by the character Don Quixote, a man who dared the impossible, Quixote Club was founded on the principles of a visionary. Wearing passion, focus, and persistence as badges of honor while always promoting innovation and collaboration with those who share in our mission.

Our world-class golf course, skillfully crafted clubhouse, and first-class staff invite generous, philanthropic-minded individuals from all over the country to participate in a club that prides itself on leaving a legacy behind for future generations to enjoy.

Name: State of Golf NC
Description:
State of Golf brings year-round golf and premium cocktails together under one roof at Durham's American Tobacco Campus.

Our space features state-of-the-art golf simulators where you can play some of the world's best courses, work on your game, or just hang out with friends - no matter the weather. Whether you're a serious golfer looking to practice or someone who just wants to have a good time, we've got you covered.

At the bar, we're mixing craft cocktails that are as thoughtful as they are delicious. Think elevated drinks in a relaxed atmosphere where you can actually enjoy yourself.

This is golf without the barriers - no tee times, no dress codes, no attitude. Just great golf, great drinks, and a place where everyone's welcome.

Play More.

Name: Kirkcaldy Golf Club
Description: The last golf course designed by Old Tom Morris in 1904, this attractive 18-hole layout features scenic views, lush fairways and smooth greens. The Tiel burn runs throughout the golf course providing an abundance of wildlife and the perfect place for a relaxing game of golf with family or friends.

Name: North Jersey Country Club
Description:
Situated on three hundred forested acres in Wayne, New Jersey, only twenty miles west of New York City,
North Jersey Country Club is renowned for its award-winning Walter Travis-designed golf course and classically-styled Tudor Clubhouse. Since its founding in 1895, North Jersey Country Club has aimed to provide its members and guests with a consistently relaxing and rewarding experience.

In addition to golf, members have the opportunity to enjoy casual and formal fine dining, a fully equipped fitness center, tennis and paddle tennis courts, an outdoor heated swimming pool and access to banquet facilities for parties and special events.

Name: Maxim Golf Solutions
Description: At Maxim Golf Solutions, it is our goal to help every operation we work with maximize their earning potential. We have years of real, on-the-job experience in diverse markets with a proven track record of success. We’re confident that we can help your company earn more money and offer improved services that will distinguish you from the competition.

Name: Shaker Ridge Country Club
Description: Shaker Ridge Country Club is a private, member-owned club located in the heart of the Capital District. Established in 1929, Shaker Ridge was originally designed by Jim Thompson and remodeled by Stephen Kay and Doug Smith. Our 18-hole course features 6837 yards of golf from the longest tees for a par of 71. Our members and many top PGA professionals have enjoyed the course. As a family-oriented club, other amenities include a beautiful 25,000 square-foot Clubhouse, pool, playground, fine and casual dining, and a full calendar of social activities.

Name: Kelowna Golf & Country Club
Description:
Kelowna Golf & Country Club is a private golf club that was formed in 1920 and is the 2nd oldest Club in the valley. Our Club has a reputation of being one of the finest facilities in the province and is considered a great traditional style golf course.

Our mission statement is to provide excellence in the golf and country club experience through a commitment to member satisfaction, and by fostering a positive culture through adherence to the following values; Fellowship, Continuous Improvement, Environmental Sensitivity, and Communication.

Description: Birdiemaker Indoor Golf

Our enjoyable, well-conditioned, and challenging course design offers a great experience for all levels of play.  From the 6741-yard Par 72 golf course, to the clubhouse, to the event center we are certain you will enjoy the great service and commitment to quality we strive to provide for you.

Name: Milburn Country Club
Description: Milburn Country Club is the ideal community-gathering place. Our mission is to provide all members, family & guests a premier golf, tennis, dining, and social experience in a friendly, inclusive, and comfortable environment. Milburn Country Club is exclusive to members yet we provide a warm and welcoming environment.

Name: Lincolnshire Fields Country Club
Description: Lincolnshire Fields Country Club is all that a classic Central Illinois country club has to offer. Members enjoy a well-manicured championship golf course, spectacular dining, social events, tennis courts and an outstanding pool facility. Lincolnshire Fields Country Club also hosts events for non-members, making it the ideal venue for weddings, golf outings, corporate events or any special social occasion.

Name: Golf Consultants
Description:
Guest Experience Optimization: We help you craft unforgettable experiences that keep golfers coming back, from the course to the clubhouse.
Revenue-Driving Strategies: Whether through improved operational efficiency or innovative marketing, we ensure your course stays financially strong.
Food & Beverage Services: We specialize in transforming F&B operations into profit centers by enhancing menus, streamlining service, and delivering exceptional value to your guests.
Financial Analysis & Growth: Our data-driven approach uncovers opportunities for growth and ensures every dollar works hard for your course.

Name: Bristow Manor Golf Club
Description: Established in 1993, Bristow Manor Golf Club is an 18-hole semi private golf club open to the public and also offers annual golf membership packages. Featuring some of the best course conditioning in Northern Virginia with luxuriously plush Zoysia-grass fairways, bent greens, and the signature 467-yard seventh hole — a par 4 locally voted as one of the Top Ten Toughest Holes in Northern Virginia — Bristow Manor Golf Club has established itself as the D.C. area’s premier daily fee course. This Par 72 Championship Golf Course tops out at 7,102 yards with generous fairways, undulating greens, and a picturesque eighteenth hole framed by a bunker and a pond. The USGA rated the course 73.9 from the Back Tees, with a slope of 141. The Manor Pub is the on-site pub that serves at-the-turn-food to golfers, and casual lunch and dinner options to golfers and non-golfers. The Manor House is Bristow Manor Golf Club's signature 1800’s southern style home used to host weddings and other private events.

Name: High Meadows Golf & Country Club
Description:
Nestled in the scenic Blue Ridge Mountains of northwestern North Carolina, High Meadows Golf Course is a true gem of the Carolinas. Designed by renowned architect George Cobb in 1964, our course offers not only stunning views but also an exceptional golfing experience that has stood the test of time.
At the heart of our community is the clubhouse, home to our dining facilities with both spacious indoor and outdoor seating overlooking the lake and the golf course. Inside, you’ll find a full-service bar and two elegant dining spaces. Whether you're enjoying a quiet dinner, hosting a celebration, or dancing the night away in the grand ballroom, it’s the perfect setting to make lasting memories with friends and family.
Our amenities extend beyond the greens—the pool house is designed for both wellness and fun. Upstairs, you’ll find a fully equipped fitness area. 
We invite you to explore all that High Meadows has to offer—where natural beauty, genuine connection, and timeless tradition come together.

Name: Candlewood Valley Country Club
Description: Selected by the New England Golf Course Owners Association as 2026 Golf Course of the Year, Candlewood Valley Country Club is a challenging and scenic 18 hole public golf course situated between the rolling hills of New Milford, CT. In addition to golf, the course offers lessons with our PGA professional, restaurant, banquets, and pro shop.

Name: Yahnundasis Golf Club
Description: The Yahnundasis is a private golf club dedicated to providing superior services & amenities to its members and guests, and also caters upscale banquet events, weddings & meetings for the public.

Name: Crondon Park Golf
Description:
Situated in the tranquil Crondon Park Estate, our championship course is renowned in Essex and is considered one of the most challenging in the county.

Stretching over 6,800 yards from the back tees, Crondon provides a rigorous test for golfers at all skill levels.

Our Golf club boasts an impressive landscape surrounding the main course, with over 20,000 trees planted more than two decades ago, creating a classic parkland ambience. Most of the time, you can only see the hole you're currently playing.

The course remains a formidable presence of the Essex golf scene, featuring a combination of 5 par 3's, 5 par 5's, and 8 par 4's, offering opportunities for impressive scores if you're ready to tackle its unique challenges.

If you’re looking for an inviting Essex golf club with a challenging course - we extend a warm welcome. The course has matured beyond its years, remains in excellent condition and is a must-visit for golfers in the area. Browse our membership options or book a Tee Time to discover the enjoyment of our popular course for yourself.

Name: Quarry Oaks Golf Course
Description: Quarry Oaks Golf Course is a 27 hole facility, located just a short 35 minute drive from Winnipeg, just outside of Steinbach, Manitoba.  We offer three different unique nine-hole courses, with first class practice facilities and a fully licensed restaurant.

Name: Savannah Country Club
Description: Savannah Country Club is home to a Donald Ross designed, championship golf course. The 6715 yard, 18 hole, par 71 course boasts picturesque fairways and small well bunkered greens that offers an experience that is enjoyable yet challenging. In addition to golf, we offer tennis, pickleball, pool, dining, and many social activities.

Name: Superior Indoor Golf
Description: Superior Indoor Golf is a new state-of-the-art indoor golf studio in Concord, NC. We offer a wide range of world-famous courses, along with practice options that provide real-time data with each shot. We have four bays available for your enjoyment and also offer drinks and snacks. This is a great place to work on your game, enjoy time with friends, or even host a team-building work event for your job or business.

Name: Real Club Astur de Regatas
Description: Real Club Astur de Regatas is a company based out of Spain.

Name: Flint Hills National Golf Club
Description:
Flint Hills National Golf Club is a luxury golf club with overnight accommodations, indoor and outdoor dining facilities, a walk-in cigar/humidor room, a 31-acre golf practice/instructional facility as well as indoor studios, and an 18-hole championship course, currently ranked #2 in the state of Kansas and #132 in the world by Golf Digest.

"I have built a hundred golf courses. Everything I learned from the first ninety-nine went into this. Flint Hills is as good a course as I’ve ever designed." - Tom Fazio

Name: Piedmont Club
Description:
A private Club known for its social, welcoming atmosphere, Piedmont prides itself on being a place to make connections. The Tom Fazio-designed course is the main attraction at the Club in Haymarket, Virginia, but that is just the start of what Members – some of whom have been Members since the Club's inception – can enjoy in this picturesque setting.
One of Northern Virginia's Premier Golf Clubs
Golf at the Piedmont Club is a truly unforgettable experience. Set against the beautiful Blue Ridge Mountains, our Tom Fazio-designed 18-hole course offers generous fairways and medium-sized subtle greens to provide a challenge for golfers of all skill levels. It is truly one of the most enjoyable and best-conditioned courses in Northern Virginia. Our golf facility features a fully stocked pro shop offering professional club fitting services, lessons from our experienced pro staff, as well as a full calendar of events, outings and tournaments for Members.

Name: Aberdour Golf Club
Description:
Established in 1896, our well-maintained parkland course by the cliffs of the Firth of Forth offers fantastic views and is an enjoyable and testing round for golfers of all abilities. 

The clubhouse provides members, visitors and guests with comfortable facilities including changing rooms and showers. Our Riverview Lounge offers a panoramic view across the Firth of Forth to Edinburgh and is a great place to relax and enjoy our bar and catering facilities.

Our Pro Shop, headed by Michael Kanev PGA Professional and his team, provides you with everything you need. Golf retail, repairs and golf lessons available.

Name: SAKONNET POINT CLUB
Description: Founded in 1998 to revitalize an historic harbor property and to preserve its storied heritage, the Sakonnet Point Club's mission is to provide members and their guests access to the Sakonnet waters, as well as offer quality, complimentary activities such as boating, swimming, exercising, dining, and socializing in a setting of unmatched harbor and ocean views. The Club is fully committed to maintaining a relaxed, family-focused and welcoming atmosphere, and managing its financial affairs in a responsible manner.

Name: Yamba Golf & Country Club
Description: Yamba Golf and Country Club is a non for profit organisation.

Name: A-1 Golf Carts
Description: At A-1 Golf Carts we are golf cart enthusiasts, and we are excited to help you experience the fun and adventure that a quality E-Z-GO, Cushman, Western Golf Carts vehicle can bring into your life! We are a golf cart dealership serving the Chandler area, offering the best in new and pre-owned golf carts and other golf cart vehicles. Our friendly and knowledgeable sales, financing, service, and parts departments are ready to offer outstanding service at every point, from assisting while you're making your choice to ongoing maintenance and customization. At A-1 Golf Carts, we value the opportunity to create a long-term relationship with our customers, and we do that by making sure to exceed your expectations.

Name: Golf Club Verden e.V.
Description: Das vielfältige Angebot an Spielmöglichkeiten auf unserer schönen 27-Loch-Golfanlage mit ihren unverwechselbar und individuell gestalteten Bahnen sowie der 5-Loch-Kurzplatz (Pay & Play), bieten neben der reizvollen Landschaft viele faire sportliche Herausforderungen. Die Driving-Range mit ihren 18 Abschlagplätzen, davon 5 überdacht sowie dem Putting- und Pitchinggreen ermöglichen optimale Trainingsbedingungen mit und ohne Golf-Pro.

Name: Ada Indoor Country Club
Description: Introducing a state-of-the-art indoor golf experience in Ada, Michigan. With 3 Golfzon simulators, we will provide members with an exceptional experience. Stay tuned for exciting updates!

Name: La Sella Golf
Description:
Ubicado en Denia, Alicante.
La Sella Golf ofrece una experiencia excepcional con sus 27 hoyos distribuidos en tres recorridos. 
Diseñado por José María Olazábal, este campo se distingue como uno de los más importantes a nivel nacional. 

El torneo La Sella Open, que se celebra en este campo, ha sido elegido por las profesionales del Ladies European Tour como el 'Mejor Torneo del Año 2023'.

Name: Club Hato Verde Golf
Description:
“El Club de Golf Hato Verde es un club joven, abierto y dinámico que inició su actividad en el año 2008 en el entorno privilegiado de la Sierra Norte, a tan sólo 25 min. del centro de Sevilla”.

Diseñado por Manuel Piñero, el campo de golf de Hato Verde de 18 hoyos y par 70 ofrece hoyos accesibles en distancia y greenes con movimiento que hacen de él un campo muy divertido, que permite utilizar todos los palos y caminar durante todo el recorrido sin grandes esfuerzos.

Es un campo que, sin duda, sorprenderá a los handicaps bajos y que reúne las condiciones perfectas para que disfruten seniors, damas y juniors.

La zona de prácticas cuenta con “Driving Range” con posiciones de tiro en hierba y alfombra, y zona de juego corto (putting green, chip, approach).

Name: Fremont Hills Country Club
Description:
Fremont Hills Country Club is the only not-for-profit, member-owned, private country club in the Springfield area, making it one of the most affordable clubs to join. Managed by a Board of Directors comprised of volunteer members elected by our membership, the members and the board help structure the club, it’s programs and committees ensuring the club and any updates are in line with what the membership as a whole wishes it to be. Operating a club solely for the benefit of its membership provides a much more satisfying member experience overall.

The 80-acre, 18-hole championship golf course is recognized for its manicured Bermuda fairways and bent grass greens. The course features a classic, playable design that makes artful use of the lush scenery and mature oak trees interlaced through the native Ozark environment, offering four sets of tees for fairness, quality and playability.

Our heated, resort-like, 25 yard swimming pool offers five swimming lanes, zero-entry beach, children’s splash pad play area, and plenty of seating and dining. Our staff is on-hand to serve beverages and an extensive pool menu. The pool is open seven days a week from Memorial Day to Labor Day, lifeguards are on duty at all times.

Our 20,000 sq. ft. clubhouse can accommodate up to 200 people and offers first class amenities for members and their guests in a relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere overlooking the driving range, 18th hole and the swimming pool. Enjoy a casual dining experience or beverages in the full-service restaurant and bar, on one of the decks, around the pool or under the Hack Shack Pavilion overlooking the ninth and eighteenth hole. Our culinary staff offers a first-class catering service available for private parties and receptions. Our private clubhouse is also open to non-member events, such as weddings, family celebrations, business meetings or presentations and golf tournaments. The extensive menu, attentive and friendly staff, and beautiful view of the fairway.

Name: City of Newcastle Golf Club
Description:
Welcome to the City of Newcastle Golf Club, where passion for golf meets a commitment to excellence. Nestled in the picturesque landscapes of Newcastle, our club offers a premier golfing experience designed for players of all skill levels.

With a beautifully maintained 18-hole championship course and a welcoming community, we strive to provide an exceptional environment for both leisure and competitive play. Our modern clubhouse features a bar, dining options, event spaces. We also have a pro shop equipped with the latest gear to enhance your game.

At the City of Newcastle Golf Club, we believe in fostering a love for the sport and building lasting connections. Whether you're looking to improve your game, host an event, enjoy a day on the greens, or simply enjoy a meal in the clubhouse, our dedicated team is here to support you every step of the way.

Join us to experience golf at its finest, surrounded by breath taking views and a vibrant community. Follow us for updates, events, and insights into our golfing culture.

Name: The Hill Club
Description: The Hill Club will be a place for an infinitesimally small group of members who seek great golf on an idyllic parcel of land where the ethos of the club is “Proper Impropriety”

Name: Mains of Taymouth Country Estate & Golf Course
Description:
Real Freedom, Real Luxury, Real Scotland
Welcome to the award-winning Mains of Taymouth Country Estate & Golf Course, a Royal Westmorland Highland Estate located in the picturesque village of Kenmore, Highland Perthshire.

Our accommodation is second to none complete with stunning views for that perfect rural getaway. Most of our properties are pet-friendly and available for any-day arrival.

Our fantastic onsite facilities include Perthshire’s finest 9-hole golf course, The Courtyard Bar & Brasserie, the award-winning Courtyard Deli & gift shop.

Name: Kelab Rahman Putra Malaysia
Description: Kelab Rahman Putra Malaysia (KRPM) is a members owned club that offers two challenging 18-hole par 72 golf courses, The Lakes Course and The Hills Course and a spacious Club House full of amenities for members, family and guests.

Name: Kent Golf Simulator Ltd
Description: Golf Simulator using trackman technology

Name: Golf Sign and Design
Description: Golf Sign and Design is a leading golf course furnishing specialist located in Jasper, GA.   We specialize in golf course furniture and staging essentials, creative golf course and clubhouse signage, custom tee markers, 3D yardage guides, course mapping, pin sheets, professional photography, and drone flyover video.  We are owned and operated by golf professionals that are personally involved in the day to day operations ensuring the highest quality standards for all our clients.  Our goal is to exceed your expectations every time!

Name: Airport Golf Club Šurany
Description:
Miesto, kde firmy spájajú prácu s oddychom – efektívne, štýlovo a mimo stereotypu.

Ponúkame ideálny priestor pre firemné akcie, teambuildingy, networking a športové dni.
Čaká vás 9-jamkové golfové ihrisko, footgolf, discgolf, lukostreľba a možnosti na mieru podľa potrieb vášho tímu.

 Skvelá dostupnosť v Nitrianskom kraji
 Profesionálny servis, občerstvenie a podpora organizácie
 Relax v prírode a neformálne prostredie, ktoré podporuje spoluprácu

Vytvorte zážitok, na ktorý sa bude spomínať.

Name: BillyMartinGolf
Description: Whether you're a highly competitive junior aiming for the top, a seasoned player striving for lower scores, or just starting out and seeking a solid foundation for your golf swing, Billy Martin has the solutions to help you reach your goals. Billy Martin Golf offers a full suite of personalized learning options all through the free GolfLiveApp.

Name: Kelly Plantation Golf Club
Description: Kelly Plantation Golf Club is the gem of the Emerald Coast

Name: GCAS Golfbaneägarna
Description: Ideell branschförening.

Name: Crail Golfing Society
Description: Crail Golfing Society is a company based out of United Kingdom.

Name: ASTBURY GOLF CLUB
Description: Astbury Golf Club. - established in 1922, is a vibrant members parkland golf club located in the beautiful rural South Cheshire countryside.

Name: Market Rasen Golf Club Limited
Description: Market Rasen Golf Club celebrated its Centenary in 2012 and is one of the premier Clubs in the county. Market Rasen is a challenging, picturesque heathland course with many natural hazards including the River Rase, which flows through the course. It is a friendly Club with about 550 playing members. Casual green fee payers and societies are most welcome and a testimony of its popularity is the fact that many Societies return each year.

Name: The Kitchi Gammi Club
Description:
Private Membership Available | No Monthly Food and Beverage Minimum | Complimentary Meeting Space and AV for Small and Large Events | Over 70 Reciprocal Clubs Nation and World Wide | Seasonal Golf Available at Ridgeview Country Club | Personalized & Elevated Service | Special Membership Dues for Non-Residents and Young Professionals
Contact: membership@kitchigammiclub.com

Name: Golf Hour
Description:
Golf Hour in Holly Springs, NC provides a community space for social entertainment and indoor golf & multi-sport fun. We’ve built a modern, relaxed lounge where guests can play, practice, or simply hang out while enjoying food, drinks, and company.
• Premium Golf & Multi-Sport Simulation: Our four state-of-the-art simulator bays feature TruGolf Apogee launch monitors powered by E6 Connect and Apex software. Whether you’re a beginner or a scratch golfer, enjoy realistic play on over 300 golf courses or analyze precise performance data. Each bay has its own tv that you can dictate what you watch.
• More Than Golf: Switch from the fairway to the field with our multi-sport options - soccer, baseball, hockey, bowling, disc golf, zombie dodgeball and more.
• Pay-as-you-Play, Leagues & Memberships: Join a league, become a member, or just drop in for a round. Your game, your schedule, your style.
• Lounge Without Limits: You don’t need a simulator reservation to enjoy Golf Hour. Guests are welcome to relax in our lounge, bring in or order food from your favorite restaurant or enjoy wines, select cocktails, soft drinks, and local & craft beers while watching the big game on one of our big screen TVs.
• Self-Pour Tap Wall: Our self-serve tap wall features 15 rotating taps of local & craft beers - giving guests plenty of options to sip and sample at their own pace.
• Food from Oakview Public House: We’re excited to partner with our neighbors at Oakview Public House so guests can order delicious menu selections delivered directly to our lounge - no leaving the fun required.
• Event Space Rental: Partner with us to host your next party, corporate event, or celebration in our flexible, upscale space. Combine simulator play with food, drinks, and a welcoming atmosphere.
Whether you're meeting friends for a fun night out, want to catch a game, get your kids out of the house, host a corporate or social event, or work remote for the day, Golf Hour offers it all in a beautiful space.

Name: White Mountain Country Club
Description:
White Mountain Country Club offers members an unrivaled experience in Arizona's high country. From spring to fall we are considered, "home in the mountains" for generations of families who spend summers enjoying our beautiful private Club. Our beautiful grounds include an expansive clubhouse with stunning views, championship golf, racquet sports, a thriving youth program and an abundance of activities. 

Since our humble beginnings, WMCC has evolved into a premier destination for golf and other recreation in the White Mountains, where our members feel a sense of comfort and pride of ownership.  We have hosted hundreds of events, inspired young children to take up the game of golf and forged thousands of friendships and memories. We are truly a retreat in the pines like no other.

Membership is by invitation.

Name: Oakhurst Country Club
Description: Named the “Best New Course in Northern California” by California Golf magazine when it opened in 1990, Oakhurst Country Club’s breathtaking Par 72, 7205 Yard championship layout continues to captivate golfers. thanks to its imaginative design and outstanding conditioning.

Name: SmartCourse
Description:
SmartCourse is an innovative golf course management solution that combines advanced sensor technology, wireless connectivity, and data analytics to optimise course operations.

Our integrated system provides real-time insights into turf health, irrigation needs, player movements, and equipment tracking. We enhance this ground-level data with aerial multispectral imaging from drones, capturing crucial vegetation indices to offer a comprehensive view of course conditions.

By harnessing the power of both terrestrial and aerial data, SmartCourse empowers superintendents to make informed decisions, reduce costs, and improve playing conditions.

Our solution balances traditional course management with cutting-edge technology, promoting environmental stewardship while enhancing the overall golfing experience.

Name: Club de golf Ormstown
Description:
Le Club de golf Ormstown vous accueille sur un parcours de 18 trous (par 72) situé en Montérégie, offrant un défi stimulant dans un décor naturel paisible. Avec ses 6 362 verges, ses plans d’eau, ses zones boisées et ses verts bien entretenus, notre terrain s’adresse autant aux joueurs expérimentés qu’aux golfeurs récréatifs.

Au-delà du jeu, Golf Ormstown propose une expérience complète : ambiance conviviale, terrasse ensoleillée, microbrasserie sur place, voiturettes électriques, services de restauration et événements tout au long de la saison. Nous accueillons les particuliers, les familles, les groupes corporatifs et les organisateurs de tournois avec un service personnalisé.

Nous croyons que le golf doit être à la fois accessible, agréable et bien encadré. C’est pourquoi nous mettons l’accent sur un accueil chaleureux, un parcours bien entretenu et des installations de qualité. Que ce soit pour une partie amicale, une journée en famille ou un événement sur mesure, notre équipe est là pour vous faire vivre une expérience mémorable.

Name: Brooklake Country Club
Description:
Brooklake Country Club is a private, member-focused country club offering championship golf, premier tennis and pickleball, exceptional dining, and a vibrant calendar of social events in a welcoming, family-friendly environment.

Members enjoy:
• Championship golf and practice facilities
• Premier tennis and pickleball programs
• Elevated dining and clubhouse experiences
• Year-round social, family, and lifestyle events
• A strong sense of community and connection

From the course to the clubhouse, Brooklake Country Club delivers a refined yet approachable club lifestyle—where timeless traditions meet modern amenities and meaningful connections are built.

Name: Country Club of Winter Haven
Description:
In 1923, the founding members, seeking a place of natural beauty and a congenial way of life, had no way of knowing that their new association was to eventually become Central Florida’s most prestigious and historic private country club.  Today, we reap the benefits of gentlemen, who back then, made a decision and commitment to form what was then Lake Region Country Club.  But it wasn’t until 1964 that the Club resembled anything close to a modern country club as we know one today.  In 2013 the Club sold to a small group of equity Members and is now known as The Country Club of Winter Haven.  History though, will not be forgotten.

The first trip down the long, tree lined drive leading to the Club solidifies the fact that this is someplace special; where memories have been made over the years during dances and weddings, tournaments and parties, holes-in-one, and tennis rallies. But, more importantly, this property, no matter the name, is treasured as a place where lifetime relationships have been, and will be formed.

Name: Michaelbrook Golf
Description: Michaelbrook is a public 18 hole mid-length recreational golf course. The family atmosphere provides a country feeling and an abundance of bird species within the marsh systems, adjoined to the city park biking and walking trails. You will experience an atmosphere of relaxed leisure activity with a focus on fun, entertainment and great dining at our full pet friendly patio pub.

Name: Greener Golf Network
Description:
Our aim is to influence and signpost golf clubs to resources so they can lower their carbon footprint, reduce water and energy requirements, and increase biodiversity on their own land to benefit the wider landscape.

We run a series of events and site visits throughout the year for golf clubs in Leicestershire and Warwickshire. 

Please visit our website where you will find a range of case studies and resources to help your golf club on their sustainability journey.

Name: St Austell Golf Club
Description:
St. Austell Golf Club is a James Braid designed private members club located just outside St.Austell in Cornwall. The course itself is an undulating parkland / heathland course which provides a test for both beginners and low handicappers alike. Facilities include: A licensed bar for members and guests, men’s and ladies changing facilities, separate dining area, well stocked professional shop, floodlit driving range, swing & fitting room, practice putting green and short game area. 
The club caters for both members and visitors providing facilities for a variety of functions and events from birthday parties and weddings to meetings and society bookings.

Name: The Colts Neck Golf Club
Description:
The Colts Neck Golf Club is Monmouth County's premier semi-private golf facility. Whether it's your first look at the picturesque fairways or our Scottish style bunkers framed by plush greenery, you will be enamored by the sheer beauty that's inherent throughout. The Club offers a driving range and a full member practice area with bunker and chipping green.

 All of our members and guests are privileged to take advantage of The New Jersey Golf Performance Academy, an on-site, comprehensive instruction program combining the fundamentals of golf, body and mind to offer the very best in golf skills development.  Individual and group instruction is available for men, women and juniors year-round. 

Our impressive clubhouse is your home to relaxation, socialization and camaraderie among your fellow members.  Our recently renovated Pegasus Terrace is open for fine dining & special events.

Name: Loudoun Golf & Country Club, Inc.
Description: Founded in 1927, Loudoun Golf & Country Club was organized to promote membership assembly, sports and leisure activities. Today, we offer an 18-hole championship golf course and golf practice facilities; tennis and pickleball courts; swimming and wading pools; and a full-service Clubhouse with both indoor and outdoor dining outlets — all in a scenic, peaceful, family-friendly environment.

Name: Glendale Golf & Country Club
Description:
The Glendale opened its doors in 1961 and since that time has become one of the premier golf facilities in Canada. Tradition, integrity, and commitment rank high in our staff’s service pledge to our members.

The Glendale Golf & Country Club strives to provide a family orientated atmosphere offering a consistently high level of service and amenities that will meet or exceed the Member’s expectation of what the private golf club experience should be.

Our current Membership enjoys one of the best laid out golf courses in Western Canada with fantastic conditions under the ever-watchful eye of Golf Course and Property Manager- Chris Prodahl. The full-service golf shop has become known as one of the best-stocked in the city. Led by PGA of Canada Head Professional Jeff MacGregor, our professional staff and their teaching programs are second to none. Finally, the Clubhouse atmosphere offering everything from a sports lounge to classical fine dining, featuring Executive Chef Darrell Sopel’s latest creations, provides a perfect location to relax after your round or visit for a very enjoyable meal. I am sure by now you are starting to realize the pride we have in our golf club. Our Food & Beverage team is diligent in their efforts to ensure each visit is enjoyable and that our staff provides a service level expected in a private club setting.

Name: Ouirgane Explore
Description: En tant qu'entreprise spécialisée dans le tourisme golfique au Maroc, nous sommes déterminés à offrir des expériences exceptionnelles. Nous collaborons avec des golfs de renom pour créer des séjours sur mesure, adaptés à tous les niveaux de compétence. Nos voyages golfiques sont conçus pour combiner la passion du golf avec la découverte de la beauté marocaine.

Name: Club Deportivo Somontes
Description: El Club Deportivo Somontes, ubicado a solo 5 minutos de Moncloa cuenta con instalaciones que incluyen golf, tenis, pádel, pickleball, piscina, espacios para organizar eventos y diferentes opciones de restauración.

Name: CLUB LATINOAMERICANO DE LA CIUDAD DAKHLA
Description: Sin Fines de LUCRO

Name: Dara Sakor Golf Resort
Description:
Dara Sakor Golf Resort  
In the heart of Cambodia's pristine landscapes, where the lush green of nature meets the serene blue of the ocean, lies a haven of luxury and relaxation - Dara Sakor Golf Resort. Born from a vision to create a unique destination that blends the thrill of adventure with the comfort of relaxation, Dara Sakor has become a symbol of refined elegance and unparalleled service. 
Our story begins with a dream to offer an escape - not just a place to stay but an experience to live. Dara Sakor Golf Resort was envisioned as a one-stop vacation destination, a place where every detail is curated to ensure our guests' utmost satisfaction. From the tranquil waters of our private beach to the challenging fairways of our world-class golf course, each element of the resort is designed to provide a memorable experience.
At Dara Sakor, we cater to a discerning clientele, ranging from 25 to 55 years old, who seek more than just a holiday. They are explorers of life, seeking to enrich their experiences with moments of joy, relaxation, and adventure. They come from across the globe - China, Korea, the USA, Japan - each with their own story, each looking to add a new chapter to their journey at Dara Sakor.
Our guests are not just visitors; they are the heroes of their own adventure, and we are their guides. Whether it’s perfecting their swing at our lush golf course, rejuvenating at our exclusive spa, or making a splash at our exhilarating water park, we ensure that each moment at Dara Sakor is one to cherish.
As we look to the future, Dara Sakor Golf Resort continues to evolve, always pushing the boundaries of luxury and service. Our commitment to excellence has made us a beacon of high-quality living, and our dedication to our guests' well-being remains unwavering. Dara Sakor is not just a resort; it’s a journey to the extraordinary, a gateway to experiences that linger long after our guests have returned home.

Name: Mauritius Golf Federation
Description:
Founded in 1994, the mission of the MGF is to foster and develop the sport of golf in Mauritius. With the assistance of the R&A, the MGF, has, with mixed success, embarked on an ambitious project to bring golf to all juniors on the island.

This is an ongoing project and requires the commitment and dedication of numerous golf teaching professionals on the island.  The MGF firmly believes that the future continuity of the sport lies within the development of juniors to a level that will reach international competitiveness.
Read more here: https://www.mgf.mu/history

Name: Higuera Golf Club
Description: Located in Punta de Mita, México, Higuera Golf Club offers world class golf with innovative services and amenities. This Greg Norman designed course features some of the most breathtaking scenery available with stunning oceanfront features, well-manicured fairways and greens that seamlessly blend into the surrounding beauty.

Name: Utrechtse Golfclub Amelisweerd
Description: Onze 18 holes golfbaan en 9 holes par-3 zijn gelegen aan de rand van Utrecht langs de A27, met de Domtoren in zicht. De baan kenmerkt zich door diverse natuurlijke elementen waardoor deze veel uitdaging biedt voor zowel de beginnende als gevorderde speler. We zijn een relatief jonge vereniging en de club kenmerkt zich door een prettige sfeer, waar iedereen zich welkom voelt. Ook ben je van harte welkom voor een hapje en drankje in ons clubhuis!

Name: Wynnum Golf Club
Description: Wynnum Golf Club (est. 1922) in Brisbane's Bayside, offers an 18-hole championship parkland golf course for members and visitors, practice facilities, and a classic Queenslander Clubhouse with open patios and golf course views. It is a premium venue for weddings, functions and corporate golf days.

Name: Bognor Regis Golf Club
Description:
As a private club, owned and run by its members, we can offer you a special retreat to play golf and enjoy our fine clubhouse before & after your round.

Visitors and Societies are most welcome with prior arrangement by contacting our office, and the services of our PGA Professional are available to everyone including lessons, custom equipment, and clothing.

Name: Golf Paradise Club
Description: An innovative indoor golf range with cutting-edge technology so you can improve your game!

Name: Emilia Golf Experience
Description:
Emilia Golf Experience è il brand che unisce tre circoli storici a 18 buche della provincia di Parma e Reggio Emilia e due campi a 9 buche, di cui uno con tecnologia Toptracer Range.

Offriamo un’esperienza completa, tra golf e territorio, unendo percorsi di alta qualità a cultura, enogastronomia e business networking.

Organizziamo gare, eventi aziendali, attività di team building e soggiorni personalizzati per gruppi e singoli.

Siamo a:
Parma
18 buche - in via Campi, 8 43038 Sala Baganza (PR)
9 buche con Toptracer Range - in strada Martinella, 328/A 43124 Vigatto (PR)

Salsomaggiore
18 buche - in Località Contignaco, 105/A 43039 Salsomaggiore (PR)

Reggio Emilia
18 buche - in via Del Casinazzo, 1 43123 Reggio Emilia (RE)
9 buche - in via Federico Garcia Lorca, 5 43122 Reggio Emilia (RE)

Name: Cobbs Glen Country Club
Description: Cobb's Glen Country Club is named after its designer, George Cobb, he designed many golf courses, including the par-3 course at Augusta National. The golf course sprawls across rolling terrain blanketed with mature forests. The course has hosted a variety of events over the years including the U.S. Open Qualifier and the South Carolina Amateur Championship.

Name: Kungl. Drottningholms Golfklubb
Description: Kungl. Drottningholms Golfklubbs 18 hål är utlagd på kunglig mark och klubbens 1400 medlemmar och många gästspelare kan njuta likaväl av den vackra naturen som det närbelägna slottet.

Name: Beaconsfield Golf Club
Description: Beaconsfield Golf Club, Seer Green, England

Name: Golf La Roche Posay
Description:
Dans un espace de biodiversité de 45 ha, notre parcours boisé 18 trous de 5 839 mètres (par 72) est un lieu unique pour passer un moment agréable. De par son environnement bucolique, la qualité de nos infrastructures, l'accueil et la convivialité du Bar, notre Golf éco-responsable est prêt à vous accueillir.
N'hésitez pas à venir à notre rencontre pour partager notre passion.

Name: Vallentuna Padel
Description:
Välkommen till Vallentuna Padel – en trivsam anläggning med en familjär känsla!

Vår nybyggda hall, invigd den 8 oktober 2022, har en imponerande takhöjd på över 10 meter, toppmodern belysning och ljuddämpning i världsklass. Här spelar du padel i en miljö skapad för optimal spelupplevelse.

Anläggningen har 8 banor, inklusive 2 centercourts med panoramaglas och 1 singelbana. Vi stoltserar även med Vallentunas största seriespel, där vi erbjuder spel i herr-, dam- och mixedserier på alla nivåer. Säkra din plats i nästa omgång genom att maila info@vallentunapadel.se.

Hos oss hittar du stora sociala ytor med en inbjudande lounge, ett mysigt café och en välsorterad padelbutik. Vi erbjuder också yinyoga i vår vackra, specialanpassade yogasal, samt konferens- och mötesrum, behandlingsrum och omklädningsrum med bastu.

Vallentuna Padel erbjuder gratis parkering och laddplatser för elbilar för en bekväm upplevelse. Name: Atlantic City Country Club
Description:
Since 1897, Atlantic City Country Club has enjoyed a vast and rich history, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. As one of America’s oldest and most prolific golf clubs, Atlantic City Country Club has been home to many firsts, including being the “Birthplace of the Birdie.” The earliest traditions of this seaside links course are still evident today. Finely manicured fairways and large sloping green complexes protected by deep sand bunkers remain the course’s signature, as it did more than a century ago.

Atlantic City Country Club's commitment to excellence sets this club apart.   Offering a world-class private golf course and the highest quality facilities and amenities to both its members and honored guests, including The Taproom Bar & Grille which is open to the public serving lunch, dinner, weekday happy hour, and Sunday Brunch.

With magnificent wedding and banquet facilities, a stunning Skydeck, delicious culinary delights and an extraordinarily accommodating staff, Atlantic City Country Club is a Premier Wedding & Event Venue in southern New Jersey.

Name: Estela Golf Club
Description:
Estela Golf Course stands out as a jewel among Portugal's golf courses. Renowned for its challenging design and Links Course features, this 18-hole course offers a unique experience that attracts golfers from around the globe.

Challenge for Golfers of All Levels: Estela Golf Course presents challenges for golfers of every skill level. Narrow fairways, strategic bunkers, and the Atlantic breezes make it an exhilarating test, even for the most seasoned golf enthusiasts.

Natural Beauty by the Seaside: Overlooking the Atlantic Ocean, the backdrop of this course is truly breathtaking. You'll savor spectacular views while enjoying a magnificent day of golf.

Ideal Location: Just 30 minutes from Francisco Sá Carneiro Airport, Estela Golf Course is easily accessible, making it a perfect stop for golfers looking to experience the best of golf in Portugal.



O Estela Golf Course é uma jóia entre os campos de golfe de Portugal. Conhecido por seu design desafiador e suas características de Links Course, este campo de 18 buracos é uma experiência única que atrai golfistas de todo o mundo.

Desafio para Golfistas de Todos os Níveis: O Estela Golf Course oferece desafios para golfistas de todos os níveis. Os fairways estreitos, os bunkers estratégicos e as brisas do Atlântico o tornam um desafio emocionante, mesmo para os golfistas mais experientes.

Beleza Natural à Beira-Mar: Com vista para o Oceano Atlântico, o cenário deste campo é verdadeiramente deslumbrante. Você desfrutará de vistas espetaculares enquanto desfruta de um magnifico dia de Golfe.

Localização Ideal: Apenas a 30 minutos do Aeroporto Francisco Sá Carneiro, o Estela Golf Course é facilmente acessível, tornando-o uma paragem perfeita para golfistas que desejam experimentar o melhor do golfe em Portugal.

Name: ZIMUSA Golf Association
Description:
About Us - ZIMUSA Dallas GC

At ZIMUSA Dallas GC, our vision is to build a strong foundation for economic empowerment through camaraderie, brotherhood, and a shared love for golf. Our mission is to drive the participation of Afro-Diasporan communities in this influential game, recognizing golf as a gateway to opportunities in business, networking, and personal growth.

We are committed to increasing accessibility, representation, and visibility for minorities in the sport, fostering not just skill development but pathways to economic advancement. As a leading voice for African diaspora representation in golf, we believe that the game can be a catalyst for business partnerships, career growth, and financial well-being.

Whether you’re looking to connect through our Blacks In Golf initiative, learn from Golf Griot, or access personalized golf lessons, we’re here to support your journey. Join our email list today and become part of a community focused on success both on and off the course.

Our Goals:

Empower through Golf: Create access points and opportunities for economic growth by increasing minority participation in the sport.

Build Interest: Unite golfers in the Dallas-Fort Worth area to establish a network that drives both personal and professional development.

Promote Brotherhood: Strengthen ties within the community for collective economic and social advancement.

Enhance Professionalism: Encourage compliance with USGA standards to build a foundation of integrity and excellence in the sport.

Maintain Competitive Standards: Ensure members uphold an official USGA Handicap for consistent improvement and competitiveness.

Host Strategic Events: Organize competitions and events that double as platforms for networking and economic engagement.

Join ZIMUSA Dallas GC and discover the intersection of golf, community, and economic empowerment within a supportive and thriving environment.

Name: Søhøjlandet Golf
Description:
Søhøjlandet Golf Resort byder på en udfordrende og velholdt 18 hullers mesterskabsbane, samt en 6 hullers Pay & Play-bane. 

Søhøjlandet Golf Resort er beliggende i Gjern - Midt i Søhøjlandets smukke og bakkede omgivelser. 

Søhøjlandet Golf Resort byder på en unik og udfordrende golfoplevelse for medlemmer og gæster - ligesom den hvert år bliver flittigt besøgt til vores populære golfophold i vores banenære feriehuse.

Udover vores golfbaner, byder Søhøjlandet Golf Resort også på en restaurant hvor du kan nyde god mad og drikke i naturskønne omgivelser. 

Vores faciliteter er oplagte til alt fra konfirmationer til Company Days - samt alt derimellem. Søhøjlandet Golf Resorts personale er altid klar til at skabe de bedste rammer omkring arrangementer - store som små. 

Hvert år bliver banen besøgt af rigtig mange gæster fra nær og fjern - og den nærmeste nabo er et stort velbesøgt feriecenter. 
Der er derfor et væld af kommercielle muligheder, som kan skabe synlighed, eksponering og forretningsmuligheder for virksomheder i alle størrelser. 
Og kun fantasien sætter grænser - Vi elsker skæve idéer. 

Kontakt os for at få en uforpligtende drøftelse om alt fra golfophold til eksponeringsmuligheder i Søhøjlandet Golf.

Tlf. 7070 7499
Mail: golf@sohojlandetgolf.dk

Name: Golf Guys Mauritius
Description:
Golf Guys Mauritius specialise in providing exceptional golf experiences for enthusiasts and corporate clients alike and our unique approach, which ensures that we not only provide a world-class golf service, but we give back generously to our local communities. As a subsidiary of Golf Guys SA, we bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to the island. Our passion for golf, our commitment to customer service and looking after the charities that care for our people, our animals and our environment is what sets us apart.

We host golf tours to Mauritius, catering to players from all over the world, from beginners to the more gifted and our packages not only deliver some of the best courses in the world, but we also cater for non-golfing partners too. Our tours include transportation, accommodations, tee times, and equipment rentals if required, ensuring an unforgettable experience on some truly stunning courses.

For the locals on the island, we also provide customisable golf activities for sponsored corporate events, charity days and member days. Our services include hole-in-one contests, giant catapult nearest the pin, golf darts, night golf and more.  We also supply various golf equipment, so check out our website as soon as this has been launched - See golfguyssa.com in the interim for an overview of some of our services.

At Golf Guys Mauritius, we pride ourselves on our attention to detail and dedication to customer satisfaction. It's our aim to bring a fun, competitive edge to the golf community on the island - So, bring your A-Game and contact us to learn more about our services and how we can help elevate your golf experience.

Name: Golfhub
Description:
Discover the future of golf in the heart of the prestigious Laguna Phuket. Golhub is the island's premier indoor golf lounge and academy, offering an all-in-one golf experience under one roof. Whether you're escaping the midday sun, dodging a tropical shower, or looking for a unique social venue, our state-of-the-art facility is your ultimate destination.

At Golhub, we combine cutting-edge technology with a passion for the game. Our facility features:

Three State-of-the-Art Trackman Simulators: Experience the pinnacle of virtual golf. Powered by industry-leading Trackman technology, our simulators offer unparalleled accuracy for play and practice. Tee off on legendary courses from around the world or dive deep into your swing data for game-changing analysis.

The Golhub Academy: Elevate your game with personalized coaching from our resident professionals. We offer private lessons and group clinics for golfers of all skill levels, from complete beginners to seasoned players.

A Stylish Bar & Lounge: Relax with a cold beer, a classic cocktail, or a selection of premium beverages while you play or watch your friends. It's the perfect 19th hole.

Curated Pro Shop: Discover a unique collection of modern golf essentials. We feature premium apparel from leading brands like G/FORE and Extracurricular, alongside our own exclusive Golhub merchandise. For your equipment needs, explore our selection of high-performance clubs from LA Golf, precision putters from L.A.B. Golf, and other carefully curated brands.

More than just a place to practice, Golhub is a vibrant community hub. We host exciting leagues, competitive tournaments, and are the perfect venue for your next private party or corporate event.

Our Mission: To grow the game by providing a fun, accessible, and high-tech environment for everyone to experience the joy of golf. Connect with us to book a bay, schedule a lesson, or plan your next event.

Inauguré le 28 octobre 1984 et dessiné par l'Architecte de golf Michel GAYON, le Golf de Meaux-Boutigny propose un parcours 18 trous et un parcours 9 trous compact sur un terrain vallonné de 65 hectares.

Name: Golf Bugz Adventure Tours
Description:
Calling All Golfing Adventurers!  Are You Ready to Unleash Your Inner Legend?

Forget the ordinary. Forget the same old, same old. Golf Bugz Tours isn't your average tee-off and tan lines vacation. We're talking epic African adventures, where challenging signature courses meet the untamed beauty of the wild. Here's what awaits you:

  Conquer Courses Fit for Legends: We're talking 18-hole masterpieces designed to test your skills and leave your adrenaline pumping. Think breathtaking landscapes, strategic layouts, and bragging rights that'll last a lifetime.

**  Beyond the Green, the Wild Awaits:**  Your adventure doesn't end at the 19th hole. Imagine soaring over the African bushveld in a hot air balloon, spotting majestic elephants on a classic safari game drive, or even coming face-to-face with a playful troop of baboons. (Don't worry, experienced guides will be there to keep you safe and in awe.)

**  Luxury Meets Adventure:**  Unwind after a thrilling day on the links in comfortable shared accommodations (think plush beds and maybe even a king-size for added comfort). Delicious meals on a Dinner, Bed & Breakfast basis will keep you fueled for the next adventure.

**  Limited Edition Experiences:**  With only 960 coveted spots available for the year (out of a staggering 80 million golf enthusiasts worldwide!), these tours fill up fast. We're talking an exclusive club of adventurers ready to create memories that'll make your golfing buddies green (with envy, not from the course...).

  Ready to Start Your Adventure?  We get it – you're itching to tee off on an epic African odyssey. Here's the exciting part: just visit https://golfbugz.com/ and we'll help you every step of the way.

YOUR ADVENTURE AWAITS. BE THE LEADER. BE THE LEGEND. EXPERIENCE GOLF, UNTAMED.

Name: The Woodlands Club
Description:
Located in Falmouth, just minutes from downtown Portland, The Woodlands Club offers year-round amenities that distinguish us from any other private club in Maine. Paired with our numerous amenities, we have an experienced and knowledgeable staff, ensuring our members receive the highest level of service while utilizing our facility.

Our 18-hole golf course, designed by Jim and George Fazio, is regionally revered and has hosted several state and regional championships during our history, as well as four Hogan/Nike Tour events, which is known today as the Korn Ferry Tour. Setting us apart from other clubs, The Woodlands Club is known for much more than golf. Our members enjoy year-round indoor amenities including our restaurant and lounge, fitness facility, squash and racquetball courts, pool, and one of the best lit indoor tennis facilities in all of New England, which has hosted many regional USTA events. Outdoors, we offer a heated pool and four tennis courts. We even have a childcare facility allowing you to take advantage of one of our many club offerings, while we take care of your little ones.

Throughout the year, we offer many special social events, tennis and golf clinics, fitness classes and so much more. During the summer, our members look no further than The Woodlands Club for day camp for the kids. Our restaurant has a variety of menu items that often reflect the local offerings, and when summer ends, our members can be found enjoying cocktails at the bar, dining in the lounge, or out on the patio around the firepits watching the sunset. So, as you can see, The Woodlands Club truly is a club for all seasons.

Name: Rungsted Golf Klub
Description:
Rungsted Golf Klub siden 1937
Rungsted Golf Klub blev stiftet i midten af 1930’erne af en lille kreds af golfspillere. De drømte om at anlægge en golfbane i skønne omgivelser - og i Rungsted blev det en realitet, da de anlagde en 18 hullers golfbane efter tegninger af den engelske arkitekt C.A. MacKenzie.

Golfbanen og klubhuset så ved indvielsen i september 1937 i store træk ud som i dag. Allerede i de tidlige år indtog klubben en fremtrædende plads i den danske golfverden - dels som vært for en hel række nationale og internationale turneringer, dels som leverandør af nogle af landets dygtigste golfspillere.

Også inden for dansk golfs mere officielle organer har klubben sat sit præg på udviklingen. Formanden for Dansk Golf Union kom i 30 år i træk fra Rungsted.

I begyndelsen af 1970'erne omlagde klubben en række huller, hvilket skabte plads omkring klubhuset til træningsbanen og puttinggreenen. Senere er banens anlæg løbende blevet justeret i takt med tidens krav og golfspillets udvikling. Nye teesteder er blevet etableret, huller er blevet omlagt eller forlænget, og omfattende pleje af områderne mellem hullerne har beriget naturoplevelsen.


GREENFEE 2023
Greenfeespillere er meget velkommen i Rungsted Golf Klub
Banen er åben for greenfeegæster med et max. hcp på 30
Gæstespil tillades på alle hverdage efter kl. 08.30; weekends og helligdage efter kl 14.00
Maksimalt samlet hcp. i en bold er 108

Company Day
I snart 30 år har Rungsted Golf Klub afviklet RGK Company Day, som er en eksklusiv holdturnering, hvor overskuddet går til at støtte talentudviklingen i klubben.

Kontakt os gerne for mere information.

The history of our club really begins in 1898 when a group of local worthies, including the Marquess of Willingdon, put together a simple 9-hole layout with a corrugated iron hut as their Clubhouse. This course survived seven years or so until 1905, when the legendary J.H. Taylor was commissioned to redesign the layout to a more traditional 18 holes.

Name: Arbroath Golf Links
Description:
Founded in 1877, Arbroath Golf Links is a historic links course steeped in tradition and challenge. Located on the stunning Angus coastline, Arbroath offers golfers a unique and unforgettable experience.

Tee off where legends have played: Our championship course boasts design contributions from three Open Champions – Old Tom Morris, Willie Fernie, and James Braid. Walk in their footsteps and test your skills against a timeless layout that has challenged golfers for generations.

Embrace the elements: A true links course, Arbroath is exposed to the ever-present Scottish wind and rolling dunes. Hone your strategic thinking and shot-making skills as you navigate this demanding yet rewarding terrain. The course will test every aspect of your game, from your driving accuracy to your short game finesse.

Unparalleled beauty: Enjoy breathtaking views of the North Sea as you play. Arbroath's scenic setting adds another layer of enjoyment to your round, creating lasting memories. The combination of rugged coastline, lush fairways, and challenging bunkers provides a visual feast for golfers of all levels.

More than just golf: Arbroath Golf Links is more than just a golf course, it's a welcoming club with a rich history and a vibrant community. We offer a variety of memberships and visitor packages to suit all golfers, from seasoned professionals to enthusiastic beginners. Our clubhouse provides a warm and inviting atmosphere to relax and socialise after your round.

Join our community: Follow us on LinkedIn for the latest news, course updates, and exclusive offers. We're passionate about sharing our love of golf and providing an exceptional experience for all who visit Arbroath Golf Links. We look forward to welcoming you to our historic club.

Name: Jericho National Golf Club
Description:
Founded in 1996, Jericho National Golf Club has quickly established itself as the finest private course in Bucks County. 
Jericho National made its debut in 1999 and was designed by the world-class architectural team of Dr. Michael Hurdzan and Dana Fry.  Known for the dramatic bunkering and contoured greens, Jericho National has quickly become one of the most challenging and enjoyable golf courses in the region.  It was designed to play firm with fast putting surfaces and this concept has remained since inception.  The natural beauty offered by Jericho Mountain and its surroundings make for a spectacular golf experience on this exceptionally conditioned private club.

Our clubhouse features two restaurants, locker rooms, an award winning pro-shop and three charming banquet rooms that can host up to 250. From your first inquiry until the last guest leaves the building, we are committed to providing service that surpasses your expectations and leaves you with elegant memories! We offer a golf membership and/OR a dining membership. 

We are open to the public to host any type of event! Contact the Banquet Department to schedule a tour of our beautiful facility for your golf outing, wedding, shower, mitzvah, rehearsal dinner, or party! We have various menus to choose from to make your event spectacular!

Description:
Staying at one of the Santo António Villas, Golf and Spa is guaranteed to be an Algarve holiday to remember! Santo António Villas, Golf and Spa offer a wide range of Algarve holidays, golf holidays and spa breaks in the unspoilt Western Algarve of Portugal.

Name: La Sabana Club Campestre
Description: Creemos en la importancia de fortalecer los lazos familiares a través del deporte y la recreación. Nuestro club ofrece una amplia gama de actividades y servicios diseñados para que toda la familia disfrute de momentos inolvidables.

Name: Bethpage Black Course
Description:
Bethpage State Park is one of the most popular and cherished public parks in the nation.Located in suburban Long Island in close proximity to New York City, Bethpage is a mecca for public golf featuring five 18-hole regulation golf courses, including the world-renowned Black Course.In addition to Bethpage Black hosting the United States Open Championships in 2002 and 2009, it was also the site of The Barclays PGA Tour events in 2012 and 2016. In 2019, Bethpage will host the PGA Championship and the Ryder Cup in 2025.

The Park was developed from an estate owned by the Yoakum family and other surrounding properties in Farmingdale.The Yoakum family leased their estate to the Lenox Hills Corporation which subsequently built the Lenox Hills Country Club. In the early 1930s, the Bethpage Park Authority purchased the Lenox Hills Country Club and other adjacent properties to build Bethpage State Park.

Famed golf course architect A.W. Tillinghast was hired to design and oversee construction of three new golf courses (the Black, Red, and Blue) as well as modify the original Lenox Hills course, later known as the Green Course. Due to the increasing popularity and demand for golf, the Yellow Course designed by Alfred Tull was opened in 1958. Over 200,000 rounds are consistently played annually on the five courses at Bethpage, all of which start from the Clubhouse area.

With approximately 15,000 golf courses of all different types and sizes in the United States, the Black Course at Bethpage State Park has consistently ranked among the top 100 Greatest Golf Courses in America per Golf Digest for nearly twenty years (highest rank #26).Last year Bethpage Black was ranked the #8 Public Course in America.

Name: CNIG - Conselho Nacional da Industria do Golfe
Description: O Conselho Nacional da Indústria do Golfe é uma entidade privada sem fins lucrativos que funciona como agregador da Indústria, com a participação de 80% do universo de campos de golfe em Portugal.

Name: The Golf Brain Coach
Description:
Wiebeke Seymortier and Johan Backen are the founders and faces behind The Golf Brain Coach. 

We work with golfers of all ages and levels who struggle with anxiety, performance pressure or other mental barriers that hold them back on the golf course.

With over 20 years of experience in clinical psychology, psychotherapy, and coaching—combined with multiple international certifications in Golf Mental Performance Coaching—Wiebeke brings together science and a deep understanding of the game of golf.

Using neuroscience-based techniques, she helps golfers reprogram their minds for calm, focus, clear thinking, resilience, confidence, and lasting performance improvement.

When working with The Golf Brain Coach, you can expect to:
 Overcome fear and mental blocks
 Play with confidence—even under pressure
 Build mental resilience to perform at your best

Wiebeke's work has been featured in my Dutch-language book 'Fit je mentale golfswing' as well as in international golf publications such as Nationaal Golfmagazine (NL), Golf In Style (Belgium), and GolfPlus Monthly (India).

 Curious how golf mental performance coaching with The Golf Brain Coach can transform your golf game?

Let’s connect—we’d be happy to schedule a free conversation to explore how we can strengthen your mental game.

Services offered:
 1-on-1 Coaching
 Mental Training (individually & groups)
 Keynotes & Workshops (Golf Clubs, Business Clubs, Events)
 Caddie-service with certified caddie-coach Johan Bancken 

Available worldwide, with flexibility to travel. Coaching in both English and Dutch.

Contact:

Description:
The Lake Forest Club was established in 1958 and serves the community as a family-oriented gathering place for friends and neighbors to recreate, dine, and socialize.

Name: DROP-PIT
Description:
Drop-pit is the ultimate solution for modernizing your golf driving range. We provide a fully automated Ball Management System designed to eliminate manual labor, reduce operational costs, and lower your ecological footprint.

The Challenge: Managing a driving range is labor-intensive. Finding reliable staff to pick and wash balls is difficult, and traditional mechanical pickers often damage the turf or bury golf balls, costing you money every year.

The Solution: Drop-pit, engineered and manufactured by VDB Technics in Belgium, automates the entire logistical process. Our system ensures your driving range remains open and stocked with balls 24/7, regardless of the weather or staffing schedules.

Name: St. Thomas Golf and Country Club
Description:
The course at St. Thomas Golf and Country Club—or “Union” as it is called by its many fans—is without question one of the best designs created by Canada’s top golf architect.

Routed through undulating parkland, the course demands accurate tee shots, precise distance control, and soft hands around the greens. At the same time, St. Thomas is an enjoyable experience for golfers of all skill levels. The competitive player will enjoy the strategy required around the challenging variety of holes, while the more casual golfer will find receptive landing areas, few forced carries, and the opportunity to play the whole round with a single golf ball.

Name: Olde Homestead Golf Club
Description:
Nestled in the rolling hills of the Lehigh Valley, Olde Homestead Golf Club is a premier, family-owned destination offering a unique blend of championship golf, rustic charm, and warm hospitality. Steeped in Pennsylvania history, Olde Homestead combines classic elegance with modern amenities to create unforgettable experiences on and off the course.

Our award-winning, four-star public golf course provides a challenging yet accessible layout for players of all skill levels. With panoramic views, expertly maintained greens, and thoughtfully preserved historical features—including a restored 1700s summer kitchen—every round at Olde Homestead is as scenic as it is memorable.

Beyond the fairways, Olde Homestead is a sought-after venue for weddings, corporate events, and private celebrations. We offer two distinctive venue spaces, each with its own character and charm, allowing guests to create events that are as unique as they are.

We’re proud to be more than just a golf course—we’re a place where memories are made, traditions are honored, and guests feel like family.

Name: DUNKERQUE GOLF CLUB
Description:
Le Golf de Dunkerque est un site d’exception situé dans l’agglomération de Dunkerque, au cœur de plus de 350 hectares d’espaces naturels.

Inspiré de l’architecture Vauban, ses 27 trous offrent une expérience de jeu unique, alliant technicité, élégance paysagère et identité patrimoniale.

Lieu incontournable du dunkerquois, le golf s’adresse aussi bien aux sportifs qu’aux familles et amateurs de loisirs, et constitue un cadre privilégié pour se retrouver autour de son restaurant, que ce soit pour un moment convivial ou un repas d’affaires.

Dunkerque Golf Club is an exceptional venue located within the Dunkirk metropolitan area, set in the heart of more than 350 hectares of natural surroundings.

Inspired by Vauban architecture, its 27 holes offer a unique golfing experience, combining technical challenge, elegant landscapes and a strong sense of heritage.

A landmark destination for the Dunkirk area, the golf club welcomes sports enthusiasts, families and leisure visitors alike, and provides a privileged setting to come together at its restaurant, whether for a convivial moment or a business lunch.

Name: Bridgnorth Golf Club
Description:
Bridgnorth Golf Club, situated on the banks of the River Severn, offers golfers some of the most beautiful scenery in Shropshire. Our 18-hole Par 73 Course provides an enjoyable test for players of all ability.

FULL members enjoy playing rights at our partner club Lilleshall Hall. Join 1 club and get 1 free!

We pride ourselves on the welcoming atmosphere which is open to all the family. Come and see us to find out more about joining our club.

Name: Warragul Country Club Inc
Description:
Founded in 1907, the Warragul Country Club is one of Regional Victoria’s leading community sporting Club’s. 

Boasting a rich golfing history and a challenging course, the Club enjoys a unique brand as a premier golf and entertainment venue in Regional Victoria and the local Gippsland community. Located in Warragul, just 100km from the Melbourne CBD, it is the perfect place for your next golf trip.

The Warragul Country Club is the home of the PGA Tour of Australasia’s, Gippsland Super 6, an exciting tournament that continues to be an outstanding event for the whole Gippsland Region. The Club also enjoys a very successful annual PGA Pro Am, several district events and has an extensive golf programme for its members.
 
The Warragul Country Club offers members and guests an outstanding golfing & social experience claiming a challenging 18-hole golf course, complemented by a state-of-the-art short game facility, as well as industry-leading facilities and services. Our On Course Golf Shop offers a great range of golf equipment, clothing & accessories, with golf lessons, clinics and club fittings available with our credited PGA Golf Professionals 7 days a week.
 
Staff, Members & Guests enjoy the wonderful social atmosphere and culture at Warragul and we welcome you to be a part of our unique Club experience.

Whether you're looking for lessons, club fittings, club repair, grips, or a great place to practice your golf game, they have you covered.

Our premier destination is celebrated for its championship golf course, set within 135 hectares of stunning natural bushland, and The Greenhouse, our distinguished dining and event venue.

The Golf Experience
Our 18-hole championship golf course, renowned for its meticulous design and maintenance, offers golfers a diverse and rewarding experience. With world-class Bentgrass greens and Santa Ana Couch fairways, every round is a new challenge set against the backdrop of breathtaking natural beauty.

The Greenhouse

Name: Club de Golf del Uruguay (CGU)
Description:
El Club de Golf del Uruguay (CGU) es una institución social y deportiva fundada en 1922 en Montevideo. Reconocido por su prestigioso campo de golf de 18 hoyos, diseñado por el destacado arquitecto de campos de golf Alister Mackenzie, está ubicado sobre la rambla de Punta Carretas y fue declarado Monumento Histórico Nacional en 1975.

Es un ícono de la ciudad y un club familiar que ofrece actividades deportivas y sociales para todas las edades, además de ser sede de importantes torneos nacionales e internacionales.

El CGU brinda una amplia variedad de actividades deportivas —golf, rugby, hockey, tenis y gimnasios— junto con propuestas recreativas, sociales, culturales y gastronómicas.
