Name: The Golf Station
Description: The Golf Station is a custom fitting and teaching studio which also offers tournament gifts, corporate gifts and custom embroidery by special order. Established in 2005, The Golf Station offers product from every major manufacturer as well as hard to find Japanese product. Brands we carry are: Titleist, PING, TaylorMade, Callaway, Mizuno, More Golf, ProtoConcept, Miura, Epon, Jucie, Srixon, Cleveland, XXIO, SIK, Toulon, Scotty Cameron, Oban, VA Composites, Aldila, Accra, Mitsubishi Chemical Golf, Graphite Design, BGT, Fujikura, KBS, Aeortech, Nippon, LA Golf, BBF&Co, etc. We custom build clubs to your specifications onsite in Hurst, Texas.

Name: Pueblo Country Club
Description:
The Pueblo Country Club was organized in April 1903 by O.G. Pope, Harlin J. Smith, and Richard O’Neil. It was their vision to provide the community with a place for friends and family to enjoy leisure time together. The Club was incorporated as a non-profit, private Club on February 20, 1904. 

The first members recruited friends, family, and neighbors to help clear the rugged course of cactus and sage brush. The first round of golf was played on June 1, 1903, making Pueblo Country Club the second oldest Club in Colorado. The old 9-hole course was officially opened on May 31, 1926 with 2,897 yards of fine greens and fairways, making it a Par 35 course. 

Later in 1964-1965, Henry Hughes improved the original design with an additional nine holes, laying the ground work for the amazing 18-hole championship course it is today. The first clubhouse was constructed in 1903, and remains today at the corner of Fifth Ave and 29th St as a reminder of just how far we have come over the years.

The current clubhouse was built in 1926. It was designed by Harvey Dakin, local architect, with an Italian Renaissance style. Since then, the clubhouse has undergone several renovations to modernize the building and add square feet. The Olympic-sized swimming pool was constructed in 1964, and has undergone re-design over the years. The indoor tennis facility was constructed in 1983 with total of three standard courts. Today, it has a total of five hard courts.

Name: Great Hadham Country Club
Description:
Great Hadham is known for being one of the friendliest and most welcoming clubs around. The club’s 18 hole championship course is set in 240 acres of beautiful rolling meadowland, boasting spectacular panoramic views of the surrounding countryside, Great Hadham offers a challenge to golfers of all abilities. Our 'Lakes’ 18 hole Championship Course, totaling over 6850 yards, has plenty of testing holes with hazards that are carefully positioned to provide a real golfing challenge but allowing you a great reward for a great shot!

Looking to shape up in a fun and welcoming environment? Our friendly team of fully trained instructors are on hand help and work with you to devise a convenient and comfortable way to achieve your personal health & fitness goals. The club has a relaxed and supportive environment, so whether it’s losing weight, improving your health, working towards a challenge or a sports specific aim we have an extensive range of expertise, classes and equipment to ready to help you.

At Great Hadham, we have an extensive range of luxury lifestyle lodges with stunning country side views. Taking a tour around one of our individually designed show homes will prove just how attractive country side living can be. Offering a stylish interior with every modern convenience, each home is set on its own generous plot with plenty of room for outside living.

For those seeking an active lifestyle, Great Hadham is the perfect location with fantastic on-site leisure facilities available 365 days a year

Name: The Monroe Invitational
Description:
The Monroe Invitational is one of the oldest and most prestigious amateur golf competitions in the United States. Since 1937, our tournament has been held annually at Monroe Golf Club in Pittsford, NY. A Donald Ross masterpiece built in 1923, The Monroe has challenged some of the greatest players in the history of the game including Major Champions Tiger Woods, Dustin Johnson, Jason Day and Jason Dufner. Several U.S. Amateur champions have also won The Monroe, including Andy Ogletree, Sam Urzetta, Robert “Skee” Riegel and Fred Ridley. Ridley, the 1976 Monroe champion, notably went on to become Chairman of Augusta National Golf Club.

2024 will mark the 83rd playing of The Monroe. We look forward to welcoming back the world's best to Golf Avenue to compete July 24-July27, 2024. #TheMonroe

Name: Shaker Hills Country Club
Description:
Beautiful golf courses are usually akin to beautiful properties and Shaker Hills in Harvard, MA is no exception. Although the dynamics of the extraordinary 2012 renovations accomplished by new owner Fred Curtis, Jr. and company truly set this golf course apart. A classic New England layout is only the starting point of adjectives to describe Shaker Hills. 

It is in the details of the creative renovations that one truly finds its splendor.

How could anyone improve on what was previously the #1 ranked public course in Massachusetts and the #2 best new course in America? Vision.

Our Jerry Matthews' designed course hosts 18 challenging, yet playable holes, artfully sculpted fairways and tee boxes, soft sand bunkers, and more. The course also features river frontage, picturesque lakes, and natural wetlands coming into play on numerous holes. We are centrally located in Mt. Pleasant, which makes for a convenient meeting location, in Mid-Michigan. Golfers from all over the state can easily access our course to meet friends or stop on their way through the area to play a round with us.

In addition to the course itself, we pride ourselves on the variety of luxurious amenities available to our guests and club members. Amenities include our Quarry Grill Restaurant, a picturesque banquet facility, an 18-hole putting island, stay & play golf packages, professional golf instruction, and more.

Description: The Royal Fox Country Club, is a private Members Only club located in St. Charles, Illinois. Since 1989, the Club has been a premier destination for discerning golfers, with the honor of hosting the prestigious Illinois PGA Open seven times. The elegant surroundings reflect the quality and prestige of the Club, and challenge you from the moment you tee off on the first hole. Come experience the Royal Fox Country Club for yourself and see why it is truly one of the best golf clubs in the state.

Name: Bentwinds Golf & Country Club, Inc
Description:
Nestled at the southern tip of Wake County in Fuquay Varina, North Carolina, Bentwinds offers members an 18-hole pristine golf course, a full-service restaurant, a robust calendar of family-friendly events, and newly renovated swimming and tennis facilities.

Our mission is “A club you call home for the entire family.” As South Wake County’s only member-owned private club, we take pride in being the place where families make lasting memories in an exclusive yet relaxed setting. If you’re looking for a club where your family can truly grow roots, we believe you will feel right at home here.

The MGA conducts several statewide championships, offers handicap services through GHIN Member Service and provided course rating and measuring services throughout the state. We also offer a number of benefits and discounts to our members.

The course at Barnton is a real pleasure to play for golfers of all abilities. Situated in beautiful parkland, it is hard to imagine you’re just six miles from the heart of Edinburgh and within easy reach of Edinburgh Airport.

The Clubhouse is, alongside our superb course, the real jewel in the crown of The Royal Burgess Golfing Society, and an outstanding example of Arts and Crafts architecture from the late Victorian period.

It offers a friendly and relaxed atmosphere, comfortable clubhouse and fine dining options. The club focuses on exceptional service making it a standout for golf enthusiasts and those seeking a memorable social experience. With our range of member experiences, it allows us to offer numerous unique areas for career opportunities and growth.

Name: The West Lancashire Golf Club
Description: The West Lancashire Golf Club is proud to host R&A and England Golf competitions, as well as being featured in the Top 100 Golf Courses in Great Britain, and we look forward to welcoming you to Blundellsands for an extraordinary golfing experience.

Name: Eagle Springs Golf Club
Description: Eagle Springs is a private golf club located in Wolcott, Colorado, only 30 miles west of Vail, and situated in a lower valley to take advantage of warmer, sunnier conditions in the Rocky Mountain high country. Membership is attained via introduction by a current Eagle Springs member and subsequent invitation from the Club's Board of Directors.

Name: Golf & Country Club Blumisberg
Description:
Wir sind Blumisberg!

Wir sind stolz auf unseren charaktervollen und grossartig bewirtschafteten Golfplatz. Wir erfreuen uns an ausgezeichneten Spielbedingungen und Golferlebnissen, die von Fairplay und gegenseitigem Respekt geprägt sind. Wir teilen diese gepflegte und ruhige Atmosphäre gerne mit unseren Gästen. Wir blicken mit Stolz auf unsere Geschichte zurück, auf deren Basis wir gemeinsam, engagiert und verantwortungsbewusst in die Zukunft schreiten.

Name: Heritage Harbour Golf Resort
Description:
The Heritage Harbour Golf Resort in SW Florida was originally designed by Arthur Hills and has been completely renovated with all new turf grass, greens, sandy white bunkers and 4 all new designed holes.
Starting May 2022, HHGR kicked off our resort expansion project with the 1st phase of a 3-year resort master plan.  A tee to green golf course renovation was completed November 2022 that included the creation of four entirely new golf holes, and significant design changes to the remaining fourteen holes. 
A new putting and chipping green complex, plus a members-only short game area perfect for honing your scoring and short game skills.  The clubhouse also received it's Phase I enhancements. The major clubhouse renovation continues to be planned by our architect and contractor and will be timed in coordination with the construction of the resort lodge and villas. This will allow for more cohesive design and décor elements to be brought to life between both buildings.

Summer/Fall 2022 was the first big step in a 3-year masterplan to achieve all that a golfer would want to with a golf course. Our goal is to provide golfers with a challenging and architecturally inviting course that features high quality turfgrasses maintained to excellent standards playable by both the avid and novice golfer. 
Now that the heavy lifting is complete, grooming the new turf to meet your and our expectations will take place over the next one to two years. Our agronomic team will work diligently on course conditioning 

Over 70 acres along Florida's Suncoast of totally new playing surfaces were carefully shaped, constructed and installed since May 2, 2022. Renovation Costs: $2.6M

 https://heritageharbourgolfclub.com/home-2/new-vs-old

Name: New Sierra Golf
Description:
Located in a natural environment to the Southeast of the Murcian Community, the New Sierra Golf golf course offers its clients a charming and well-cared golf course composed of 9 holes (9 holes remaining in project) with a noble design ideal for all styles of game. We offer the infrastructure and all the necessary services to practice and enjoy this wonderful sport.

Enjoy the game in the middle of nature. The gaming experience at New Sierra Golf is unique. When stepping on a street you will be able to hear the crunch of the grass under your feet and the sounds of the native fauna. Peace and quiet will surround you as you are in an environment away from the city and in connection with nature and sports.

New Sierra Golf provides all the services that you need to learn, practice and play golf with the best prices in the region. A 9-hole golf course (with another 9 holes under construction) with driving range, approach area and putting green, buggy and pull trolley hire, golf lessons, pro shop and a bar.

Name: Foxbridge Golf Club
Description:
Foxbridge Golf Club is a public golf course located on the edge of Uxbridge, Ontario - only an hour northeast from downtown Toronto. 

Opened in 1958, Foxbridge features rolling terrain, sandy soil, tight fairways, mature trees, and well-manicured greens. Our unique two 9-hole courses, known as the South and the North course, are connected by a scenic cart path running from the clubhouse through the woods. Check out our improvements on the north a par 3 hole with an island tee shooting to a green with a mature forest backdrop, and the combining of two holes into a fun par 5.

The course has seen numerous improvements over the past decade, including a gorgeous clubhouse containing the year-round Scrambles Kitchen & Bar – a favourite Uxbridge breakfast restaurant and event centre.

Whether you are looking for a tee time with your family and friends, a place to host your corporate tournament or charity event, or a venue for a special day, Foxbridge Golf Club is here for you.

Visit us at https://foxbridge.ca.

Name: Lake House Resort Country Club y Spa
Description: Lake House Resort, Coutnry Club y Spa, es un complejo turístico y hotelero que cuenta con un campo de golf de 18 hoyos, 10 canchas de tenis, 5 piscinas y 3 restaurantes.

Name: Tiber Golf Club
Description: Tiber Golf Club is a golf club based out of VIA DEL MARE 1050, Rome, Italy.

Name: Aspen Glen Club
Description: Nestled at the foot of breathtaking Mt. Sopris lies Aspen Glen Club, the valley's ultimate destination for a rugged yet upscale lifestyle with everything your family could dream of when it comes to recreation. One of the world's most spectacular golf course views, a stunning mountain lodge clubhouse, a delectable restaurant and so much more await when you choose country club membership at our Carbondale, Colorado, club.

Name: Golf Sapiens
Description:
Golf Sapiens es el ecosistema del golf en español.
No nacimos, nos hicimos. Y ese amor por el golf —junto con los contactos que hemos forjado desde la infancia— nos ha llevado a crear un proyecto que hoy incluye:
 El podcast más escuchado de golf en Latinoamérica y España
 Una agencia de viajes especializada en golf
 Representación de marcas dentro del sector
 Consultoría estratégica para iniciativas vinculadas al golf

Conectamos marcas con golfistas reales, diseñamos experiencias memorables y empujamos el crecimiento del golf donde más falta hace: cerca de la gente.

Name: The Palencia Club
Description: Palencia, created by international real estate developer Hines, resembles the community-oriented designs of places like historic St. Augustine and San Marco. Different from other master-planned communities in Northeast Florida, Palencia has a full range of world-class amenities. Palencia ’s recreational amenities include golf, tennis, three swimming pools, a fitness center, athletic fields, pocket parks as well as a 30-acre park system interconnected by a series of boardwalks and fitness trails. Families enjoy being a part of this multi-faceted, unique natural environment.

Name: iCaddies
Description:
ABOUT US

At iCaddies, we strive to speak to our statement of "UPLIFTING THE SA CADDIE INDUSTRY", and for us, this means a long-term, sustainable program which ensures a positive change.

iCaddies intention is to enhance the caddie offering and make it as consistent as possible across all golf clubs in South Africa. Through the iCaddies program, we identify the caddie squad's shortfalls and inconsistencies, working through them individually and as a squad.

Once management structures and the training program are in place, the caddies' skill set and overall offering is enhanced, ultimately narrowing the gap between the professional club caddie and the entry-level bag carrier.
While we have made some great strides within the caddie industry in our first two years of existence, we have many more lives to impact. Our long-term approach and the sustainable program will ultimately change the South African caddie industry for generations.

HOW DO WE GENERATE REVENUE

It is paramount that we speak to our statement of “UPLIFTING THE SA CADDIE
INDUSTRY” and for us taking a cut from the caddies fee, however small a percentage, was never an option. For iCaddies to operate, we rely on selling advertising on bibs with the specific club benefits for the caddie generated through various fundraising initiatives and sponsorships. iCaddies manage the caddie squad on the club's behalf as an outsourced partner, looking after the day-to-day operation of the caddies with a strong focus on the
life-impacting benefits of the caddie. 

By empowering the caddies with the opportunity to offer a consistently professional service, they are able to increase their revenue and ultimately provide for their families and loved ones.

Name: Golf Plus Travel
Description: Golf Plus Travel is your local golf specialist in Turkey. We arrange individual and group tours to Belek, Turkey, mainly but to other destinations as well. Golf Plus Travel is a member of TURSAB (The Association of Turkish Travel Agencies), registered by Ministry of Culture and Tourism with the licence number 15338. We have worked in tourism sphere for long time and especially in golf tourism for more than 10 years alredy. We use our knowledge and experience to make our clients' holiday perfect. Our aim is to meet the needs of every individual holiday-maker. We tailor make each vacation.

Name: Corales Championship
Description: Welcome to Puntacana Resort & Club, home of the first PGA TOUR Event held in the Dominican Republic. The fifth edition of the Corales Puntacana Championship will be hosted from March 20-26, 2023 at Corales Golf Club, our exclusive 18-hole course with miles of natural cliffs and majestic coralina quarries; where more than 120 professional players will have the chance to earn points of the FedExCup.

Name: Howe2Golf
Description: Sydney's premier Indoor Golf venue, bar and lounge. Howe2Golf has 6 TrackMan simulators, lessons, professional coaching and event hire, along with drinks and dining services.

Name: EvoGolf
Description: Lerne spielerisch Golf. Absolviere die Platzreife. Verbessere dein Spiel. Treffe Golfer aus ganz Berlin. Miete die Indoor Golf Lounge für Feiern und Teamevents.

Name: ForeYou GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Wir bieten Ihnen eine einzigartige Indoor Golf Anlage inklusive Meetingraum, Bar und Loungebereich. Mit unserem außergewöhnlichen Ambiente und erstklassigem Service garantieren wir Ihnen und Ihren Gästen ein unvergessliches Erlebnis.

Unser vielseitiges Angebot ist genau auf Ihre Bedürfnisse und Wünsche abgestimmt. Ob Sie Ihre Mitarbeiter motivieren möchten, ein Teambuilding-Event planen oder eine Kundenveranstaltung organisieren – bei uns finden Sie alles, was Sie für einen erfolgreichen Event brauchen. Unsere Indoor Golf Anlage ist für Spieler aller Levels geeignet und bietet eine tolle Möglichkeit, den Golfsport in einem innovativen, wetterunabhängigen Umfeld zu erleben.

Name: Avid Caddie Golf Lounge
Description:
All the greats have a caddie. We’re yours.

We started Avid Caddie with a simple belief: greatness in golf isn’t reserved for a select few. Every golfer—whether you’re a 14-handicap chasing consistency, a pro building a side hustle, or an executive who loves to mix business with a round—deserves the tools, the technology, the time, and the community to get better.

The problem? Golf takes time, weather gets in the way, and access to elite courses and instruction isn’t always realistic. We knew there had to be a better way.

So we built Avid Caddie—a private indoor golf lounge that blends tradition with technology, practice with play, and individual passion with community. Entrepreneurs first, golf addicts always, we designed this space for people who want more from the game and from each other.

Here’s what makes Avid Caddie different:
— Over 250 world-class courses available at the touch of a button
— PGA-certified Head Pro instruction and custom club fittings to elevate your game
— Game-changing Golfzon tech: moving floorplates, auto-tee, and instant feedback on every swing
— Serious community: leagues, lessons, and camaraderie that sharpen your game
— Time on your side: play 18 holes in under 2 hours, rain or shine
— Corporate memberships and event packages that turn client entertainment into lasting connections

But Avid Caddie isn’t just about lower scores—it’s about building relationships. Deals get done here. Teams grow stronger here. And friendships forged here carry over long after the last putt drops.

This is where avid amateurs, seasoned pros, and business leaders collide. Where obsession meets excellence. Where every swing is a step toward greatness.

Welcome to the Caddie Community. Your game, your network, your community—and yes, your caddie through all of it.

Name: En-Turf
Description: En-Turf is an inoculant comprised of beneficial bacterial that promote turf resilience.

Name: Rock Golf Oy
Description: A company building the world's best nine hole par-3 golf course to the heart of Pickala Rock Resort.

Name: SAS Golf du Cognac
Description:
Idéalement situé sur les bords de la Charente, entre vignobles et forêts, le Golf du Cognac réunit un bouquet d’atouts naturels qui ne manque pas de faire chavirer le cœur des amateurs de sports en plein air.

Face aux rangs de vignes tirés au cordeau sur les collines bordant le parcours, les joueurs qui évoluent sur d’anciennes terres viticoles de la famille Martell, se retrouvent plongés au cœur d’un espace naturel de plus de 60 hectares où l’expérience golfique se mêle en parfaite harmonie à la beauté naturelle des lieux.

Name: Modena Golf & Country Club
Description:
Born on the initiative of a group of local entrepreneurs, in September 1987, the Modena Golf & Country Club owes its design to the German champion Bernhard Langer, in collaboration with the American architect Jim Engh.

Laying 100 meters above sea level, on an extension of over one hundred hectares, our golf course is among the best in Italy, due to its construction characteristics.

Wide greens, a variety of tee boxes, multiple fairway slopes and 5 artificial lakes all within the typical landscape of Modena’s hills. Shaped among oaks, maples and evergreen shrubs, our course is an ideal spot for both amateur and professional events, ranging from prestigious junior tournaments to the 50th edition of the Open d’Italia sanctioned by the European Tour.

Our 9-hole executive course, large driving range with indoor simulator, 2 tennis courts, gym and swimming pool are facilities available within the club.

In the Club House, in addition to the bar-restaurant, we have several spaces for social life. Plenty of rooms for playing cards and ping pong, as well as a TV area, billiard room and a wellness area in each locker room. All these features next to the 15th century tower and the oratory, Casa De Lame, which dates back to the 16th century and is decorated with rhombuses, a classic feature from buildings belonging to the Aggazzotti family.

Additionally, Ca’ Bruciate di Sotto and di Sopra which border the “Laghetti Vecchi” residence and “La Tegagna”, once a post office, whose elegant lines are engraved in the symbol of the Club.

Name: LINDRICK GOLF CLUB
Description: LINDRICK GOLF CLUB is prestigious Private Members Golf Club based at Deep Carrs Lane, Lindrick Common, South Yorkshire, S81 8BH.

Name: Conwy Golf Club
Description:
Conwy Golf Club is a renowned golfing destination situated in the heart of North Wales, offering an exceptional golfing experience set against a backdrop of stunning natural beauty. Nestled within Conwy County, this club combines a rich history, captivating landscape, and outstanding facilities, making it a must-visit for golfers of all levels.

The course itself is a testament to the region's splendor, featuring impeccably maintained fairways, greens, and a terrain that seamlessly blends links and parkland characteristics. Bordered by the majestic Conwy Mountains on one side and the glistening waters of the Conwy Estuary on the other, the setting is nothing short of breathtaking. Golfers will encounter a diverse range of holes that meander through dunes, heathland, and along the coastline, providing a challenging yet enjoyable golfing experience.

Conwy Golf Club is celebrated for its exceptional design, which demands precision and strategy from players. The course is designed with numerous bunkers, undulating fairways, and intricate green complexes, providing a true test of skill. It has hosted numerous championship events, earning its reputation as one of Wales' premier links courses.

The clubhouse at Conwy Golf Club is a welcoming and elegant facility, offering a warm and friendly atmosphere for both members and visitors. After a round of golf, guests can unwind and savor delectable cuisine and refreshing beverages while taking in panoramic views of the course, mountains, and sea.

Furthermore, the club provides golf lessons and professional instruction, making it an ideal place for golfers to improve their skills or newcomers to learn the sport. With a well-stocked pro shop and modern practice facilities, Conwy Golf Club ensures that every aspect of your golfing experience is of the highest quality.

Name: North Ridge Country Club
Description: North Ridge Country Club is a private club designed to meet the golf, social, and dining needs of its proprietary members, their families and their guests with a primary interest in the game of golf.  Designed by William Francis Bell, North Ridge Country Club takes full advantage of the rolling terrain found in Fair Oaks, California.  A classic, parkland style golf course, North Ridge features an impressive routing through a wooded urban area adjacent to Madison and San Juan Avenue.   Golfers will enjoy the frequent changes in elevation, the over two dozen varieties of trees smartly and strategically planted throughout the property, the pristine course conditions, the wonderful sloping greens that challenge even the best putters, the sculpted bunkers, and a layout that golfers never tire of playing.

Name: Nomad Golf Studio
Description: NOMAD GOLF STUDIO: Премиальное пространство для корпоративных турниров, неформальных деловых встреч и инновационного тимбилдинга. Мы предлагаем уникальный формат отдыха, сочетающий спорт, технологии и нетворкинг.

Name: Long Cove Club
Description:
If you are longing to find a premier island community that is as casually elegant and yet as unpretentious as you are, a private residential club filled with spectacular homes and warm and friendly people who, like you, have fallen in love with the breathtaking beauty of Hilton Head Island, then we'd just like to say: Welcome home.

Long Cove Club. You really belong here.

Name: Helsingin Golfklubi
Description: Helsingin Golfklubi – Suomen vanhin golfseura. Kenttämme sijaitsee Pitäjänmäellä lähellä Helsingin keskustaa hyvien kulkuyhteyksien varrella

Name: Goin' Golf
Description: Goin’ Golf providing the biggest and best Virtual Golf experience in the UK

Name: Lonnie Poole Golf Course
Description:
The Lonnie Poole Golf Course is a dream come true for NC State University.

The stunning layout was designed by Arnold Palmer and the design team at Arnold Palmer Design Company (including Erik Larsen and Brandon Johnson, both NC State graduates).

The purpose of the facility is to provide a public golf course on the Centennial Campus of NC State University that serves as a venue for the men’s and women’s golf teams. It also facilitates turfgrass and stormwater research associated with the College of Agriculture and Life Sciences (CALS). Likewise, the golf course serves as a teaching and training facility for the Professional Golf Management (PGM) Program in the College of Natural Resources. The course is playable for all skill levels and a challenge to low handicap players.

With breathtaking views of the Raleigh skyline and the world-renowned Centennial Campus, the course has become a favorite in the golf community.  After a round of golf, you will surely find it as one of the finest in the area, one of the best university facilities, and worthy of one of the premier universities in the nation.

Name: Golf et Restaurant Orléans Limère
Description:
Harmonie parfaite entre une destination de charme et un parcours classé, à seulement 1h15 de Paris.

Ce magnifique parcours, classé parmi les plus beaux golfs de France, se fraie un chemin dans la forêt de Sologne et permet un jeu très varié en alternant plans d'eau, greens bien défendus et quelques beaux bunkers. Un véritable petit bijou.

Situé sur le Domaine de Limère avec hôtels (sur place ou à proximité immédiate), cottages, et centre de balnéothérapie, le Golf d'Orléans Limère est la destination idéale pour une escapade d'un week-end ou de quelques jours ou vos événements (mariage, séminaire..)

Le golf de Limère vous propose son parcours 18 Trous mais également son restaurant l'Etiquette ouvert à tous !

Pour tous vos événements (congrès, mariages, expositions, compétitions..) contactez nous au 07.83.75.20.06 ou à l'adresse suivante : evenement@golflimere.com

Name: Palm Beach National Golf Course
Description: We know that golf is more than just a pastime, or a sport. Rather it’s a great way for couples, friends, or family to catch up and enjoy one another’s company while taking in fresh air and beautiful surroundings.

Name: Cartpath Social
Description:
Indoor Golf Facility located in Lowell, Arkansas. The perfect place to bring a customer or host a team-building activity. 

Book online, call 479-487-3622, or walk in to reserve a bay and play 18 holes on over 1,000 courses!

Name: Findlay Country Club
Description:
Findlay Country Club was established in 1908 on its present site as a nine-hole course. In the early years, transportation to and from the grounds was by boat on the Blanchard River from the Main Street bridge to Riverside Park, and then by small boats and canoes to a landing located near the present eighth tee. For over 100 years, the clubhouse has evolved to fit the changing needs of our membership.

Findlay Country Club's 18-hole golf course was designed and built by Tom Bendelow and has existed since 1908. Today, FCC offers its members and guests an unforgettable experience with smooth fast greens, immaculate bunkers, pristine tee and fairway conditions with a challenging layout that is playable for all skill levels. The Club Hosted Events include U.S. Open Qualifiers, Ohio Amateur Championship, Ohio Open Championship, Ohio Junior Championship, Ohio Mid-Amateur Championship, Ohio Senior Amateur, NCAA Division II Women’s National Championship, NCAA Men’s GLIAC Championship.

The Club has a long legacy but just the right blend of past and present. Rich in tradition but not afraid to evolve and adapt to the changing lifestyles of our membership, the Club continues to offer experiences to meet most needs. Family-focused in both our dining atmosphere and our programming but also appealing to the audience that seeks a more formal, quiet dining experience. You can truly experience it all at Findlay Country Club.

Name: River Creek Club
Description: The D.C. area’s premier private Club is a tranquil hideaway located on the Potomac River in Leesburg, VA. Rich in history, our Members enjoy first-class golf, tennis, swimming and fitness, plus gourmet dining and exclusive social events all year round. We invite you to explore the Club and experience the extraordinary atmosphere, our diverse membership, and the unforgettable views. Golf memberships are available to both the residents and non-residents of the River Creek community.

Name: GOLF absolute
Description:
Das System Rotationsgolf "Pay ONE, play MORE" von GOLF absolute.

Der Sportler bekommt von GOLF absolute die Möglichkeit geboten, auf einigen der schönsten Plätze im 5 Sterne bzw. 5 Sterne Superior Segment (höchste Klassifizierung des BVGA) seiner sportlichen Leidenschaft nachzugehen. Und dies, obwohl er nur Mitglied in einer einzelnen Golfanlage zu sein braucht.

Eine Mitgliedschaft eröffnet also die Möglichkeit, auf das Gesamtangebot von mehreren Golfplätzen inklusive der damit verbundenen Services (gemeinsamer Club-Zeitschrift »FORE«, Startzeiten, Turniere, Fitnessstudios, Wellnessbereiche, Reiseangebote etc.) je nach Gusto zugreifen zu können.

Der Spieler genießt – rotierend eben – alle Anlagen, wo er will, wann er will und wie er will. Und das, soweit es die äußeren Umstände zulassen, zwölf Monate im Jahr.

Name: Corporación Club Puerto Peñalisa
Description:
Nuestro Origen
El objetivo del proyecto CLUB PUERTO PEÑALISA fue la construcción y desarrollo de un proyecto urbanístico y recreacional de estrato 6, sobre un lote de 341 hectáreas, el cual estaba previsto inicialmente en 5 etapas (1 por año).

De ellas 311 ya estaban destinadas a la construcción de las unidades residenciales y las otras 30 ya restantes en lagos, zonas verdes y bosques. El proyecto estaría ubicado en el municipio de Ricaurte (Cundinamarca) distante a 120 Km. de Santa fe de Bogotá, sobre la desembocadura del río Sumapaz al Magdalena.

La tarea de la parte constructiva la lideró la Constructora Peñalisa Entre Ríos S.A. bajo el diseño Urbanístico del reconocido arquitecto y urbanista Willy Drews.

El diseño de la Sede Social y de algunas casas, se trabajó bajo el diseño del reconocido Arquitecto Simón Vélez, el cual se ha destacado en sus obras a nivel internacional por utilizar un material poco común en la construcción, como es el de la Guadua.

Name: Hatogrande Golf & Tennis Country Club
Description: En el año 1991, se da inicio al desarrollo de las instalaciones de La Corporación Hatogrande Golf & tenis Country Club, entidad sin ánimo de lucro, creada para promocionar el deporte aficionado, los valores familiares a través del desarrollo social y cultural y la conservación del medio ambiente, surgiendo así uno de los lugares más emblemáticos para la realización de actividades recreativas, deportivas y culturales, tanto para los Asociados como para sus beneficiarios.

Name: Golf Resort de Digne-les-Bains by Adonis
Description:
Le Golf Resort de Digne-les-Bains est un complexe golfique complet situé à environ 1h d’Aix-en-Provence, posé au pied des montagnes dans un cadre naturel magnifique, entre champs de lavande et panoramas alpins.

 Hôtel 4*
Hôtel 4 avec chambres élégantes et confortables (13 chambres) — parfait pour des séjours courts ou prolongés
 Restaurant & snacking sur place
 Club House & Bar
 Grande piscine extérieure
 Salle de séminaire et mise à disposition des équipements
 Terrains de pétanque
 Golf & activités sportives :
 Parcours de golf 18 trous ~70 ha en pleine nature, boisé et vallonné
 Parcours compact 6 trous, idéal pour petits jeux ou débutants
 Practice, putting green et zones d’entraînement
 Académie de golf et cours encadrés (débutants à confirmés).
 Location de matériel (clubs, chariots électriques ou classiques)
 FootGolf possible sur place

 Loisirs & services complémentaires
Location de vélos électriques ou VTT pour explorer les alentours
Concepts bien-être (yoga, fitness, aquagym selon saison).
 Espace coworking disponible à l’hôtel
 Nature & accès aux sentiers de PR

Name: The Els Club Teluk Datai
Description:
Nestled along the pristine shores of Langkawi, The Els Club Teluk Datai is recognised as one of Southeast Asia’s most breathtaking golf destinations. Designed by golf legend Ernie Els, our award winning Rainforest Course is celebrated for its world class playability, dramatic scenery, and its seamless connection with the island’s ancient rainforest and the Andaman Sea.

More than a golf course, The Els Club Teluk Datai offers a refined leisure experience where nature, luxury hospitality and sporting excellence come together. Every detail from our carefully maintained fairways to our premium clubhouse facilities is thoughtfully crafted to deliver an unforgettable experience for golfers, travellers and corporate guests.

We are committed to
• Exceptional Service: Warm Malaysian hospitality combined with international standards
• Sustainable Stewardship: Protecting and preserving Langkawi’s UNESCO Global Geopark environment
• Memorable Experiences: Championship golf, curated events and personalised guest services

Whether you are looking to challenge your game, host a corporate event or immerse yourself in the natural beauty of Langkawi, The Els Club Teluk Datai remains the premier destination for luxury golf and lifestyle experiences.

Redefining tropical golfing. Elevating every moment.

Name: INgolf Events
Description:
INgolf es la primera experiencia premium de golf portátil en España diseñada para impactar, conectar y emocionar.
Convertimos tu evento corporativo una experiencia de alto nivel, equipada con tecnología profesional, ambientación realista y un servicio integral.
Disfrutarás de: 
• Una pantalla envolvente de gran formato.
• Materiales de alta seguridad certificados.
• Montaje y desmontaje profesional.
• Clases personalizadas con profesor de golf.
• Zona exterior para networking, promociones. 

INGolf es ideal para team building, activaciones de marca, ferias, inmobiliarias, hoteles o eventos privados.

Name: Broadmoor Country Club Indy
Description: Broadmoor Country Club is the first choice in the greater Indianapolis area for it's classic Donald Ross golf course, broad-range of family-friendly amenities, opportunities to build social relationships, and vibrant and engaged membership.

Name: Nanaimo Golf Club
Description: Nanaimo Golf Club is a spectacular 18-hole par 72 semi-private course with full practice facilities.

Name: São Fernando Golf Club
Description:
A história do São Fernando Golf Club retrata a fé e a perseverança de um grupo de amigos, congregados em torno de seu amor pelo golfe. Em 21 de abril de 1954 foi descerrada a placa inaugural, em homenagem aos doadores de 22 alqueires do Sítio do Caiapia, a Fernando de Almeida Nobre e sua família. Os trabalhos do campo já haviam sido iniciados, sob a direção de Diogo Aguiar de Barros, primeiro presidente do clube.

Com projeto do arquiteto argentino Luther Koonz, o campo de golfe foi inaugurado em 21 de abril de 1958. Uma semana depois, no dia 28, foi disputada a primeira taça um canadian mixed Foursomes, vencida por Marcello Carvalho Nogueira e Hebe Nova Gomes.

Os outros nove buracos foram abertos em abril de 1969. A primeira diretoria foi formada por Diogo Aguiar de Barros, presidente; Marcello Nogueira, vice-presidente; Luiz Adolpho Nardy, 1º secretário; Vasco Galvão Bueno, 2º secretário; Roberto Pinto de Souza, 1º tesoureiro e Armando Caiuby Moraes, 2º tesoureiro.

Name: FORE Business
Description: FORE Business is an amazing community of over 1700 business leaders across all business sectors, meeting monthly at over 83 golf course up and down the UK as well as in Spain, the UAE, USA and Sweden. Contact me for more information on how you can get involved

Name: The Leicestershire Golf Club
Description:
The Leicestershire Golf Club founded in 1890 is a beautiful parkland course which stands to the south of the city, backing on to open countryside.

Heavily treed and boasting the finest quality greens, the 6456 yard par 70 course challenges low handicap golfers whilst remaining suitable to golfers of all abilities. The course was extended to 18 holes in 1899 and in 1910 improvements by James Braid included a number of new bunkers.

In 1936 the course was extended by Major Charles Mackenzie, brother of the legendary Alistair Mackenzie of Augusta National fame, and subsequently altered by C K Cotton.

The unique and architecturally significant circular clubhouse commands superb views over the course and offers excellent facilities for entertaining, dining and relaxing. Enquires for membership are welcomed, subject to waiting lists.

This welcoming private members club, with its highly praised course and dramatic clubhouse, offers visitors a most enjoyable and testing golfing experience.

Name: Bonita National Golf and Country Club
Description:
Welcome to Bonita National Golf and Country Club where members and nature connect in the heart of Southwest Florida. This beautiful gated community is designed around a wildlife preserve. As you stroll through Bonita National you can admire the natural beauty of its areas and lakes. The amenities of this splendid community include a Gordon Lewis-designed 18-hole championship golf course, professional tennis courts, fitness center, spa services and three dining venues.

The Bonita National community offers homes for golf and non-golf members.  A social membership is included for all homes in the community. Our community features many amenities and clubs that promote an active lifestyle to keep its members fit and healthy in mind and body. Bonita National offers a warm welcoming environment to all members, along with professional staff committed to helping you make the most of each day.

Outside of the community, members have convenient access to miles of beautiful beaches and waterways, hiking and biking trails, shopping, and many art and theater venues. Bonita National Golf and Country Club is located five miles east of I-75 on Bonita Beach Road. This prime location offers our residents convenient access to all that Bonita Springs, Naples and Fort Myers have to offer.

Name: Pin High Hospitality
Description:
Pin High Hospitality is your sales-centric, affordable, remote sales & marketing partner—designed to support clubs (golf, country club, yacht, beach) and SMBs in closing more business and increasing revenue.

We specialize in filling sales gaps with a proactive team of innovative, experienced professionals. Our Hospitality Sales Directors identify your specific sales needs and uncover untapped revenue opportunities through both proactive and reactive strategies that deliver results—fast.

We seamlessly complement any existing sales team. We are not a management company—we are laser-focused on driving sales. Our services include lead generation, cold calling, qualifying, negotiating, contracting, detailing, business development, marketing, and client retention.

Once the business is booked, we turn it over to your operations team for flawless execution.

 Vision:
To revolutionize how clubs and SMBs grow by delivering innovative, affordable remote sales solutions that set a new industry standard.

 Mission:
To empower clubs and SMBs with cost-effective, expert-driven sales support, fueling sustainable growth and lasting success.

Name: Club Puerto Azul
Description: Club social único en su género, creado como un centro de esparcimiento, con las condiciones y comodidades de un balneario residencial y el establecimiento de un centro social, destinado al uso y aprovechamiento de los miembros de la asociación, y fomentando entre sus miembros la práctica de toda clase de deportes marítimos, entre otras cosas.

Name: Gleneagles Country Club Communication Connections
Description:
Welcome to Gleneagles Country Club – the premier hub for business, leisure, and sports in the Dallas/Fort Worth (DFW) area. Nestled in the heart of Plano, TX, our club is a central gathering place for small business owners, local sports enthusiasts, and families seeking a vibrant community experience.
Standout highlights at Gleneagles include:
 Two Championship 18-Hole Golf Courses: Challenge and serenity meet on our beautifully landscaped grounds that cater to all skill levels, offering a sublime golf experience.
 Robust Racquet Sports Facilities: Stay on top of your game with access to 12 state-of-the-art tennis courts and 4 dynamic pickleball courts, making us a hub for racquet sports in the DFW region.
 The Nest – Kids’ Club: Where great memories are made for our younger members. It’s supervised, it’s fun, and it ensures that there’s always something for everyone at Gleneagles.
Join our thriving community where business networking meets leisure and sport. Follow us to stay updated on events, amenities, and the various ways Gleneagles Country Club can energize your lifestyle.

Name: The Desert Highlands Association
Description: Imagine a private club community, nestled between majestic Pinnacle Peak and the city lights in the valley below. A place of connections and camaraderie, where the spirit of togetherness is cultivated among members, where members are neighbors, and friends are as close as family.

Name: The Golf Fellowship
Description:
The Golf Fellowship - Golf, Compete & Connect

Join our welcoming community of golfers, where men and women of all skill levels come together to share their passion for the game. 

Enjoy the convenience of our weekly Tuesday night 9-hole events, a perfect midweek refresher. Additionally, we host 18-hole events, typically on the 4th Saturday of every month. Compete for cash prizes while always playing your own ball in both event types.

Participate in a variety of side games, including team and individual net, individual gross, skins, closest to the pins, and vie for your city's hole-in-one pot at each event. You can also opt to join your city's match play contest.

Earn points in our unique FedEx Cup-style points races for every hole you play, leading to the TGF Championship. Then qualify to represent your city in our end-of-season Ryder Cup event, the Lone Star Cup, where you'll go head-to-head against our other three cities.

Our unique TGF Handicap system ensures fair competition, and our historically-based pairing system introduces you to new golfers at every outing. You'll even find team games available for you and your foursome or cart partner to root each other on as you battle against the field.

With chapters in Austin, DFW, Houston, and San Antonio, locating a TGF chapter near you is convenient. Whether you're interested in trying out an event or becoming a full member, we invite you to consider joining The Golf Fellowship today!

Testimony:
"I came for the competition but stayed for the fellowship!" - Bryan D, San Antonio

Name: Play Golf 54 by Montecchia group
Description: Play Golf 54 by Montecchia Group brings together 4 courses under a single management, to offer everything the golfer could wish for: feeling of pure nature, a short drive from Venice, excellent services, championship courses, high technology and a professional staff for a unique all-year round experience.

Name: St. Charles Country Club
Description: A historic 27-hole golf club designed by Alister MacKenzie, Donald Ross and Norman Woods with state-of-the-art facilities and outstanding dining, located in Winnipeg, Manitoba.

Name: La Grande Mare
Description: Experience precision, performance and professional expertise. Featuring ten covered bays, two premium teaching suites, and a bespoke club-fitting studio, our expert instruction is enhanced by cutting-edge technology for measurable improvement.

Name: LE CLOU GOLF
Description:
Golf du Clou - La convivialité au service du business

Situé à Villars-les-Dombes, le Golf du Clou rassemble 350 membres au sein d'une communauté de dirigeants et décideurs. Notre parcours de qualité et notre atmosphère conviviale en font le lieu de référence pour développer votre réseau professionnel dans la région lyonnaise.

Restaurant
Notre chef, formée dans les plus grandes maisons (Pic, Orsi, Bocuse), propose une cuisine adaptée à vos exigences professionnelles : déjeuners d'affaires, séminaires, événements privatisés et réceptions clients.

Carte Affaires - Un investissement stratégique
La carte affaires vous offre un accès privilégié au club, la possibilité d'organiser des événements sur mesure et de recevoir vos partenaires. Un outil relationnel puissant pour construire la confiance et développer vos affaires.

Opportunités de sponsoring
Associez votre entreprise aux valeurs du golf. Notre programme de sponsoring vous permet de renforcer votre visibilité auprès d'une cible qualifiée de dirigeants et d'influenceurs économiques régionaux.

Au Golf du Clou, chaque partie devient une opportunité, chaque repas un moment de développement relationnel. Parce que les meilleures décisions se prennent souvent sur le green.

Contactez-nous pour découvrir nos solutions entreprises.

Name: Golfclub Heidelberg-Lobenfeld e.V.
Description:
Der Golfclub Heidelberg in Lobenfeld wurde 1968 als gemeinnütziger Golfclub Heidelberg-Lobenfeld e.V. gegründet.

Unser Golfclub zeichnet sich durch ein sportlich familiäres Ambiente aus und unweit  der Universitätsstadt Heidelberg. Alle Mitglieder und Gäste spielen ohne Reservierung von Startzeiten – ein Privileg, welches seit der Gründung besteht.

Wir bieten dem Nachwuchs eine fundierte Golfausbildung und wurde mehrfach vom Deutschen Golf Verband (DGV) sowie dem Baden-Württembergischen Golfverband  (BWGV) für unsere erfolgreiche Jugendarbeit ausgezeichnet. 

Der Club hat Mannschaften und Spielgruppen für alle Handicaps, Altersklassen und Zielsetzungen.

Unser Golfclub ist:
- Mitglied des Partnerclubverbunds „Golf Rhein-Neckar-Pfalz“
- Offizieller Golfpartner der MLP Academics Heidelberg
- Trainingsstandort des Baden-Württembergischen Golfverbandes
- Bundesleistungszentrum des Deutschen Gehörlosen-Sportverbandes

Name: Tap-In's
Description: We are a full-service Driving Range with TrackMan Range Technology, 4 indoor TrackMan golf simulators, a beach themed miniature golf course with a full bar offering and small plates!

Name: Estonian Golf & Country Club
Description:
Opened in 2005, the Estonian Golf & Country Club is the top golf resort in Estonia and one of only eight European PGA Tour Courses in Europe.

EGCC is located just a short driving distance from Tallinn – along the Baltic Coast in the Jägala River delta, and boasts not only the beautiful, 18-hole Sea Course with its spectacular sea views, but also the historic 9-hole Stone Course, which meanders through impressive stone fences. Offering a true golfing experience and leaving no golfer indifferent.

Description:
Golf Store UK have a wide range of stunning clubs to suit all budgets and levels 
New & refurbished in stock

Even buy now and pay later with Klarna, PayPal & Credit cards accepted
