Name: DIAMOND HAWK GOLF COURSE
Description: Western New York’s premier golf course, with a fun bar, restaurant & banquet facility, offers country club quality in a public setting. Located off Genesee St. by the Buffalo Airport, Diamond Hawk is in the center of Greater Buffalo and minutes from anywhere in Western New York.

Name: Cardinal Golf Group
Description: We manage seven unique golf clubs within Southern Ontario offering something for everyone. Discover the difference.

Name: Bears Paw Country Club
Description: Bears Paw Country Club is located at 2500 Golden Gate Pkwy, Naples, Florida, United States.

Name: Fox Run Golf Club
Description:
Fox Run is a golf course located in Eureka, MO that is entering a new era. Under new ownership, the golf course is undergoing a significant renovation that will elevate the playing experience to a premium level. The golf course property is beautiful, with the golf holes laid out over excellent undulating ground amidst dense woods. The general setting meets the “nice walk in the park” standard set by the best golf courses.

The golf will be thoroughly enjoyable, with added playability through additional width. The strategic merit of each hole will be exceptional, especially from the green tees, where players will be challenged with longer approach shots to more diverse and interesting hole locations. The overall setting and appearance of the golf holes will also be exceptional, highlighted by the bent grass. The bunkers will be highly visible, with the white sand creating a beautiful contrast to the dark green turfgrasses framed by the golden brown fescue grasses and the outer frame of deciduous trees. It will be an exceptional golfing experience for Fox Run Golf Club members in all regards.

Name: St. Margaret's Golf & Country Club
Description:
St. Margaret’s Golf & Country Club is one of Ireland’s leading Championship Courses. Former home to the Ladies Irish Open, Irish Seniors Open and the Irish PGA Championship, this spectacular venue offers golfers of all abilities a very special treat. When you tee it up, you will find a fantastic course layout, lush fairways, meandering streams and greens that roll pure.

Ryder Cup Captain Sam Torrance praised the 18th Hole at St. Margaret’s saying it was "the best finishing hole I have ever seen... and probably the strongest and most exciting in the world."

The facility is under new management since November 2014. Synergy Golf, one of Ireland’s leading golf management companies are presenting the course impeccably while also providing golfers with a first class service 7 days a week.

Ideally located in the quaint village of St. Margaret’s, only 5 minutes from the M1, M50 and Dublin Airport, accessing this gem could not be easier. For more information or to book a tee time, call 01-8640400.

Name: Trafford Golf Centre
Description:
Trafford Golf Centre is Europe’s premiere golf practice facility, with the largest golf academy in the UK.

Featuring 53 bays with Toptracer and Power Tee technology, 36 holes of Adventure Golf, Starbucks Café and Bar and American Golf store. 

Situated only 50 metres from junction 10 of the M60 motorway in Manchester, with free parking, Trafford Golf Centre is the perfect location to host any gathering. Whether it is an important meeting, or some much needed team building, the boardroom at Trafford Golf Centre can be hired throughout the week and includes Starbucks coffee. Equipped with a 56 TV as well as on-site Cafe & Bar serving Starbucks, the meeting room at Trafford Golf Centre has the essential amenities to ensure your meeting is a success.

Name: Golfclub Schärding / Maad
Description: Erleben Sie eine der schönsten Golfanlagen der Region mit malerischen Fairways und herausfordernden Greens. Unsere 18 Loch Championship Anlage bietet sowohl Anfängern als auch erfahrenen Golfern ein unvergessliches Spielvergnügen.
Location: Taufkirchen an der Pram, Upper Austria

Name: Pro Golf Sundsvall
Description: Golf ska kunna spelas året om, även i Norrland! Det löser vi på bästa sätt genom Trackman 4 och geniala simulatorer med tillbehör.

Name: CERCLE BELLEVUE
Description:
Depuis sa fondation, il s'est toujours distingué par sa tradition d'excellence, laquelle se perpétue encore aujourd'hui et rend les membres, qui en sont les seuls propriétaires, si fiers de leur Cercle.
Innovant, en fournissant un bon rapport qualité-prix, un excellent service avec des installations de qualité soutenant des offres sportives, sociales et commerciales sélectionnées, Cercle Bellevue est toujours ravi d’élargir sa communauté soudée et d’accueillir de nouveaux membres. La famille est primordiale au Cercle Bellevue, et nos familles savent comment faire sensation.  L’Abondance d’évènements et d’activités axés sur la famille font du Cercle un favori. 
L'adhésion au Cercle ne se fait que sur invitation d'un Membre du Cercle. Par ailleurs, le nombre ses membres est très limité, de façon à offrir un cadre unique, un contact privilégié et un service personnalisé à chacun. En ces temps d'évolution technologique, vous trouverez toujours chez nous une oreille attentive et une équipe prête à vous aider. Au Cercle Bellevue, vous jouissez d’une atmosphère unique, sereine, un havre de paix, une ambiance chaleureuse, une expérience sociale enrichissante, un fort esprit de communauté, apprécié et entouré de ce que le pays a de mieux à offrir. Avec une variété de services, de produits et d’infrastructure, nous sommes adaptés pour tous les goûts. Nous complétons nos excellentes installations avec des programmes exceptionnels, services et événements et en offrant des expériences exceptionnelles à nos membres, invités, employés et la communauté.

Name: The Georgia Club
Description: The air is a little warmer. The tea is a little sweeter. Ties to family and heritage are a little stronger. The Georgia Club is home to a private club lifestyle with resort-style amenities and service committed to your comfort and enjoyment. No matter where you are from, we invite you into our club community, and to learn more about our lifestyle and membership. Learn more about life at The Georgia Club by contacting us today!

Name: Bear Creek Country Club
Description: Located on lush, rolling terrain in the Cascade Mountain foothills, Bear Creek Country Club boasts a magnificent Jack Frei-designed championship layout and beautiful renovated Clubhouse that hosts private events and tournaments that have earned it recognition among the finest private clubs in the greater Seattle area.

Name: Berkeley Country Club
Description:
Located in the Berkeley Hills above the community of El Cerrito, California, Berkeley Country Club offers its members a challenging course for players of all abilities. The setting affords visitors spectacular views of the San Francisco Bay and its surroundings. Including the Bay Bridge, San Francisco, the Golden Gate Bridge, Sausalito, Mount Tamalpais, and the San Pablo Bay to the west, and Wild Cat Canyon to the east. Our venue is the place to have your next corporate event, wedding reception, or banquet.

Founded in 1920 as the Berkeley Country Club, Berkeley Country Club strives to provide a premier golfing and social experience to its members by offering excellent course conditions, practice facilities, and social amenities. The 'new' Berkeley Country Club remains a testament to the Golden Age of Golf in America and the vision of two legendary golf architects, Robert Hunter and Willie Watson. Challenging yet playable for all skill levels, Berkeley Country Club is back and ready to delight a new generation of Bay Area golfers.

Name: Golfpark De Loonsche Duynen
Description:
Welkom!

Golfpark De Loonsche Duynen is uniek gelegen te midden van de rustige natuurgebieden de Loonse en Drunense Duinen en landgoed Huis ter Heide. Dé ideale omgeving om een frisse neus te halen, te genieten van de prachtige natuur en snel te ontspannen na de drukte van alledag.

Op het park vind je een prachtige golfbaan én een brasserie met meerdere terrassen waar golfers én niet-golfers (fietsers, wandelaars, bedrijven) dagelijks meer dan welkom zijn voor een hapje en een drankje. Naast de brasserie beschikt het golfpark over diverse zalen voor vergaderingen, presentaties en feesten.

Kom gewoon langs, dat vinden wij gezellig!

Name: The London Electrical Engineers Golfing Society (LEEGS)
Description:
Welcome to The London Electrical Engineers Golfing Society (LEEGS).    

The London Electrical Engineers Golfing Society has been established for over 68 years.   

 It provides an excellent opportunity to network and socialise with a wide variety of electrical consultants, contractors, manufacturers and suppliers from throughout London and the South East.   

 
Due to the established history of the society, and the enthusiasm of the committee, it is also an excellent opportunity to play some of the best golf courses in and around London.  

 

 There are normally nine meetings a year, one per month from March to November. Based on sponsorship, LEEGS are able to offer excellent value for money on each day. Trophies and prizes are awarded to the good and the bad! Every meeting includes breakfast or lunch, 18 holes and a three course dinner.

Name: The Club House at Seneca One - Golf Simulator & Event Space
Description:
Buffalo’s premiere downtown golf simulator and event space! By appointment only.

Book a private simulator rental today to work on your swing or golf with a group of friends (1-6 people).

Book a private event today for birthday parties, corporate events, grad parties, bachelor parties, stags and more, for up to 40 people!

(Note: Bookings must be made through our website only. We cannot create bookings over the phone.)

Name: The Rise Resort
Description:
Designed by the world-renowned player/architect team of Fred Couples and Gene Bates, The Rise is a spectacular championship course in Vernon, BC—it’s your perfect escape from the day-to-day. 1,000 feet above Okanagan Lake, with its dynamic layout, generous landing areas, and five sets of tees at every hole, this course proudly accommodates golfers of all abilities.

Each hole has its own unique character, and 12 of them showcase incredible views of Okanagan Lake below. Rise above it all—come play at the top of the world and celebrate the best of the Okanagan lifestyle.

Name: Torshälla Golfklubb
Description:
Välkommen till den familjevänliga golfklubben! 
Torshälla GK har för närvarande över 1600 medlemmar varav +200 juniorer som är verksamma i klubben. 
För att kunna stötta vår juniorverksamhet så är vi på jakt efter nya sponsorer. Vi har flera olika färdiga paket, men kan också skräddarsy sponsrings paket för just ditt företags behov. 
Kontakta oss för mer information: marknad@torshallagk.com
eller 016-35 87 22. 

#Denfamiljäragolfklubben #Sörmlandsjunior #TorshällaGK #barn #csr #golf #företag #junior #ungdom #eskilstuna #sponsring #torshälla #södermanland #juniorverksamhet #golf #sol #glädje #förenökadtrygghet #juniorgolf #sport

Name: Stowmarket Golf Club
Description:
Founded in 1902, Stowmarket Golf Club has been on its present site in Finborough Park since 1962. It is a pretty parkland course set in the quiet and peaceful Suffolk countryside with much wildlife and lovely views. The renowned high-quality greens and varied holes suit both low and high handcappers looking for a challenging yet rewarding game on a well maintained layout with excellent practices facilities and grass driving area. The club is also renowned for the friendly welcome it gives to members and visitors.

The Course

Now measuring some 6,107 yds from the whites, the par 69 course initially evolved through normal play but during the mid 60’s designs were invited from Hawtree and Charles Grayston. Grayston was chosen but Hawtree were involved in 1968 in the design of six new greens. Stowmarket’s parkland course requires accuracy and good ball positioning; appealing to long hitters and strategists alike whilst the greens give any golfer a master test of their putting skills.

Name: Northampton Country Club Easton PA
Description: Nestled in the heart of the Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania, Northampton Country Club is a private club which offers members the finest in golf, tennis, swimming, and superb dining. Beautifully set against a backdrop of mature, tree-lined fairways and large, undulating greens, Northampton Country Club provides not only spectacular scenery, but also offers a full range of services and facilities including a driving range, practice putting green, pro shop, and an inviting pool-side snack bar.

Name: Mount Vernon Country Club - 1915
Description:
Established in 1915 and hidden in the hills of Knox County, Ohio, Mount Vernon Country Club is proud to be one of the last remaining full-service private country clubs.

For over 100 years we have offered an exclusive and private setting for our members to enjoy an unparalleled level of service. We are committed to exceeding expectations and believe our purpose is to enrich the lives of our members, offering the camaraderie of a true private country club.

Name: Steel Club
Description:
Voted Morning Call Readers' Choice Best Brunch, Best Golf Course, Best Country Club, and Best Outdoor Dining!

Nestled in the hills of Saucon Valley, Pennsylvania, this Donald Ross-designed 27-hole facility offers beauty, style, and grace. Our experienced staff caters to your every need, making sure you are always comfortable and welcome. A captivating, 27,000 square foot clubhouse offers banquet and meeting rooms to accommodate everything from intimate gatherings to gala affairs. Whether business or personal Steel Club is the perfect place to make every event a memorable one.

Name: POTTGOLF
Description:
Bei POTTGOLF verschmelzen Golf, Events und Clubleben zu einer unschlagbaren Mischung. Wir sind nicht nur ein Golfclub, sondern auch die ultimative Eventlocation für unvergessliche Feiern. 
Hier sind wir nicht nur ein Team auf dem Grün, sondern auch Party-Gastgeber mit Stil. 
Unsere Leidenschaft fürs Detail und die neuesten Trends, machen den Aufenthalt bei uns zu einem Erlebnis.
Unsere Golfschule bietet eine breite Palette von Kursen für alle Spielstärken an.
Egal, ob du Anfänger bist, an deiner Technik arbeiten möchtest oder dein Handicap verbessern willst – bei uns findest du den passenden Kurs.
Willkommen bei POTTGOLF, wo Golf mehr ist als nur ein Schlag ins Gras – es ist ein Lifestyle!

Name: Golf Club Angoulême - Hirondelle
Description:
Fondé en 1953 par un groupe d’industriels passionnés, le Golf Club de l’Hirondelle reçoit son homologation en 1955 avec le numéro 48, ce qui en fait un des plus vieux golfs du Poitou-Charentes. Ce golf se présente alors comme une structure associative.

Dans les années 1980, une tentative de passage à 18 trous se heurte aux mouvements écologistes. Et c’est en 1994, sous l’égide de sportifs, en partenariat avec les communautés territoriales et la ville d’Angoulême, que le parcours passera à 18 trous.

L’inauguration a lieu en 2001, par le Président de la Fédération Française de Golf, le maire d’Angoulême et le Président du Golf en exercice.

Un parcours exigeant, la convivialité, la sportivité des membres et son Ecole de Golf labellisée permettent aux équipes du club d’évoluer à haut niveau national.

Name: Links Golf & Wellbeing
Description:
Since opening in March 1993, the golf course at Hope Island has consistently ranked in Australia’s top ten resort courses. Host to the 1997 Johnnie Walker Classic and Qantas Legends Golf Classic, the course is both nationally and internationally renowned. Designed by five times British Open Champion, Peter Thomson, and partner, Mike Wolveridge, it is rated by Australian golfing legend, Peter Senior, as “one of the best championship links courses you’ll play”. An iconic course it forms the centrepiece of the Hope Island Resort located on the north shore of the Gold Coast, just 20 minutes from Surfers Paradise and 40 minutes from the Brisbane CBD.  

The layout is set in a 360 ha residential resort community and the par 72 course measures approximately 6,500 metres off the championship tees. Careful strategic thinking must be employed around the natural and man made hazards and 117 challenging pot style bunkers. Other facilities including a 18 bay driving range, with putting and chipping greens, a concierge bag drop and GPS carts further enhance your golfing experience.

While an intangible asset in one sense, a primary point of difference with the Links Hope Island is the atmosphere of friendship and sportsmanship that prevails. Relatively young as a club by some standards, its comparative youth has encouraged a progressive attitude resulting in the absence of outmoded attitudes and a warm camaraderie between members, guests and staff.

Name: The Golf Projx
Description:
TheGolfPROjx’s foundation is a love of golf, and a drive to create a more enlightened way of practising. When the UK went into lockdown 1.0 in March 2020 – the start of the golf season, Graham Cox invested in a Trackman hoping to use lockdown for productive practice. Previously, practice typically meant hitting hundreds of balls obsessively focusing on perfecting my technique, chasing the perfect form.

With Trackman, Graham was able to measure his performance during skills based tests, recreating a competitive environment. The real results were shown when professional golf did briefly re-open; Graham had three competitive wins. This powerful bit of kit was truly transformative. The more golfers – both professional and amateur – Graham spoke to, the more it became obvious that there was an appetite for a more flexible but measurable approach to practice.

So, Graham set out to find a way to make the most of Trackman – and to open up its capabilities to his fellow professionals and passionate amateur golfers. To open up meaningful golf practice to more people, and to create a community along the way.

A warehouse in Warrington has become theGolfPROjx, a state-of-the-art indoor golf facility. Golfers will have access to everything they need to make the most of the tech – expert PGA coaching, game analysis, even a sports psychologist.  

We can’t wait to welcome you to theGolfPROjx.

Name: The Quarry Beach Club
Description: The Beach Club is a private member owned club featuring amenities that set us apart from the rest. The Breezeway will lead you to paradise.  Our private waterfront Club features both a resort and lap pool, fitness and wellness center, tennis, pickleball and bocce courts and boating. Dining at its finest is available at the Indoor Dining room and Tiki Bar.  The Resort Pool is the perfect place to spend your afternoon basking in the sun while enjoying food and beverages served poolside with a smile.  Spend the day enjoying our amenities and the evening with a breathtaking sunset at the lake.

Name: Llantrisant and Pontyclun Golf Club
Description: A parkland course lined with mature trees and bounded by the river Ely at its northern edge. A little over 5,300 yards, you are presented with an enjoyable challenge for all levels of golfer. The views from the course are spectacular and there is plenty of wildlife to take in on your way around.

Name: Stockholms Golfklubb
Description: Stockholms Golfklubb is a Golf Club and a golf course - Keveingebanan - based in Danderyd, Stockholm County, Sweden.

Name: Black Squirrel Golf Club
Description: 18 hole golf course in Goshen, IN

Name: Golf-X Marketing
Description:
WELCOME TO GOLF-X - A LEADING DIGITAL GOLF MARKETING COMPANY

Golf-X specialise in golf marketing and our purpose is to help maximise the value of your brand. Working with you, we’ll unlock the power, potential and value of your brand and ultimately help to increase sales.

With over 18 years experience in the golf industry Golf-X brings you experience in all areas of digital golf marketing. From web design to social media management we work with golf clubs, golf pros, e-commerce and start ups that are looking to break into the golf market.

Name: Sawa
Location: Santa Eulària des Riu, Islas Baleares

Name: Brookridge Golf Club
Description:
In the heart of Overland Park, Brookridge Golf Club features an 18-hole course with tree-lined fairways and perfectly manicured greens. Indian Creek winds gently throughout the course to add a touch of beauty and a great challenge. It is a championship course that's challenging for any handicap. Our practice facilities offers a putting green, chipping green, short game practice areas and a driving range. Brookridge offers Men's and Ladies leagues, Couples events and an award-winning Junior golf program. Our friendly team of golf pros offers group and private instruction for every level of player.

Brookridge is a true fitness center offering over 95 hours of gym accessibility per week, 13 different types of classes, 36 group fitness classes, personal training,  37 pieces of cardio, 18 circuit training pieces, over 20 machines and benches of free weights, 18 Lemond bikes in our cycle room and a dedicated aerobic room with all the bells and whistles.

Name: Burlingame Country Club
Description: Located in Sapphire, NC, Burlingame Country Club is a Member Owned Golf, Lawn Sports and Social Club.

Name: Peterborough Milton Golf Club
Description: Peterborough Milton Golf Club is a classic James Braid parkland course, with tree-lined fairways, well-guarded greens and a large lake that divides the 1st and 18th fairways. We also have clubhouse facilities that can host a variety of meetings, seminars, celebrations and events.

Name: Bally’s Golf Links at Ferry Point
Description: Bally's Golf Links at Ferry Point is a Jack Nicklaus designed links style golf course in NYC that offers public tee times, an upscale restaurant, and a gorgeous event venue. The golf course is situated at the foot of the iconic Whitestone Bridge, where the East River meets the Long Island Sound, providing stunning views of the New York City skyline. Since its opening in 2015, Bally’s Golf Links at Ferry Point has gained recognition as one of the top public courses in New York State. Its exceptional design, breathtaking views, and commitment to providing an exceptional experience have made it a must-visit destination for golfers and event planners alike.

Name: Royal Perth Golf Club
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn page for Royal Perth Golf Club.

Royal Perth Golf Club is the oldest golf club in metropolitan Western Australia (WA) and was awarded its Royal Status in 1937.

Name: Huxley Golf
Description: Huxley Golf is a company based out of The Old Grain Store, Lippen Lane, Warnford, Hampshire.

Name: Golf Club am Reichswald Nürnberg e.V.
Description:
Faszination Golf am Rande der Stadt! 

Wir versprechen: Spielen ohne Startzeiten, eine tolle Atmosphäre, eine super Gastronomie und Entspannung pur 

Der Golf Club am Reichswald e.V. ist nicht nur stolzes Gründungsmitglied der renommierten Leading Golf Clubs of Germany, sondern auch ein echtes Juwel und der einzige Golfclub im Stadtgebiet Nürnbergs. Eingebettet in die malerische Natur des Sebalder Reichswaldes, umgeben von Vogelgezwitscher und gelegentlichen Begegnungen mit Rehen, bietet das Areal eine einladende Atmosphäre der Ruhe und Entspannung.

Der eigene Anspruch an höchste Qualität spiegelt sich nicht nur in der erstklassigen Platzpflege des Vereins wider, sondern auch in der herzlichen Willkommenskultur für Mitarbeiter, Mitglieder und Gäste sowie dem exzellenten Service. Das gemütliche Clubhaus und die herrlich gelegene Terrasse schaffen einen Ort, der zum Verweilen einlädt und an dem sich Golfliebhaber wie auch Besucher gleichermaßen wohlfühlen.

Im Restaurant „Eagle’s Kitchen“, geführt von Christian Brieske, einem der angesehensten Gastronomen Frankens, werden exzellente Gerichte serviert, die den Gaumen verwöhnen. Auf dem gepflegten 18-Loch-Platz gibt es keine festen Startzeiten – unter dem Motto „Come and Run“ treffen sich Golffreunde zu geselligen Runden und spannenden Turnieren.

Die erfahrenen PGA-Golftrainer Richard Taylor und David Blakeman bieten ein vielfältiges, modernes Training für alle Altersgruppen und Spielklassen sowie gelegentliche Golfreisen für Mitglieder und Gäste an.

Im Golf Club am Reichswald finden Golfbegeisterte ihre sportliche Heimat und können ihre Leidenschaft für diesen faszinierenden Sport in vollen Zügen ausleben.

Name: Baton Rouge Country Club
Description: The Baton Rouge Country Club, established in 1916, is considered one of the foremost private country clubs in the Southeast. Working at the Baton Rouge Country Club allows you to gain knowledge, develop skills, and work with a professional team in a great environment.

Name: National Golf & Country Club
Description: National Golf & Country Club, located less than 37 km north of Bucharest, is an inclusive golf community developed within the most beautiful resort ever built in the vicinity of Bucharest. The eye-catching golf course, exquisite services, amazing skylines from every angle, club facilities, and the homey clubhouse; all of the above and many more, are what National Golf & Country Club means.

Name: ALAMANCE COUNTRY CLUB, INC.
Description: Alamance Country Club is a family oriented private club that strives to be it's Members' favorite place to be. We do this by offering a wide array of activities for members of all ages and their families with gracious hospitality. Our core values are family, integrity, invested, stewardship, and excellence. We are the only full service country club in Alamance County, NC. Our historic Donald Ross golf course is one that will keep you coming back time after time. With modern amenities across our campus we are a tucked away retreat in the middle of the growing Piedmont region of North Carolina.

Name: MID KENT GOLF CLUB LIMITED
Description: Established in 1909, Mid Kent GC offers golf for all ages on a fabulous course and a great social life.

Name: Stock Farm Club
Description:
Our vision is to preserve this place – where unspoiled landscapes and modern luxuries strike a natural balance, and it is our honor to steward this responsibly. Here, we embrace Western hospitality and small town sensibilities. Our relationship with the local community and access to the outdoors are not things we take for granted.

Stock Farm Club is in Western Montana in the heart of the Bitterroot Valley – nestled between the Sapphire and Bitterroot Mountains, in the city of Hamilton.

Name: NO DIRT GOLF
Description:
NO DIRT GOLF is a wholesale & direct-to-consumer golf accessories brand. We've crafted the ultimate golf towel for every Player, featuring a built-in club scrubber for effortless club cleaning. Our goals are simple:

Goal 1: Improve the golf towel experience for players of all levels
Goal 2: Make golf towels that add style and character to your golf bag

Name: Sporties Barooga
Description:
Incorporating Cobram-Barooga Golf Club, Barooga Aquatic & Recreation Centre (BARC), and The Beach Cafe.


Welcome to Sporties, your ultimate destination for dining, entertainment, and community in Cobram Barooga.

We bring mateship, community, and a love of sport together to create an extraordinary experience. Our licensed club is the social hub of the Murray River Region, perfect for celebrating thrilling games or unwinding after a hard day’s work.

Since 1981, Sporties has evolved from a humble tin shed into a magnificent showpiece reflecting our pride in the region. Indulge in delightful dining with a carefully curated menu showcasing local ingredients and gourmet cuisine. Immerse yourself in a vibrant atmosphere with captivating live performances and music.

Synonymous with Cobram Barooga, Sporties attracts locals and visitors alike. Enjoy delectable food and drinks, engaging conversations, and unwind in our inviting outdoor seating or cocktail bar crafted by expert mixologists. Explore our exciting offerings, from 18 holes of mini golf for all skill levels to state-of-the-art multi-sport simulators in The Bunker, providing unparalleled realism and a range of sports and games.

As a proud member of the community, we give back through supporting local projects and charities, creating a better future for our region. Join our thriving community, experience the best in dining and entertainment, and embrace the camaraderie that defines Sporties. Welcome to a world of unforgettable moments.

Name: Simbay
Description:
Don’t miss out on the revolution in golf.
Attract new players, boost member loyalty and create new revenue opportunities. Lower the barrier for newcomers, appeal to younger generations and break the stereotypes of golf. More than a machine: it’s a vision for the future of golf, where technology, tradition, and interactivity meet. 
Follow us at www.simbay.nl and be the first to be part of the revelation.

Name: Alwoodley Golf Club
Description:
Alwoodley Golf Club is the original design by Dr. Alister MacKenzie, the famous architect behind courses such as Augusta National, Cypress Point, Royal Melbourne, and many more.

Opened for play in 1907, Alwoodley has welcomed many golfers from around the world to Yorkshire and hosted many prestigious championships such as The Brabazon Trophy, English Ladies' Amateur Championship and has played host to Regional Open Qualifying.

Name: Wolf Creek Golf Club
Description:
Atlanta's Premier Golf Destination

Experience the Ultimate Golfing Experience in Atlanta with easy access from downtown Atlanta and a short drive away from Hartsfield Airport.

Wolf Creek Golf Club offers a unique blend of challenging play and stunning natural beauty, making it the premier golf destination in Atlanta. Our 18-hole championship course is an actual skill test for golfers of all levels.

Course Highlights:
Championship course featuring a strategic and engaging layout.
Immaculately maintained greens and fairways.
Scenic landscapes with rolling hills, mature trees, and beautiful water features.

Community and Events:
Welcoming atmosphere fostering a vibrant golfing community.
Hosts various events, tournaments, and corporate outings.

Commitment to Excellence:
Dedicated to maintaining high standards in course conditions and customer service.
Professional golf instruction and youth development programs are available.
Conveniently located in the heart of Atlanta, Wolf Creek Golf Club is an urban oasis providing a serene retreat from the city's hustle and bustle. Join us to experience golf excellence, breathtaking beauty, and the thrill of the challenge at Atlanta's premier golf destination.

Name: Golf des Yvelines
Description:
Un cadre enchanteur parmi une population de chevreuils
Le tracé original revient à l’architecte anglais Bill Baker en 1990. L’architecte Jean Claude Cornillot est à l’origine des nombreuses transformations et rénovations depuis près de 10 ans. Le parcours 18 trous « Les Chênes » du Golf des Yvelines reçoit régulièrement des épreuves amateurs de haut niveau, un gage de qualité et de reconnaissance.

Un parcours technique, boisé et exigeant. La précision dès le premier coup est une nécessité, les attaques de greens sont variées avec des greens très protégés.

Name: National Golf Links Of America
Description: National Golf Links of America is a prestigious links-style golf course in Southampton, New York.

Name: University Golf Club
Description: The University Golf Club is a public golf club located in Pacific Spirit Regional Park  in the city of Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada, and the University of British Columbia. It is owned and operated by Musqueam Capital Corporation

Name: Serena Golf
Description:
Nuestro campo de golf, La Serena, no es excesivamente largo, tiene una estructura tradicional con suaves colinas y calles onduladas, los búnkeres esculpidos en forma de flor muy originales entre grandes lagos, palmeras y una gran cantidad de especies que viven en nuestros humedales.
Estamos en un pueblo costero lleno de vida y facilidades para alojarse y disfrutar. 
Nuestra casa club alberga un restaurante con una carta para todos los gustos y una gran terraza desde la que disfrutar de buenos momentos.
La proshop sorprende por la variedad de marcas más top especializadas en ropa técnica de golf. 
Nuestro personal les está esperando para facilitarle todo lo necesario para su siguiente ronda.

Name: Chattahoochee Country Club
Description: As Gainesville’s premier family-focused, member owned private club, Chattahoochee Country Club is dedicated to enhancing the social, recreational and professional lives of members and their families. We achieve this by offering a uniquely superior experience while protecting the privilege and value of the membership. The Club values quality, integrity, teamwork, personal relationships and fiscal responsibility. With a rich history dating back to 1950, Chattahoochee Country Club offers an experience like no other.

Name: Hayling Golf Club
Description: Hayling Golf Club is proud to be one of the premier links golf courses on the South Coast. Having hosted a number of Championships events over the years, giving it Championship Course status, the quality of the course attracts golfers from far and wide and is recognised as a Top 50 Golf Course in England and Top 100 Links Golf Course in UK & Ireland.

Name: Kilmacolm Golf Club
Description: Kilmacolm Golf Club: A Unique Course & Outstanding Club

Name: smbGOLF
Description:
We unlock new revenue for golf businesses. 

smbGOLF works with golf businesses on short and long term projects. We provide digital services for golf courses and consulting for b2b SaaS golf companies.
Specialties: data, go-to-market, revenue management, revenue expansion, marketing, technology, vendor contracts.

Name: LAURO GOLF RESORT
Description:
Lauro Golf Resort · 27 hoyos en plena Costa del Sol 
Golf, experiencias únicas y naturaleza viva en un entorno sostenible.

Name: Saint Louis Country Club
Description: St. Louis Country Club

Name: Lost Rail Golf Club
Description: Nebraska’s elite golf courses, much like its railroad heritage, are widely known. But there’s nothing on the map like Lost Rail, a place that blends the exclusivity and intimacy of a destination course with the convenience and character of a classic club.

Name: AL HOUARA GOLF CLUB
Description: Designed by eminent architects Graham Marsh and Vijay Singh, Al Houara Golf Club, with its challenging 18-hole championship golf course, has quickly ascended to the apex of the golf world. The club’s panoramic setting overlooking the Atlantic Ocean, combined with a challenging course layout featuring strategically positioned bunkers and water hazards, has seen it rank in the Top 100 Golf Resorts in the World by Golf.com. Beyond its golf amenities, the club is part of a larger resort complex that includes the opulent Hilton Tangier Al Houara Resort & Spa, providing guests with an unrivaled blend of luxury accommodation, superior dining options, and leisure facilities.

Name: James River Country Club
Description:
James River Country Club is a hidden gem nestled along the banks of the James River.  At James River, members experience all the luxury of a resort, the comforts of a close knit community, vibrant social lifestyles, and robust athletic amenities, with a relaxed and inviting atmosphere.

With an exceptional 18 hole golf course, indoor and outdoor tennis courts, four pools, activities for children, and multiple dining venues with frequent events, James River Country Club offers its members a private retreat that offers something for the entire family.

Name: The Mind Zone
Description: The Mind Zone workshops have been developed to help you use your mind to maximise your performance. The Mind Zone workshops make an area of the golf game – The Mind Zone – that most people realise is very important, useable, realistic and performance improving on the golf course.

Name: Real Club Golf Sotogrande
Description: First desgin by R.T. Jones in Europe (1964). Full restoration in 2015-2016 advised by Rulewich & Fleury.

Name: Kauri Cliffs Golf
Description:
Set among high cliffs and rolling farmland, Kauri Cliffs offers a spectacular par 72 championship golf course designed by David Harman, alongside the luxury coastal resort Rosewood Kauri Cliffs.

Immerse yourself in the sheer beauty of Kauri Cliffs, set on 6,000 acres of working sheep and cattle farmland. Playing atop pristine coastline with vast views over the Pacific Ocean and picturesque Cape Brett and Cavalli Islands. Beyond the greens, the expansive property unfolds, hosting the exclusive Rosewood Kauri Cliffs resort. This luxury haven is an integral part of the landscape, offering a refined escape with unparalleled hospitality.

Name: Kungsbacka Golfklubb
Description:
Kungsbacka Golfklubb bildades 1970 och de första hålen var spelklara 1974. Banan bestod då av 13 hål, dagens hål 1-6 och 12-18. De resterande fem hålen färdigställdes 1977 och 18-hålsbanan benämns idag "Gamla Banan". Bankaraktären spänner från lummig skogs- och parkbana till vindpinad seaside.

"Nya Banan" är en tuff 9-håls fullängdsbana med mycket skog och vatten som blev spelklar 1992. Den blev ett perfekt komplement till Gamla Banan.

"Korthålsbanan" är en 9-håls "pay and play"-bana med mycket fina greenområden. Den färdigställdes 2003 efter att innan dess ha bestått av 5-hål.

Name: Belton Park Golf Club
Description:
Belton Park Golf Club (founded in 1890) lies within the spacious parkland of the historic National Trust estate of Belton House. Our golf club is one of the finest golf courses located in the East Midlands with a unique 27 attractive and challenging holes, set in 240 acres of the heart of Lincolnshire.

As a regular host of England golf events, we boast superb views of the local National Trust landscape with an abundance of wildlife including fallow deer which roam the course.

The main purposes of Belton Park Golf Club are to provide facilities for and to promote participation in the amateur sport of golf in the Grantham and surrounding area. As such the Club is registered as a Community Amateur Sports Club. We are a private club with over 800 members and excellent facilities making Belton Park a very popular venue.

Name: Ceann Sibéal - Dingle Golf Links
Description:
Fáilte go dtí Galf Chumann Ceann Sibéal. Welcome to Dingle Golf Links, or Ceann Sibéal as it's known locally (pronounced "Key-Oun She-Bail").
We are a Eddie Hackett designed links course on the Dingle Peninsula in South West Ireland. Renowned for our warm welcome, pure fescue greens, award winning dining, and for being a tough – but very fair – test of golf. Ongoing course upgrades in recent years have seen us ranked in the top 50 courses in Ireland for the first time in 2022 and we have extensive plans for further upgrades this Spring and beyond.
Our facilities include our bar and restaurant, fully stocked proshop, club hire, electric trolleys, golf carts and full caddy programme. 
We're delighted to welcome golfers from all over the world to this special location on the Wild Atlantic Way.

Name: Trolls Golf Club
Description:
Bringing Private Golf Courses Access to Passionate & Forward Thinking Golfers 

Website Launch 5/23/22

Name: De Zalze Golf Club
Description: Nestled in the heart of the winelands, within the parameters of the renowned De Zalze Winelands Golf Estate, lies the 18-hole championship De Zalze Golf Course. The perfect test for all golfers, our state-of-the-art course boasts an excellent mix of parkland holes as well as the Oak-lined Blaauwklippen river which winds its way through the Estate and comes to play at various intervals.

Name: AVID GOLF
Description:
simulators & lounge  where those who love golf hang out.

AVID GOLF is a sports entertainment company based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada. Our golf simulator lounge has proudly facilitated 10,000 tee times in our first 16 months of business, leverages the exact same technology PGA Tour pros use, operates a full-service bar that keeps things entertaining, and hosts as many birthday parties, bachelor parties, diaper parties & corporate events that we possibly can. AVID GOLF has proven fun for BOTH avid golfers AND non-golfers alike. We're bringing off-season country club vibes to a community hot-spot. And we're making Winnipeg Winters just a little warmer.

Membership options available. Book private events for up to 40 people, 12 months of the year!

Name: The Golf Society
Description:
At The Golf Society, our mission is to redefine the golfing simulator experience by providing unparalleled access to state-of-the-art facilities. We are committed to creating an immersive environment where members and guests can enhance their skills, forge lasting connections, and celebrate the artistry of golf.

We offer 24/7/365 Access Private, Climate Controlled Luxury Suites, members only, multiple membership opportunities, cutting edge golf technology, custom app for access and private suite bookings. Bring your own food & beverages - beverage fridge in each suite. Access to exclusive curated events and products.

Name: The Legends Country Club
Description:
The Legends Country Club is a private, member-focused community nestled in the scenic hills of Eureka, Missouri. Featuring 27 holes of championship golf, a vibrant calendar of social events, family-friendly amenities, and elegant indoor and outdoor dining, The Legends offers a truly elevated country club experience.

Whether you're here for the game, the camaraderie, or the lifestyle, The Legends delivers unforgettable moments — on and off the course.

 Golf • Tennis & Pickleball • Aquatics
 Dining & Events
 Weddings • Tournaments • Corporate Outings

 Conveniently located just west of St. Louis

Name: Old Course Ranfurly Golf Club
Description:
Situated in rural Renfrewshire, the Old Course Ranfurly offers the perfect challenge to golfers of all abilities. Our 18-hole Championship course, designed by James Braid, is a fine example of an inland moorland course, accompanied by magnificent views of Ben Lomond and the Campsie Fells. 

Our wonderful clubhouse is the perfect setting to enjoy the extensive range of beer, spirits, and wines we have on offer. And our dining experience is easily one of the best you will experience in a golf club environment.

Name: The Old Collier Golf Club
Description: The Old Collier Golf Club’s 18-hole championship course was designed by noted golf course architect Tom Fazio. Set in a gently elevated park-like setting and favored by cooling breezes from the nearby Gulf of Mexico, the Club has no residential real estate whatsoever. It is pure golf. Membership at The Old Collier Golf Club is a highly personal experience, and anticipation of each member’s preferences is the standard. Facilities are impeccably maintained and continuously upgraded. Simply put, The Old Collier Golf Club has but one purpose – to provide pure enjoyment of the game of golf for its members.

Name: Pine Valley Golf Club
Description: Pine Valley Golf Club in Pine Hill, New Jersey

Name: Club de golf St-Jean Ltée
Description: Le Club de golf St-Jean, fondé en 1922, propose à ses visiteurs un parcours riche en arbres matures et un terrain soigneusement entretenu par du personnel expérimenté. Venez vivre une expérience mémorable dans une ambiance chaleureuse avec ses employés accueillant et bienveillant!

Name: Granadilla Country Club
Description: Club de Campo Granadilla, es una Corporación de deportes y recreación, que permite a sus socios tener un momento de esparcimiento junto a un entorno rodeado de vegetación, con hermosas vistas de la cuidad jardin, lo que hace que este recinto se transforme en un atractivo polo de reunión social y familiar.

Name: Pike Run Country Club
Description:
Nestled among 400 wooded acres in the Laurel Mountains near Donegal, PA and surrounded by 20,000 beautiful acres of protected state game lands, Pike Run provides an unmatched year-round retreat from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. Pike Run combines a traditional setting with modern amenities and a full range of recreational activities including: 

Warm Months:
•	Executive Golf Course
•	Heated Swimming Pool
•	2 Tennis Courts
•	Private Trout Stream
•	Bowling Green
•	Biking 
Winter:
•	Cross-Country Skiing
•	Bonfires
•	Welcoming Fireplaces
•	10-Minute Proximity to 2 Local Ski Resorts
All Year:
•	Trap, Skeet and Five Stand Shooting
•	Gourmet Dining
•	Special Events
•	Cozy Lodging

Name: Mulligan's Golf Experience
Description: We are a unique indoor golf experience that combines easy-to-use golf simulator technology, a custom built realistic putting green, and a welcoming, social atmosphere. We strive to create an environment, year-round, where golfers of all skill levels can:  Play. Relax. Repeat.

Name: X-Golf Naperville
Description: Experience Year Round Golf! Explore leagues, tournaments, memberships, and more! Your perfect swing awaits!

Name: Killearn Club
Description: Killearn Country Club & Inn is now reimagined into the Killearn Club, honoring its 50-year legacy and Tallahassee roots. David Cummings, entrepreneur, golf enthusiast, and Tallahassee native, spearheaded the multimillion-dollar reimagination. With the redesigned 18-hole Championship Course, new 9-hole Clover course, revamped facilities including a clubhouse, pool, and restaurant, members can expect the Killearn experience to be better than ever.

Name: Birdie Bros
Description: Birdie Bros, based in Middle Tennessee, offers the finest indoor golf facilities. It's the perfect fusion of a clubhouse, sports bar, and golfing venue offering high-tech golf simulators, large TV screens, a robust food menu, and extensive bar offerings. More.Than.Golf.

Name: Best View Golf Adventures South Africa
Description:
An amazing travel plan for your visit to South Africa!

From visiting some of the countries famous golf courses to adventurous game drives at the coast of the Western Cape! Not to be missed.

Name: Wedgewood Pines Country Club
Description:
Welcome to Wedgewood Pines Country Club —New England’s Best-Kept Secret.

Tucked away in the heart of New England, our club is a sanctuary of tradition, camaraderie, and natural beauty. From our championship golf course to our pristine pool and gathering spaces, every detail is designed for relaxation, recreation, and refined enjoyment.

For generations, Wedgewood has been more than just a club, it’s a legacy. What began as a quiet escape for a close-knit community has grown into a cherished haven where families grow, friendships flourish, and memories are made season after season. Whether you're perfecting your swing or enjoying a summer afternoon by the pool, you’ll feel right at home. With over 20,000 square feet of the perfect blend of classic design and state of the art amenities. Our locker room facilities include spacious changing areas with personalized premium wood lockers for each member and separate men’s and ladies steam and sauna rooms. We offer a member’s restaurant, 19th Hole grill, and outside patio for casual dining and socializing, multiple function and conference rooms, and a main ballroom that can comfortably accommodate 200 people. Our aquatics facility, located adjacent to the clubhouse, provides the perfect family retreat from our warm New England summer for the entire family.
Our facilities may be fabulous, but it’s the people that make Wedgewood Pines special. From our knowledgeable, cheerful golf shop staff of certified PGA professionals, to our friendly and courteous food & beverage and function staff, you will always feel special and well cared for. Each and every member of the Wedgewood Pines staff is here to make sure your time at the Club is enjoyable. It’s not just the staff that creates the warm family atmosphere, the owners and members make everyone feel welcome and comfortable. The Pittorino Family represents two generations of dedication to enhancing every member’s experience.

Name: Woeste Business Club
Description: De Woeste Business Club is het zakelijke netwerk van golfvereniging de Woeste Kop in Axel en gelooft in de versterkende kracht van samenwerking tussen bedrijfsleven en onze golfclub. De Woeste Business Club verbindt de belangen van haar leden aan die van onze golfvereniging en creëert hiermee een win-win voor alle betrokkenen.

Name: ANJOU GOLF
Description:
Au cœur historique de l’Anjou, à 25 minutes d’Angers, l’Anjou Golf & Country Club vous accueille dans un cadre naturel et préservé. Dessiné par l’architecte anglais Frédéric Hawtree, le domaine est composé d’un chaleureux clubhouse et d’un magnifique parcours parsemé de vieux chênes pour votre plaisir et détente.  

Ouvert à tous, nous hébergeons jusqu'aux 50 personnes sur le golf dans nos chambres et studios fait pour les séjours longues ou courts, pour du business ou loisir.  Notre restaurant est ouvert pour déjeuner du mardi au dimanche à partir du 1 avril et notre chef est à votre écoute pour les réservations du soir (à partir du 15 personnes).  

Le fondateur d’Anjou Golf, Roland de La Poype est connu pour ses exploits du pilote pendante la Seconde Guerre Mondiale.  Il a crée le parc aquatique Marineland et a également développé la Méhari avec une carrosserie en plastique thermoforme révolutionnaire.  Aujourd’hui la Méhari reste une voiture emblématique des années 60.  Cette icône démontre les racines du club et explique notre attachement aux voitures vintages.

Name: Under Par Life
Description: Golf, golf and more golf

Name: Copetown Woods Golf Club
Description:
Copetown Woods is transforming into the place to be for golf and social events in Southern Ontario. 18 holes of great golf, an unreal patio to talk about all your missed putts and a Victorian style clubhouse that will make you feel like you've stepped back in time. 

You're gonna want to golf here. 
You're gonna want to eat here.
You're gonna want to get married here. 

CW has some great things happening. You're gonna want to be here!

Name: SouthShore Country Club
Description: Nestled between stunning mountain peaks and the pristine shores of Lake Las Vegas, SouthShore is conveniently located minutes from the Strip. Experience the pinnacle of golf in a breathtaking sanctuary on our Jack Nicklaus Signature Course.

Name: Watchung Valley Golf Club
Description: Watchung Valley Golf Club is a company based out of 600 Mountain Blvd, Watchung, New Jersey, United States.

Name: Longmeadow Country Club
Description: Established in 1922, Longmeadow Country Club is one of the most prestigious and oldest clubs in western Massachusetts. LCC boasts an 18-hole, Donald Ross championship golf course that is nationally renowned. LCC has been the host to the 1995 USGA Girls Junior Amateur, the 2005 USGA Junior Amateur and the site for the 2013 MGA Amateur Championship.

Name: Shadow Hawk Golf Club
Description:
The exclusiveness of Shadow Hawk is a direct result of the quality and integrity of our existing Members.  We are proud of the commitment to privacy, camaraderie, facilities and service, and strive to maintain these characteristics that define Shadow Hawk Golf Club as one of the premier private clubs in Houston.   

In addition to exclusive access to Shadow Hawk Golf Club. Shadow Hawk Members receive complimentary playing privileges at the area's finest golf courses including Black Hawk Country Club,  Golf Club of Houston's Member Course, Golf Club of Houston's Tournament Course and both North and South Courses at BlackHorse Golf Club, totaling 108 holes of championship golf in the Houston area.  Corporate Memberships and Individual Memberships are available.

Name: Eisen 7 Indoorgolf GmbH
Description:
E7SEN bietet die perfekte Alternative und Ergänzung zum klassischen Golfevent. „In Nord-Deutschlands erster Indoorgolf Location findet man auf 600 Quadratmetern 8 Trackman Boxen zum Golfen, ein 50qm großes Puttinggreen mit Puttview und eine großzügige Bar für Drinks und Snacks vor, nach und während des Spiels.

E7SEN ermöglicht Golfsport bei jedem Wetter und für jedes Spielniveau. Über 250 exakt vermessene Original-Plätze lassen sich spielen. 
Alle Bahnen und Games wie Nearest-to-the-Pin, Longest-Drive und Capture-the-Flag lassen sich auch ohne Handicap spielen.

Mit unserem neuen mobilen E7SEN bringen wir das Golferlebnis auch zu Dir vor Ort.

Wir bieten: 

-	Golf-Spaß für jedermann, überall und bei jedem Wetter
-	Events & Veranstaltungen für Firmen (Im E7SEN oder vor Ort)
-	Golfturniere mit attraktiven Gewinnen
-	Individuelles Golftraining mit Profis
-	Modernste Trackman-Technologie hilft dabei, den perfekten Schlag zu trainieren
-	Eine Bar zum Erfrischen und Networken
-	Fitting mit Top-Marken

Du bist eine Firma, die eine großartige Location für ein Firmenevent sucht? 
Oder Du bist sogar Eventveranstalter und möchtest Dir unsere Indoorgolf-Anlage für Dein Portfolio genauer ansehen? 

In jedem Fall kannst Du zu unseren Öffnungszeiten vorbeikommen oder uns direkt für einen Termin kontaktieren unter: 

Mail: info@eisen-sieben.com
Telefon: Tel.: +49 172 3077737
