Name: Mount Broughton Golf & Country Club
Description:
Mount Broughton Golf & Country Club has been designed for those who truly appreciate golf’s rich Scottish Heritage.
Tradition abounds…. from the echo's of old Scotland, to the old-fashioned values of course etiquette, to the camaraderie of the club house and the privilege of a superb country retreat.
Its a gentler and more thoughtful game you experience at Mount Broughton …as we say its “Golf the way it was meant to be.”
Mount Broughton is open 7 days a week for Members and Visitors.

Name: SmartPin
Description:
SmartPin's revolutionary smart flagstick and mobile app turn par 3s into heart-pounding games of skill with epic prize money, ball-to-hole distance detection, and Tour-quality highlight videos of every shot.

Download the SmartPin Golf app and learn more at SmartPinGolf.com.

Name: NNG&CC Golf Business Club de Poll
Description:
Business Club de Poll : Een Unieke combinatie van Business, Verbinding en Vermaak

In het pittoreske dorp Glimmen, verscholen tussen smalle fairways en glinsterende waterpartijen, ligt de Golfclub NNG&CC. Deze golfclub herbergt de Business Club NNG&CC. Dit is geen gewone business club, maar een ontmoetingspunt waar de kracht van netwerken, de schoonheid van de golfsport en het plezier van sociaal samenzijn samenkomen.

De Business Club NNG&CC is meer dan een plek voor ondernemers om te netwerken, het is een platform dat zowel de geest van de golfsport als de dynamiek van het bedrijfsleven belichaamt.

Een bezoek aan de club van Golfclub NNG&CC in Glimmen is meer dan een gelegenheid om uw swing te verbeteren. Het is een kans om te netwerken met gelijkgestemde professionals, nieuwe zakelijke kansen te ontdekken en te genieten van de harmonie tussen sport en business.

De kracht van de Business Club NNG&CC ligt in de integratie van haar kernwaarden in elk aspect van haar activiteiten. Business is niet alleen beperkt tot de onderhandelingstafel. Hier worden deals gesloten op de groene velden, waar het spel van golf een metafoor wordt voor de uitdagingen van het zakenleven.

Verbinding is het hart van de club. Het draait allemaal om het bouwen van relaties, het delen van successen en het samenwerken om gemeenschappelijke doelen te bereiken. De club biedt een omgeving waarin leden kunnen groeien, leren en ontwikkelen, zowel op persoonlijk als professioneel vlak.

En laten we vermaak niet vergeten. De Business Club NNG&CC erkent het belang van ontspanning en plezier in het hectische zakelijke landschap. Of het nu gaat om een vriendschappelijke golfwedstrijd, een culinaire avond of een feestelijke bijeenkomst, de club zorgt voor een evenwicht tussen werk en ontspanning.

Name: Ford Hill Country Club
Description: The Ford Hill Country Club Golf Course is situated on beautiful Ford Hill, in upstate New York, overlooking the quaint village of Whitney Point and Whitney Point Lake. Just a short drive from historic Binghamton, golfers playing Ford Hill Country Club will enjoy a quiet, pastoral setting, away from the noise and bustle of the city.

Name: The Ranches Golf Club
Description: Our mission is to deliver an affordable, accessible membership that makes golf and fitness a year round lifestyle for individuals, families, and corporate partners offering unlimited play, training, and wellness in a spectacular links-style setting at The Ranches Golf Club, where unforgettable views, welcoming service, and community gatherings create a place people belong.

Name: Tieke Golf Estate
Description:
Welcome to Tieke Golf Estate, a marquee golf course and hidden gem nestled in the heart of the Waikato. Our pristine greens and breathtaking landscapes offer a premier golfing experience for all levels of golfer. 

Beyond the fairways, we have a stunning Bistro and Bar, providing the best views in the Waikato. It's the perfect spot to unwind and take in the views.

For corporate clients, the Tieke Lounge offers an exceptional venue for meetings, strategy sessions and events.  We also offer fun golf-based breakout sessions led by our knowledgeable staff, perfect for team building and a bit of fun.

Name: Belvedere Golf & Country Club
Description:
The Belvedere Golf and Country Club was constructed in the early 1960’s as an architecual structure situated on a hill allowing a 360 - degree panoramic view of our wagon wheel format designed 18 hole golf course.  From the outset, golf was the catalyst for camaraderie and belonging in good company drove development and growth of the Club. 1981 saw the launch of major course improvements; with storage ponds constructed to promote a continuous supply of water for the irrigation system and several holes redesigned to improve both playability and appearance.

In keeping with current golf course design trends, the Club retained the services of a course design expert in 1993. In 2001 a Long Range Planning Committee was established to ensure the ongoing improvements required to meet and manage member expectations. In 2005, the Club retained the services of Golf Course Architect Ted Locke who provided an ambitious Course Development Plan that will guide improvements in the years to come.

Celebration of the Belvedere’s 50th Anniversary in 2011 was followed by completion of a newly renovated $3.4 million clubhouse in 2014. The Belvedere has evolved from a dream of a few golf enthusiasts into a Premier Private Club.

Located close to both Edmonton and Sherwood Park a mile south of the intersection of Provincial highways 14 and 21, the Belvedere Golf & Country Club occupies 160 acres of tree-lined rolling landscape framed by trees and posing a variety of challenges over 18 pristine holes. Score Magazine ranks Belvedere one of the Top 100 Courses in Canada.

Name: The Legends Golf Club
Description: Located 10 minutes north of Saskatoon, The Legends Golf Club in Warman has hosted a number of Saskatchewan Provincial Championships. With five different tee boxes to accommodate golfers of all ages and skill levels The Legends Golf Club is a fair test of golf for all to enjoy

Name: Golf & Country Club Leipzig
Description:
Inmitten der idyllischen Landschaft des Muldentals bietet der Golf & Country Club Leipzig eine Golfanlage, die durch ihre ausgewogene Symbiose zwischen Golf und Natur einen besonders hohen Freizeit- und Erholungswert bereithält. Nur etwa zwanzig Autominuten von Leipzigs Zentrum entfernt erfüllen sich die Träume von Golfern und Naturliebhabern.
 
Auf dem 80 Hektar großen Areal erstrecken sich zwischen dichten Waldgebieten die anspruchsvolle 18-Loch-Anlage und der 6-Loch-Übungsplatz Die Spielbahnen fügen sich harmonisch in das leicht hügelige Gelände ein und sind für Golfer jeder Spielstärke eine Herausforderung. Taktisch gut platzierte Bunker, Wasserhindernisse und Feuchtbiotope stehen für ein fast grenzenloses Spielvergnügen.
 
Die 18-Loch-Anlage mit ihren engen Par 3- bis Par 5-Spielbahnen erfordert ein präzises Spiel. Das anspruchsvolle Platzdesign hält auf 5.985 m für Herren und 4.865 m für Damen abwechslungsreiche Spielbahnen mit taktisch gut platzierten Bunkern, Wasserhindernissen und Feuchtbiotopen sowie gut verteidigten, ondulierten Grüns bereit.

Name: AI Agency Expert Cambodia
Description:
Dara Sakor Golf Resort  
In the heart of Cambodia's pristine landscapes, where the lush green of nature meets the serene blue of the ocean, lies a haven of luxury and relaxation - Dara Sakor Golf Resort. Born from a vision to create a unique destination that blends the thrill of adventure with the comfort of relaxation, Dara Sakor has become a symbol of refined elegance and unparalleled service. 
Our story begins with a dream to offer an escape - not just a place to stay but an experience to live. Dara Sakor Golf Resort was envisioned as a one-stop vacation destination, a place where every detail is curated to ensure our guests' utmost satisfaction. From the tranquil waters of our private beach to the challenging fairways of our world-class golf course, each element of the resort is designed to provide a memorable experience.
At Dara Sakor, we cater to a discerning clientele, ranging from 25 to 55 years old, who seek more than just a holiday. They are explorers of life, seeking to enrich their experiences with moments of joy, relaxation, and adventure. They come from across the globe - China, Korea, the USA, Japan - each with their own story, each looking to add a new chapter to their journey at Dara Sakor.
Our guests are not just visitors; they are the heroes of their own adventure, and we are their guides. Whether it’s perfecting their swing at our lush golf course, rejuvenating at our exclusive spa, or making a splash at our exhilarating water park, we ensure that each moment at Dara Sakor is one to cherish.
As we look to the future, Dara Sakor Golf Resort continues to evolve, always pushing the boundaries of luxury and service. Our commitment to excellence has made us a beacon of high-quality living, and our dedication to our guests' well-being remains unwavering. Dara Sakor is not just a resort; it’s a journey to the extraordinary, a gateway to experiences that linger long after our guests have returned home.

Description:
WELCOME TO GOGOLF

We are a new age, limited membership only facility with the sole goal of creating a community of golfers that can practice, play and improve in the comfort of our golf studio’s.

Members of GoGolf will be part of an indoor golf club that spins a traditional golf setting on its head so you get your golf fix all year round.

Name: Tönnersjö Golf & Resort
Description:

Name: Palheiro Golf
Description: Set within the magnificent Palheiro Estate and lying adjacent to the five-star Madeira Island Hotel Casa Velha do Palheiro - a Relais & Châteaux property - the 18-hole, par 72 championship golf course meanders through a pristine environment of maritime pine and botanical woodland embroidered with lush, sub-tropical vegetation. At nearly 500 m (1640 ft) above sea level, the location is blessed with dramatic views of Madeira's mountainous skyline and the vast Atlantic Ocean. Nestling below just 10 minutes away is Funchal, the island's capital. Designed by renowned golf architect Cabell B. Robinson, this picturesque layout with year-round appeal takes full advantage of Madeira’s hilly terrain, with abrupt ridges and deep valleys providing a compelling challenge for even the most seasoned golfer. The Palheiro Golf Course has been included in the "TOP 200 Golf Courses in Continental Europe" by Golf World Magazine, and is among the TOP 100 Golf Resorts.

We offer lessons, clinics, classes, coaching, workouts and team opportunities at every level. Whether you are enjoying a swim in one of our two pools, playing tennis or pickleball day or night, or working out in our fitness center, there is something for everyone at Ladera Oaks.

Name: GolfCave
Description:
Welcome to GolfCave – The Evolution of Golf

At GolfCave, we're passionate about revolutionizing the game of golf through innovation, technology, and a commitment to helping every golfer reach their full potential. We're on a mission to transform the way indoor golf is played, practiced, and experienced.

Using cutting-edge TrackMan technology in our private rooms (we call 'Caves'), GolfCave provides golfers of every skill level with an immersive and dynamic practice and playing environment. Our 24/7 state-of-the-art facilities help elevate your game from the inside —> out.

 LEARN
At GolfCave, we're a cross between your favorite caddie and your go-to golf partner. Whether you're teeing off for the first time or honing in on your game, our expert instructors leverage TrackMan technology to provide personalized, 1:1 coaching and analysis; helping golfers refine their skills and master their game.

 PLAY
Experience the thrill of playing the 18th hole at Pebble Beach! Every Cave at GolfCave is powered by TrackMan technology, allowing golfers to tee off on over 280+ world-renowned courses. Challenge your friends to a friendly round, or compete in online tournaments – all from the comfort and privacy of your own Cave.

  IMPROVE
GolfCave isn't just a place to practice – it's a place to Practice Inside and Play Better Outside. Through data-driven insights and targeted training programs, we empower golfers to identify areas for improvement and make meaningful progress toward their goals. Whether it's refining your swing or sharpening your mental game, GolfCave is here to help you become the best golfer you can be – translating your skills from the simulator to the course with confidence and precision.

Name: Glen Kernan Club
Description:
Reimagined in 2024, the new Glen Kernan combines its commitment to the highest standards in dining and member services with an 18-hole championship course designed by noted golf course architect Jim Furyk. 

Only minutes from the center of Jacksonville and Jacksonville Beach, the Club is an environmental sanctuary. Club members share its 250+ acres with a wide variety of wildlife, including eagles, osprey, foxes, gopher tortoises, and the occasional bull gator.

Membership is offered by invitation only. No solicitations please.

Name: Dobson Ranch Golf Course
Description:
The traditional golf experience is stiff and stuffy and that’s not cool. We’ve changed all that by creating the most fun and friendly golf experience in Arizona - it’s part golf, part party! So now you can have a blast at the course and make golf day the best day of your week!


At Dobson Ranch Golf Course we know that you want to have fun. To make that happen, you need to find an exciting, upbeat place to play. The problem is, most golf courses enforce stiff policies that kill any chance of having a good time. The day you play, should be the best day of your week, which is why we break with tradition and provide AZ’s most fun and friendly golf experience.

Name: Golf de Rougemont
Description: Sur les hauteurs de Profondeville, à mi-chemin entre Namur et Dinant, les dix-huit trous exceptionnels du golf de Rougemont dévoilent des vues inédites sur la vallée de la Meuse.

Name: GOLF SON SERVERA
Description:
EN
Course description: As unique members Club and second oldest Club on the isalnd of Mallorca This 18 Hole  course lays between a range of pine clad mountains with glorious views over the bay of Costa de los Pinos. Both experienced and rookie players  will enjoy their game  through challenging lakes and bunkers. After the game our Club House Restaurant offers the right spot to relax and enjoy great local gastronomy with views on the 18th hole and the sea.
Facilities: Driving Range, Putting Green, Chipping Green, Golf Pro Shop, Golf School, Restaurant with terrace 

Built : 1967	18 Holes                   Par 72      	          Designed by:    John Harris/ Francisco López Segales

ES
Descripción del campo: Como único club social y segundo club de golf  más antiguo de Mallorca, este campo de 18 hoyos está situado al pie de montañas rodeado de pinos con una vista grandiosa a la bahía. Tanto por jugadores con
experiencia como para principiantes este campo con sus lagos y búnkers ofrece un recorrido para disfrutar. Nuestra casa club ofrece un lugar maravilloso para descansar y disfrutar de nuestra gastronomía local con vista al hoyo 18 y el
mar.
Instalaciones: Driving Range, Putting Green, Chipping Green, Golf Pro Shop, escuela de golf, restaurante con terraza  

DE
Platz Beschreibung: Als einziger Mitgliederclub und zweitältester Club auf Mallorca liegt dieser 18–Loch Platz zwischen mit Pinien bewachsenen Bergen, mit einem grandiosen Blick auf die Bucht von Levante. Sowohl für erfahrene Spieler, so wie für Neueinsteiger, ist dieser Platz mit seinen Seen und Bunkers eine faire Herausforderung. Nach dem Spiel biete das Club-Haus Restaurant einen wunderbaren Ort, um sich zu erholen und unsere  lokale Gastronomie mit Blick auf das 18. Loch und das Meer zu genießen.

Einrichtungen:  Driving Range, Putting Green, Chipping Green, Golf Pro Shop, Golfschule, Restaurant mit Terasse

Name: Bigg Golf
Description:
The BIGG (Best In Golf Gear) Golf company is founded by a group of guys who love the game of golf, but hate blowing money on expensive balls! 

We asked ourselves, "Why can't there be a quality ball at a good price, that lets us keep the distance we love?" So in 2020 we did just that!

But we didn't stop there... We figured that guys like us... like guys like us AND the stuff we like too! Swing by our site, http://BigGolf.com, and give them a shot. Ya never know, you may love our BIGG BALLS ;-)

Name: Moraine Country Club
Description: Moraine Country Club is a restaurants company based out of 4075 Southern Blvd, Dayton, Ohio, United States.

Name: Florida Golf Course Superintendents Association
Description:
The purpose of the Florida Golf Course Superintendents Association shall be to promote sustainable turf management and unify the golf course superintendents of the state.

To achieve these goals, the Florida GCSA will engage in cooperative communications and education efforts with various interested organizations and regulatory and governmental offices to achieve the highest standards of professionalism.

The Florida GCSA consists of eleven local chapters, each of which is represented on the Florida GCSA Board of Directors. Membership in the Florida GCSA is automatically extended to all Class A, SM and C members who are members of one of the local chapters. There is no Commercial member category in the Florida GCSA.

Name: Gardagolf Country Club
Description:
Nestled between the rolling hills of Valtenesi and the stunning Lake Garda, GardaGolf Country Club is one of Italy’s most prestigious golf courses. Designed by world-renowned architects, our 27-hole course offers a perfect blend of technical challenge and breathtaking scenery, catering to golfers of all levels.

Our mission is to elevate the golf experience to new standards of quality, hospitality, and excellence. Every detail—from the immaculate course conditions to our exclusive club services—is designed to create a refined and welcoming atmosphere, where sport and nature come together in perfect harmony.

GardaGolf is more than just a golf course; it is a benchmark for Italian and international golf, a host to prestigious tournaments, and a gathering place for passionate golfers and professionals alike. We are shaping the future of golf, offering an unparalleled experience to our members and guests.

Name: Royal Mid-Surrey Golf Club
Description: Royal Mid-Surrey Golf Club lies within a bend of the river Thames in south-west London next to the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew. Golf has been played on this stretch of royal parkland since 1892 but it was the club’s great professional, JH Taylor, five times Open Champion, who set about transforming the landscape into one of the finest golf courses in Surrey.

Name: Vistabella Golf
Description:
Cuando alguien entra por primera vez a Vistabella Golf siente algo especial. El cuidado y el mimo dedicados a su recorrido donde cada detalle se convierte en un elemento indispensable.
Sus calles onduladas, bunkers estratégicos y sus característicos greenes lo convierten en uno de los diseños más atractivos de la zona.

When someone enters Vistabella Golf for the first time they experience something quite special. You will feel our dedication to every detail.
Its undulating fairways, its strategic bunkers and its unique greens make Vistabella Golf one of the best designs in the area.

Name: High Grove
Description: High Grove located in Venus, Florida, is a private, member golf destination dedicated to delivering an exceptional golfing experience. This exclusive club features a meticulously designed 18-hole course by Hanse Golf Design, taking full advantage of the site’s natural ridges, orange groves, and sandy terrain. The facility includes a practice area, clubhouse, 48 rooms made up of 3 lodges, and short course. High Grove emphasizes a walking-focused layout, blending traditional design with the unique topography of Florida’s Lake Wales Ridge, providing a premier experience for dedicated golf enthusiasts.

Name: Caddy For A Cure
Description:
Caddy For A Cure is a qualified 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Corporation. It has been approved and operating with the PGA TOUR  since 2004.

Caddy For A Cure offers the public the opportunity to experience a day “inside-the-ropes” at a PGA TOUR venue, caddying for a PGA TOUR player—with 100% of the proceeds going to charity. It’s a chance to walk the greatest courses in the nation, next to the greatest players and names in the world of golf, at a sanctioned PGA TOUR event. Caddying is an opportunity to gain insight into professional golf and its players that is unlike any other means. It’s a priceless opportunity to develop a relationship with one of the top players in the world while standing next to them as they hit shot after incredible shot.

Name: Golfing with Disabilites
Description: At Golfing with Disabilities, we envision a world where the golf course becomes a bridge, connecting people of all abilities. Our mission is to bring disabled and non-disabled individuals together through an innovative program that goes beyond the fairways and greens. By offering a variety of experiences, from taster sessions to on-course events, we aim to break down barriers, promote social inclusion, and contribute to the overall health and happiness of our community.

Name: Golf in the City #GITC
Description: A monthly game of golf, built around networking and growing businesses. Any interested in joining should contact Matthew Brady, Marc Millar or Jenna Herlingshaw

Name: Occano Golf & Boat Club
Description:
Walk in the Footsteps of Arnold Palmer - Occano is honored to be home to one of Arnold Palmer’s premier signature golf course designs. Palmer knew from the beginning that this special property overlooking the picturesque Albemarle Sound offered an opportunity to provide the finest golf experience in the eastern Carolinas.

Engaging his deep respect and love for the land, for the game, and for people, Palmer created a 7,192-yard, 18-hole masterpiece, which opened to immediate acclaim in 2009. Offering 11 holes that play directly on the waterfront, the course offers sweeping views and a tranquil coastal backdrop that elevates every round. The layout flows naturally with the land, using the area's rolling terrain and mature trees to shape a course that feels organic and refined.

Whether you're a seasoned player or a weekend enthusiast, Palmer’s vision at Occano delivers a round of golf that is both challenging and deeply enjoyable. The course is known for its playability, beauty, and pace, making it a must-play for those who appreciate the game in a relaxed setting.

Name: Eyckenduyn Golf | Eten | Drinken
Description:
GOLFEN IN EEN PARKACHTIGE OMGEVING
Eyckenduyn, in het plaatsje Helden, gemeente Peel en Maas (Noord-Limburg), is een golfbaan met C-status, die het gehele jaar door te bespelen is.

De natuurlijke omgeving ademt rust en ruimte uit. De prachtige baan, met een totale oppervlakte van maar liefst 10 hectare, levert veel indrukwekkende holes op. Het brengt u op een ontspannen manier langs fraaie hoge bomen en vijverpartijen. Het golfpark is een thuishaven voor veel soorten bloemen, planten, bomen en dieren.

Name: Camberley Heath Golf Club
Description:
Camberley Heath Golf Club is one of Surrey's finest courses. 

Founded in 1913, our Harry Colt-designed course celebrated its centenary year in 2013. Set in 135 acres of heath land, framed by towering pines, the challenging 6,400 yard, par 71 golf course is a true test for any golfer. 

The combination of excellent location, outstanding layout and wonderful hospitality in the superb clubhouse is what makes Camberley Heath so special for members, visitors and golf societies. 

Contact us today for further information and one of our friendly team members will get back to you: 01276 23258 or info@camberleyheathgolfclub.co.uk

Name: Pleasington Golf Club
Description:
Pleasington Golf Club, conveniently located between Preston & Blackburn, is regarded as one of the premier inland courses in the North of England, having hosted many prestigious events during its illustrious history which dates back to 1891. 

In the last 15 years we have had the privilege of hosting Regional Qualifying for The Open, The Brabazon Trophy (North Qualifying), European Senior Ladies Team Championships, England Golf Ladies County Finals, Northern Boys Championship, Lancashire Union County Matches as well as the EuroPro Tour and Maxi-Tour events.
In 2019 we welcomed England Golf again for the Brenda King Senior Foursomes, Lancashire Ladies CGA for their County Championship and we were delighted to host the PGA Assistant's Championship - one of the oldest professional championships in the world. 
We also have 2 stores, one in Oswaldtwistle, Accrington and one in Southport were we sell a range of small animals, pet food and accessories with friendly, informative and reassuring staff on hand.

Name: 7th Hole
Description:
7th Hole is a web-based platform designed to enhance the golfing experience by making food and beverage orders seamless and convenient. No need for golfers to download an app—by simply scanning a QR code, they can instantly access your restaurant’s menu online and place their orders directly.

This modern solution increases revenue for golf course restaurants and bars while delivering a smooth, hassle-free service for golfers. With 7th Hole, you can offer a top-tier dining experience that keeps your patrons satisfied without slowing down their game.

Join us in revolutionizing food service at the course with a simple scan!

Name: Magna Golf Club
Description: A professional 7,300-yard 18 holes golf course which was awarded the Canada’s Best New Golf Course in 2001 when it was built and has hosted the LPGA tour in 2018. It also has a European-style clubhouse with 30-foot vaulted ceilings, floor-to-ceiling stone fireplaces and an open-concept kitchen. Among the golfing elites who have enjoyed this course are Tiger Woods, Sergio Garcia, Annika Sorenstam and Mike Weir.

Name: Racine Country Club
Description:
Racine Country Club offers a wide range of amenities for those seeking a premier country club experience. With an 18-hole championship golf course, members can challenge themselves on a beautifully designed course with lush fairways and challenging greens. 

Additionally, the club offers a variety of other activities, such as swimming, tennis, pickleball, platform tennis, and bowling. Members can also dine in the club's extraordinary restaurant, hang out at Billows Lodge, or attend exclusive events hosted throughout the year. In addition, the club offers a selection of meeting rooms for business or social events that can accommodate any gathering. 

Overall, joining Racine Country Club provides access to top-notch facilities, recreational activities, and social opportunities, making it an ideal choice for those who value a well-rounded country club experience.

Name: Concord Country Club
Description: Concord Country Club is a private country club that offers golf, racquets and pool facilities.

Name: Higuerón Marbella Golf Resort
Description: Diseñado por el legendario Robert Trent Jones Senior, Higuerón Marbella Golf Resort se encuentra a sólo 5 minutos en coche desde el centro de Marbella. Nuestro campo le reta a vivir una experiencia inolvidable. En la Casa Club tenemos un elegante Restaurante El Olivo y una tienda de golf equipada con las mejores colecciones de las más prestigiosas marcas. Justo al lado de la casa club está la cancha de prácticas, un excelente putting green y zona de juego corto. Las colinas de los alrededores, olivares y magníficas vistas al mar desde nuestras dos terrazas sombreadas proporcionan un impresionante telón de fondo para cualquier evento o comida en el Restaurante El Olivo, el cuál ofrece un innovador menú con ingredientes de temporada, preparado a diario.

Name: Rotherham Golf Club
Description: One of Yorkshire's finest parkland golf courses. RGC welcomes golfers of all abilities to enjoy our beautiful yet challenging course and majestic grade II-listed Thrybergh Hall clubhouse.

Name: Sewickley Heights Golf Club
Description: Sewickley Heights Golf Club is a private golf club based out of 126 Backbone Rd, Sewickley, Pennsylvania, United States.

Name: Butler National Golf Club
Description: Butler National Gold Club

Name: Club de Oficiales de la Policía Nacional "Rancho San Vicente"
Description: "Somos un Club Social sin fines de lucro, destinado para los Oficiales, activos y pasivos, de la Policía Nacional. Brindamos los mejores servicios a nuestros socios y público. - Áreas Recreativas (canchas de tenis, fútbol, ecuavoly, baloncesto) - Zona Húmeda (piscina, piscina polar, sauna, turco e hidromasaje) - Gimnasio - Alojamiento - Eventos"

Name: Green Tree Country Club
Description:
At Green Tree Country Club, the priority is the family experience, and every year we continue to reinforce that commitment through our summer program, our golf and tennis lessons, and our year-round family events. 
Join us at Green Tree, where families matter most.

Name: San Diego Country Club
Description: San Diego Country Club is proud to be the first country club established in San Diego founded in 1897, and remains the only private club in Southern San Diego County. Today, SDCC is a member-owned private club with a rich history and reputation for excellence. The Club has hosted several prestigious championships, including the U.S. Women’s Open in 1964 and the U.S. Women’s Amateur in 1993 and 2017. We are also honored to be the host of the U.S. Senior Women’s Open in 2025.

Name: Eskdale Golf Club
Description:
Contact us on info@eskdalegolf.co.uk 

Eskdale has its very own 18 Hole Par 67 parkland course that reaches 5,494 yards in length. Henry Cotton three times Open Champion in the 1940's, helped in its development and held it in great affection. Stunning views attract golfers each year and combined with a layout that will test the most skillful player, Eskdale will provide a great game. The signature hole is undoubtedly the 151 yard 14th. An elevated tee looks towards a green set within a vast pond which requires an accurate shot to stay out of trouble. Eskdale prides itself on a quiet and relaxed feel.

Name: Mira Vista Country Club
Description: Welcome to Mira Vista Country Club. We are a full-service, member-owned, equity Fort Worth country club open to Members living inside and outside of the community. For over 35 years, Mira Vista has brought families and friends together for golf, tennis, pickleball, swimming and social gatherings in our gated community. Members participate in frequent social events and play golf where many golf tour pros choose to play, on a nationally recognized course and practice facility. The par 71 course takes full advantage of the natural beauty provided by this 700-acre development, as it meanders through the scenic vistas.

Name: Sun Valley Wedding and Golf Venue
Description:
The Sun Valley Golf Club is a 18-hole short golf course with 4 Par 4 Holes and we are associated with the South African Golfing Association and connected to the Handicap System. We are open for memberships. We are situated 5km off the R59 between Alberton and Meyerton and operate on a PITCH, PAY AND PLAY basis. No Bookings required.

Your wedding day is one of the most important days in your life, and you want it to happen somewhere spectacular. Sun Valley, hidden between the hills and surrounded by wide open spaces, aim to provide the ambiance where fairytale weddings come true.

Name: Ozaukee Country Club
Description:
Ozaukee Country Club features a golf course that is among the finest in the region, known for its invigorating challenge and impeccable maintenance. Rolling greens and manicured fairways provide a picturesque backdrop for a truly unforgettable experience. Our exceptional dining program is headed by our Executive Chef of 25 years, offering not only quality but consistency.

Our members are deeply committed to the future of our club community, investing in numerous capital improvements that have set new standards for area clubs including a new Grounds & Greens Maintenance Facility, new fleet of Golf Carts with GPS, refreshed Turn House featuring updated restrooms and a "comfort station," remodeled pool facilities with upgraded changing rooms, restrooms and showers, and new pool furniture.

Fall 2024 will see an 839 sq ft pool expansion and a resurfaced pool deck.

2026 will bring a clubhouse renovation featuring reimagined dining spaces centered around a spacious, communal bar with ample seating and stunning views of the golf course. Lounges and restrooms will be updated, and wine lockers and intimate gathering areas will be added.

Are you ready to elevate your lifestyle? Discover Ozaukee Country Club by contacting us today.

Name: Carleton Golf & Yacht Club
Description: Carleton offers an array of golf membership options to suit every type of player, from casual to competitive. Whether you’re a single, couple or family, a young adult, busy professional or a retiree

Name: Swing365 Golf DC
Description:
Swing 365 is a private, 24/7 indoor golf simulator experience powered by Full Swing—the trusted technology used by top PGA professionals. Designed for golfers who value flexibility, privacy, and realism, it offers a convenient way to play or practice on your schedule.

Memberships are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. Members enjoy secure, keyless entry, a climate-controlled environment, and a comfortable, home-like space built for serious practice or casual play.

Name: Domaine du Golf de L'Empereur
Description:
Bienvenue au Domaine du Golf de L’Empereur

Situé à une trentaine de kilomètres de Bruxelles, non loin du Lion de Waterloo, le Domaine du Golf de L’Empereur vous accueille depuis 35 ans dans une oasis de verdure. Nous vous offrons une expérience golfique qui promet détente, convivialité et plaisir.

 Parcours de Golf : Avec nos parcours de 18 et 9 trous, nous proposons aux passionnés de tous niveaux la chance de s’amuser et de relever des défis palpitants dans un cadre naturel époustouflant.

 Restaurant L’Art des Sens : Après une partie intense, détendez-vous dans notre restaurant où une cuisine délicieuse et une ambiance chaleureuse vous attendent.

 Hôtel Moderne : Prolongez votre séjour dans notre hôtel confortable, offrant 12 chambres élégantes pour un hébergement de qualité.

 Salles de Séminaire : Pour vos événements d’entreprise ou réunions en petit comité, nous disposons de trois salles de séminaire bien équipées.

 Proshop : Notre Proshop regorge de trésors pour les amateurs de golf, avec une sélection soigneusement choisie d’équipements et de vêtements.

Name: Golf- und Country Club Seddiner See
Description:
Zielsetzung des Golf- und Country Club Seddiner See ist es, als exklusiver, qualitativ hochwertiger, service-orientierter, innovativer und zuverlässiger Golfclub seinen Clubmitglieder und Gästen, Sponsoren und Partnern bestmögliche infrastrukturelle Rahmenbedingungen zur Ausübung des Golfsports – im Leistungssport ebenso wie im Freizeitsport - zu bieten.

Transparenz, Effizienz und Nachhaltigkeit sind sowohl Zielsetzung als auch Inhalt der Geschäftspolitik, die einen besonderen Schwerpunkt auf das Qualitäts- und Umweltmanagement legt.

Name: commissie NVG visie 2015
Description: The Dutch association of golf course owners

Name: GolfServizi.com
Description: GolfServizi.com è la piattaforma italiana dedicata al mondo del golf, offrendo consulenze personalizzate per circoli e aziende . Forniamo servizi di digital marketing, promozione online e strategie su misura  per valorizzare i golf club e aumentare la visibilità . Con opzioni pubblicitarie su social media e sito web, aiutiamo a far crescere il business golfistico in Italia . Innovazione e strategia per risultati concreti!

Name: Marbella Golf Country Club
Description: Diseñado por el legendario Robert Trent Jones Senior, Marbella Golf Country Club se encuentra a sólo 5 minutos en coche desde el centro de Marbella. Nuestro campo le reta a vivir una experiencia inolvidable. En la Casa Club tenemos un elegante Restaurante El Olivo y una tienda de golf equipada con las mejores colecciones de las más prestigiosas marcas. Justo al lado de la casa club está la cancha de prácticas, un excelente putting green y zona de juego corto. Las colinas de los alrededores, olivares y magníficas vistas al mar desde nuestras dos terrazas sombreadas proporcionan un impresionante telón de fondo para cualquier evento o comida en el Restaurante El Olivo, el cuál ofrece un innovador menú con ingredientes de temporada, preparado a diario.

Name: Het Rijk van Nunspeet
Description: Golfbaan Het Rijk van Nunspeet is voor iedereen toegankelijk, voor zowel golfers (startende en ervaren) als niet-golfers. We streven er naar iedereen te voorzien van een zorgeloze dag in een prachtige omgeving. Ook bedrijven zijn bij ons van harte welkom. De ontspannen sfeer en de schitterende ligging op een oud landgoed in een bosrijk gebied vormt het ideale klimaat voor een vergadering, brainstormsessie, teambuildingbijeenkomst of bedrijfsborrel.

Name: Applebrook Golf Club
Description: Applebrook Golf Club is a private golf course located in Malvern, PA, United States.

Name: The Park
Description:
"Open golf" all while having a positive impact on the community 
Gil Hanse designed golf course with lighted par 3 course and TopTracer range.

Name: Fore! The Planet
Description:
According to Statista, the UK generates over two million metric tons of plastic waste each year! The golf industry contributes significantly, with thousands of plastics and non-recyclable products discarded yearly.

These plastics persist for centuries, harming wildlife and polluting water sources. Urgent action is imperative. Such trends demand a shift towards sustainable practices within the golf industry, from products and packaging to clubhouse management and on-course maintenance.

Fore! The Planet is the home of sustainable golf - a one-stop shop for golf venues to improve their environmental impact and sustainability credentials today.
 
We provide sound advice, educational events, on-course initiatives and a range of sustainably sourced products that put people and planet before pollution and plastic!

Name: Goofy Golf
Description: India's largest and Kolkata's first themed indoor minigolf.

Name: Fiddlesticks Country Club, Inc.
Description:
Fiddlesticks is Southwest Florida's premier private community! Step into a world of warmth and camaraderie, where fairways meet friendships, and every moment is an invitation to connect and savor the joys of community living. Our Members are the heartbeat of our club.

At Fiddlesticks, you'll indulge in world-class amenities, including 36 championship holes, pickleball and tennis courts, bocce, a diverse range of dining outlets, and an exceptional fitness center.

Name: Black British Golfers
Description: Black British Golfers is an access initiative focused on disrupting the golf space. Beyond just putting a monetary value on the size of the Black British Golf community, we are looking to  EDUCATE, EMPOWER, and ENTERTAIN current and future generations of underrepresented minorities in the UK with the necessary knowledge, skills and opportunities in the world of golf.

Name: Los Cardales Country Club Consorcio
Description:
A poco más de una hora de la Capital, Los Cardales Country Club se encuentra en una zona rural de la pampa húmeda, lejos del ruido urbano y muy cerca de un pintoresco pueblo tradicional de la provincia de Buenos Aires, donde ir a hacer las compras se convierte en una experiencia turística. 

Desde nuestros inicios, las prácticas deportivas han sido el alma de nuestro country. Nos destacamos por la excelente infraestructura de nuestras canchas y nuestra activa participación en diversas competencias. 

Además, ofrecemos una variedad de actividades recreativas y sociales como eventos, coro, torneos y clases de naipes y juegos de mesa, etc. En Los Cardales Country Club nos reunimos para disfrutar la vida entre amigos.

Name: Golfbaan de Zaanse
Description:
Golfbaan de Zaanse is dé golfhotspot ten noorden van Amsterdam. Op nog geen 15 autominuten van de hoofdstad ligt een moderne 18-holes + 4 golfbaan ingebed in een prachtig veenweidegebied. Dat alles in een decor waarin op de achtergrond de molens van de Zaanse Schans opdoemen.

De Zaanse is een echte polderbaan, waarop zowel ervaren als beginnende golfers hun hart kunnen ophalen. De baan wordt omsloten én doorkruist door diverse waterpartijen en vijf van de achttien holes hebben afslagplaatsen op een oude dijk. 

Op ons gezellige terras met uitzicht op hole 18 kun je ongedwongen een drankje doen, lunchen of dineren. Maar is het ook goed en gezellig netwerken bij onze actieve Business Club. Nieuwsgierig? Je bent van harte welkom!

Name: San Jose Country Club - San Jose, CA
Description: Nestled in the hills with breathtaking views of the Silicon Valley's, San Jose County Club is the friendliest private club, rich in history and tradition. Founded in 1899,  San Jose Country Club strives to provide an outstanding private golf experience at the best value in the greater San Jose area. Fully private club offering a variety of member amenities including a 24,000 square ft. clubhouse,  an 18 hole championship golf course, PGA Certified instruction and club fittings, Junior Golf, full-service golf shop, luxurious men and ladies' locker rooms, member-only dining and special events, heated outdoor pool and sun deck, outdoor patio with fire pit and BBQ Grill for dining alfresco,  (2)  regulation sized  Bocce Ball courts, formal dining and banquet facilities.  A limited number of memberships available including proprietary, young executive, social and corporate memberships. Outside events welcome such as weddings, corporate luncheons, celebration of life and golf tournaments.

Name: Lonsdale Links
Description:
*** Ranked #19 in Golf Australia Magazine's Top 100, 2024 ***

Lonsdale Links features template holes inspired by trailblazer Charles Blair Macdonald and his colleagues Seth Raynor and Charles Banks. Lonsdale Links is a deliberate throwback to an earlier age and a unique look for an Australian course. 

The quality of the hospitality facilities matches that of the golf course.  The Club is home to Lago Restaurant which offers some of the finest Italian-Australian cuisine on the Bellarine Peninsula.  The Lounge at Lonsdale Links enjoys beautiful sunset views across Lake Victoria and is home to a cosy fire in Winter and a vibrant Alfresco area in Summer. Lonsdale Links is family-friendly with a playground for the kids, easily accessible from the Lounge.

Lonsdale Links offers a range of Membership Categories to suit all ages and lifestyles, whether you’re an experienced golfer, new to golf or a regular visitor to our Clubhouse and restaurant facilities.

Name: Golf Services Management Pty Ltd
Description:
Golf Services Management (GSM) has been a trusted leader in Australian golf management for over 35 years, enhancing the experience at a diverse range of courses across Victoria and Queensland. Known for a hands-on approach that combines industry knowledge with tailored solutions, GSM works alongside stakeholders to bring out the best in each facility—whether by elevating course conditions, streamlining operations, or crafting marketing strategies that engage and inspire.

GSM’s expertise spans all facets of golf facility management, from venue maintenance and food & beverage to retail and community engagement. By focusing on quality, value, and accessibility, GSM delivers sustainable success for golf venues, meeting the unique needs of players, partners, and communities alike.

For those seeking a management partner with a proven track record in golf, GSM provides a dedicated, knowledgeable team ready to support every aspect of the journey.

Name: Heritage Bay Golf & Country Club
Description:
Heritage Bay offers an extraordinary lifestyle that includes the best in golf, tennis, fitness, social activities and gated community living.

Heritage Bay boasts a 27-hole Lewis-Azinger designed championship golf course, complete with an aqua driving range and a fully stocked pro shop. The course opened in November of 2006 and has been dazzling golfers since its opening.

Heritage Bay was built on 718 acres in North Naples. The property is enhanced by two sparkling quarry lakes that provide a dramatic and inviting entry and the 1,800 acre Cypress Preserve to the north and west. Our entry bridge spans the water culminating in the turn to the clubhouse marked by a vibrant dancing fountain. The golf course is one of the most beautifully landscaped and maintained in Southwest Florida, with ample landing areas for occasional players and strategic hazards in place for the lower handicap player. Our greens are large and undulating, averaging 7,000 square feet and offer the best putting surfaces in the Southwest Florida area.

With the course architecture, course condition, landscaping and the topography, Heritage Bay is one of the most desired places to play in Southwest Florida. At the beautifully appointed and recently refurbished clubhouse you will experience the delights of the renowned culinary team in the elegant yet comfortable Grille Room with breathtaking views of the course and water, multiple rooms filled with social activities, an impressively appointed Billiards Room, Men’s & Ladies Locker Rooms with saunas and all the essentials, and an abundance of supplies and specialties in the Golf Pro Shop. Other club amenities include the Tennis and Pickleball Center, Bocce Ball Courts, Wellness Center, five satellite pools, and the Resort Pool enhanced by the community hot spot, The Cabana, the open air restaurant offering delicious food and live music. 

Our exemplary staff is well versed in all aspects of the club lifestyle and is ready to welcome you home.

Name: Golf Park Mikołów
Description:
"Mistrzowskie publiczne pole golfowe Golf Park Mikołów!"

Budowę Mikołowskiego pola golfowego rozpoczęto w 2016 r., a zakończono w 2019 r. Pole powstało z pasji oraz miłości do Golfa, a zaprojektowane zostało przez pierwszego Prezydenta Bogdana Uliasza. Zbudowane społeczną pracą członków stowarzyszenia Golf Park Mikołów i ich przyjaciół. Jest to jedyna wielomilionowa inwestycja w Polsce, zrealizowana w tak krótkim okresie, BEZ ŻADNYCH DOTACJI, w oparciu o społeczną pracę pasjonatów sportu oraz ich przyjaciół.
 
Pole położone jest w pięknej okolicy Mikołowa na terenie Śląskiego Ogrodu Botanicznego. Kolekcje siedliskowe ogrodu rozdzielane są farway’ami pola golfowego. Ma charakter parkowy, a szata roślinna pomiędzy dołkami została zaprojektowana przez arch. krajobrazu Martę Hirsz dzięki czemu pole jest unikatowe pod każdym względem.
 
Pole PAR 72 w układzie dwóch klasycznych “dziewiątek”, startujących i kończących się przy budynkach klubowym (2 x PAR 3, 2 x PAR 5 i 4 x PAR 4). Przy 8 stanowiskowym driving range znajduje się dostępna dla klubowiczów baza wózkowo/sprzętowa z 8 potocznie mówiąc tzw.  melexami. Dostępne są również boxy do przechowywania własnego sprzętu.
 
Pole zostało tak zaprojektowane, aby dać frajdę zarówno zaawansowanym jak i początkującym golfistom.
 
Co więcej od końca 2024 r. pole posiada profesjonalny symulator golfa w jednej z sal budynków klubowych. Niezależnie od poziomu zaawansowania, symulator ten pozwala poczuć się jak na prawdziwym polu golfowym, bez względu na pogodę i porę roku. To świetna okazja, by rozpocząć swoją przygodę z golfem lub dopracować technikę bez wychodzenia na pole.
 
Ponadto infrastruktura pola wraz budynkiem klubowym pozwala na organizacje różnego rodzaju spotkań do 30 do 200 os zarówno firmowych jak i prywatnych. Wszystko w towarzystwie pięknych widoków, wyśmienitych potraw serwowanych przez klubowe bistro, a przede wszystkim w atmosferze jakiej nie doświadczycie nigdzie indziej.
 
Serdecznie Zapraszamy

Name: Leewood Golf Club
Description:
Chartered in October 1922, Leewood Golf Club is one of the oldest Westchester golf clubs with a rich tradition in local history. Among the charter members were D.W. Griffith, director of film classics The Birth of a Nation and Intolerance, and the honorable Frederick P. Close, a Justice of the New York State Supreme Court and for many years Presiding Justice of its Appellate Division. The first President of the club was George W. Field, a Scarsdale resident who was a prominent New York attorney and a director of the Scarsdale National Bank.

Situated precariously on a mass of boulders, many of them related to the famous Tuckahoe marble used in some of our great national buildings including the Washington Monument, the builders faced a formidable task in carving out a suitable golf course. The challenge was met by the first club professional, Carl Fox, who laid out and constructed the course aided by a corps of members who gave up their weekends to dig holes and bury boulders so that machines could be brought in to cut the rough and fairways. Many of the holes that they created, with supervision by the famous Long Island golf architect, Devereaux Emmet, who did the Garden City Golf Club and Wee Burn in Darien, are little changed today.

He has over 20 years of experience in the Golf Industry and with his contribution to the game, Alert Golf  has become a platform for overall golf solutions in India. Our number of feasibility reports & research works has provided a clear vision to investors.

Our Director, Rakesh Sharma has been associated with several golf bodies across the globe including IGIA (Indian Golf Industry Association), IGU (Indian Golf Union), GCS&MAI (Golf Course Superintendents & Managers Association of India), DGS (Delhi Golf Society), MGA (Manipur Golf Association), TAEGA (The Ahmedabad Elite Golfers Association), GCSAA (Golf Course Superintendents Association of America), USGA (United States Golf Association), GCBAA (Golf Course Builders Association of America), IGTA (India Golf Tourism Association), AGCSA (Australian Golf Course Superintendents Association)

Name: Ruitoque Golf  Club
Description:
Ruitoque Golf Club se posiciona como el referente de estilo de vida, exclusividad y excelencia deportiva en el oriente colombiano.

Nuestra misión es fusionar un campo de golf de clase mundial, diseñado por la prestigiosa firma Nicklaus Design, con un entorno social y familiar de alto nivel.

Más que un club, somos una comunidad comprometida con la sostenibilidad, la innovación y el bienestar integral de nuestros socios.

Ruitoque es el destino estratégico en Santander para la celebración de eventos corporativos, desarrollo de negocios y promoción de alianzas estratégicas. Nos enfocamos en ofrecer una experiencia extraordinaria y sostenible.

Name: One9Club
Description:
Premier Indoor Golf Club
 Mejora tu juego y únete al Club
Síguemos en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/one9club.golf/

Name: Pine Trace Golf Club
Description:
Arthur Hills is one of the best designers today, and Pine Trace is a testament to his accomplishments. This is a beautiful course from start to finish, and every hole offers a different challenge and scenic view. 

The scenery at Pine Trace is fulfilling to say the least. The landscape of the course is laid so that many natural characteristics are in play. There is much life in the course, as trees mostly isolate you from other holes and the outside world giving Pine Trace a variety in scenery.

A common link between Hill's courses is that he designs them for anyone and everyone to enjoy. Pine Trace offers four distinct tee levels that provide enough challenge for anyone. The Championship Tees measure about 6600 yards. The Forward Tees measure about 5000 yards.

The conditioning of the course at Pine Trace is of paramount importance to the staff and ownership. Pine Trace strives to provide the finest conditions within the public course sector of Southeast Michigan. 

Pine Trace Golf Club has been consistently recognized as providing a great value for a good round of golf on a well designed and maintained golf course. We are sure that if you play our course you will feel the same.

Name: Waverly Oaks Golf Club
Description:
Are you ready for an unforgettable day? 

The 18 Hole Championship Golf Course at Waverly Oaks Golf Club offers a unique, fun and upscale experience for every golfer that will leave you wanting to play the course over and over again.

Acclaimed by industry publications and avid golfers alike, Waverly Oaks is carved through over 240 acres of sprawling New England hills and valleys. Surrounded by lush woodlands and towering oak trees, the layout consists of expansive fairways, robust bunkering, bold greens and 150 feet of elevation change. Designed by nationally acclaimed architect Brian Silva, the Championship Course presents unique challenges across every hole that will have you using your entire bag and thinking your way around the golf course.

Our location between Boston and Cape Cod, in America’s Hometown of Plymouth, Massachusetts offers local and destination golfers the perfect stop on their journey around one of the most beautiful & visited regions in the United States.

Golf - Weddings - Golf Outings

Name: Club Campestre de Saltillo
Description: Somos un club deportivo y social exclusivo, en donde podrás vivir experiencias únicas.

Name: TeeClub Ltd
Description:
Welcome to TeeClub, a modern indoor golf destination designed for golfers of every level. Whether you're an avid player or stepping onto the tee for the first time, our seven luxurious bays offer an unparalleled golfing experience.

Each bay features Trackman technology—the same iconic system trusted by the world's top golfers—giving you access to over 450 of the globe's most renowned courses. Beyond virtual play, our practice ground provides valuable insights to help refine your skills and elevate your game.

Enhanced Services & Expertise: Take your game to the next level with expert tuition from our on-site PGA Professional, or get perfectly fitted with new TaylorMade clubs tailored to your exact specifications. Bring your own clubs however through our exclusive partnership with TaylorMade, we provide premium clubs and balls for use in all bays, ensuring you have everything needed for an exceptional experience.

Beyond Golf: Not a golfer? No problem. Our range of immersive, interactive games makes TeeClub the perfect venue for memorable gatherings with friends, family, colleagues, or clients—entertainment that appeals to all ages.

Complete Experience: Enjoy delicious food and drinks in the comfort of your own semi-private bay while watching live sport on our screens. Whether you're here to play, learn, or socialise, TeeClub offers a relaxed yet dynamic atmosphere that brings people together.

Exclusive Membership: Join our exclusive member community and compete in regular competitions, adding an extra dimension of excitement to your TeeClub experience.

Name: Superior Indoor Golf and Soccer
Description: Superior Indoor Golf and Soccer is a new state-of-the-art indoor golf studio in Concord, NC. We have many world-famous courses to choose from and practice options with real-time data provided with each shot. We have four bays available for your enjoyment and also offer drinks and snacks. This is a great place to work on your game, enjoy time with friends, or even host a team-building work event for your job or business.

Name: TPC Harding Park
Description: The 18-hole, par-72 Harding Park Course is situated on a gently rolling peninsula surrounded by the shores of Lake Merced in San Francisco. The championship layout hosted many prestigious golf tournaments such as the San Francisco Open and the Lucky International Professional Golf Championship. The TOUR has since returned to TPC Harding Park for the 2005 World Golf Championships-American Express Championship, the Presidents Cup in October 2009, Charles Schwab Cup Championship in 2010, 2011 and 2013 and was Host of the 2015 WGC-Cadillac Match Play.

Name: World Amateur Golfers Championship
Description:
Founded in 1995 by Sven Tumba, one of the most prominent sports icons throughout time, representing Sweden in ice-hockey, soccer, as well as golf. Tournament Patron Arnold Palmer was a supporter for over a decade. Annika Sörenstam took over as Hon. Chairman of the Advisory Board after the sad passing of Seve Ballesteros.

It’s now the world’s largest amateur golf championship with national championships in over 40 countries. Designed to give all amateur golfers the thrill & prestige of representing their nation in a global championship against players of similar skill level.

Complies with USGA & R&A amateur rules. The Invitational is a separate tournament that gives golfers the opportunity to share in the exciting “WGC experience” of a world-wide tour-like championship event, without first having to qualify.

The Invitational caters to business executives, celebrities, VIP clients, sponsors, national organizers and golf enthusiasts.

The world final is held at great resorts (such as renowned 5-star resorts) and played at some of the best courses in the host nation.

Name: Auburn University Club
Description: Established in 1999,  Auburn University Club is a locally owned private establishment that is committed to golfing excellence. With our 18-hole championship golf course set on 225 acres of beautiful rolling hills and woodlands,  come see what makes us a cut above the rest and why Auburn,  Alabama is one of the top golfing cities in the South.

Name: The Pepper Pike Club
Description: We are a exclusive private golf club dedicated to providing the best golf experience for our membership.

Name: The Centenary
Description: The Centenary is a non-profit organisation designed to help historic golf clubs thrive in the modern era. Many clubs rely on quite outdated methods for reciprocal clubs. By uniting century-old clubs through a streamlined platform, The Centenary makes it easier for their members to discover and easily utilise reciprocal agreements, while ensuring clubs retain control. The Centenary safeguards the tradition of golf’s oldest clubs, ensuring their legacies continue well into the future.

Name: Eldorado Golf Course
Description:
Eldorado Golf Club. executive 9 hole.
First night golf in Ontario Canada.


The Eldorado Golf Club and Restaurant is open to the public and offers an authentic Mexican setting and original Mexican recipes. Our Chef blends a "North of the Border" grill with Mexican cuisine.

We can accommodate 60 people inside and 50 on the patio overlooking the golf course. Tournaments are always welcome as we have the ideal setting for your golf event!

The Restaurant and Golf Course are licensed under LLCBO. Groups are always welcome and you can make your event special by creating your very own menu with our Chef!

Name: Ingrebourne Links Golf & Country Club
Description:
The realisation of nearly seven years of planning and construction, this premium club includes state-of-the-art health club facilities, a modern and vibrant clubhouse in addition to a spectacular inland links golf course.

Outstanding Golf
18-holes of Championship golf with beautifully manicured fairways, slick greens and memorable “links” style features replicating the very best traditions of how the sport of golf started in the early 15th century.

State-of-the-Art Fitness Facilities
Workout in a modern, air-conditioned environment using the latest touch screen, app-enabled equipment from Matrix, with Personal Trainers on-hand to help you achieve your own fitness goals.

Conference, Function & Banqueting
Ingrebourne Links also boasts a clubhouse that caters for private parties, corporate functions and daily dining for both members and non-members alike. With fine views across the Championship courses, the purpose-build function suites can cater for up to 250 people.

Name: Kirkwood National Golf Club and Cottages
Description: Kirkwood National Golf Club Cottages is situated in The Hills Region of north Mississippi, just south of historic Holly Springs. Conveniently located just 35 miles southeast of Memphis, Kirkwood National is only thirty minutes north of Oxford, home of the University of Mississippi, and an hour east of Tunica.  Kirkwood National is the perfect choice for first-class golf, events and accommodations. You will thoroughly enjoy the wooded sanctuary of Kirkwood National, hidden enough to be private, close enough to be convenient; where what you discover will bring you back.

Name: Goswick Golf Links
Description: A James Braid-designed authentic links course set amid the sand dunes along the Northumberland Coast. Ranked among the top 50 courses of all kinds in England, top 100 links course in GB&I and selected by the R&A as a regional qualifying venue for The Open Championship.

Name: Unique Indoor Golf
Description: Unique Indoor Golf was born from the passion of dedicated golfers determined to share the exhilaration of golf with enthusiasts all year-round, irrespective of weather conditions. Identifying the constraints of conventional golfers, our mission became clear: to establish a welcoming indoor sanctuary where individuals could hone their skills in comfort.

Name: Scratch Golf GmbH

ENTSPANNTE ATMOSPHÄRE & GUTE GESELLSCHAFT

Golfen wird bei uns zum geselligen Event! Verbessere deine Skills, genieße coole Drinks und leckere Burger – für ein Rundum-Erlebnis, das über das Golfspiel hinausgeht.

Name: InteGolf
Description: InteGolf is a technology startup driven by a passion for golf. Our team, comprised of avid golfers, designed and built InteGolf with the sole purpose of enhancing the game for fellow enthusiasts like you. By collaborating closely with golf courses, we ensure an unparalleled experience that benefits both the courses and golfers alike. Our ultimate goal is to enable you to indulge in more of the game you love, all with the help of InteGolf.

Name: Golf Studio Jyväskylä
Description:
Golfstudio Jyväskylä tarjoaa huippuluokan puitteet golfin simulaattoriharjoitteluun, hauskanpitoon ja erilaisiin tilaisuuksiin. Golfstudio JKL toimii kolmessa eri toimipisteessä eri puolilla Jyväskylää. 

Toimipisteet sijaitsevat Kirrissä, Polttolinjalla ja Tousalankujalla. Huippuluokan Trackman-simulaattorien lisäksi tiloissamme on myös mahdollisuus puttiharjoitteluun ja Kirrin toimipisteessä myös rangelyönteihin verkkoon.

Name: The Fortnightly of Chicago
Description:
An Oasis For Learning and Friendship Since 1873
The Fortnightly of Chicago is a private women’s club founded to enrich the intellectual and social lives of its members. The landmark building ensures a gracious setting where members enjoy each other’s company and a diverse array of cultural, educational, and social programs.

Name: Centre de Golf Le Versant
Description:
Centre de Golf Le Versant Inc is the largest golf complex in Canada with 72 holes of golf, a driving range and conference center for up to 500 guests.

Golf Courses:
Des Seigneurs - Par 72
Des Braves - Par 72

Du Griffon - Par 3 - 18 holes

Services:
Restaurant Le CIAO!
Conference Center
Indoor Golf Center (Nov. - April)
Indoor training facility
Driving range (grass for member and premium carpets)

2075 Côte de Terrebonne, Terrebonne, Quebec, Canada.

Name: Golfpark De Breuninkhof
Description:
Iedereen is meer dan welkom! 

Golfers, fietsers, wandelaars en natuurlijk ook gasten die gewoon gezellig komen eten, drinken, vergaderen of feesten.

Iedereen kan op De Breuninkhof - gelegen in Voorst - op zijn of haar eigen manier genieten van de prachtige natuur op onze twee unieke golfbanen, gelegen in het typische Hollandse landschap van de stedendriehoek Apeldoorn, Deventer en Zutphen.

De Breuninkhof is geschikt voor beginnende én gevorderde golfers.

Voor de beginnende golfer hebben we een 9 holes Par 3 baan (Kleine baan) waarop ook zonder baanpermissie of handicap gespeeld kan worden. Deze baan leent zich voor ieder niveau golfer. De beginnende golfer kan op deze baan leren golfen. Voor de gevorderde golfer is deze baan geschikt voor het oefenen en verbeteren van het korte spel. 

Een rondje spelen op deze baan is een mooie manier om samen met familie en vrienden kennis te maken met golf.
 
De 9 holes grote baan van De Breuninkhof is ook als 18 holes baan te spelen door de verschillende afslagplaatsen. De baan is rustig en mooi gelegen, aangelegd in een landschap waarin fauna en flora zich bijzonder goed ontwikkeld hebben. De waterpartijen maken de goed onderhouden baan een uitdaging, voor zowel lage handicappers als minder geoefende spelers. Het golfpark beschikt verder over een deels overdekte driving range, uitgebreide oefenfaciliteiten en een Golfschool.

Op het park vind je verder Brasserie De Breuninkhof met een groot, zonnig terras dat uitkijkt over de golfbaan. Hier kun je dagelijks genieten van heerlijke koffie, een lekker wijntje of een verse maaltijd in een sfeer van ‘gewone gezelligheid’. De kaart van de Brasserie wordt afgestemd op het seizoen.

En heb je zin in een feestje of wil je een bijeenkomst plannen? Dat kan! We hebben ruimte van 12 tot 100 personen. De gratis uitgebreide parkeerfaciliteiten op eigen terrein geven de gelegenheid om makkelijk te parkeren.

Kom langs en laat je inspireren … Gewoon Gezellig!

Name: St Helen's Bay Golf Resort
Description: St Helen's Bay Golf Resort is home to St Helen's Bay Golf Club, A full service clubhouse, as well as  over 300 residences surrounding a magnificent 18-hole course.  One of Wexford's finest beaches - St Helen's Bay is also accessible from the resort.

Name: All Square
