Name: iGolf Pune Pvt Ltd
Description:
GOLF IS FOR EVERYONE.

iGolf Pune is India’s first radar-based golf driving range, redefining how golf is experienced—through technology, entertainment, and community.

More than just golf, iGolf is where music, food, drinks, games, and great conversations come together. Designed for beginners, enthusiasts, and professionals alike, we also serve as a premium corporate engagement destination for offsites, team building, client entertainment, and brand experiences.

Because the best business connections don’t happen in boardrooms—they happen over shared experiences.

Name: Denham Golf Club Limited
Description: A traditional private member’s club, where the values of the game are respected, friendliness and hospitality are guaranteed.

Name: Azalea Golf
Description:
Azalea was born from decades of combined experience in golf operations, technology, and payment processing. Our founders worked in pro shops, managed courses, and built payment systems, we've seen the challenges firsthand.

We watched golf courses struggle with outdated systems, disconnected platforms, and technology that didn't understand the unique needs of golf operations. We knew there had to be a better way.

That's why we created Azalea, a platform designed specifically for golf courses, with every feature built around real operational needs we've experienced ourselves

Name: Guayaquil Yacht Club
Description: El Guayaquil Yacht Club es un Club náutico privado, fundado en 1928 gracias a un grupo de entusiastas navegantes que decidieron iniciar un viaje que marcaría la historia de la ciudad. Hoy mantenemos vivo el legado, permitiendo que nuevas generaciones se sumen en este viaje.

Name: inJoy Golf
Description: inJoy Golf is a 4 bay golf simulator facility located in downtown Lancaster PA.  Powered by Trackman, the gold standard in launch monitor technology we offer the most realistic indoor golf experience available. Bays are rentable by the hour, with packages for multiple bay rentals as well as private parties, team building, and networking events. Groups can play over 160 courses worldwide and play any individual or 2/4 person team format, including scrambles which is great for groups with beginners or non golfers.  We also have target practice, closest to the pin, and long drives games for a more casual hangout.  Golf brings people together, keeps us on our toes, and add joy to our lives.  Come experience the best indoor golf Lancaster has to offer!

Name: The Wisconsin Country Club
Description: Located just outside of the city, The Wisconsin Country Club is home to one of the most challenging and beautiful 18-hole golf courses in the area. It's Harry Smead/David Gill design features tree-lined fairways, intricately contoured greens, and well-positioned bunkering. In addition, Members enjoy an excellent court experience with 4 hard tennis courts and 6 pickleball courts available for open play, clinics, and socials. Our heated Junior-Olympic-sized pool is open seasonally and features a kiddie pool, slide, and full-service snack bar. For our health-conscious members, our Fitness Center is open daily and features a variety of specialty equipment. A year-round social calendar and dining operation ensures all Members enjoy their home away from home.

Name: Forest Heights Country Club
Description:
Welcome to Forest Heights Country Club, where exceptional service and a welcoming atmosphere come together to create an unforgettable experience for our members and guests. Our dedicated staff is committed to ensuring your time at the club is enjoyable, catering to your every need with warmth and professionalism.

We take pride in offering a wide array of programs and activities designed to suit everyone’s interests—from golf and tennis to social events and dining experiences. Whether you’re here for a relaxing day on the greens or an engaging evening with friends, our team is here to make it all possible.

Name: Proper Golf Brands
Description: A community that extends beyond the fairway.

Name: Blue Valley Golf and Country Estate
Moose Ridge Golf Course
Description: Moose Ridge Golf Course is a Top 10 Metro Detroit Area Golf Course. Featuring stunning vistas and rolling topography, Moose Ridge is a "Must Play" course.  We are located at 11801 Doane Rd, South Lyon, Michigan, United States.

Name: Golfbaan Appelscha
Description:
Deze 9 holes golfbaan ligt op het terrein van Buitenplaats de Hildenberg, in het Drents-Friese Wold, één van de grootste aaneengesloten natuurgebieden van Nederland. 
Een natuurgebied met veel afwisseling, zowel in flora als fauna, een prachtige omgeving voor een golfbaan. De baan kent aantrekkelijke hoogteverschillen, uitdagende waterpartijen, bunkers en duinachtige zandverstuivingen. 
De totale lengte van de baan is 4904 meter met een par van 70. In het voorjaar van 2018 is de baan ruim 500 meter langer geworden door de uitbreiding met 3 holes. Golfbaanarchitect Alan Rijks heeft ook met de uitbreiding een goede aansluiting op de natuurlijk omgeving en de huidige baan gecreeerd. 

Een baan die voor zowel de beginnende als de ervaren golfer een leuke uitdaging vormt!
Starttijden kunt u reserveren via 06-57848818 of via info@golfbaanappelscha.nl.

Name: Rolling Hills Wichita, The Birthplace of the LPGA
Description:
Rolling Hills Country Club, The Birthplace of the LPGA. 

This private, member-owned club offers members a resort lifestyle, right here in Wichita. We invite you to come for a visit & stay for the memories.

The LPGA was founded at Rolling Hills Country Club in 1950 after the Women's U.S. Open tournament, in the very clubhouse our members use today.

Name: Golf de Bitche
Description:
Découvrez le Golf de Bitche en 2024 : Une Expérience Unique au Cœur de la Nature
 
Situé au cœur du Parc Naturel Régional des Vosges du Nord, le Golf de Bitche est une destination d'exception pour les amateurs de sport, de gastronomie et d'événements professionnels.
 
 Un Parcours Prestigieux
Avec ses 27 trous, le parcours se distingue par son sol sablonneux, garantissant une praticabilité optimale tout au long de l'année. Il séduit golfeurs débutants comme confirmés par la qualité de son design et l’immersion totale dans la nature environnante.
 
 Un Restaurant Panoramique
Après une partie de golf, profitez d’un moment gourmand dans notre restaurant. Avec sa terrasse panoramique surplombant le parcours, il propose une carte mettant en avant les saveurs locales, idéale pour un déjeuner ou un dîner dans une ambiance conviviale.
 
 Un Espace Séminaire Modernisé
Pour vos événements professionnels, le Golf de Bitche offre des espaces séminaires parfaitement équipés. Alliez travail et détente dans un cadre inspirant, avec des prestations sur mesure incluant pauses gourmandes et activités golfiques.
 
 Un Cadre Exceptionnel
Le Golf de Bitche est bien plus qu’un parcours : c’est une expérience où nature, sport et convivialité s’harmonisent. En 2024, redécouvrez un lieu d’exception qui ne cesse d’innover pour offrir le meilleur à ses visiteurs.
 
Rejoignez-nous pour vivre une année mémorable au Golf de Bitche !

Name: Juelsminde Golfklub
Description:
18 HULLER I KUPERET TERRÆN OMKRANSET AF SKOV OG MED UDSIGT TIL KATTEGAT

Vi er en klub i rivende udvikling, og det vil vi fortsætte med at være. Vores seneste tiltag er en overdækket driving range og et indgået samarbejde med golf-app’en GLFR, som blandt andet hjælper dig med præcise afstandsmarkeringer.
I Juelsminde Golfklub er vi mere end golfspillere. Vi er også et fællesskab, der føler ejerskab for vores klub. Og vi deler et ønske om, at vores klub skal være et rart sted at komme – for alle!
Vores pro-shop har det, du lige står og mangler og vores café tilbyder lækkerier og hygge med de andre medlemmer.
Vi har en mentorordning, der sikrer, at du får en god start på både golfen og klublivet. Og vi har to professionelle golftrænere, der kan hjælpe dig med at udvikle dit golfspil.
Vi har plads og faciliteter til alle – begyndere og elite – og dem midt imellem. Vi har også plads til dig, så kom og besøg os. 
 
18 HOLES IN HILLY TERRAIN SURROUNDED BY FOREST AND WITH A VIEW TO THE OCEAN
We are a club in development, and we will continue to be so. Our latest initiative is a covered driving range and a collaboration with the golf app GLFR, which among other things helps you with precise distance markings.
At Juelsminde Golf Club we are more than golfers. We are also a community that feels ownership of our club. And we share a wish that our club should be a nice place to come - for everyone!
Our Pro-shop has what you are just missing, and our café offers delicacies and fun with the other members.
We have a mentoring scheme that ensures that you get a good start on both golf and club life. And we have two professional golf coaches who can help you develop your golf game.
We have room and facilities for everyone - beginners and elite - and those in between. We also have room for you, so come and visit us.

Name: The International Golf Stars Classification
Description: You know star hotels and star gastronomy - then you also know what golf stars achieve.

Name: Le Parcours du Cerf
Description:
Situé dans le magnifique cadre naturel de Longueuil, le Golf Le Parcours du Cerf est une destination de choix pour les amateurs de golf de tous niveaux. Notre parcours, soigneusement entretenu et offrant des vues imprenables, est conçu pour offrir une expérience de jeu exceptionnelle. Que vous soyez un golfeur débutant ou expérimenté, vous trouverez chez nous des défis adaptés à votre niveau de compétence.

RESTAURANT L'ÉLAN

Après une partie de golf, détendez-vous et savourez un repas délicieux à notre restaurant l'Élan. Avec une carte variée proposant des plats raffinés, l'Élan est le lieu idéal pour un repas entre amis, en famille ou pour une réception. Notre équipe de chefs talentueux utilise des ingrédients frais et locaux pour créer des plats qui raviront vos papilles.

EXPÉRIENCE TOPTRACER

Pour ceux qui cherchent à perfectionner leur jeu ou simplement passer un bon moment entre amis, notre installation Toptracer est une option fantastique. Le Toptracer utilise la technologie de pointe pour suivre vos balles et fournir des données précises sur votre performance. Que vous veniez pour une session d'entraînement ou pour une soirée amusante, le Toptracer offre une expérience interactive et enrichissante.

ÉVÉNEMENTS ET RÉCEPTIONS

Le Golf Le Parcours du Cerf est également un lieu de choix pour accueillir des tournois, des réceptions ou des événements corporatifs. Notre restaurant l'Élan et notre installation Toptracer sont parfaitement équipés pour répondre à vos besoins. Que vous planifiez un événement intime ou une grande réception, notre équipe dévouée travaillera avec vous pour garantir le succès de votre événement.

Venez découvrir pourquoi le Golf Le Parcours du Cerf est plus qu'un simple terrain de golf. C'est un lieu où le sport, la gastronomie et l'innovation se rencontrent pour offrir des expériences mémorables à tous nos visiteurs.

Name: Belvedere Golf Club
Description: Ranked with the best member clubs in Eastern Canada this traditional “Country Club” layout winds through hardwood lined fairways and plays to a four hour round walking or riding. A must to play on your PEI Tour, this Par 72, 18 hole course is groomed daily to tournament like conditions and has been recently renovated by architect Graham Cooke.

Name: Indoor Golf AS
Description:
Vi har 3 TrackMan 4 golfsimulatorer, åpent alle dager fra 06.00 - 22.00.
TrackMan er markedsledende innenfor analyse og simulatorspill og er foretrukket av de fleste profesjonelle golferne verden over.

Vi holder til på Helgelandsmoen Næringspark med gratis parkering rett utenfor lokalet.

Ta kontakt med oss for leie av lokalet eller book tid for spill gjennom MATCHi.

Velkommen til oss!

Name: The Putting Zone
Description:
Now Open | Flagship Location — Nashville, TN

The Putting Zone (TPZ) is a first-of-its-kind indoor putting venue built for real golfers. Designed and refined over 25+ years, TPZ redefines golf entertainment by combining skill development, competition, and social play—year-round, rain or shine.

Our patented design features an ADA-compliant, indoor 18-hole, par-72 putting course with over ⅓ mile of true-roll putting surfaces, dog-legs, and precision target zones—engineered to simulate real on-course putting.

Whether you’re a tour-level stick, weekend warrior, or new to the game, TPZ is where putting becomes the main event. Practice. Compete. Join leagues. Play tournaments. Improve the 50% of your game that matters most.

This isn’t mini-golf.
This is competitive putting—reimagined.

Name: Golf Roches d'Azur
Description: Nous sommes un golf situé dans le sud de la France, à Agay (St-Raphaël), très convivial. Avec son parcours offrant des vues imprenables sur le massif de montagnes rouges de l'Esterel et la mer Méditerranée, vous pourrez profiter de l'expérience complète de la Côte d'Azur.

Name: Rally Robotics
Description: We create robotic golf ball pickers for driving ranges.

Name: Visualytes Golf Championship
Description: Join us on August 17, 2025, at Thorney Park Golf Club for the Visualytes Golf Championship! Participate in an 18-hole Stableford pairs competition, enjoy business networking, and compete for trophies and prizes. Registration is now open, with sponsorship opportunities available.

Name: Golf Globale Italia
Description:
Soluzioni strategiche per le aziende del golf di oggi. 27 anni dedicati al mondo del golf e allo sport per diventare una delle più grandi società europee di gestione di club professionistici.
Abbiamo fornito servizi in 30 località e in oltre 140 campi da golf, gestendo anche vari servizi, come: manutenzione, vendite, tour operator, pro-shop, accademia di golf, marketing e comunicazione,
paddle, tennis, fitness, cibo e bevande, alloggio e altro.
Abbiamo fatto crescere la nostra azienda ascoltando e comprendendo le opportunità e le sfide specifiche dei nostri clienti, quindi personalizzando il nostro approccio per raggiungere insieme
il successo. Ciò si ottiene con talento e risorse e coltivando la creatività dei nostri associati in tutto il mondo. La nostra cultura, ci dà l’opportunità di sviluppare le strategie, le risorse e il
talento che consentono ai nostri clienti di eccellere in questo settore competitivo.
- La nostra missione è creare e migliorare le condizioni dei campi da golf che gestiamo, prestando la nostra grande esperienza in tutte le attività e i servizi del club. Per quanto riguarda i nostri
investitori, cerchiamo di offrire loro un rendimento garantito, basato su una gestione efficace, impegno e fiducia.
- Il nostro obiettivo è creare esperienze straordinarie per ospiti e soci attraverso un servizio personalizzato, coerenza e attenzione ai dettagli, senza compromessi. Vogliamo superare le aspettative
ogni volta che sarai nostro ospite. Controlla i tee time disponibili, trova un campo gestito da Global Golf nella tua zona, controlla il tuo account premi, cerca una vacanza o una scuola di
golf adatta alle tue esigenze, approfitta delle offerte speciali o acquista attrezzature e accessori.
- I nostri valori f in dall’inizio sono strettamente legati allo spirito del golf: costanza, passione, fiducia, tenacia e impegno, trasparenza, onestà e miglioramento

Name: The Hawk Country Club
Description: The Hawk Country Club is a Private Golf Club located at 5N748 Burr Rd, St Charles, Illinois, United States.

Name: Kirkintilloch Golf Club
Description:
Our club is situated north east of Glasgow in the town of Kirkintilloch within easy reach of the M80 motorway (find us). One of the main reasons we receive so many visitors each year to our club is the fact that our course is one of the finest parkland courses in the area. Originally designed in 1895 by golf course design legend James Braid, our par 70 course measures 5,860 yards (medal tees) with the layout suited to golfers of all abilities and ages with a relatively flat layout.
 
We offer a warm welcome to visitors and on arrival you will receive a friendly welcome from our PGA Professional, Colin Fairweather. You may also wish to partake in our excellent catering prior to or after your round as well as making full use of our practice facilities before your round.
 
Whether you are coming to KGC for a relaxing game with friends, playing a team match or taking part in one of our many Open Competitions you will not be disappointed with what we have to offer. Hopefully you will enjoy it that much we may just be welcoming you back as a member one day.
 
If you do pay us a visit, have a great day and remember the three golden rules of your visit with us:
Relax - You work hard so make the most of your leisure time
Enjoy - Don't worry about how you play there is always another day
Come Back - If you enjoyed your day out come back and please tell your friends

Name: Beach Grove Golf Club
Description:
Beach Grove Golf Club: Where Tradition Meets Community 
Located in the heart of Tsawwassen, Beach Grove Golf Club is a premier private club offering an exceptional golf experience and a welcoming community. Established in 1929, our club combines rich history with modern amenities, providing members with an 18-hole championship course, outstanding dining, and a vibrant social atmosphere.

More than just a golf course, Beach Grove is a place where friendships are forged, families come together, and business connections are made. Whether you're here for a round of golf, a special event, or to enjoy the clubhouse, you’ll experience the warmth and camaraderie that define our club.

Name: High Pointe Golf Club
Description:
High Pointe Golf Club is the rebirth of legendary golf architect Tom Doak’s first design as a private national golf club in the Summer paradise of Northern Michigan.

While we take our inspiration from some of golf's greatest clubs, we have a simple goal - High Pointe will be the high point of golf.

Great clubs have great members. Our members share a love for the greatest game, a respect for its traditions, and a uniquely high golf IQ.

Name: Aarhus Golf Club
Description: Traditionsrig og attraktiv golfklub beliggende i det sydlige Aarhus. Danmarks 6. ældste golfklub er beliggende i fantastiske omgivelser der danne ramme om unikke opleverser.

Name: San Marcos Golf Course
Description: Established in 1913 and the first all-green grass links in Arizona, the San Marcos Golf Course underwent a multi-million dollar renovation in 2014, which included an all-new state-of-the-art irrigation system that now provides year-round playing conditions. Preserving the course’s historic elegance and charm, the San Marcos clubhouse includes distinct architecture, a world-class golf shop, and restaurant. Designed to be a fun challenge for golfers of all skill levels, the par 72 San Marcos Golf Course is just a short three-minute walk from the Crowne Plaza Phoenix Chandler Golf Resort. Tee up and go for the green while enjoying the tradition and nostalgia of yesterday at the historic San Marcos Golf Course!

Name: Annanhill Golf Club
Description:
Annanhill golf course was opened on the 27th of April 1954 and is managed by East Ayrshire Leisure Trust.

The opening of Annanhill golf course was marked by an exhibition foursome featuring two of Scotland’s greatest golfers, Eric Brown and John Panton. The Annanhill pro, John McLean and the Prestwick St Nicholas pro, Willie MacDonald made up the foursome and the match finished all square.

To this day, Annanhill golf course remains a challenging test of golf.

Name: Limitless Golf Club
Description: Limitless Golf Club is a state of the art indoor golf training facility where members will have access to short game practice facilities, simulators and instruction. In addition to offering practice based memberships, LGC offers club fitting and individual instruction which are available to both members and non-members.

Name: Elevate Women In Golf
Description: Elevate & connect women in golf internationally.                                                      Community of women golfers.

Name: Golfpoint
Description: GolfPoint is the golf companion app that makes every round smarter and more social. Players can track live scorecards, see each other around the course, order food, access GPS maps, and get AI-powered caddie insights. Courses boost engagement and revenue through the app, with optional 14″ kiosks that can also be retrofitted to golf carts.

Name: Copenhagen Golf Center
Description:
Copenhagen Golf Club is centrally located for members and companies in West Copenhagen. With us, we put the social aspect first, where the community and good events help to make the experience complete.

We are located in scenic surroundings only 15 minutes from the center of Copenhagen and have 2 courses: an 18-hole course and a rated 9-hole course. In addition, we have a fully Trackman-covered driving range facility that invites you to both training all year round, as well as social events and competitions.

In our modern clubhouse you will find a restaurant and a well-stocked pro shop.

Name: Bonnyton Golf Club
Description:
Augusta National designer and world-famous course architect, Dr. Alister Mackenzie oversaw course design of Bonnyton from March 1922 to June 1923 whereby he opened the course in an exhibition match with George Duncan, Abe Mitchell, J. H. Kirkwood and multi-Major winner, Walter Hagen.

The Bonnyton Golf Club welcomes societies and visiting parties all year round. We can cater for groups of all sizes with catering packages to suit your requirements. You do not have to be a member to enjoy the facilities, simply get in touch to make a booking.

Enquire today! We offer a fantastic wide range of membership at the club, we really do serve everyone’s wants and needs for their golf. From Junior, to Midweek, Ladies and Full membership we cover all the bases.

Name: Hiwan Golf Club
Description: Hiwan Golf Club is one of Colorado's finest golf clubs. For over 55 years it has graced the Evergreen community. Generations have walked its storied fairways and enjoyed golf and all the many activities of a country club. Our family lifestyle and focus on activities from tennis to our sports and fitness operations create an environment to amplify the mountain lifestyle. It is also the perfect place to host golf tournaments, weddings and business conferences.

Name: HGC Golf & Event Göteborg
Description:
Välkommen till HGC Golf & Event - Powered by Inrange

Från världsledande och senaste tekniken av golfsimulatorer på över 40 platser öppet för alla!

Gratis lån av golfklubbor för Er som inte har egna klubbor. HGC Academy för träning, kurser och kommande Juniorprogram.

Cafe, restaurang och bar samt härliga uteserveringar i söderläge. Baseboll-Svingburen, adrenalinfylld aktivitet från +15 år med målsman till minigolf och multigolfbana 5 sporter. Fotbollsgolf, Handbollsgolf, Padelgolf, Frisbeegolf och Parkgolf. 

En fritidsgård under bar himmel - jag det är precis vad det är. kom som företag, kom som familj eller kika hit som nyfiken ungdom och häng hos oss och testa roliga sportaktiviteter med kamratgänget till föreningen.

På hälsosidan har vi ett gym med specialpris för Junior och senior samt en hälsobastu för leder och besvär.

HGC Golf & Event Göteborg - Ett nöje för alla !

Name: Torquay Golf Club
Description:
We are a thriving and traditional members club situated just three miles from Torquay’s centre with its stunning marina and harbour, and a short distance from picturesque St. Marychurch and Babbacombe.

Founded in 1909, the course has steadily evolved to present a first class parkland layout that offers a challenging yet rewarding test of golf in beautiful natural surroundings. Extensive views from the course encompass Lyme Bay in the east across the water to as far afield as Portland Bill, and to the rugged tors of Dartmoor to the west.

Our tree lined fairways and high quality greens present an interesting challenge on each hole. We offer a warm welcome to visitors and societies looking to test your skills; Torquay golf course provides a true test of golf for players of all abilities. Visitor green fees are available throughout the week and weekend.

Our comfortable and friendly clubhouse offers excellent catering and bar facilities. We hope you enjoy your visit!

Name: The Boathouse & Field Club
Description: A private club located on the beautiful island of Martha's Vineyard. Members enjoy fine dining overlooking Edgartown Harbor, a fleet of classic boats, fitness facility and classes, tennis, spa and pools.

Name: Golfclub Gstaad-Saanenland
Description: Die 18-Loch-Golfanlage (Par70) liegt auf 1’400 m.ü.M, umgeben von einem Naturschutzgebiet mit Flachmoor von nationaler Bedeutung. Die abwechslungsreichen 18 Spielbahnen sind behutsam in die Natur eingebettet. Geniessen Sie den zauberhaften Blick auf die Bergwelt des Berner Oberlandes abseits von Verkehr und Lärm.

Name: Loyalist Golf and Country Club
Description: Loyalist Golf and Country Club is a company based out of 1 Loyalist Blvd, Bath, Ontario, Canada.

Name: Aim Master
Description: Aim Master trainer keeps you directly in-line with your target and the club face square. Our Patent-Pending design ensures your backswing is correct, follow through is correct and numerous drills to perfect your swing.

Name: Golf de Morfontaine
Description: Golf privé, parcours de 27 trous, dessiné par Tom Simpson en 1913

Name: Algarve Golf Guru
Description: Setup in 2015 by PGA Professionals Eddie Charnock and Richard Hudson, Algarve Golf Guru provides a complete Algarve Golf Holiday Concierge Service. We take care of organising and booking your resort accommodation, green fees, transfers, club and trolley hire, car hire and golf schools. Start planning your Algarve golfing holiday by contacting Algarve Golf Guru - just one easy quote for parties of any size.

Name: Ubuntu Golf Initiative
Description: Empowering the Youth Through Golf

Name: Upton-by-Chester Golf Club
Description: Upton-by-Chester is a friendly, welcoming club with an established 18-hole parkland course with mature tree lined fairways and is suitable for all ages.

Name: RUSTINGTON GOLF CENTRE LIMITED
Description: Rustington Golf Centre has been welcoming golfers since 1992. We aim to ensure golf is a game for everyone, by creating a relaxed, fun and friendly atmosphere with affordable prices for all of our facilities.

Name: @ThisIsForefront
Description:
A pioneering business network with a twist.
Golf at its core… but crafted for non-golfers.

Name: Forest Lake Club
Description: With more than 4,700 acres of forest in northeastern Pennsylvania, three lakes, and a stream, the Forest Lake Club is a member-owned private club and residential community providing the outdoor enthusiast with recreational and social experiences in a convivial and family-friendly atmosphere.

Name: Fall River Country Club
Description: Tucked away on a quiet and secluded parcel of land in the North End of Fall River, Massachusetts, the Fall River Country Club is a classic New England golf course.  Established in 1895, our golfing members and guests traverse a historic and scenic layout, following in the footsteps of golf legends Harry Vardon, Francis Ouimet, Bobby Jones, and many more.  Situated along the banks of the Taunton River, the Fall River Country Club features water views on 17 of our 18 holes, along with beautiful vistas from our full-service Clubhouse.

Name: Golf Development Solutions Co., Ltd
Description: Golf Development Solutions is a holistic agency focused on each part of the Golf Industry with a keen focus on Golf Course Development and Construction and Marketing and Communications.
Location: An Loi Dong Ward, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: Stone Harbor Golf Club
Description: Stone Harbor Golf Club is a company based out of 905 Route 9 North, Cape May Court House, New Jersey, United States.
Location: Cape May Court House, New Jersey

Name: The Back Nine Golf Clarksville
Description:
The Back Nine Golf in Clarksville, TN is a Premium Indoor Golf Facility!
We are open to members 24/7 and have tee-times available to the public by appointment only. We are opening this summer! We can't wait to show you where golf never sleeps!

Name: POGO TurfPro
Description:
POGO sets the industry standard for course monitoring, mapping, and analysis. 
Get optimal insight on and off your turf with POGO!
Linktree: https://linktr.ee/POGO.TurfPro

Name: Ramsey Golf & Country Club
Description: Ramsey Golf and Country Club is a historic property nestled near the heart of Ramsey in Bergen County, NJ, just 30 miles from Manhattan. Our Club is surrounded by a formal English garden, scenic 18-hole golf course, lakefront pool and beach and paddle tennis facility.

Name: Balvanera Polo & Country Club
Description:
Grupo Desarrollador Balvanera

Somos líderes en la creación de comunidades exclusivas que ofrecen un estilo de vida inigualable. Con una visión centrada en la excelencia y la innovación, creamos espacios donde la elegancia se combina con la naturaleza. En Balvanera, cada detalle está cuidadosamente diseñado para brindarte una experiencia única.

Name: einbeck.golf
Description:
Unser Angebot:

 Golfplatz: Gepflegter und abwechslungsreicher Golfplatz mit 18 anspruchsvollen Löchern.
 Mitgliedschaft: Interessante, planbare und verlässliche Mitgliedschaftskonditionen mit attraktiven Kennenlern-Paketen.
 Training: Professionelles Training für Anfänger und Fortgeschrittene.
 Events: Regelmäßige Turniere und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen für Mitglieder und Gäste.
 Gastronomie: Genießen Sie köstliche Speisen und erfrischende Getränke in unserem Clubrestaurant.

 Unsere Werte:
Gemeinschaft: Eine herzliche und familiäre Atmosphäre, in der sich alle willkommen fühlen.
Qualität: Hohe Standards in Pflege und Gestaltung unserer Golfanlage.
Nachhaltigkeit: Verantwortungsbewusster Umgang mit der Natur und Förderung des Umweltschutzes.

Name: Fox Hollow Golf Club
Description:
Fox Hollow Golf Club features 18 holes of Championship golf spread across 150 sprawling acres set along the Crow River between Rogers and St. Michael, Minnesota. Located in the west metro of the Twin Cities, the golf course has a proud tradition of hosting state championships including the 2008 U.S. Amateur Public Links Championship.

Our Back 9 redesign is complete including the breathtaking Holes 16 and 17. Add in the dramatic downhill drop on the par-3 15th hole with the uphill 18th playing to a memorable three-tiered green, and you’ll see why Fox Hollow offers 4 of the best finishing holes in the metro.

The clubhouse facilities at Fox Hollow comfortably host receptions, meetings and banquets for groups up to 240 guests.  Elegant or casual, your event will receive the highest levels of service from our professional staff.

The practice facility includes a full-length driving range, two putting/chipping greens, and a practice bunker.

Name: Kings Hill Golf Club
Description: Kings Hill Golf Club is one of Kents finest inland golf courses within easy reach of London.

Name: Los Naranjos Golf Club
Description:
When you enter Los Naranjos Golf Club, you notice that special and welcoming atmosphere the club respires. The Restaurant and its spectacular terrace is a natural meeting point. This is where the members and guests reunite; enjoy lovely food and good company.

The golf course, a master piece designed by Robert Trent Jones Sr. has been crucial in the preparation of many professional golf players and is considered to be one of the best courses in Spain.

Los Naranjos Golf Club does not only represent a superior golf course but also the social events for members and guests are very popular and admired. As a member you will be a part of an international Club with a delightful atmosphere and social commitment.

Name: Paradise Valley Country Club
Description:
Paradise Valley Country Club is widely recognized for its exceptional location, preservation of its natural beauty and top amenities, as well as its progressive and innovative leadership. Recognized as a Distinguished Club, nestled deep in the heart of the small town of Paradise Valley, Arizona, the Club has supported a comfortable and inviting lifestyle for its members and families since 1953. The membership is among the most well-respected and discerning individuals in the local community. The members and employees are committed to fostering lasting friendships and memories within their Club community.

As a traditional, invitation-only Club, members and families enjoy a home away from home experience that is unique, exquisite, and rich with history and Arizonian culture. The grounds are surrounded by the iconic Camelback Mountain to the south, Phoenix Mountain Preserve to the west and McDowell Mountains to the east creating a picturesque backdrop for the many amenities that are offered including golf, tennis, fitness, swimming, dining, and a variety of social engagements.

Mission Statement
To be the premier country club in Arizona, oriented to family and friendships, and to be considered among the finest country clubs in the United States.

Values Statement
Commitment to servicing our members, guests and employees with respect, while maintaining a balance of Paradise Valley’s rich history and traditions and creating value for the evolving membership demographics through friendships and experiences seen throughout all aspects of the Club.

Amenities
•	18-hole, parkland-style Golf Course designed by Lawrence Hughes and renovated by Coore & Crenshaw
•	State-of-the-art Golf Learning Center
•	State-of-the-art Fitness Facility
•	6 lane, 25-yard competition swimming pool with a separate area for young children
•	9 Court Tennis, 4 Pickleball Facility, including a centre court.
•	Vibrant Youth Activities program for our younger Member famil

Name: The Concours Club
Description: The Concours Club sets the new standard for automotive country clubs worldwide. The members-only motorsport facility blends high-performance driving, impeccable service and luxury amenities within a spectacular resort setting. Located minutes from the heart of Miami, this is the ultimate escape for automotive enthusiasts and collectors to relax, connect, and share their passion.

Name: Modern Golf & Country Club
Description:
Modern Golf & Country Club is an 18 Holes International Standard Golf Course. The course was designed by five times British Open Champion, Peter Thomson. Every hole is designed with great detail so that each hole has a unique character. Lakes, long fairways, and bunkers are designed along the way to the green to challenge and add excitement to the course.

Modern Golf & Country Club offers its members and guests complete sports facilities. You will be able to enjoy tennis that can be played semi outdoor, squash, and badminton court, complete with a great Olympic - size pool. Modern Golf & Country Club Sports Club also offers fitness, aerobics, spa, completed with sauna, cold and hot plunge pools, jacuzzi and as the ideal place to really unwind after a long day of exercise.

Name: Quail Hollow Club
Description: Quail Hollow Club is based out of 3700 Gleneagles Rd, Charlotte, NC, United States.

Name: The Stirling Club
Description:
Welcome to The Stirling Club: An Exclusive Lifestyle Club Defined by Exceptional Service and Luxurious Amenities. Located in the Heart of the Entertainment Capital and Just Steps from the Las Vegas Convention Center, Our Magnificent 73,000 Square Foot Space Offers an Unparalleled Club Experience for Members and the Community.

Embrace New Year Opportunities: Corporate, Young Executives, and Out-of-State Elite, Discover the Top Private Club in Las Vegas, Just Moments from the Strip - Attainable Luxury Awaits.

Experience Our Vibrant Social Calendar, Clay Tennis Courts, Pickleball, Outdoor Pool, Cabanas, Poolside Bar and Grill, Fitness Center, Unlimited Movement Studio Classes, Cigar Lounge, Restaurant, Supper-Club, Barbershop, Spa, Salon, Medspa, Starbucks, Meeting Space, and Much More! Join Our Elite Community Today.

Membership Pamphlet:
https://www.canva.com/design/DAFWE53dZ4o/nmUwi_C04Hk2XRSm-ctolw/edit?utm_content=DAFWE53dZ4o&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=sharebutton

Name: Lima Golf Club
Description: Exclusivo club social, dedicado a la promoción del golf y otras disciplinas como el tenis, squash, gimnasio. Cuenta con una operación de Alimentos & Bebidas, que contempla 3 restaurantes de primer nivel.

Name: Golf Club of Houston
Description:
Golf Club of Houston opened in 2003 with an 18-hole Member Course designed by the renowned Jim Hardy and Peter Jacobson. This 900 acre land was beautifully crafted with Cypress, Live Oak and Pine trees. Since 2003, Golf Club of Houston has hosted the PGA TOUR's Houston Open with three great years on the Member Course and since 2006 on a newly crafted Tournament Course. Rees Jones, course architect, was instrumental with incorporating a beautiful yet challenging layout designed to test the best players in the world while maintaining a positive experience for players of all skill levels. 

Our clubhouse offers an exclusive environment in an attractive, convenient location. Whether you're hosting a corporate meeting, or combining it with a golf outing, our 33,000-square foot clubhouse and distinguished golf courses are the ideal location. Experience breathtaking views and uncompromising privacy. 

Our dedicated events team advises, arranges and facilitates to ensure that everything proceeds as planned.

Amenities include:
- All inclusive golf packages 
- Specialty gifts, merchandise, mobile Golf shop and professional retail staff 
- Exceptional service with a variety of Food & Beverage options  

Golf Club of Houston hosts one of the largest PGA tournaments in the country - the Houston Open. It is one of only 11 public courses across the country that hosts a PGA TOUR event. Play where the Pros play and experience the level of precision and refinement that only comes with a course designed for the very best.

Name: Sunningdale Golf Club
Description:
Sunningdale Golf Club is a private members Club founded in 1900. The Club has over 1,000 Members and also welcomes visitor play. 

Sunningdale Golf Club is ranked as one of the best in the world. The Club has a traditional ethos, aspires to world class standards and is accredited with Investors in People Platinum Standard.

Name: The National
Description: På The National möts människor för att spela golf på banor i toppklass. För att utvecklas på en av Europas bästa tränings-anläggningar. För middag, ett glas, eller en konferens i klubbhuset. För att runda av, varva ned eller växla upp. För nya möjligheter till oslagbara möten. Varje dag.

Name: Mint Greens Golf
Description:
At Mint Greens, we believe golf is the true sport of business – a unrivalled way to entertain and impress; to talk at length with key clients and strengthen important relationships.  Our goal is to help you maximise its potential.

As a Golf Advisory and Concierge Service, we'll work with you to help shape your golfing strategy. We’ll advise how best to match your golfing plans to your business ambitions, and then set about tailoring and organising all your golfing activity – from a single 2-ball or beginners’ clinic, through to a major corporate event.  The ideas and opportunities to impress are, literally, unlimited.

In the process, our partnerships with leading golf clubs will afford you exclusive terms of access and our concierge team will save you countless hours of work.

It’s fair to say, golf will never have worked harder for your business.

Drawn from a wide range of sectors including finance, insurance, media, construction, property, law and IT, our clients also enjoy access to an exclusive events programme and executive lunches, as well as benefiting from personal introductions.

If you use golf for business, we would welcome the opportunity to explain how our service can work for you.  Please contact enquiries@mintgreens.com for further information.

Name: Inverness Club
Description: Inverness Club is a nationally recognized club, building on a rich heritage to provide its members and guests a memorable experience. We are thoughtful stewards of a historic, world-class golf course. Rooted in Midwestern values and family-oriented, we strive for excellence in a broad range of amenities and activities for our members.

Name: APOGEE - HOBE SOUND
Description: APOGEE is the only private golf club of its kind: a masterfully designed, three-course retreat on a protected expanse of natural beauty - with extensive 6-star amenities and private villas reserved for members, family, and invited guests.  Set in Southeast Florida's stunning Hobe Sound, just thirty minutes from Palm Beach International Airport - getting to APOGEE is as swift and seamless as the perfect swing, and staying for the weekend a luxury all its own.

Name: Golf des Alpes
Description:
Golf des Alpes - Entre lac et montagne, à mi-chemin entre le Lac d’Annecy et le Mont-Blanc
 304 Route du Thovey, 74210 Giez

Le Golf des Alpes vous offre un cadre d’exception pour pratiquer le golf dans un environnement naturel spectaculaire, tout en bénéficiant de services sur mesure adaptés aux entreprises et aux particuliers.

Nos parcours

	 Le Belvédère (18 trous) : Un parcours avec vue imprenable sur le Mont-Blanc et le Lac d’Annecy, idéal pour les golfeurs en quête de défis. Fairways étroits, vastes espaces ponctués de pièces d’eau, et un environnement naturel où se reflètent chênes, frênes et peupliers.
	 Les Castors (9 trous homologués) : Un parcours conçu pour les débutants, parfait pour l’entraînement, les stages et les compétitions de classement.

 Practice Top Tracer 

Pour perfectionner votre swing, nous mettons à votre disposition un practice unique en France, équipé de 20 postes Top Tracer. Analysez chaque coup avec précision, améliorez votre technique et profitez d’un espace moderne et innovant.

 Le Resto des Alpes - ouvert à tous !

Rendez-vous au Resto des Alpes pour savourer une cuisine gourmande et de saison. Profitez de la terrasse et du cadre idyllique pour partager un moment de détente.

 Événements d’entreprise sur mesure

Le Golf des Alpes est le lieu idéal pour organiser vos événements professionnels : séminaires, team buildings, ou initiations golfiques. Un cadre hors du commun entre lac et montagne, parfait pour rassembler vos équipes et offrir des moments de qualité en dehors de l’entreprise. Nous proposons des solutions personnalisées pour créer une expérience mémorable et renforcée par des activités en plein air.

Pour toute réservation ou demande, contactez-nous au 04 50 44 48 41.

Name: Tamahaac Club
Description:
Rediscover our hidden gem
of nature and fun atop of the Niagara escarpment. The Tamahaac Club occupies 78 acres of parkland set amidst a Carolinian forest. From our founding in 1912 by 75 of Hamilton's most prominent families and on into the 21st century, our club makes history come to life.
Summer and winter, our members may gather for sports enjoying tennis, pickleball, bocce, skeet shooting and croquet.
Specializing in weddings and corporate events we elevate our food and beverage experience to the highest level.

Name: Club Campestre Guaymaral
Description: Club Campestre Guaymaral is a sports company based out of Autopista Nte. #245-01, Bogotá, Colombia.

Name: Hollandsche Golfclub
Description: Wij zijn dé club van Hollandsche Golfbaanexploitatie Maatschappij (HGE). Een club waar je leuker kunt leren golfen, beter kunt leren golfen, je handicapregistratie regelt én waar je altijd kunt golfen met een glimlach op één van onze golfparken.

Name: Erbil Hills Golf Club
Description: The First International Golf Club in Iraq. Erbil Hills is managed by IMG Golf Course Services and features a Championship Golf Course, designed by the world-renowned Golf Course architecture company Dye Design. The exclusive club is tailored for individuals seeking a luxurious golfing, and lifestyle experience.

Name: Sand Golf Club
Description:
Bli en del av Jönköpings starkaste nätverk - Sand Business Club!

Unika möten kräver unika miljöer, här kan ni konferera, bedriva styrelse & ledningsgruppsmöten. Restaurang i oslagbar miljö och hotell med 64 bäddar gör Sand Golf Club till Er perfekta mötesplats. 

Sand Golf Club öppnade portarna 2005 då ett par entusiastiska entreprenörer beslutade sig för att omvandla en gammal potatisåker till en av nordens bästa golfbanor.

De välrenommerade golfbanearkitekterna Arthur Hills och Steve Forrest fick uppdraget att designa denna unika skapelse. De fick tillgång till en plats med ren sandjord som ger den ultimata förutsättningen för att bygga en högklassig bana av bästa internationella USGA standard.
En linksbana av högsta klass.

Välkomna till en unik upplevelse//

Name: Club de golf Las Pinaillas
Description:
El club Golf las Pinaillas es un club social que fundado a finales de los años 90 por la iniciativa de un grupo de aficionados al golf de Albacete se inauguró el 24 de abril de 2002.

La principal instalación del club es su campo de golf, de 18 hoyos y par 72, diseñado por Seve Ballesteros y cuyo recorrido, por la amplitud de calles, densidad de rough y el movimiento de los greenes, lo hacen un campo muy adecuado para todos los niveles de juego.

El club consta también de las instalaciones necesarias para la práctica y aprendizaje del golf, así como de una gran casa club con salones sociales, salas para reuniones y servicio de cafetería y restaurante, así como de una zona polideportiva con campo de fútbol 7, pistas de tenis y una gran piscina y pradera en la que disfrutar durante los meses de verano.

Name: SHORTEES GOLF
Description:
GOLF DIFFERENTLY AT SHORTEES GOLF.
AUSTRALIA'S ONLY 18 HOLE, DAY + NIGHT PITCH + PUTT GOLF COURSE AND CLUBHOUSE.

Name: Angus Glen Golf Club
Description:
Welcome to Angus Glen Golf Club - Home to the championship North and South golf courses, casual dining at the Silo Grill Restaurant, and first-class event facilities. We are more than just golf!

2015 is a very big year for Angus Glen Golf Club. We are celebrating our 20th anniversary, the official grand opening of the Renovated South Course, the new Nike Pro Shop (the first of its kind in Canada and one of few in the world) and hosting golf at the Toronto 2015 Pan Am Games on the South Course. 

About the South Course
The South Course has hosted the 2001 BMO Canadian Women’s Open, 2002 Bell Canadian Open and the 2014 World Junior Girls Championship. 

A $6 million renovation was just completed by award-winning golf architectural firm MacKenzie & Ebert.  A firm who’ve advised on an impressive list of world-renowned courses such as Turnberry, Royal St. Georges, Royal Lytham & St. Annes, and more.

Angus Glen Golf Club is a public golf facility specializing in Corporate and Charity Golf Tournaments as well as Special Events.  We are conveniently located in Markham (less than 35 kilometers from downtown Toronto).

Name: The Royal and Ancient Golf Club of St Andrews
Description: The Royal and Ancient Golf Club of St Andrews was founded on 14 May 1754 with the first Challenge for the Silver Club. Evolving over 250 colourful years of British history, it has grown from a small society of no fixed abode into a club whose membership of around 2,500 extends worldwide.

Name: GBC.golf
Description:
GBC.golf - Golf Business Connect : Votre Réseau d'Affaires avec le Golf ! 

Un network différent …

C’est nouveau, c’est innovant venez faire partie du mouvement …

Vivez une révolution dans le réseautage avec nos rencontres mensuelles exclusives avec tables rondes, parcours de golf et repas ! 

Une occasion unique de joindre l'utile à l'agréable, de tisser des liens d'affaires solides tout en perfectionnant votre swing.
Ne manquez pas cette opportunité de faire partie d'un réseau d'avant-garde, où chaque partie est un pas vers le succès. Les places sont limitées. Réservez votre participation et transformez votre manière de réseauter dès maintenant !

Name: Thompson Golf Management
Description:
At TGM, we operate at the cutting edge of golf course development and management. From land acquisition to orchestrating televised events, we engage in every phase with the precision of a mission-critical operation and a task-oriented ethos. Our approach integrates advanced construction techniques, state-of-the-art management practices, and pioneering innovations in education, administration, and technology.

We don’t just manage golf courses; we engineer environments where the game evolves. TGM-prepared facilities aren’t just different—they’re designed to push the boundaries of what’s possible in golf.

Name: Nicklaus Golf Club at LionsGate
Description: A premier golf club in the Kansas City metropolitan area.

Name: Lighthouse Golf Club CIC
Description:
Golf • Charity • Networking •  Fun
We are dedicated to raising funds for the Lighthouse Construction Industry Charity through our golf club and golf events, the only charity that provides emotional, physical and financial wellbeing support to construction workers and their families in the UK and Ireland.

A dedicated experienced events team to assist you

Discounted rates at top venues across the UK/ Europe/ Dubai/ USA
Discounted rates on major golf brands including – Titleist / Footjoy / Glenmuir / Bushnell 

Donated Free of Charge 
Aauction/raffle/NP prizes from our partner companies
Five star hole in one prize
Designed golf day marketing flyer
Assistance with your event PL and forecast/budget
Event marketing via our website
Fundraising auction platform
Online event booking system

For more information email info@lighthousegolfclub.com or visit our website www.lighthousegolfclub.com

Name: Golf International de Pont Royal
Description:
Le Golf Français, signé Severiano Ballesteros.

Niché au cœur du Luberon, entre la lumière d’Aix-en-Provence et le charme d’Avignon, le Golf International de Pont Royal incarne l'élégance et l'exigence d'un parcours dessiné par une légende.

Quatre fois élu meilleur parcours de France (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024 – World Golf Awards), il est aussi un écrin naturel préservé, distingué par le label argent pour la biodiversité (FFGOLF & Muséum national d’Histoire naturelle).

Un tracé d'exception. Un défi pour tous.

Un parcours où chaque fairway est un tapis de velours, chaque green une invitation à l’excellence. Départs stratégiques, variété des coups, entretien irréprochable : Pont Royal est une œuvre d'art golfique, exigeante et raffinée, pensée pour challenger chaque joueur.

Terre de compétitions, Pont Royal a vibré au rythme des plus grands tournois, accueillant, de 1994 à 2023, les épreuves de l'European Tour (Challenge Tour & Alps Tour).

Un Centre d'Entraînement d'excellence : un practice à étage avec vue imprenable sur le Luberon, un parcours 6 trous technique, cinq pros aux expertises complémentaires, et un Pitch & Putt 3 trous exigeant : chaque joueur affine son jeu sous l'œil avisé de l'Académie de Pont Royal.

Le Golf International de Pont Royal, l'Art de Golfer en Provence.

Name: Tee Commerce
Description:
The online retail partner for golf courses and country clubs. 

Currently powering over 600 online club shops across the country. 

Learn how you can sell merchandise online with no extra work or inventory risk.

Name: Vilamoura Golf
Description: Vilamoura is home to a collection of exceptional golf courses, each offering a unique challenge and experience. From the charming fairways of Pinhal to the scenic landscapes of Laguna and Millennium, you’ll find endless opportunities to perfect your game. With a variety of courses to explore, Vilamoura truly stands out as a premier destination for golfers of all levels.

Name: Al Dhannah Golf Club
Description:
Al Dhannah Golf Club is a premier golf and leisure destination located in the heart of Al Dhannah City, UAE. Known for our warm hospitality, scenic landscapes, and well-maintained facilities, we provide a welcoming environment for golfers of all levels—from beginners to seasoned players.

As the proud winner of the Middle East’s Best 9-Hole Golf Course 2024 & 2025, we continuously strive for excellence in course quality, customer experience, and community engagement. Our team is committed to delivering exceptional service, world-class golf experiences, and memorable events tailored to our members, guests, and corporate partners.

With upgraded amenities, professional coaching, and a growing range of activities, Al Dhannah Golf Club stands as a vibrant hub for sports, recreation, and social gatherings in the Western Region.
Location: Al Dhannah City, Abu Dhabi Emirate

Name: Somabay Golf Official
Description: Your year-round golf haven with a temperate climate. Home to world-class facilities including the Gary Player Championship course, floodlit driving range, short game area, putting green, and Par 3 9-Hole course

Name: TPC Sugarloaf
Description: TPC Sugarloaf continues to build on a history of tradition and excellence for today’s lifestyles and expectations. Meeting the needs of today’s country club member, TPC Sugarloaf is more than just a championship golf course, but a Club that honors the traditions of golf and camaraderie within a private country club community. TPC Sugarloaf’s remarkable golf, amenities and exclusive benefits make it one of the most coveted private clubs in Georgia.

Name: The Back Nine Golf
Description: The Back Nine in Chandler is a premier 24/7 indoor golf facility powered by Trackman Technology. Members and Guests can play 300+ courses worldwide, practice and track their analytics and play fun mini games for all ages. You can also get involved in our tournaments, leagues, camps and corporate partnerships.

Name: Renaissance Club
Description:
Since its founding in 2008, The Renaissance Club has become one of the most exclusive private golf clubs in Scotland, where a genius for iconic links design is matched only by the art of service and hospitality and the highest standards of its facilities, amenities, and accommodations.

It was created with a golf course worthy of hosting competitive golf at the highest level, and since 2019, The Renaissance Club has been the host venue for The Scottish Open, currently the only professional event co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour.

A new course. Historic land. A golf club that truly is Rare Indeed

Name: Marine Drive Golf Club
Description: For over 100 years, the members of Marine Drive have set standards of excellence.  An ideally situated and mature course, Marine Drive has been the home of many champions including Stan Leonard, the Club's long-time honorary professional.  At just over 6,400 yards from the black tees, it is certainly known for its difficulty as opposed to its length, but at par 70, many players will tell you it plays longer than expected.  It has certainly earned the respect of many a fine player as well as many of golf's top pundits.

Name: Club Campestre Medellín-Llanogrande
Description:
Corporación Club Campestre
 Sedes: Medellín y Llanogrande

Desde 1924, hemos sido un referente de excelencia, tradición y exclusividad en Colombia. En el Club Campestre Medellín Llanogrande creamos espacios únicos para la práctica deportiva, la conexión con la naturaleza y la celebración de momentos inolvidables.

 Nuestras fortalezas:

Modernas instalaciones deportivas en más de 13 disciplinas.
Eventos sociales, culturales y deportivos de talla internacional.
Un compromiso sólido con la sostenibilidad y el desarrollo comunitario.

 Nuestro equipo:
Cada día, nuestros colaboradores trabajan con pasión para ofrecer experiencias de excelencia a nuestros socios, posicionando al Club como un líder en el sector de clubes privados y como un lugar excepcional para crecer profesionalmente.

 ¿Quieres ser parte de nuestra historia?
Conéctate con nosotros para descubrir oportunidades laborales, eventos destacados y proyectos que nos hacen únicos.

Name: Manasquan River Golf Club
Description: Manasquan River Golf Club is a private member-owned golf club located on the eastern shore of New Jersey in the Borough of Brielle. In 1922, Manasquan River Golf Club purchased 150 acres of farmland and rolling hills that included 1800 feet of waterfront property along the Manasquan River. The property, part of the Old Squan Highlands, includes the highest point on the Atlantic Seaboard from Atlantic Highlands to Florida. Golf course architect Robert White was commissioned to build nine holes in the pastures and swampy meadowlands along the river, which opened for play in 1923. Then in 1926, the second nine holes opened for play in the elevated woodlands and laurel-laden ravines overlooking the river. Manasquan River Golf Club remains a course with a flavor unlike any other at the Jersey shore, presenting two distinct faces.

Name: CLUB LA MACARENA
Description:
El Club Campestre el Rodeo Sede la Macarena se ubica en el apacible Valle de San Nicolás, en Rionegro, a tan solo 20 minutos del aeropuerto José María Córdova. Esta sede del Club El Rodeo te brinda la oportunidad de disfrutar de un conjunto de exclusivas instalaciones y servicios:

Entre sus principales atractivos, destaca uno de los campos de golf más destacados y desafiantes de Suramérica, que consta de 18 hoyos. Además, encontrarás:

Un campo de "Pitch and Putt" para prácticas de golf.
Una impresionante casa club que evoca la arquitectura de las antiguas casonas antioqueñas.
Un entorno con un clima excepcional y un paisaje deslumbrante.
Una piscina para disfrutar de momentos de relajación y diversión.
El restaurante AL ALMA, que te deleitará con su gastronomía.
Dos canchas de tenis para los amantes de este deporte.

Por otro lado, el Club Campestre el Rodeo Sede la Macarena cuenta con un espectacular Centro de Eventos. Su gran salón, con una extensión de 864 m², tiene la capacidad de albergar hasta 1,000 personas en formato auditorio. Este espacio es versátil y se puede dividir en hasta 6 salones individuales, cada uno con capacidad para 90 personas en montaje tipo auditorio. Adicionalmente, se dispone de 2 salas de reuniones, con capacidad para 8 personas cada una. Todos estos espacios están equipados con tecnología de vanguardia, incluyendo video proyectores, pantallas, sistema de sonido en el techo y aire acondicionado. Si prefieres eventos al aire libre, también se cuenta con una amplia pérgola y una zona verde para llevar a cabo tus actividades al aire libre.

Si deseas obtener más información o ponerte en contacto con el equipo comercial del club, te facilitamos los siguientes datos de contacto:

Móvil: +57 3160183880
Dirección: Calle 41 #33 - 595.
Email: eventosmacarena@clubelrodeo.co
Sitio web: www.clubcampestreelrodeo.com

La Macarena, es el lugar perfecto para los amantes del golf, la naturaleza y para aquellos que buscan un entorno lleno de naturaleza.

Name: The Els Club Vilamoura
Description: The Els Club Vilamoura is a new private golf club in the Algarve. Membership is extended only to those proposed by our Founder Members or those invited by the Club.

Name: Bukit Darmo Golf
Description: Bukit Darmo Golf is dedicated to improving your golf game by designing various easy to understand golf training programs within the excellent practice facilities, including a magnificent Aquatic Driving Range which has large grassed tee with over 80 bays. We welcome you to join Lessons from Beginner to Advance, trained by our experienced teaching professional.

Name: Warren Valley Golf Course
Description: Renovation of Warren Valley Golf Course is currently being led by Revive Golf Management, LLC for reopening in the 2023 golf season.

Name: Burhill
Description:
Established in 1907 Burhill Golf Club is one of the finest golf venues in Surrey.  Nestled in leafy parkland on the outskirts of Walton on Thames, Burhill has two superb 18 hole golf courses, each very different in style, character and golfing challenge.  Burhill's Georgian mansion clubhouse, dating back to 1726 is simply stunning and is home to two bars, The Green restaurant and private dining facilities for up to 150 guests.
 
Burhill Golf Club has a thriving membership and welcomes new members to join. Its magnificent facilities also make Burhill a popular corporate golf day and charity golf day venue.

Name: Petroleum Club of Fort Worth
Description:
The Fort Worth Petroleum Club, founded in 1953, is a prestigious private club located on the 40th floor of the iconic 777 Main Street building in downtown Fort Worth, Texas. Offering sweeping city views, upscale dining, and elegant event spaces, the club provides an exceptional experience for its members. 

With amenities including a full-service restaurant, lounge, cigar patio, and access to over 100 reciprocal clubs worldwide, the Club fosters meaningful connections in both business and leisure. Celebrating its Texas Oilfield legacy, the Fort Worth Petroleum Club blends tradition with modern elegance, offering unparalleled hospitality for generations.

Name: Royal Norwich
Description: Norfolk's Premier Golf Course and hospitality venue featuring two brand new courses designed by European Golf Design - a 7,209 yard 18-hole parkland course and a 6-hole academy course - and The Stables a stunning hospitality and dining centre.

Name: The Santaluz Club
Description: The Santaluz Club is nestled in the heart of this 3,800-acre village whose highest knolls offer panoramic views of the coast. The natural habitat of golden rolling hills and timeless traditional California architecture of the homes and clubhouses create an authentic early California setting, unlike any other in the region.

Name: CHHUN ON GOLF RESORT
Description: The first 37-hole golf course designed by Brian Curley is now in Cambodia

Name: Greater Madrid Golf
Description: Hola! We are the Madrid Golf Courses Association, founded in 2014 by Club de Golf Retamares, Club de Golf Lomas-Bosque, Golf Negralejo and Club de Golf La Dehesa. Currently, a total of 19 Madrid golf courses are part of this association.

Name: Dundonald Links
Description:
Set in the heart of Ayrshire on the West coast of Scotland, Dundonald Links is the place to come – from its stunning golf course to its five-star facilities. Stay, play, dine, and relax, with our par 72 course, our world-class restaurant and our luxury lodge accommodation. 

Golf at Dundonald Links never looked so good.

Designed by Kyle Phillips, Dundonald Links was home to the Aberdeen Asset Management Ladies Scottish Open in 2015, 2016 and 2017, The Aberdeen Asset Management Scottish Open in 2017. The Trust Golf Women’s Scottish Open in 2022 & 23 and The ISPS Handa Women's Scottish Open in 2024 & 2026. Also a venue for Final Qualifying for The Open from 2023 to 2026

Name: The Country Club at Castle Pines
Description:
Perched at nearly 7,000 feet, The Country Club at Castle Pines boasts an exceptional Colorado country club lifestyle just minutes south of Denver.  We are the premier private country club in the region located inside The Village at Castle Pines community. Residence is not required to be a member.  

The Membership is nearing the completion of our $21 million transformation adding a full complement of country club amenities to further expand the Club’s year-round active social culture and add to the spectacular and iconic Jack Nicklaus Signature Course that offers the only private mountain course experience in Denver. 

Our Signature Jack Nicklaus golf course weaves seamlessly into the Rocky Mountain landscape and provides members an unmatched golf experience, complete with our course, a 20 acre golf practice facility, and The Crags one acre putting course amidst incredible wildlife, rugged terrain and breathtaking mountain views.  The 2022 completion of our expansion project will bring stylish new dining and social features to the clubhouse, as well as cliff side amenities to include an infinity edge pool, fitness, and racket sports.  The project has added diverse world-class amenities to our already world-class lifestyle.

Name: Golfipedia
Description: Connecting golfers with the best coaches around the world.

Name: Apes Hill Golf Resort & Community
Description: The only elevated golf resort & community in Barbados.  Where the golf's on a higher level but life's always down-to-earth.

Name: Centro Asturiano de Oviedo
Description:
El Centro Asturiano de Oviedo es una entidad con casi 100 años de historia dedicada a promover la cultura, el bienestar y la convivencia de la comunidad asturiana en Oviedo. Nuestra misión es ofrecer un espacio abierto, dinámico y acogedor donde se fomentan actividades culturales, deportivas y sociales que enriquecen la vida de nuestros socios y de la ciudad.

En el CAO apostamos por la innovación y la excelencia en la gestión, buscando siempre adaptarnos a las necesidades de nuestros miembros y de la sociedad actual. Además de nuestra amplia oferta cultural y de ocio, organizamos eventos corporativos y profesionales que facilitan la conexión y el networking en un entorno privilegiado.

Formar parte del Centro Asturiano de Oviedo es sumarse a una tradición de compromiso con Asturias y sus valores, a la vez que disfrutar de instalaciones y servicios de primera calidad.

Name: Randpark Club
Description:
Randpark Club has a welcoming atmosphere, delightful ambience and fantastic service that all add up to the ultimate South African lifestyle experience.  With two of the best-manicured golf courses in the country, an excellent golf shop, an award-winning hotel and spa, conference and function venues, executive boardrooms, a running track, a health and wellness centre and four padel courts; Randpark Club has undoubtedly become one of the most desirable destinations in South Africa. Understanding the needs of our guests, we also offer facilities such as a stylish bar, professional golf tuition and clinics, local and international reciprocity and a two-tiered floodlit undercover driving range that now gives you free access to Inrange with every bucket of balls. Twenty-two of the bays are fitted with Inrange+, a multiplayer golf experience for everyone. If you add all of this together, you have a winning combination. 

Due to our outstanding facilities and service, Randpark Club was able and indeed privileged to host - The Joburg Open in 2017, 2020 and 2021 and SA Open in 1995, 2000, 2018 and 2020. Randpark Club was honoured to host the Nomads Nationals for 2019 - one of the largest amateur golf tournaments in the world and a highly anticipated event on the Nomadic calendar. 

In February 2020, 2021 and 2022, we also hosted the SA Stroke Play Championship. This is a premier event on the men’s amateur golfing calendar, sitting alongside the SA Amateur and African Amateur as one of the three biggest events of the year. 

Randpark Club has for nine consecutive years been awarded the accolade of The Best Golf Course in Johannesburg. This is no small achievement, given the number and exceptional standard of golf courses in our commercial capital.

Name: Basingstoke Golf Club
Description: Keep up to date with news and information about one of the most exciting golf club redevelopments in recent years. We are nearing completion of the build and getting closer to opening - watch this space!

Name: Kawonu Golf Club
Description: A private golf-only club in the Upstate of South Carolina designed by renowned course architect Andrew Green, offering exclusive membership experiences, unsurpassed levels of service, and world-class golf to create unforgettable moments for members and their guests.

Name: Glasgow Golf Club
Description:
Founded in 1787 we are one of the ten oldest golf clubs in the world. We are unique in that our members and visitors enjoy our two courses 35 miles apart; Killermont and Glasgow Gailes. 

Our Killermont parkland course on the North bank of the River Kelvin, five miles from Glasgow city centre, was laid out by Old Tom Morris in December 1903. 

Glasgow Gailes links in Irvine was redesigned by Willie Park Jr in 1912, is a Top 100 UK and Ireland course and has hosted 32 international tournaments including The Open final qualifying most recently from 2014 to 2017.

Name: Country Club Confidential
Description:
Country Club Confidential: Where Privilege Meets Gossip

Welcome to the virtual clubhouse of Country Club Confidential, the weekly newsletter stirring up starched collars and manicured greens. Think of us as the TMZ of private clubs - with a twist: we change the names to protect the guilty (because we’re naughty, not reckless).

What We Serve (Besides Tea)
 Juicy tidbits from behind those iron gates
 Fairway follies and locker room legends
 Gossip hotter than the steam room on ladies’ guest day
 A peek into the lives of the posh and (not always) proper

Our Mission
To bring you the stories that make country club life fascinating, funny, and occasionally scandalous. Even in the most exclusive circles, humans are gloriously, hilariously imperfect - and we’re here for it.

Why Subscribe?
 Get the inside scoop on high-society hijinks
 Laugh at the upper crust (yourself included?)
 Feel like an insider - even if your only club experience is watching Caddyshack

Who We Are
A crew of cheeky observers, reformed caddies, and undercover informants. Our sources are impeccable. Our stories? Unbelievable. Our cocktails? Always properly poured.

Join the growing ranks of subscribers who can’t wait for their weekly dose of country club chaos.

 Subscribe at www.ccconfidential.vip – it’s free, and fabulously indiscreet.

Because what happens at the club… ends up here.

Name: Greenwich Country Club
Description:
Traditions & Warm Hospitality Since 1892

Greenwich Country Club prides itself on providing its members and guests a home away from home, offering world-class amenities for all interests combined with a team that delivers exceptional hospitality and service. 

•	152 Meticulously Maintained Acres
•	18-Hole Golf Course – designed initially by Seth Rayner & maintained by Beau Welling Designs
•	8 Tennis Courts
•	4 Pickleball Courts
•	4 Paddleball Courts
•	3 Squash Courts
•	Fitness Center
•	Skeet, Trap & Five Stand
•	Private Estate on Site
•	Aquatics 25 Meter Lap Pool
•	Bowling Alley
•	4 Full-Service Restaurants 
•	16 Hotel Rooms & Suites 
•	Over 200 Employees in Season
•	Opportunities for Growth & Professional Development 
•	Team Housing on Site 

Membership by invitation only.

Name: La Dehesa Club de Golf
Description:
El mejor club de golf familiar de Madrid.
Situado en la zona noroeste de Madrid.

-> Campo Par72, Trackman Range, Simulador Indoor, 3 piscinas, gimnasio, padel, tenis, restaurantes, zona de eventos y escuelas de golf.
Location: Villanueva de la Cañada, Community of Madrid

Name: Midlothian Country Club
Description:
Join our vibrant community of executives, entrepreneurs, and professionals at one of Chicagoland’s most dynamic private clubs. Whether you’re swinging for birdies, closing deals over dinner, or relaxing poolside with the family—this is where it all comes together. Discover why Chicago’s professionals are joining Midlothian Country Club!
 
-HISTORIC & RENOVATED GOLF COURSE PAIRED WITH UPSCALE YEAR ROUND DINING & SOCIAL EVENTS. 

-82 Newly Designed Bunkers Featuring Pro-Angle Sand

-New Indoor Trackman Golf Simulator Complex, Restaurant & Gaming Space

-Championship Caliber Greens & Immaculate Course Conditions

-Active Men’s Golf Calendar, Ladies Golf Leagues, Junior Golf Program, Couples 9 & Dine Mixers & More!

-Enjoy Playing a Round of Golf in 3H 45M!

-Experience the Elegance of our Renovated Member Lounge, Ballroom, 1898 Room and Champions Lounge or Enjoy Al Fresco Dining on our Two Gorgeous Outdoor Patios Overlooking the Course.

For more information on Midlothian Country Club, please contact Director of Marketing & Sales, Emily Giaimo at egiaimo@midlothiancc.org or call 331-201-5935.

Name: Kingsbarns Golf Links
Description:
The moment you arrive at Kingsbarns, you know you’re somewhere special. The relaxed clubhouse, broad smile from each member of staff and hearty handshake of the first tee starter – all combine to ensure that your trip to play golf in Scotland includes what has been called the warmest welcome in golf.

Kingsbarns Golf Links is proud to be part of the heritage of links golf in 
St Andrews. Located 7 miles south east of the ’home of golf’, the game has been played on the site since 1793.

Kyle Phillips designed this Top 100 Ranked golf course and by setting it in an amphitheatre along the coast, nearly every hole boasts spectacular views of the North Sea. Each Autumn Kingsbarns joins the Old Course, St Andrews and Carnoustie Golf Links as a co-host of the European Tour’s prestigious Alfred Dunhill Links Championship.

Name: Country Club de Villa
Description:
El Country Club de Villa, fundado el 12 de Julio de 1957 es una Asociación Civil sin fines de lucro, adecuada al Código Civil, la Ley General del Deporte y regida por un Estatuto.  
Tiene como fines desarrollar las actividades deportivas, culturales y sociales para el bienestar mental y físico de sus integrantes.
Ofrece a sus Asociados las sede de verano Villa Sur Km. 112.36 Panamericana Sur Asia y Villa Chorrillos en el distrito de Chorrillos ambos frente al mar, con un excelente contraste con nuestro campo de Golf de 18 hoyos en la sede Villa Chorrillos y una sede de invierno en el distrito de Chosica con amplias áreas verdes, además de una interesante infraestructura deportiva que en conjunto consta de 19 canchas de tenis, 6 de mini tenis, 11 canchas de frontón, 02 canchas de squash, 02 canchas de fulbito, 01 cancha de fútbol, sauna con jacuzzi para damas y caballeros, 01 gimnasio moderno , 01 sala de  Spinning, cabinas de Internet, 01 piscina olímpica, 02 piscinas ornamentales, 02 piscinas para niños, 01 cabaña infantil, 01 guardería, 01 piscina temperada, 01 galería de tiro y 32 bungalows completamente equipados en nuestra sede de invierno, Así como 20 campers en la Sede de Playa (Asia) para la temporada de verano, totalmente. Además de diversos camarines, restaurantes, salones de lectura y descanso para nuestros asociados.

Name: Tesoro Club FL
Description: Tesoro Club is a 1,400-acre gated master planned community located on Florida’s Treasure Coast. The community is home to a wide variety of luxury single family homes overlooking the lakes and fairways of two championship golf courses. Tesoro Club is also home to the Crane Club, a premiere wedding and event venue managed by the renowned Lessing’s Hospitality Group. The magnificent Clubhouse boasts over 100,000 square feet, with the ability to accommodate up to 250 guests for dining and reception services. This idyllic location can host a myriad of events, ranging from grand proceedings to small intimate gatherings, while tailoring the ambiance to meet each client’s specific needs and tastes.

Name: Royal Colombo Golf Club
Description: The Royal Colombo Golf Club (RCGC) is one of the oldest private member’s clubs in Sri Lanka and takes pride as a club not just with a rich heritage but boast of a membership network that consists of some of the most influential local professionals and leaders both local and expatriates which makes it one of the most sought after institutions in the country. With a history that spans over 142 years, the club has ambitious plans to enhance and provide a world-class experience for its members and provide leadership in the community as a premier Golf club in Asia.

Name: Asociación Country Club El Bosque
Description: Club Campestre

Name: Teebox BV
Description:
Bij Teebox speel je op de mooiste banen ter wereld, ongeacht het weer. Of je nu traint, leert of plezier maakt met vrienden, de Trackman-technologie tilt jouw golfervaring naar een hoger niveau. Onze missie is om een hoogwaardige, toegankelijke en innovatieve golfervaring te bieden voor iedereen. Of je nu komt om te ontspannen, te trainen, of een gezellige dag met vrienden door te brengen – wij staan voor je klaar.  

 𝐖𝐚𝐚𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐓𝐞𝐞𝐛𝐨𝐱?
3 high-tech teeboxen, waaronder een luxe ruimte voor ultieme game-analyse.
