Name: Barassie Links
Description:
Kilmarnock (Barassie) Golf Club is located on the Ayrshire coastline, nestled amongst the great golf courses in our area. 

We have an extensive history and have been offering a magnificent links challenge since 1887. 

With 27 holes, members and guests can enjoy a true test of links golf whilst following in the footsteps of Major Champions who have played at Barassie. We are proud to have hosted many great championships such as, Final Open Qualifying, Boys Amateur Championships and most recently The Women's Amateur. We are set to host Open Qualifying in 2023 and The Junior Open in 2024.

Name: Kingston Heath Golf Club
Description:
Est. 1909
Ranked in the top 20 courses in the world
Located on the Melbourne Sandbelt
Host of the 2028 Presidents Cup

Name: Avalon Golf Estate
Description:
Sculpted in idyllic surroundings, combining tea plantations, rivers, ravines, mountains and a sweeping view of the Southern coastline, Avalon Golf & Country Club will offer you a unique golfing experience in Mauritius. Featuring an undulating, windswept terrain and ravine-style landscape, our 18-hole international standard golf course, designed by world-renowned South-African golf architect Peter Matkovich is set in the heart of nature in Bois Cheri.

Not only is Avalon the newest golf course on the island, it is also the only ‘in-land’ championship course available in Mauritius. Apart from its distinctive and natural features, Avalon was designed in such a way so as to foster and bring out the indigenous flora and fauna of the untouched South.

Most golf rounds in Mauritius are played in resorts on the coast. Avalon will offer its guests an exclusive golf experience in a diverse yet welcoming environment, where the climate is perfect for a golf round. From the moment you arrive at Avalon to the moment you leave, our highly trained team will be on hand to offer the best of customer service.

Whether you are looking for an unforgettable golf experience, a unique venue to host private parties, corporate events or simply a place for family days out, we guarantee that your time at Avalon will always be truly memorable.

Name: The Golf Lab
Description:
The Golf Lab was designed and built with one specific goal in mind, to turn the golf industry upside down. We are the architects of performance backed by industry leading technology.

Our world class facility enables us to custom fit and build golf clubs together with our certified master fitters and club builders to the highest standards.

Name: Turflogic
Description:
We bring innovation and aerial technology to turf management and improve the overall golfing experience.

Agronomy professionals know that simply having aerial imagery is not enough—data must be actionable. Our platform utilizes NDVI (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index) analysis combined with multispectral sensor technology to offer insights and inspections of stress not yet visible on the surface. This knowledge is critical for early detection to maintaining a healthy and professional course.

Name: Golfbaan Bentwoud
Description: Als je houdt van golfen zonder poeha, dan kom je golfen bij Golfbaan Bentwoud. In het grootste aaneengesloten bosgebied van de Randstad vind je deze indrukwekkende 36-holes golfbaan. Uitstekend onderhouden, uitdagend en betaalbaar. Met vier verrassend veelzijdige 9-holes, waaronder een qualifying par 3-4. Verlichte putting greens. Unieke grass range. De grootste TrackMan Driving Range van Nederland. En een prachtig golfgebouw, feestzalen, terras en uitgebreide horeca.

Name: Golf de Saint-Nom-la-Bretèche
Description:
Inauguré en 1959, le Golf de Saint-Nom-la-Bretèche est un golf privé comportant deux parcours de 18 trous, le club house a été aménagé dans une magnifique ferme XVIIIème, dépendance royale du Château de Versailles.

Le Golf de Saint-Nom-la-Bretèche est réservé à ses membres, leurs familles et leurs invités.

Au tout début de son existence, il accueillait déjà le Championnat du Monde en 1963, puis, pendant 34 ans, le Trophée Lancôme, épreuve majeure du circuit Européen à laquelle participaient les meilleurs joueurs du monde. Ce qui a largement contribué à sa notoriété et à la qualité de ses parcours.

Golf pour la biodiversité - Label Argent

Name: Northmoor Country Club
Description: Established in 1918, Northmoor Country Club is a premier private club that is dedicated to providing members and guests with unforgettable experiences. For over 100 years, Northmoor has been a place where families and friends have gathered to create special memories. Our club features world-class amenities, including 27 holes of championship golf, tennis and pickleball courts, an Olympic-sized swimming pool and exquisite dining facilities. Northmoor Country Club is a place where time-honored traditions are celebrated and exceptional experiences are crafted.

Name: Killarney Golf & Fishing Club
Description: Killarney Golf & Fishing Club is one of Ireland’s most prestigious and historic golfing venues. Located in Killarney National Park and surrounded by the lakes of Lough Leane, Killarney Golf & Fishing Club is a world class destination which has hosted the Irish Open on 6 separate occasions. It is home to two 18-hole Championship Courses and The Killarney Golf Academy which encompasses a 9 Hole Academy Course, a Driving Range and extensive practice facilities.

Name: Portland Golf Club
Description:
Welcome to Portland Golf Club
Located near the heart of Portland, but tucked away among Herculean fir trees, rolling greens and tightly manicured gardens, Portland Golf Club is an oasis, offering a golf and clubhouse experience unlike any other within this region.

Established in 1914, Portland Golf Club is regarded as one of the most prestigious, challenging, and enjoyable member-owned golf clubs in the Pacific Northwest and continues to cultivate its place in history as a championship golf facility. The picturesque golf course and modernized clubhouse support golf and social functions that are compatible with the members’ and their families' values and interests.

Name: EDGA Golf
Description: EDGA (formerly the European Disabled Golf Association) is a not-for-profit, volunteer organisation, active in the promotion and delivery of opportunities to sample, participate and compete in golf.

Name: Ontario Golf Superintendents' Association
Description: The OGSA was formed in 1924 to benefit the superintendent in Ontario. Our mission is to serve our members, advance their profession and enrich the quality of golf and its environment.

Name: Killarney Country Club
Description:
The Killarney Country Club is a homely and respected, full-service country club where our members and guests enjoy a friendly, relaxing atmosphere that appeals to all ages.

For those sporting fanatics there is plenty to choose from at the Country Club, including a 18-hole golf course in immaculate condition, bowling greens, a tennis academy, squash courts and a gymnasium.

There are also various function venues available for all your banqueting and events needs. From conference facilities and private meeting rooms, to weddings, children’s parties, and all other special events.

The Terrace restaurant and bar serves members and guests with delicious food and drinks and throughout the day, while overlooking the 18th hole with its water features, birdlife, and forest lined fairways.

Name: OUTFIELD NURSERY ENTERPRISES VIET NAM
Description: Outfield Nursery Enterprises brings improved turfgrasses to Asia, for golf courses, schools, landscapers, and infrastructure projects.  ONE identifies varieties that will work especially well in our warm, wet Asian climates – that “grow in” quickly, have beautiful color, create dense surfaces, thrive with less water, and recover better from use – and licenses or purchases them from the scientists and plant breeders who have cultivated them.

Name: Scottsdale National Golf Club
Description: An exclusive, members only oasis in the Sonoran Desert, Scottsdale National Golf Club presents golf the way it should be played. No tee times required. Wide open fairways across forty-five holes with no homes lining the courses. Supported by two distinctive clubhouses with stunning views and unexpected amenities. Fifteen luxurious member Villas with sixty tastefully appointed rooms, surrounded by three million acres of government protected desert land in the center of magnificent vistas. And just one rule, established by club owners Bob and Renee Parsons — and insisted upon by the membership — “No member shall ever impinge upon another member's enjoyment of the club.”

Name: Kempferhof Resort
Description:
Le Kempfehof Golf Resort est un golf 18 trous - par 72 de 5989 mètres comprenant un chateau-hotel. Le Domaine est construit sur 85 hectares qui a ouvert en 1990 à Plobsheim 67 - Bas-Rhin), à 15 minutes de Strasbourg en Alsace.

Vous jouerez parmi les chênes centenaires les nombreux obstacles d’eaux, les grands greens modelés et d’immenses bunkers dessinés par Robert Von Hagge.

Profiter de votre séjour pour découvrir la route des vins, le Parlement Européen et la Cathédrale.

L'accueil du Golf est ouvert tous les jours de 08h30 à 17h00.

Name: Eagle Spirit

Nouveau le plus grand centre de Golf Indoor certifié Trackman Performance dans la région lyonnaise !

Nous vous accueillons tous les jours de la semaine pour vous faire découvrir ou redécouvrir le golf indoor dans un cadre lounge.

Equipé de 3 grands simulateurs Trackman, zone de putting, salle de séminaire, salle de réunion, bureaux de coworking et service de restauration.

Ideal pour vos entrainements, coaching, tournoi, team building Eagle Spirit vous propose un éventail d'offre et de service pour passer un agréable moment entre amis, collègues et clients.

Name: Rehoboth Beach Country Club
Description: Founded in 1925, Rehoboth Beach Country Club is the premier private country club on the Delmarva Peninsula. Our members and guests enjoy outstanding services and facilities in a welcoming family oriented environment that encourages enduring friendships.

Name: Agronomic Advisors
Description:
Dave Delsandro and Jeff Corcoran have partnered to form Agronomic Advisors, a consulting company focused on providing a diverse comprehensive suite of solutions to the golf course industry. Delsandro and Corcoran’s backgrounds include superintendent stops at major-championship venues Oakmont Country Club and Oak Hill Country Club, respectively.

Agronomic Advisors provides agronomic, operational management, project/construction preparation and management, capital planning, tournament preparation/hosting/restoration, team building, and other services to the industry.   

We feel Agronomic Advisors is well-positioned to help various courses and clubs through a multitude of different aspects, and our unique relationship-based, comprehensive approach is geared towards developing custom and specific solutions for our client partners in a cost-effective manner.

Name: Mazzella Partnership
Description: Mazzella Golf Renovations is a full-service golf course construction and renovation consulting firm. We specialize in assisting clients through all stages of planning and executing successful projects. We frequently serve as Owners Representatives throughout the renovation process, and also partner with allied professionals in the field of golf course construction to create a custom approach for our clients.

We have purchased what was known as The Links at Stoney Point and are redeveloping the golf course and many other aspects of the club to become Olde Eight.

Name: Green Valley Country Club
Description:
The Green Valley Country Club has a quiet elegance, reflecting its secluded location and the unchanging tastes of its members. We offer eighteen deceptively challenging holes of golf set in the foothills of the Blue Ridge Mountains. Tee times are easy to come by and you can usually find a threesome in need of a fourth on Saturdays and Sundays.

In addition to golf, tennis, and swimming, the Club has various dining facilities, including a grille and a ballroom. The Club's calendar offers all kinds of entertainment for couples and families.

Please call 864.246.2141 for more information.

Name: The Singapore Island Country Club
Description:
The Singapore Island Country Club (SICC) is the nation’s most historic and prestigious private members’ club, serving Singapore’s golfing and social community since 1963.

SICC offers 63 holes of championship golf across two central locations, supported by world-class racquet, fitness, and F&B facilities. Our courses have hosted international tournaments and welcomed generations of members.

We are the proud organisers of the SICC May Day Charity, Singapore’s largest multi-sport fundraising event, which has raised over $27 million for more than 100 charitable causes.

Recognised for our commitment to sustainability, SICC continues to lead with award-winning green initiatives and responsible practices across operations.

Name: Le Golf d'Arras

Deux parcours de 18 et 9 trous vous sont proposés dans un cadre sublime composé de rivières, d’étangs et de collines. Un environnement exceptionnel qui fait du Golf d’Arras l’un des plus beaux complexes golfiques du Nord de la France.

Name: Fescue & Dunes
Description:
The first time we played real, links golf changed us. It is what led us to create Fescue & Dunes. Our mission is simple - connect golfers to the courses they’ve played and loved so the world’s destination golf clubs thrive. 

The foundation of Fescue & Dunes is our e-commerce marketplace and digital marketing engine. We help golf clubs drive more e-commerce revenue without having to build an online store, buy any additional inventory, or manage any part of fulfillment. 

Clubs get a dedicated presence on our marketplace and a stand alone store, if they choose. We partner with the top golf apparel and accessories companies to offer a premium, curated collection that visiting golfers love.

Name: IGC London
Description:
Many years ago on my regular trips to Brussels I was introduced to IGC Belgium, a club established in 1988 and still thriving today. Formed by a small group of like-minded golfers living in and around the Brussels area, they were desperate to play golf but unsure where, how, or indeed who with. As well as containing many international visitors, the group contained golfing locals not wishing to join one particular club. Soon however, they were joined by those already a club member but simply wanted to play more golf on a variety of courses.

They saw a real potential for a new type of golfing society. Local clubs were contacted, golf days arranged, and the IGC concept was born. I’ve enjoyed many IGC golf events both in Belgium and their tours abroad – it soon struck me what a simple yet brilliant concept it was. Thus, with IGC Belgium’s full blessing, IGC London was born.

I want each golf day to be welcoming & thoroughly enjoyable for everyone both on & off the course.

Please feel free to contact me personally at any time by phone or email at the details shown below.

Peter Phillips
07930 445566
peter@igclondon.co.uk

Name: SMARTGOLF
Description:
Smartgolf is a collection of 3 apps that work in tandem to provide a streamlined and efficient food and beverage delivery service to your golfers: The manager app, which gives you total control of your menu and allows you to control the flow of orders; the driver app, which your staff can use to track customers on the course and deliver their food; and the customer app, which can be downloaded through a QR code and allows your golfers to place their orders anywhere on the course. 
We use real-time tracking software to ensure that delivery is seamless and fast, allowing golfers to effortlessly place their orders without skipping a beat.
Courses are also given access to the Smartgolf dashboard, a powerful website that improves upon the functionality of the manager app by allowing greater menu control, access to business data, and the ability to run promotional events such as happy hours and holiday items. 
 
Completely Free
Setting your course up with Smartgolf mobile ordering is quick, easy, and completely free! You provide us with your menu and some details about your course, and can expect to start accepting orders within a week.
Intuitive Systems
With easy to understand instructions and settings, integrating Smartgolf into your course is painless for you and your golfers. We also provide an in-app messaging system in case any issues arise during orders.
In-App Payments
Save time and labor with our in-app purchase system. Smartgolf operates through Stripe connect, allowing payments to be automatically deposited at POS. It’s quick, efficient, and requires zero maintenance on your end.

Name: Golf, Blockchain & NFT's
Description:
Golf is steeped in history and tradition yet it's never too late to stay ahead of the curve - With technology changing at an ever-increasing pace, will the game always remain behind the curve and who will choose lead the way into the Metaverse? 

Ok - So there will always be a place for Golf on the real green stuff too but it's no secret that disruptive technology is taking the industry by storm - Whether it's portable launch monitors, golf bays that tell you how many points you got for hitting it 198 years or an app to update your handicap, this is just the start of a technological revolution for the game of golf. 

In 2000, Blockbuster turned down an offer to buy Netflix for a mere $50m yet here we are today and your children won't even know who blockbuster are yet they're watching Netflix on a daily basis and we won't mention that Netflix today is worth c$100Bn (Yes, billion)! 

Blockchain will do to "Business Complacency", what Netflix did to Blockbuster. 
Understanding what blockchain does, how it works and how it has the ability to disrupt your industry will become crucial to ensuring that you have the edge on your competitors. 

Cryptocurrency will become a daily payment method so whether you choose to accept $BTC, $ETH or $DOGE may not actually be your choice in years to come but understanding it now might give you the edge when you have to make a decision on how it's going to be used in your business. 

NFT's - Non Fungible Tokens will replace memberships and become digital proof of belonging with an associated value - They're not all 16 bit pictures of a monkey. 

The Metaverse will exist in one form or another and where or how you choose to allow your members to engage with you in this space will dictate the future. 

We're here to break down the jargon and make real-life business sense of a new age of technology - Join in, Follow along and give us your thoughts today.

Description:

Dank des milden pannonischen Klimas ist die Anlage meist ganzjährig bespielbar. Die Donau-Auen bieten einzigartige Feuchtgebiete, während die Hänge des Braunsberges ausgewiesene Trockenrasengebiete sind. Der Club ist sich der Lage direkt an einem Naturschutzgebiet bewusst und trägt aktiv mit schonender Platzpflege dazu bei, die vorherrschende Fauna und Flora zu schützen.

Die außergewöhnliche Lage bietet daher jedem Golfer ein besonderes Naturerlebnis.

Der Golfclub Hainburg ist bis zum heutigen Tag ein mitgliedergeführter Verein. Der gewählte Vorstand und die Geschäftsführung leiten die Tagesgeschäfte.
Location: Hainburg an der Donau, Lower Austria

Name: Blind Shot
Description:
Blind Shot is a game changing system improving the safety of blind holes on golf courses.

Keep players safe and improve speed of play on blind holes with the new 'Blind Shot' warning light system. Alert approaching players that they need to delay taking their next shot because there are players obscured from view. 

The Blind Shot warning light system uses camera analytics to monitor potential risk areas where players are not visible to those who are playing behind. Detection of a player within the risk area will trigger a warning light to flash - signalling it is unsafe to play on.

Name: Gifford Golf Club
Description:
"East Lothian's Golfing Hidden Gem"

Gifford Golf Club offers a scenic, 9-hole course set in secluded undulating parkland in East Lothian’s tranquil countryside. 

Located just a short drive from Edinburgh, Gifford Golf Club provides the perfect escape for a day of golf amid picturesque surroundings, demonstrating the variety and versatility of golf on Scotland’s Golf Coast. 

This beautiful course is renowned for its scenic landscape, pristine fairways, and welcoming atmosphere. The tree-lined course provides a fair yet challenging experience for all skill levels. Its welcoming clubhouse and community atmosphere make it a cherished hidden gem.

Name: Golfclub Hamburg-Walddörfer e.V.
Description:
Unter dem Slogan „ein Tag unter Freunden“ zelebriert der Golfclub Hamburg-Walddörfer e.V. seit über 60 Jahren Golferlebnisse in wunderschöner Lage - im Grünen, wo Hamburg auf Schleswig-Holstein trifft. 

Mit den Clubräumen und der Gastronomie im Elingius-Herrenhaus von 1925 ist die gesamte Anlage ein „altes Juwel“ mit modernsten Qualitätsstandards.

Ein "Markenzeichen" ist der einzigartige Blick von der Walddörfer Terrasse, die sechste, siebte und neunte Bahn kreuzend bis hin zum Ufer des Bredenbeker Teichs.

Die Clubgastronomie AC Chefs & Friends by Cornelia Poletto wird von Aurel Celeshi geleitet, langjähriger Mitarbeiter der Hamburger Spitzenköchin und ist ein Ort zum Wohlfühlen und Genießen. 
Hier besteht auch die Möglichkeit, die Clubgastronomie für Firmen- oder Familienfeiern mit bis zu 120 Gästen zu mieten.

Stonebridge Golf & Country Club is a community-driven golf destination committed to restoring quality, strengthening culture, and building a sustainable future for members and guests.

Under new ownership and leadership, Stonebridge is focused on elevating the golf experience, improving course conditions, enhancing food & beverage, and creating a welcoming environment for golfers, families, and the broader Albany community. Our approach blends respect for the club’s history with thoughtful investment, operational discipline, and a long-term vision for growth.

Stonebridge is more than a golf course — it’s a place where community, competition, and connection come together. We look forward to building something special with our members, staff, partners, and neighbors.

Name: Redstone Resort
Description: Redstone Resort is a stunning Furber-designed 18-hole alpine course that boasts beautiful and meticulously kept USGA greens. Nestled in the Monashee mountains, Furber himself says the natural beauty of Redstone is second to none. Along with the golf course and driving range, it is also an excellent location for weddings, events, and corporate meetings. The course's Clubhouse can cater and replenish after a tiring day of swinging clubs on the fairway.

Name: Golf Range Uster

Name: Haddontowne Swim Club
Description:
Haddontowne Swim Club is a family-friendly swim and social club conveniently located in the Haddontowne development in Cherry Hill NJ.  Since 1963, Haddontowne Swim Club has welcomed new members from Cherry Hill and surrounding towns, including Philadelphia.  Located less than a mile off Interstate 295, makes it easy for residents of nearly any South Jersey town to take advantage of all the club has to offer.  Below are just a few of the amenities we have to offer you.

- Main pool features a 1 meter low dive and extremely popular 3 meter high dive!
- For the little ones, a separately enclosed 27-foot round 1’ – 2’ baby pool.
- Kid’s favorite is our Vortex Full Tube Slide that adds some serious water park like fun!
- Free Wi-Fi to work or play while your kids are having fun with friends.
- Propane grills for members to cook their lunch and dinners.
- Full basketball court, Wiffle ball field, and open space for Frisbee.
- Three separate play areas with swings including a massive play fort.
- Movie nights, ice cream parties, candy bingo, crab and chicken fest, and adult socials.
- Covered pavilion available for party rentals.

Unlike many other swim clubs, members are welcome to bring their own food and beverages.  It is not unusual to see families making a day of swimming and barbecuing at the club, particularly on weekends when families come together to share a meal and stay into the evening.  We have many activities in-season as well as social events throughout the year.  Stop by anytime for a tour of this hidden gem.

Website: https://www.teamunify.com/team/recssasjhsct/page/home

Name: Country Club Circeo
Description:
Immerso nel verde del Circeo, il Country Club è un nuovo circolo sportivo che nasce per offrire socialità, passione per lo sport, gusto per il cibo e amore per la musica in un’atmosfera di relax e benessere a tutte le ore del giorno e della sera.

Il circolo sportivo offre un Padel Club con ampio parcheggio dedicato, un campo per Beach Volley e Calcio a 5, un’area Fitness & Wellness, una Clubhouse per l’accoglienza dei soci, un Grill & Sushi Restaurant dove gustare esclusivi menù alla brace, un’area Pizza & Burger, un Lounge Bar per aperitivi e intrattenimenti musicali after dinner, uno Spazio Eventi per feste private ed aziendali e un Parco Giochi per l’intrattenimento dei bambini. 

Un’area ristorazione che propone un’esclusiva esperienza gastronomica SUSHI, originali GRILL EXPERIENCE con un’ampia selezione di carni di primissima qualità e un’area Pizza & Burgers da gustare negli ampi giardini della Club House.

Un cocktail bar con aree privée per l’organizzazione di aperitivi serali, dj set ed eventi speciali con la partecipazione di artisti del mondo della musica e dello spettacolo.

Un’area di 2.500 mq. Per la realizzazione di eventi, concerti, feste private, cene, aperitivi e meeting aziendali da organizzare su richiesta grazie ad un’esperienza specifica dello staff nel settore degli eventi corporate e consumer.
Green Concert nel verde del parco realizzati in collaborazione con il collettivo del «PARIOLI THEATRE CLUB» di Roma.

4 campi da padel di ultima generazione con corsi di padel per adulti e bambini, servizi pro shop, spogliatoi, terrazza bar e ristorante.
Aperto tutti i giorni dalle 08:00 alle 24:00.
CONTATTACI al +393277519487

Name: Shawnee Country Club
Description:
In 1904, Shawnee Country Club became a reality for a group of Allen County businessmen, led by Charles Linemann, who dreamed of spending their time playing golf on a course unrivaled in the area.

The land, purchased by Linemann, was chosen for its unusual rolling terrain in an otherwise flat area, within proximity to the electric railroad since the automobile had not yet become party of daily living. The combination of abundant water and trees added to the importance of this piece of land. It was both beautiful and practical.

Today, more than 120 years later, the vision of our founders is still our visions today- a course and clubhouse unparalled by any in the area. We continue to build on our rich heritage to provide our members and guests a memorable experience.

We are thoughtful stewards of a historic, top notch golf course. Rooted in Midwestern values and family-oriented, we strive for excellence in a broad range of amenities and activities for our members.

Shawnee Country Club is and has been since our founding, a private Club. Membership is by invitation only. Access to the Clubhouse, Golf Course, Pool, Tennis Courts and all other amenities is restricted to our members and their guests.

Corporate Memberships Available - http://www.shawneecountryclub.com - 419.227.7177

Name: The Ace Challenge
Description: Wij dagen je uit. Een nieuw spelelement dat extra spanning en plezier toevoegt aan het bestaande spel. Ben jij de beste van jouw flight? Zet tegoed in en win mooie prijzen. Sla je de bal op de green? Altijd een prijs. Een hole-in-one? Dan win je een Rolex! Na elke deelname ontvang je een video van jouw slag, want een ace wil je natuurlijk wel op beeld hebben ;)

Name: Golf Performance Center Norrköping
Description:
Golf Performance Center Norrköping (GPCN) är ett initiativ för att skapa Östergötlands första helårsöppna premiumarena för golfträning, utveckling och utbildning.

Projektet drivs som en förstudie 2025–2026 och formas i samarbete med lokala golfklubbar, Norrköpings kommun, företagspartners och skolor (NIU Golf).

Visionen är tydlig:
Att ge regionens golfare, juniorer och elever en modern träningsmiljö året runt – med teknik, statistik, short game-zoner och loungeytor skapade för att behålla klubbhus känslan året om.

Kärnområden:
• Året-runt-träning
• Modern teknik (TopTracer + TrackMan studios)
• Short game och puttingområde
• Event, utbildningar och företagsaktiviteter
• Samarbeten med skola, klubb och näringsliv

Status:
Projektet befinner sig i aktiv förstudie med fokus på lokalisering, leverantörsofferter och dialog med nyckelaktörer.
Planerad öppning: hösten 2026.

Ya sea que esté buscando perfeccionar su swing, jugar en campos de renombre mundial, realizar un evento privado o corporativo,  o simplemente disfrutar de una salida con amigos, nuestras instalaciones de última generación tienen todo lo que necesitas.

Name: Wyckoff Country Club
Description:
Located in Holyoke, Massachusetts, Wyckoff Country Club is a semi-private 18-hole golf course and community destination. Just minutes from major highways and neighboring cities, the club offers convenient access paired with a welcoming, local atmosphere.
Our operations span championship golf, year-round dining at Heritage Greens, and weddings and banquets. 

Memberships are designed to be inclusive and accessible, supporting golfers of all ages and skill levels while fostering long-standing traditions.

With ongoing investment in course improvements, facilities, and community partnerships, Wyckoff continues to grow as both a premier golf destination and a gathering place rooted in heritage, hospitality, and accessibility.

Name: Speed Coast Junior Golf Tour
Description:
The Mission of the Speed Coast Jr Golf Tour is to provide opportunities for jr golfers in the greater Daytona Beach area to develop and showcase their golfing talent.  

The Speed Coast Jr Golf Tour will host over 20 events in 2023 in 3 seperate series throughout the year.  Each series will crown a top boy and top girl from each division who will be awarded a golf scholarship from the Daytona Beach Junior Golf Association.  

Jr Golfer ages 9-18 can sign up for membership, which will give them access to the entire schedule for the calendar year.  

The Season will consist of 1 and 2-day tournaments, with the 2-day events being ranked on Junior Golf Scoreboard.  This will help really talented golfers to get recognized by college recruiters.

Name: Holly Ridge Golf Club
Description:
A Family Friendly Golf Course

You'll love Holly Ridge, a classic New England, Par 54 golf course, designed by Geoffrey Cornish, nestled among the hollies and pines of Sandwich, Cape Cod, MA.

Holly Ridge Golf Club is a Golf Digest Best Places to Play Golf Course and Golf Range Association of America named us as one of the Top Short Courses in America and a Top 100 Practice Facility and Learning Center. Readers of Cape Cod Life Magazine have voted us Best Golf Course on the Upper Cape for several years!
This lovely Cape Cod golf course is appealing to golfers of all levels. It challenges the more advanced player and relaxes the new golfer. With eighteen unique holes over 3000 yards, you'll play more golf in less time.

In addition to our golf course and practice facility, we offer award-winning golf instruction, custom club fitting, women's, men's, and junior leagues, a well-stocked pro shop, and a full-service restaurant and bar. Holly Ridge is a wonderful setting for parties, golf outings, charity events and more. Our friendly and knowledgeable staff is here to help you enjoy an Exceptional Holly Ridge Experience.

Name: Highland Meadows Golf Course
Description:
Highland Meadows Golf Course is Northern Colorado’s premier public destination for golf, community, and hospitality. Nestled in Windsor, CO, our 18-hole championship course features pristine fairways, scenic views, and a challenging layout.

Beyond the course, we feature a fully stocked golf shop, expansive practice facilities, and food & beverage amenities. Highland Meadows is also a hub for community connection—hosting tournaments, corporate outings, fundraisers, and private events throughout the year.

Our mission is simple: to provide an exceptional golf and guest experience, while fostering connections both on and off the course!

Name: Capel Golf Club

Name: Bearna Golf Club
Description: Bearna Golf Club is a Golf Course  located at  Corboley, Barna, Co. Galway, Ireland.

Name: Golden Eagle Golf Club - Minnesota
Description:
Located in Fifty Lakes near Brainerd, Minnesota, Golden Eagle Golf Club is an 18-hole Championship style golf course that offers best in class golf and hospitality.

Golden Eagle Golf Club is an 18-hole Championship style golf course situated on 210 acres of a former private preserve, Golden Eagle offers spectacular views from its many elevated tees. 

Designed in harmony with its majestic north woods surroundings, the forests, wetlands, and dramatic elevation changes all help make Golden Eagle a truly golden golf experience. 

Reflecting the belief that championship courses are not built just for professionals, Golden Eagle offers an impressive variety of play for all skill levels. What can be a serious challenge from the back tees can become fun and friendly from the regular and forward tees. 

A driving range and large practice putting green with a green side bunker are available to sharpen your game. The beautiful clubhouse includes a pro shop as well as a bar and grill for casual dining. Take a few minutes to enjoy the great views of the golf course and Eagle Lake from the spacious deck.

Name: Zoo Golf
Description: Zoo Golf is the wild side game that adds a new level of fun to your golf round. If your shot matches any one of the ACTIONS found on the back of a TOKEN, you now hold that TOKEN in your possession until the next person completes that ACTION. At the end of the round, whoever has the most amount of TOKENS in their possession loses Zoo Golf. The punishment for losing is up to you to decide!

Name: Ace Attack Golf Club

Name: Woodbridge Golf Club
Description:
Welcome to Woodbridge Golf Club
Established in 1893 | Suffolk, UK

Set in the heart of Suffolk’s classic heathland, Woodbridge Golf Club offers two exceptional courses — an 18-hole championship course and a charming 9-hole course — both surrounded by breathtaking natural beauty.

Thanks to our quick-draining terrain, we provide outstanding playing conditions all year round, making Woodbridge the perfect destination for golfers of all levels to enjoy the game at their leisure.

Name: Faldo Enterprises
Description: Faldo Enterprises is a company based out of the United States with a global presence in the golf and entertainment world.  Companies within are Faldo Design, Faldo Series, and Faldo Farm.

Name: Golf de Domont-Montmorency
Description:
Situé en pleine nature dans la forêt de Montmorency, à 30 minutes de Paris, le golf de Domont-Montmorency offre sur 70 hectares un cadre sportif et de détente exceptionnel. Le parcours dessiné il y a plus de 50 ans, par Fred HAWTREE célèbre architecte écossais, a su évoluer tout en conservant le caractère naturel du site.
 

Le parcours de 18 trous joue avec le massif forestier dans un écrin de verdure vallonné autour de deux lacs qui lui donnent, en temps normal, toute l’eau nécessaire à son entretien. Notre équipe de jardiniers, respectueuse de l’environnement et de la biodiversité, travaille au quotidien pour l’amélioration du parcours pour permettre aux joueurs de pratiquer leur sport dans des conditions optimales.

Vous trouverez :

- Un practice éclairé de 23 postes couverts et une vaste aire d’entrainement reproduisant toutes les situations d’approche.
- Des professeurs diplômés pour vous initier ou vous perfectionner et un centre de fitting.
- Un club junior et une école de golf pour vos enfants, une piscine pour votre agrément l’été.
- Un restaurant de qualité et une vaste terrasse pour profiter des journées ensoleillées.

Name: Club Eden

At Club Eden, every stay is a harmonious blend of relaxation and adventure. Whether you’re unwinding in our peaceful surroundings or enjoying our lively amenities, every aspect is crafted to make your experience feel like a paradise. Join us at Club Eden, where your getaway becomes an unforgettable journey. Your ideal retreat starts here.

Name: Businessclub Golfparc Sandur
Description:
Ons zakelijk netwerk is een toegankelijke plek waar ondernemers, professionals en bedrijven elkaar ontmoeten in een ontspannen omgeving. Wij geloven dat de beste zakelijke contacten ontstaan wanneer er ruimte is voor plezier, verbinding en goede gesprekken in een informele setting.

Onze gewaardeerde 9-holes golfbaan vormt het hart van onze ontmoetingen: een groene omgeving waar sportiviteit, ontspanning en netwerken hand in hand gaan.

Of je nu bestaande relaties wilt versterken of nieuwe kansen wilt ontdekken — bij ons draait het om het opbouwen van waardevolle netwerken tijdens inspirerende en gezellige bijeenkomsten op en rond de golfbaan.

 Meer weten of aansluiten?
Neem gerust contact op via:
businessclub.vereniging@golfparcsandur.nl of neem een kijken op https://www.golfparcsandur.nl/golfparc-sandur/bedrijven-sponsoren/

Description:
Two Outstanding Venues. One Unrivaled Experience.
The Via Miner Golf & City Club is among the most iconic private club experiences ever introduced into Florida. The manicured greens and striking foliage of the Golf Club provides the perfect private respite for the golf aficionado while the City Club will boast a refined city experience with members-only five-star restaurants, a downtown athletic club, private access to the coveted Mandarin Oriental Spa, and roof top pools overlooking stunning coastal views.

Name: Always Golf Club
Description: Always Golf Club (AGC) is an indoor golf simulator training and entertainment facility with full-service bar in Westlake, Ohio. Launched in January 2025, we are open to the public and provide golf lessons, host leagues, events, & tournaments, and plenty more! Whether you're looking for a driving range session or want to try out a real course like Augusta or Pebble Beach, AGC is your place to be!

Description: The Osiris Country Club is nestled against the Catskill Mountains in the beautiful and historic Hudson Valley area of New York. Less than 90 minutes from New York City, the rural nature of the community is evident from the mountain and valley views around the course.

Name: VueMyGolf
Description: AtVueMyGolf,we are Golf Course Visualization Expert, specialize in transforming conceptual designs and existing landscapes into compelling, immersive experiences. Our expertise encompasses a comprehensive suite of services, including detailed Golf Course 3D Modeling, impactful Golf Course Graphics, dynamic Golf 3D Flyovers, and a range of other golf course visualization solutions in various style formats. We leverage cutting-edge technology and a deep understanding of golf course architecture to create realistic, engaging visuals that enhance marketing, planning, and player experience.

Name: Henry Brunton Golf
Description: Henry Brunton Golf is a world leader in coaching and long-term athlete development in the sport of golf.  We operate full-service golf academies offering best-in-class programs and services for golfers of all ages and all levels of experience in three locations– in Toronto, Ontario, at Eagles Nest Golf Club; in Southern California, at Strawberry Farms Golf Club in Irvine, CA and Orlando, FL at Royal St. Cloud.

Name: Pinegrove Country Club
Description: Le Club de golf Pinegrove est reconnu par les professionnels et les amateurs comme l'un des plus beaux parcours et défis de golf au Québec.

Name: Simon Buckley Golf Coaching
Description:
I am a qualified PGA (AA/T) Professional and level 3 coach with over 40 years coaching experience. I have taught all abilities from beginner to professional and am fully versed in biomechanics, sports psychology and swing mechanics. For a number of years I have been using new video technologies to enhance my coaching. 



I started my career as a trainee assistant at Worthing Golf Club. On qualifying as a PGA professional I moved to Ham Manor Golf Club as senior assistant before becoming head professional, a role which I retained for thirty three years and was honoured to be captain of the Sussex Professional Golfers Association in 1996.



During my career I have played in many tournaments and have won a number of Pro-Ams. I was twice a member of the victorious TGI golf team in the Ashworth Cup at Celtic Manor and The K Club. I also hold two course records, one in the UK and one in the USA. To this day I am still as keen as ever to maintain a high standard of golf as I believe it an essential requirement for great coaching as I learn from my experiences.

Name: Par4 The Course
Description:
Par 4 The Course is a community for golfers which offers membership access to golf experiences & promotions PLUS a chance every month to win a fourball with 3 of your golfing buddies at one of Irelands top courses.
  
Par 4 The Course was established by four enthusiastic (but very average!) golfers following a conversation while playing a fourball at one of the top courses in Ireland. A discussion started about how every golfer should get the chance to play the top courses but most never do because let’s face it for many, cost is a factor.

The conversation developed to combining promotions on green fees, golf accessories and other golf experiences with the opportunity for golfers to play some of the best courses in Ireland using a free monthly members only draw and so, Par 4 The Course became a reality.

At Par 4 The Course we are building an exclusive community of Irish golfers that offers member only access to great golf experiences and promotions PLUS a guaranteed chance each month to win a fourball for you and three of your golfing buddies at one of the top courses in Ireland.

We invite you to join our community and come on the journey with us.

Name: Jondosport USA LLC
Description:
At Jondosport USA, our mission is to become a household name brand in the golfing market in the USA. We are driven by the core purpose of giving every golfer in the USA the chance to perform better while taking care of their eyes and protecting them from the harmful effects of the sun.

Our vision is to create a significant impact in the golfing community, providing golfers with
specialized sunglasses that enhance their visual performance and promote eye health. We aim to be recognized as the go-to brand for golfers seeking top-quality eyewear that not only offers exceptional clarity and UV protection but also enhances their overall performance on the green.

One of our long-term goals is to establish a strong presence and a large footprint in the USA. We strive to expand our reach and create widespread awareness among golfers about the importance of eye protection and visual enhancement on the golf course. By educating golfers about the significance of proper eyewear, we aim to bridge the gap in their knowledge and contribute to their overall well-being.

Through our specialized sunglasses and extensive presence in the US market, we intend to fulfill the unmet needs of golfers. Golfers often underestimate the importance of eye health and the impact it can have on their game. By offering a wide range of high-quality sunglasses specifically designed for golfers, we aim to educate golfers about the benefits of proper eye protection and visual clarity.

Name: Golfcentrum Doetinchem
Description:
Golfschool 
Vanaf 1 april 2025 zijn Bianca Dekker en Theo Kulsdom van start gegaan om driving range te runnen en Golfschool Bianca Dekker op te zetten op het golfcentrum Doetinchem. 

Golf en beter leren golfen!
Pitch&Putt Golf Doetinchem beschikt over een 9-holes par-3 qualifying golfbaan (D-status) gecombineerd met een 18-holes pitch-en-putt golfbaan. Ook is er een driving range met totaal 20 afslagplaatsen (8 overdekte, 3 op de grastee en 3 als pitch area), waar men lessen kan nemen om golf te leren of beter te worden.

Lesagenda golfschool (hyperlink -https://golfschoolbiancadekker.proagenda.com/#agenda )

Bedrijfsuitjes
Ook ideaal voor bedrijfsuitjes (arrangement van vergaderruimte in combinatie met een golfclinic en Woodies! eten en drinken). https://pitch-putt-doetinchem.nl/golfschool/

De golfschool staat voor plezier in het spel! 


Team 
Bianca Dekker, PGA B golfprofessional
“Mijn passie voor de sport en ervaring als 7-voudig Nederlands Kampioene deel ik graag. Met hierbij de focus op wat goed gaat en wat beter kan. Het laten zien van verschillende mogelijkheden en simpel maken, zodat het meeste plezier aan het spel beleeft kan worden.”

Theo Kulsdom, 20 jaar ervaring als Certified Golf Teaching Pro
Sinds 2006 mag ik mensen enthousiast maken door middel van individuele lessen, clinics, cursussen en trainingen. Mijn uitdaging is om van iedereen een betere speler te maken. 

Golfschool biedt lessen en trainingen voor leden en niet-leden. Naast individuele lessen ook iedere zondag 11-12 uur jeugdtrainingen, Golf voor Gehandicapten op vrijdagen 14-15 uur en via clinics van 1,5 of 2,5 uur kennismaking met de golfsport!

Meer weten? Stuur dan een bericht naar Bianca Dekker via b.dekk8@gmail.com of app via 06-24150702.

Our events range from 18-hole and 9-hole outings to themed events, match play, stroke play, skins games, scrambles, best ball, and shamble formats. We're always mixing it up to keep the game fresh and fun, and we constantly educate our members on new golf formats and skills.

Name: Fraserburgh Golf Club
Description:
Take a brief drive from Aberdeen along the North East Aberdeenshire coast in Scotland and you will find a totally unspoiled,  traditional links layout. If you are looking for a genuine slice of real Scottish golf history in an informal relaxed, welcoming setting at very reasonable green fee then look no further.

Established in 1777, Come enjoy the 7th Oldest Golf Club in the World, 5th Oldest in Scotland & The Oldest in the world operating under its original name. Choose from one of our two excellent courses. The Stunning and Historical James Braid inspired 18 hole CorbieHill Championship links, one of the finest links courses in the whole of Scotland, Wonderful views and some truly spectacular holes makes Corbiehill a true links adventure.

This is where the Moray Firth and the North Sea converge, creating a unique microclimate where Mother Nature becomes even more cantankerous than usual. Be prepared for an invigorating ride around Fraserburgh’s substantial sand dunes, Wildly undulating fairways, sand hills, unpredictable winds, wonderful views and vistas and some truly spectacular holes makes Fraserburgh a true links adventure from start to finish.

We also have Corbiehill’s little sister the Rosehill 9 hole layout which was commissioned in 1996 after the purchase of Additional land. Although not as taxing as Corbiehill it provides a good test of golf on its own merits or a nice warmup for the main event. Catering is provided within the Clubhouse and we will do our best to cater to all requirements.

Once a private club, Ballamor retains much of that feel today to the delight of daily fee golfers looking to experience golf at its finest.

Name: Eaglequest Grandview
Description: Eaglequest Golf (EQ) was purchased by Nawaz Hirji in 2003, a wonderful man who loves golf, loves people and loves business. As a 100% privately-owned Canadian company, EQ believes that golf brings together people of all ages, all races and all walks of life to enjoy the perfect game. More importantly, EQ provides a NEW way to experience the game… that focuses on fun, fast and family! Nawaz always says, “Golfers today want to come to the course for fun rather than for the kind of serious game the generation before them preferred. We have to change our attitude and our amenities if we want to attract them. Our Number One goal is to make our customers happy and satisfied. So long as we make that our guiding principal, Eaglequest will continue to thrive and grow.”

Name: Foreplay Golf Company
Description:
Back in 2016 when we incorporated this business, we had one goal: provide golf fans with the best golf experiences in the industry. No dress code, long waits or disappointing conditions. Just friends, family and the game you love. Fast forward several years and obstacles later and we are finally ready to deliver this experience to golfers of all abilities! 
 
Foreplay Golf is the ultimate golf experience. Our mission is to revitalize the sport of golf and strengthen friendship and family bonds by providing a premium golf experience for all skill levels. We are dedicated to bringing an experience unlike any other before, during, and after golf.

By incorporating time-tested methodologies and a standard of excellence second to none, the Foreplay Golf Company brand will disrupt an antiquated golf industry that generally ignores the common man/woman. Join us on our quest to build The People's Golf Brand!

Description:
Walla Walla Country Club, founded in 1923 and designed by a local banker, W.W. Baker in 1923 then redesigned by world famous golf course architect A.W. Tillinghast in 1936.  The overall length of the course looks as it should lend itself to low scores, but the trees, rough and smallish greens more than make up for the short length. Sitting nestled at the base of the Blue Mountains in Eastern Washington, the Walla Walla Country Club is "The Best Kept Secret in the State"!



One must find, make or take time to get away from the daily chores.  The Walla Walla Country Club offers you a relaxed atmosphere to do just that. Enjoy a day of golf or a tennis match.  Relax by the pool or experience some of Walla Walla's finest dining.

Whether you're looking to improve your skills or just enjoy the game, we provide the perfect space to practice, learn, and play.

Name: SwingLab
Description: Chez SwingLab, nous sommes obsédés par le golf, mais plus que tout, nous sommes déterminés à révolutionner votre expérience golfique. Notre laboratoire du swing est un lieu où l'innovation rencontre la passion pour créer une expérience de golf inégalée. Nous combinons la technologie de pointe, les leçons de pros, les compétitions amusantes et une ambiance conviviale pour offrir à tous, des débutants aux experts, la chance de s'améliorer, de se divertir et de vivre le golf d'une manière totalement nouvelle. Bienvenue dans l'avenir du golf. Bienvenue chez SwingLab.  #SwingLab #Golf #GolfIndoor #Innovation #GolfExperience

Name: Golf Kelowna
Description:
Golf Kelowna is a collection of 15 distinctly different, yet equally inspiring golf layouts defined by nature. An early spring, long summer days and semi-desert climate combine for extraordinary golfing conditions. Golf is as much a part of the character of Kelowna as the lake and vineyards. From towering pines and rolling fairways to lake views or golf amongst the vines, the choice is yours.

Your best golf memories start with a call to our Kelowna Golf Travel Specialists. We’ve played all of our 200+ fairways and greens and will use that expertise to customize an unforgettable golf trip.

Whether you are planning a golf weekend or a week-long golf adventure Kelowna is the ‘must play’ destination on every golf enthusiast’s list.

Individual golfers and group trip organizers save time and money by contacting Golf Kelowna. Let our golf group specialists do all of the work for you and make your golf travel EASY.

By booking with Golf Kelowna you gain the local knowledge and fantastic relationships that we have with each golf course and hotel property. At the same time you can rest assured that you are getting the best possible rates.

Name: Viridia - Greenkeeping Specialist
Description:
Azienda italiana leader nella manutenzione del verde sportivo nei settori Golf e Calcio.
I nostri campi da golf, da calcio e i prati sportivi sono curati nei minimi dettagli per garantire prestazioni ottimali. La nostra consulenza agronomica garantisce che ogni campo sia trattato con i migliori metodi e prodotti. 

Dall'analisi del terreno alla scelta dei fertilizzanti, ogni dettaglio è studiato per ottenere il massimo rendimento. Viridia utilizza tecnologie avanzate e macchinari all'avanguardia per la cura e la manutenzione del verde naturale e sintetico.
Assicuriamo che ogni superficie sia sempre in condizioni perfette. 

Oltre alla manutenzione ordinaria, Viridia si occupa di interventi straordinari: dalla posa di tappeti erbosi alla costruzione di sistemi di irrigazione efficienti, tutto per garantire la sostenibilità e l'efficienza del vostro campo.  Il tuo partner di fiducia per la manutenzione del verde sportivo. 

I nostri servizi:
- GESTIONE DEL VERDE NEI CAMPI DA GOLF E CAMPI DA CALCIO
- PROGETTAZIONE E INTERVENTI STRAORDINARI - VERDE SPORTIVO
- APP, TECNOLOGIE 4.0 E AGGIORNAMENTO TECNOLOGICO PARCO MACCHINE

Viridia si distingue per la sua gestione interna completa di tutti i servizi, un aspetto che la rende unica nel settore. 

A differenza di altre realtà abbiamo investito nella capacità di internalizzare l'intero processo, per offrire un servizio integrato e personalizzato. 

Abbiamo scelto di mettere a disposizione dei clienti un team di esperti agronomi che valutano le esigenze specifiche di ogni situazione, insieme a un ampio parco macchine, così da eliminare la necessità di affittare o cercare attrezzature esterne. 

Ogni cantiere è gestito da una squadra dedicata, guidata da un greenkeeper, per consentirci di fornire una gamma completa di servizi, dalla fornitura di materiali e fertilizzanti alla manutenzione ordinaria e straordinaria.

Description:

Ob sportlich anspruchsvolles Golfspiel, perfekte Trainingsbedingungen oder ein entspanntes Natur- und Landschaftserlebnis. Auf der "Zollmühle" werden Sie fündig. Description: At Salishan Golf Links, golf means so much more than 18 holes. It’s an experience to be savored and remembered. With old-growth timber or seaside bluffs at every turn, each hole provides a spectacular backdrop and a unique challenge. The golf course reopened in June, 2004 after a multimillion-dollar restoration overseen by Oregon golf legend and PGA Tour Pro Peter Jacobsen and his design firm, Jacobsen-Hardy Golf Design. The restoration preserves the layout and the spirit of Salishan’s fabled links while enhancing playability and opening the golf course to captivating ocean views.

Name: Maryland National Golf Club
Description:
Nestled in the beautiful rolling hills of central Maryland with views of the Catoctin Mountains, Maryland National Golf Club’s picturesque 18-hole, par 71 layout provides an unforgettable golfing experience. Designed by world-renowned architect Arthur Hills, Maryland National takes full advantage of the dramatic terrain changes and wetlands surrounding the course. From long, rolling fairways to magnificent holes carved out of natural wooded lowlands and various water hazards, each hole of this 6811- yard layout provides a unique challenge sure to inspire any golfer. Just play one round at Maryland National – and we guarantee the memories will bring you back time and time again.

Our unique clubhouse is the ideal place to relax with your friends after your round. Situated on one of the highest points on the property overlooking the 18th hole and providing beautiful views of nearly every corner of the course, our elegant clubhouse will be the perfect conclusion to a first-class golf experience. Club amenities include a full-service golf shop, tavern, corporate meeting spaces and locker rooms.

This truly magnificent Tom Fazio golf course community embodies country club living at its best; from the Tom Fazio-designed, 18-hole golf course and championship-quality tennis courts to the luxurious fitness center and clubhouse facilities.

Enjoy lounging by the pool and superb dining at the club located within Amelia National’s guard-gated access. Amelia National Golf and Country Club is situated in Fernandina Beach, which is often termed the gateway to the enchantingly quaint Amelia Island.

The entire experience of Amelia National is geared to those well acquainted with the world’s finest private country club destinations in Florida. A charming, French provincial clubhouse will welcome you with a relaxing atmosphere of quality and elegance. Name: Viveiro Golf
Description:
Viveiro Golf is the first grass golf course in the entire archipelago that allows golf lovers to find the ideal place to face new challenges with friends and with the course, in a new golf destination: Sal Island Cape Verde.

The course, par 72, is built with the utmost respect for nature and was therefore designed with attention to the environment.

Equipped with Putting-green and Pitching-green as well as the Driving Range to allow the most passionate golfers to practice and train.

The wide fairways also include large, easily playable desert areas. Everything is positioned so that the game becomes fun and challenging, also given the breeze that is often present.
The wonderful greens test the ability to get into the hole through the challenges of the various slopes.

The particular environmental conditions allowed us to create the grass course on an area of 60 hectares where the 18 holes extend over the area which has as its particular characteristic a constant view, and from every angle, of the Atlantic Ocean.
The climate, constant throughout the year, allows visitors to choose the period for their holiday on the island of Sal at any time of the year, in fact the temperatures are from a minimum of 21° to a maximum of 32° for all 365 days of the year.
Furthermore, the geographical area is free from endemic African diseases, this allows you not to have to carry out any preventive prophylaxis.

Viveiro Golf is equipped with a Club House which allows players to find a refreshment area that is always available, as well as the possibility of renting equipment such as: bags, carts and trolleys so as to make our guests' journey "light".
We also have Caddies available to accompany you on the pitch, so as to satisfy the most demanding players who want to fully enjoy the beauty of the game.

There is also a Pro-Shop equipped with every element offering a wide range of golf-related equipment, clothing and accessories.
Location: Santa Maria - Ihla do Sal, Cape Verde

Name: Somabay Golf Academy
Description:
Based at the Somabay Resort on the Red Sea coastline of Egypt, a collaboration between Tim Lobb (Lobb & Partners) and James Edwards (EDI) with support from Stuart Gillett (LGA) has resulted in one of the finest practice facilities any golf destination has to offer.  Designed specifically for dedicated practice by individuals or groups, elite or beginner, this facility has everything a golfer would want.  

The growth of golf pro's taking clients for warm weather coaching trips has grown over recent years and the design concept focused on providing the very best facility for these coaching trips.  

The facility includes a 300 metre double ended range with grass teeing areas at both ends, a 5,000 sqm short game area with 27 zones that provide options for every shot imaginable, a 9 hole par 3 course designed with approach play in mind and two putting zones.  This coupled with the Gary Player championship and a second 18 course under construction will see Somabay emerge as a leading golf destination in the years to come.

Our club offers members a prestigious golfing experience and vibrant community, while welcoming visitors from around the world to experience golf history firsthand. Whether you’re a seasoned golfer, passionate about golf architecture, or simply seeking an exceptional golfing experience.

Name: The Club at P.B. Dye
Description:
It’s about you, pure and simple. Your enjoyment, relaxation and escape for the day while playing the greatest game on earth.

We understand this, and we deliver at The Club at P.B. Dye. Our guests enjoy a championship golf course set on 250 beautiful acres, combined with a welcoming atmosphere and great food and drink to help you relax and leave the cares of the world behind.

“Be prepared to use every club in your bag,” said the world-famous architect P.B. Dye after finishing one of Maryland’s finest golf courses. A course so good that P.B. decided to put his name on his masterpiece. Along with every club in the bag, you’ll need to play virtually every shot in the book. It’s vintage P.B. Dye, with a flair for the extravagant. No matter how many times you play our course, it’ll continually reward you with fun, challenging golf.

The Club at P.B. Dye has been selected by Golf Digest as one of the toughest courses in America. Our course is also among the 15 best courses in Maryland. With Sugarloaf Mountain looming as its backdrop, our beautifully crafted and meticulously manicured golf course will capture both your imagination and your competitive spirit.

We also specialize in hosting memorable golf outings, events, weddings, celebrations, and meetings for corporate, non-profit and private clients. With our gracious service, championship course, elegant Clubhouse, gourmet cuisine, and dramatic views, The Club at P.B. Dye is the perfect place to enjoy a round golf or host a very special event.

Please be our guest. We look forward to serving you soon

Name: Pacific Pines Golf & Social Club
Description:
Welcome to Pacific Pines Golf and Social Club, a private, members-only club designed for golf enthusiasts seeking state-of-the-art simulators in a luxurious environment. Whether you’re looking to refine your skills, connect with fellow players, or compete in friendly challenges, Pacific Pines offers an unmatched golfing experience tailored to your passion.

Our club offers 24/7 access and unlimited tee times, allowing you to play on your schedule, day or night. Membership also includes participation in engaging leagues and exciting tournaments, fostering camaraderie and friendly competition among fellow members.

At the heart of our club are the GOLFZON TwoVision simulators, featuring cutting-edge technology that delivers ultra-realistic gameplay. With a moving floor to replicate course conditions and five distinct hitting surfaces—fairway, light rough, heavy rough, fairway bunker, and greenside bunker—these simulators offer an indoor golfing experience that feels just like the real thing.

Pacific Pines is more than just a golf simulator facility—it’s a luxury club where members can enjoy the game they love in a sophisticated, welcoming atmosphere. Whether you’re playing solo, challenging friends, or exploring iconic courses from around the globe, every visit is designed to elevate your game and provide an unforgettable experience.

At Pacific Pines, we believe golf is more than a sport—it’s an opportunity to challenge yourself, connect with others, and enjoy an exceptional environment tailored to players like you.

Name: Blogger Classics
Description:
Die Blogger Classics 2023 sind bereit, die Vorurteile im Golf aufzubrechen und eine frische, dynamische Perspektive auf das Spiel zu werfen. Dieses Turnier, organisiert von Caroline Gherega, einer ehemaligen Leistungssportlerin im Tennis, hat eine einzigartige Entstehungsgeschichte. Caroline, die erst seit 2020 Golf spielt, hat ihren sportlichen Ehrgeiz und ihre Leidenschaft in diese neue Disziplin eingebracht.

Als die Corona-Pandemie die Welt zum Stillstand brachte, fand sie eine neue Möglichkeit, sich mit dem Sport zu beschäftigen. Sie startete einen Golfblog, um ihre Erfahrungen zu teilen und ihre Liebe zum Golf mit anderen zu teilen. Die Aufmerksamkeit wuchs, und in einem Instagram Live wurde sie gefragt, ob sie schon einmal an einem Instagram Turnier teilgenommen hat.

Diese Idee gefiel ihr, und sie machte sich daran, das Konzept in die Realität umzusetzen. So wurden die Blogger Classics geboren. Nach dem Event wuchs die Bekanntheit der Blogger Classics enorm. Sie erhielten öffentliche Anerkennung durch regionale Zeitungen und den Bayerischen Golfverband, was den Ruf nach einem weiteren Turnier nur noch lauter werden ließ.
Die Blogger Classics haben sich von Anfang an als Event positioniert, das über das Golfspiel hinausgeht und wichtige gesellschaftliche Themen aufgreift. So standen die Blogger Classics 2022 unter dem Zeichen der Pride Flagge, um die Botschaft der Akzeptanz und Inklusion zu verbreiten - wir akzeptieren jeden so, wie er ist, unabhängig von Religion, Geschlecht oder sexueller Orientierung.

In diesem Jahr haben die Blogger Classics 2023 sich dazu entschieden, die Rosa Schleife, ein weltweit anerkanntes Symbol für Brustkrebs, zu tragen. Unser Ziel ist es, die Sensibilität für Brustkrebs zu stärken und zu zeigen, dass Golf mehr ist als nur ein Spiel - es ist eine Gemeinschaft, die sich für wichtige Themen einsetzt.

Name: BUSHWOOD SIMS
Description:
At Bushwood Sims, modern simulator technology meets the comradery of sport, and it’s found in the most unsuspecting of places (like W Scottsdale’s pool house on the wet deck).

To be frank, we are activating space in luxury hotels that would otherwise be unoccupied. And that’s not even the best news.

A Bushwood Sims enclosure can be set up and broken down in less than 24 hours. It requires zero drilling, nailing, staking, or hard labor of any kind. It’s in and out in full ghost mode.

So whether it’s out on a tennis court for a simulator spring-time tee time in the winter or it’s in a banquet room that’s not actively booked, your space now has something sparkly to dazzle & entertain your guests. A Bushwood Sim is designed to elevate any space where your guests may find interest in being transported with a luxury simulator experience for 90 minutes.

While rooted in the culture and community of golf, Bushwood Sims offers a variety of simulator experiences because we want your guests to have it all. This includes the most modern hunting simulator and VIVE/Steam virtual reality gaming experiences, all within the Bushwood Sims simulator.

Description:

TS-25 Insecticide/Fungicide is an efficient broad-spectrum insecticide kills and controls insects such as Bermuda Mites, Mole Crickets, Grubs, Army Worms, Billbugs, Mites, Fleas, Ants, Ticks, Annual BlueGrass Weevils, Nematodes, and more. It is classified   a 25(b) minimum risk insecticide/pesticide exempt from EPA registration. This product is registered with Florida Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services, Bureau of Pesticides. 

TurfSolv Insecticide/Fungicide/Biostimulant has all the same abilities of TS-25 with ingredients generally considered effective to promote plant and root growth. It is the only product available that emulsifies a FIFRA 25(b) insecticide/fungicide formulation into a biostimulant plant growth technology creating a unique one solution that kills insects, disease and fungi while promoting plant growth and health at the same time.     
      
NutriTurf Liquid Growth Accelerator is proprietary concentrated blend of biobased substances and compounds formulated to accelerate grass and root growth. Ingredients include methylene urea, seaweed, phosphorous, potassium, potash, fulvic acid, humic acid, amino acids, nonionic surfactants, and micro and macro nutrients. Must be used in conjunction with TurfSolv.
            
TurfSolv is non-toxic and biodegradable making it the superior product for the turf industry to keep adults, children, pets and wildlife FREE from harm! You can spray and play immediately! Perfect for Golf Courses, Homeowners, turf farms, athletic complexes, schools, resorts, country clubs and more!

Name: Better Billy Bunker
Description:
It was during Billy Fuller’s tenure at Augusta National Golf Club as golf course superintendent from 1981 – 1986 that he developed what has become affectionately known as “Billy Bunkers,” a specification for constructing golf course sand bunkers.  Originally known as the Enhanced Bunker Drainage Method, the primary purpose behind this spec was to minimize sand erosion and sand contamination from native soils during heavy rainstorms.  In 1994, Fuller introduced the Billy Bunker spec to the golf construction industry featuring a two-inch gravel layer applied over the bunker floor and a herringbone tile system capped with a geo-textile liner.  The gravel serves as a conduit for water to transfer down the bunker floor slopes into the tile pipe system, thus greatly reducing and/or eliminating sand movement.  The liner secures the gravel blanket and prevents native soils underneath from contaminating the preferred bunker sand that was installed on top of the liner.  The method proved effective, consistently reducing the manpower required to maintain bunkers by up to 80% following rainstorms.

With Billy's collaboration, Jerry Lemons, ASGCA, developed and patented the “Better Billy Bunker” specifications, replacing the liner with a manufactured binder to hold the gravel blanket in place, altogether eliminating the need for liners, which often created challenges when snagged and became exposed. After much study and testing, the Better Billy Bunker Method demonstrated even greater efficacy, allowing water to pass through the stone at more than 1,500+ inches per hour, while being affordable, easy to install, durable and long lasting. Today, the Better Billy Bunker Method is a patented and installed across over 75,000,000 square feet of bunkers at 2,000+ courses throughout the world, including dozens of major championship venues. While these courses are located in varying climate conditions, one factor remains the same; excellent playing bunkers.

Members and guests enjoy a full social calendar throughout the year and we welcome you to entertain family and friends whether it’s for casual dining or social functions.

Name: Blankney Golf Club
Description: Nestled away within the scenic Blankney Estate, Blankney Golf Club is an 18-hole parkland golf course, seeped in history. Founded in 1904 by the 2nd Earl of Londesborough, the course is known for challenging and tricky greens.

Name: Rioja Alta Golf Club | Golf, Eventos Corporativos & Experiencias Exclusivas
Description:
Rioja Alta Golf Club es más que un campo de golf: es un destino donde confluyen naturaleza, deporte, gastronomía y negocios.

 Situado en Cirueña (La Rioja), en el corazón de una de las regiones vinícolas más prestigiosas del mundo, ofrecemos un entorno único para quienes buscan experiencias exclusivas tanto en el plano personal como profesional.

 ¿Qué ofrecemos?

Eventos corporativos, torneos privados y jornadas de networking.

Instalaciones premium: campo de 18 hoyos, restaurante, terraza panorámica y salón privado.

Actividades combinadas con enoturismo y visitas a bodegas cercanas.

Asesoría y acompañamiento en la organización de eventos a medida.

 Empresas de diferentes sectores ya confían en nosotros para sus eventos de incentivos, formación o relaciones públicas.

 Apostamos por la sostenibilidad, la calidad y la hospitalidad riojana en cada experiencia.

Golf, vino y negocios. Bienvenidos a Rioja Alta Golf Club.

 Contacto para empresas: eventos@riojaaltagolfclub.com

Name: Good Time Golf
Description: Nestled in Assembly Row, Good Time Golf is dedicated to making golf more inclusive and accessible by bringing the game to inner-city communities. Using innovative technology, resources, and community partnerships, we aim to create an environment where people of all ages and backgrounds can learn, play, and thrive year-round. Our mission is to promote diversity, wellness, and stronger communities through the love of golf.

Name: Golf Club Hammetweil
Description:
Der Golf Club Hammetweil zählt zu den führenden Golfanlagen Deutschlands. Der Golfclub ist sowohl als 5 Sterne-Golfanlage ausgezeichnet, als auch bereits mehrfach in Gold für seine Anstrengungen im Bereich Golf & Natur uund sogar vom Land Baden-Württemberg für seine Nachhaltigkeits-Bemühungen.

Die 18-Loch-Golfanlage mit seinem Par 72-Platz liegt in der Metropolregion Stuttgart - und zwar nur rund 15 Autominuten von Stuttgart, Reutlingen oder Tübingen entfernt. Die klassische Club-Anlage bietet Golfern mit seinen anspruchsvollen und abwechslungsreichen Par 4's große Abwechslung. Das dazugehörige Restaurant clubhouse H ist öffentlich auf freut sich auch über Gäste und Nicht-Golfer.

Name: The HUNO Company
Description:
The HUNO Company is a cross-functional organization dedicated to advancing the game of golf and its core values, driving impactful initiatives across the entire golf ecosystem, including:

• Huno High Performance Institute: Year and summer golf programs and campuses for national and international students and golf enthusiasts.
• Huno Golf premium circuits. 
• Huno Golf apparel and clothing line: Strategic partnerships with leading golf-equipment brands to ensure we provide top-quality products at highly competitive prices while also launched our own exclusive golf UPF clothing line. 
• Huno fitting center: Located within the prestigious Federación Madrileña de Golf complex at Parque Puerta de Hierro, we are proud to have established our dedicated fitting center, designed to optimize performance and tailor equipment to each player's unique needs.
• Huno Experiences: Tailored luxury golf getaways and events that redefine the art of travel, blending world-class courses with outstanding destinations and night-out top events.

Our high-performance programs are designed to replicate professional conditions and maximize player potential. We partner with top-tier professionals, including experts with experience in managing Olympic-level centers across Spain, to deliver a world-class training experience.

Our expert team tailors golf programs to each player's technical, physical, and psychological needs, while providing comprehensive support in sports medicine, nutrition, and equipment to ensure optimal preparation for improvement.

Name: Georgetown Country Club
Description:
Georgetown Country Club serves as a welcoming oasis that connects members through friendship, community, and recreational fun for memories that last a lifetime. GTCC features tennis & pickleball courts, a 9-hole golf course, a zero-depth entry pool with 8 lanes and 2 diving boards, an indoor clubhouse and pro shop. While our golf course is open for non-members to play, the majority of the club is accessible only to dues paying members. 
Our Vision: To be the favored recreational club in greater Ann Arbor that promotes lasting connections in a fun, relaxing, down-to-earth atmosphere.

Our Mission: To deliver the best member experience through quality services, clean, safe, and well-maintained facilities, memorable programs, and fiscal responsibility, as well as provide a place for advancement for our staff members.

Questions about membership or job postings? Contact our general manager at gm@georgetowncc.com.

Tillinghast-designed 18-hole golf course, elegant dining, and versatile event spaces. Established in 1896, WVCC combines classic charm with modern amenities, providing members and guests with an exceptional setting for golf, social gatherings, and professional networking in the heart of the Wyoming Valley.

Name: Starter Box Studios
Description:
We are StarterBox Studios, where innovation meets tradition on the golf course.  Born out of our passion for golf and fueled by our expertise as a 60-year, family-owned commercial print services provider, we embarked on our journey in October 2023.
At StarterBox Studios, we revolutionize the way golf courses approach scorecards.  Our vision extends beyond mere printing – we believe in creating a meaningful impact in communities through donations to local charitable organizations.  What sets us apart is our commitment to a competitive price point.
Our scorecard printing endeavors were once driven by external brokers.  Now, with a separate facility and with cutting-edge printing technology, we offer high-quality, direct-to-print services with very low minimum requirements.  Our state-of-the-art machinery ensures high-speed, high-volume production, making us your go-to choice for all printing needs.
Our capabilities extend beyond scorecards – we’re a comprehensive solution for all your starter box contents and more.  From yardage books to course signage, bag tags to customized ball markers, and everything in between such as: pin placement sheets, grill room placemats and menus, divot tools, tees, membership books, event printing / signage, pro shop signage, letterhead, business cards, etc., we’re your one-stop shop.  Complimentary custom design, a variety of sizes, paper options, and a range of finishes, including lamination, foil, embossing, and die-cutting, allow us to bring your brand to life.
Recognizing the challenges of storage and ordering, we offer a unique solution.  StarterBox Studios can produce and store your items until you’re ready, with a dedicated warehouse for drop shipping and quick turnaround fulfillment.  Our on-demand production ensures flexibility, aligning with your specific needs.
Join the StarterBox Studios family and embark on a journey of rebranding your course while positively impacting the community.

Name: The Pines Golf Course
Description: Tucked in the suburbs of Wyoming Michigan, the Pines Golf Course is one of Grand Rapids premier public golf clubs, offering 18 holes accommodating to every skill level. Built in 1967 and opened in 1968, The Pines provides a beautiful and unique West Michigan landscape that keeps our golfers coming back year after year. We pride ourselves for our excellent conditions and affordable prices. The Pines is the perfect venue for hosting outings of all sizes and skill levels. Our spacious driving range along with two practice greens allows the perfect atmosphere for practicing your game.

Through a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impacts sensors and advanced gaming software. Our dedicated kiosks combine virtual reality gaming, food and beverages, competitions, golf lessons, memberships and social events. All combining to provide visitors the ultimate golfing entertainment experience.

The relaxed, welcoming atmosphere makes it perfect for players of all ages, males or females. Fun for golfers of all levels regardless of your ability, X-Golf is ideal for work events, birthday parties, corporate functions and Bachelor and Bachelorette Parties.

Description: Marple Golf club is located in the picturesque town of Marple, and was established in 1892. The course is parkland set-up, with stunning views across Manchester, the skyline including Hilton Hotel can be seen from the 1st tee and the Clubhouse.

Name: Valley of the Eagles
Description:
The only Nicklaus Design daily-fee course in Northern Ohio, designed to fully capture the beauty of the Black River Valley lined with the massive sheer black shale cliffs, tranquil surroundings of the majestic trees, and breathtaking elevation changes. The course meanders through Black River Valley and along the Black River, with mature elm, oak and ash trees lining the fairways, and intriguingly positioned island tees to island greens.

From our Nicklaus Design golf course to our extensive clubhouse and superb dining at Black River Tavern, Valley of the Eagles is an unmatched setting for unforgettable golf and truly memorable tournaments, weddings, and special events.
