Name: Palm Springs Golf Reservations
Description:
Palm Springs Golf Reservations (PSGR) is the largest concierge and golf reservation companies located in the Coachella Valley. We have been booking tee times at golf courses, including many private clubs that we cannot advertise, since 1992. We are your local experts at helping golfers with their tee times, golf trips, tournaments, private club access, stay-and-play packages, hotel rooms, rental clubs, and caddies. We have booked more tee times than all other concierge/tee times services combined.

How It All Started
It all started back in 1992, when the founder of SDGR, Rick MacDonald, could not get a tee time at Torrey Pines for himself and his Navy friends. At that time, you had to call Torrey Pines at exactly 5 a.m., a week ahead of time, to get a tee time and they were all booked up in 15 minutes. He told his daughters that he would pay them $20 for a tee time if they would wake up at 5 a.m. and get him a foursome. Of course, they were persistent and ultimately successful. After a few weeks of this, his friends found out about it and started paying the girls for their services. MacDonald was quick to realize there was a business opportunity there & the rest is history.

Palm Springs Golf Reservations
In 2020, due to overwhelming requests from our golfers, SDGR expanded into the Palm Springs area. It has been a huge success with many golfers from Southern California, Northern California, Arizona, Texas, Illinois, & Canada wanting to experience a once-in-a-lifetime golf trip to the desert.  PSGR's access to private country clubs has given golfers the opportunity to play golf courses they have never experienced before.  Our new website, www.palmspringsgolfreservations.com has made it easy for golfers to determine which golf courses would be the best fit for them.  If you are looking for a golf vacation with great weather year round & amazing golf courses, let us help you plan it.

Gamla Banan är en klassiker bland svenska parkbanor med väl inbunkrade ondulerade greener och är ritad av arkitekterna Hawtree & Taylor.

År 1990 invigdes klubbens andra bana, Nya Banan, som ritades av Tommy Nordström. Nya Banan är en öppen, kuperad och omväxlande bana med park/hedkaraktär.

Båstad Golfklubb har idag 1 650 aktiva seniormedlemmar och cirka 400 juniorer. Vår strävan är att alla medlemmar och gäster ska känna sig hemma på anläggningen. Med en bra restaurang, välsorterad shop och fina träningsmöjligheter hoppas vi vara den perfekta platsen för en heldag med golf!

We strive to create a welcoming and inclusive environment that caters to golfers of all skill levels and backgrounds. Our facility offers a convenient and comfortable space for members to practice, improve their game, and enjoy the social aspects of golf year-round. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and creating a community of like-minded individuals who share a passion for the sport. At our indoor golf facility, we believe that golf is more than just a game, it's a lifestyle, and we are dedicated to helping our members experience it to the fullest.

Name: CHAPELCO RETREAT - Refugio Boutique en Chapelco Golf & Resort.
Description:
Viví tu pasión por el golf en un entorno único. Chapelco Retreat es un exclusivo departamento dentro del prestigioso Chapelco Golf & Resort. 

 Tu escenario de juego: campo de golf diseñado por Jack Nicklaus y vistas directas al hoyo 6 desde tu propio balcón.
 La experiencia: cada amanecer regala postales de la cordillera, y cada atardecer invita al relax absoluto.
 El confort: 2 habitaciones en suite, cocina integrada y completa, piscina climatizada in/out, sauna y gimnasio.
 La conexión: senderos para caminar rodeando el golf, acceso directo al río Quilquihué para pesca con mosca o contemplar la naturaleza.
 El lifestyle: club house frente al green y un hotel 5 donde disfrutar de experiencias gastronómicas de primer nivel.
 Ubicado a solo 15 min de San Martín de los Andes, 5 min del Aeropuerto de Chapelco y 40 min del Cerro Chapelco.
 Chapelco Retreat no es solo un alojamiento. Es el refugio perfecto para golfistas que entienden el juego como un estilo de vida.
Location: San martin de los Andes, Neuquén

Partners like Foresight Sports, Golfzon, TruGolf and SimHunt provide awesome technology to our clients, while we finish the space with a multitude of options from projectors, to finish panels.  Every space is customized with the help of the client, designers and architects and brought to life by us.

Name: SkiBum50plus Exclusive Club
Description: In February 2015, two Swedish skiers, Malin Carlsson and Filip Hedberg sat in the large dining room at Hotel Schönegg in a snowy Wengen, Switzerland. The experience of the fantastic skiing during the day, in harmony with the delicious champagne in the light of the fireplace in the dining room, gave not only a calm but also room for a creative mindset and slow living in a fantastic setting. This was the beginning of skibum50plus, now developed in to a non profit organization with the goal to increase health among mature and older people by getting them on snow and to continuing alpine skiing higher up in the age. Also to support young people’s interest for alpine skiing as a healthy activity with joy in the clubs filial Skiers Access.

Name: Lane Cove Golf Course
Description: Lane Cove Golf Course is an eleven hole public course located off River Rd Lane Cove. The course has 9 full fairways plus 2 alternate greens and approaches for variety. This challenging course (par 64 with a composite of par 3 and par 4 holes) is located on 15 hectares of undulating land along Gore Creek, a tributary creek of the Lane Cove River, about 1.2 km south from the Lane Cove Shopping Centre. Lane Cove Bushland Park lies on the eastern boundary of the course which provides the unique bushland character to the fairways and greens

Name: Geogolf Mapping
Description:
GeoGolf has been a trusted leader in golf course mapping and geospatial solutions for nearly 30 years. Founded in 1998 in Orlando, Florida—with offices across the Carolinas—we were the original mapping partner behind the PGA Tour’s ShotLink and TourCast programs.

With 500+ projects completed across six continents, we’re known for delivering industry-leading services in golf course mapping, 3D terrain modeling, irrigation and drainage mapping, site inventory, central control programming, and yardage solutions. From major renovations to full master planning, we provide the most comprehensive and cost-efficient mapping suite in the industry.

Presidio Women's Golf Club
The Presidio Women’s Golf Club is open to golfers of all levels so anyone can enjoy the game of golf in a fun and casual environment.

Name: Forewarned
Description:
Forewarned is a golf course system safety provider dedicated to protecting players from unnecessary risks and giving managers peace of mind that their players are protected. Whether it’s a blind shot to a fairway or lightning in the area, our systems provide real-time warnings to ensure members and guests can play safely with confidence. 

Our cutting-edge systems are designed specifically for golf courses, blending seamlessly into the course while delivering powerful functionality. By providing timely alerts, Forewarned not only enhances safety and reduces liability, but also helps improve the pace of play — without compromising the player experience.

Name: PB Virtual Golf
Description: PB Virtual Golf is the ultimate indoor golf sanctuary in Northern Palm Beach County, FL.  A luxurious and private space tailored for golf enthusiasts of all skill levels to practice, play, and excel.  Monthly memberships are available for best pricing and availability. Name: Midwest Golf Innovations
Description: Midwest Golf Innovations prides itself on providing the best in-home golf simulator experiences in the Midwest. We create custom, in-home, and top-of-the-line golf simulators that offer realistic vistas and professional-level insights to improve your golf game. Our partnerships with Foresight Sports, TruGolf, and Golfzon enable us to supply a wide range of golf simulators, each with high-tech features and benefits for you to enjoy. Whether you want a golf simulator that helps you practice or entertain family or friends, Midwest Golf Innovations will build the perfect custom simulator for you.

Name: Sjögärde Golfklubb
Description: Sjögärde är en öppen parkbana som ligger mellan Kungsbacka och Varberg. Banan är anpassad efter golfspelaren som söker utmaning, glädje och njutning av närheten till naturen. Parkbanan slingrar sig fram mellan naturliga vattenhinder, bunkrar och bautastenar. Strategi och valmöjligheter präglar golfrundan på Sjögärde. Välkommen!

Name: Rolling Hills Golf Club
Description: Rolling Hills Golf Club is a Public Golf Course including professional swing training & coaching in Lapeer, MI.

Name: Weybrook Park Golf Club
Description:
Founded in 1992 and moved to our present site in 1997, we pride ourselves on being a friendly and welcoming members' club. Situated on the Hampshire Downs, our new 9 holes, recently opened on 1st May 2021, complete our 27-hole golf course where stunning views can be seen for miles around. The rolling landscape, superb layout and naturally free-draining soil makes Weybrook Park one of the finest all-weather courses in the South of England. Our 27 holes will always be in play, with no temporary greens and no trolley bans, thanks to our chalk-based course providing all year-round golf on well-tended fairways and manicured greens.


Our friendly and welcoming clubhouse also offers all the necessary amenities including a 2nd floor bar and restaurant which is open to our members and the public alike. We have excellent practice facilities with a driving range, putting green, pitching area and greenside bunkers to help fine tune your game prior to your round.

Why not take a look around our website to discover all that Weybrook Park can offer?

Name: Woodmont Golf and Country Club
Description:
Woodmont Country Club is more than just a place to play golf. It's a destination where you can have fun, relax with a cocktail by the pool, and make new friends enjoying our monthly calendar events. Come take a look at our photo gallery for a peek behind the scenes of Woodmont Country Club, and read our reviews to discover why our guests love us. Become a member to unlock benefits like fitness center access, pool access, training facility access, and more.

Looking for somewhere to host a birthday, wedding, shower, or Bar/Bat Mitzvah? Consider Woodmont Country Club for any event. We offer catering in our beautiful event spaces for all your entertainment needs. Host your event here for a day or night your friends and loved ones won’t soon forget. Call us today to get started.

Name: Seneca Hickory Stick Golf Course
Description: Seneca Hickory Stick is a Public 18-hole course located in the heart of Western New York. Designed for golfers of all skill levels, we feature a full driving range, practice facilities, and a welcoming clubhouse with a bar and restaurant—perfect for relaxing after your round. Enjoy stunning views, well-maintained greens, and exceptional service every time you visit.

Name: GOLF DES POURSAUDES
Description:
Le golf des Poursaudes est un golf 18 trous - par 72 de 5879 mètres. 
Ouvert depuis 1982 à Villers-le-tilleul, 08 - Ardennes. Situé à 20 kilomètres de Charleville et Sedan, le golf des Poursaudes est un joli parcours en pleine nature ardennaise.

Boisé et très verdoyant, ce golf propose des pars 3 difficiles et des pars 5 ou la confiance sera votre pire ennemi.

Name: Brownson Country Club
Description:
Established in 1959 and located just off the picturesque village green in Huntington, Connecticut, Brownson Country club is one of the area's most challenging 18-Hole Championship Golf Courses, a family pool complex and a spacious clubhouse with multiple dining, bar, banquet or meeting venues.

The golf course, an original Albert Zikorus layout and redesigned by the award winning Cornish, Silva & Mungeam, plays to par 70 with a slope rating of 128 with water coming into play on eleven holes with well bunkered green complexes and rolling elevation changes tee to green. Fully staffed and stocked Pro Shop manages a diverse Golf and Tournament calendar which includes men's, lady's and couples leagues, a season long weekend tournament schedule and a comprehensive junior golf program.

Name: Appleton Indoor Golf
Description: We offer the nations largest TruGolf Indoor Golf simulator facilities allowing for 9 or 18 holes of golf. We also feature two full service bars with custom cocktails, wine, and a wide array of domestic/craft beer options. Appleton Indoor Golf offers indoor golf leagues throughout the winter! Grab a partner, jump in a league, and compete for prizes and glory! Lastly, we offer a full club repair shop. We are able to regrip, reshaft, custom fit, and sell custom clubs. We also have a loft/lie machine for a precision fit unlike any shop can provide in the Fox Valley. Rent us for your next round or large gathering! Pool and multiple darts boards available for play!

Name: Paired Golf
Description:
We’re not trying to reinvent golf.
We’re just trying to help you play more of it.

Whether you’re new in town, short a player, or tired of group chats that never lead to a tee time, Paired Golf makes it easier to connect with golfers nearby who actually want to play.

And if you belong to a private club, alumni group, fraternity, or golf league, Paired Golf Clubhouse lets you keep that same experience just within your membership.

No noise. No spam. Just more rounds, with the right people.

Now available on the App Store and Google Play.
www.pairedgolf.com

Name: Windaroo Lakes
Description:
Windaroo Lakes is an 18 hole championship golf course, ideally situated halfway between Brisbane and the Gold Coast and easily accessible just minutes from the M1 Motorway.

Nestled along the picturesque Albert River, the Ross Watson designed course offers a challenge to all levels of golfers from the social player to the lowest of handicaps, which provides a memorable experience for all that play.

However, we are not simply a golf course. Windaroo Lakes offers a newly refurbished Restaurant, Bar, Coffee Shop and Function Room to suit all mood’s and occasions with friendly and welcoming staff to make your experience with us a memorable one.

We welcome all to bask in our relaxed and warm atmosphere, share our beautiful views around the golf course and join in our close-knit community at Windaroo Lakes.

Name: The Alto Golf Club
Description:
Ubicado dentro del hotel SO/ Sotogrande, The Alto Golf Club ofrece una experiencia de golf contemporánea que une deporte, formación y estilo de vida. Con un recorrido técnico y un entorno privilegiado, el club se convierte en el epicentro del golf moderno en la región.

La formación se vive en THE ALTO ACADEMY by Suzann Pettersen, un centro pionero liderado por una leyenda del golf mundial. Con metodología integral, tecnología avanzada y espacios como Toptracer, la academia impulsa el talento desde edades tempranas en un entorno dinámico, profesional y divertido.

Vi har en fantastisk restaurang som drivs av vår krögare Luca Boccacci och en mycket uppskattad träningsverksamhet under ledning av våra Pros Mark Dewdney och John Grant.
Vi har en Camping, en Pay&Play korthålsbana och Footgolf.
Summerat har vi en anläggning som innehåller det mesta i en miljö som är unik.
Välkomna!

Description:

Our goal is to provide you with a relaxing golf day in our idyllic and tranquil setting, making your visit an unforgettable and wonderful experience.

Both the golf course and driving range are conveniently located next to our fantastic clubhouse. Our Roca Viva restaurant offers exceptional cuisine and top-tier service, allowing you to unwind on our beautiful terrace with views of the 18th hole or the historic Capdepera Castle. Our clubhouse also provides the perfect venue for celebrating special occasions, such as weddings, communions, or confirmations. We are delighted to host birthday and anniversary celebrations, as well as other memorable events.

Name: The Country Club at Hong Lok Yuen
Description:
For over 30 years, The Country Club at Hong Lok Yuen has been an exclusive resort oasis nestled in a tranquil, green environment conveniently situated between Tai Po and Fanling in the New Territories of Hong Kong. The Club offers a diverse array of sports and recreation facilities, including swimming pools, tennis courts, squash courts, a comprehensive fitness center, golf putting, pétanque, table tennis, pool tables, and more, along with indoor and outdoor play areas for children.

Additionally, the Club boasts an excellent selection of Chinese and Western cuisines, making it the perfect venue for both formal and informal dinner gatherings. It is also well-equipped to host corporate meetings, private parties, Chinese and Western wedding banquets, and provides catering services for all occasions.

Beyond these impressive facilities, full membership privileges include access to over 20 local and worldwide reciprocal clubs

Name: Loopers Golf
Description:
Your Network and Trips, Perfectly Aligned

At Loopers, we’re redefining what it means to experience golf. Loopers Connect helps you grow your golf network and open doors to new courses, while My Trips takes care of every logistical detail. Together, they create a seamless way to play, travel, and connect—transforming golf from a weekend hobby into a shared experience built around people and places.

Loopers Connect is your golf network, unlocked. Think of it as LinkedIn for golf—a space where you can see your connections, their extended networks, and the courses they can help you access. Your GHIN-verified profile keeps your stats official while network mapping lets you visualize who’s connected to what course and where new opportunities might be waiting. It’s never been easier to stay connected to your foursome, your travel buddies, or that new player you met on your last trip. Because in golf, who you know matters almost as much as how you play.

My Trips is where golf travel gets easy. You bring the sticks, and we’ll handle the rest. No more messy spreadsheets, lost Venmos, or text threads that go off the rails. With My Trips, you can organize your players, build your itinerary, and keep everyone in sync—all in one clean, connected space. Every trip comes with built-in tools to keep your group dialed in. Each golfer gets their own Player Portal with tee times, pairings, scores, and payments in one place. GHIN analytics turn your stats into real insights, helping you track trends and performance over time.

From a quick weekend at Pebble Beach to a full Scottsdale Masters getaway, Loopers makes every trip smoother and every connection stronger. Loopers Connect and My Trips—your network and your game, perfectly aligned.

With awe-inspiring water views, we invite residents and visitors alike to come experience our coastal playground. From the welcoming charm of our facilities to the warmth of our team members, Tiger Point Golf Club is the perfect place to reconnect with family, friends and coworkers.

Name: GolfDren Solutions Ltd
Description:
GolfDren bunker liners are flat products formed by 3D structure of omnidirectionally oriented polyethylene fibers.

Their distinctive feature is high water permeability, both perpendicular to the plane and in the plane, and their advantage over granular drainage materials is their low weight and related easy handling and simple installation.

GolfDren products provide long- term separation, drainage and filtration functions in bunkers.

GolfDren separation mats have been produced and tested in compliance with harmonized European standards for geotextiles and geotextile-like products. The products are CE labeled and they are environmentally friendly.

Name: Bevey
Description:
Bevey is a Canadian technology company partnering with golf courses to provide premium service to their players.

We make it easy for golfers to place food and beverage orders through their phones and for golf courses to receive and deliver those orders wherever the golfers are on the course in a timely and predictable fashion. It increases the pace of play, improves customer satisfaction, and leads to more sales for the golf course.

Name: Diamondhead Country Club & Property Owners Association, Inc.
Drax Golf Club
Description:
Drax Golf Club is a private course managed on a 'not-for-profit' basis that enables us to offer affordable membership, on a high-quality golf course for the local community.

Set in a very attractive woodland area in the North Yorkshire District of Selby, Drax Golf Club is a real hidden gem!

The layout of the course makes it manageable for a beginner, ideal for the casual golfer, but still offers a difficult challenge even for the more skilful players because of its narrow fairways, variety of trees, hazards and testing greens which are renowned in the Yorkshire area.

Name: Le Golf de Montal
Description:
Le Golf de Montal voit le jour le 14 juillet 1994, un beau parcours de 9 trous  dans un cadre unique au pied du Château de Montal et des Césarines, en plein Causse. 

Depuis l'association du Golf de Montal voit son dynamisme sportif se renforcer chaque année  !

Name: Optimum Golf
Description: Our PGA-certified Coaches work with committed golfers and will have you playing your best in no time. They will tailor a lesson plan specific to you and your personal goals.

Name: Grande Oaks GC
Description:
Grande Oaks is a private club in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. We offer our members an exceptional golf experience on our Raymond Floyd designed 18 hole Championship Golf Course. 

Our plantation style clubhouse offers numerous social events each month as well as opportunity to host corporate events and celebrations for non-members, with a specially designed menu by chef Jeff Masanz.

Grande Oaks is also a home of the movie "Caddyshack".

Name: The Golf Club at Red Rock
Description:
The Golf Club at Red Rock has repeatedly been ranked the #1 Golf Course in South Dakota by GolfWeek. Our course was also ranked in the Top 200 Residential Golf Courses in the US for 2019 by GolfWeek, and voted 2019 and 2020 #1 Best Golf Course in the Black Hills by local residents.
 
Routed through the Black Hills terrain and located within minutes of Rapid City, the Red Rock golf course features lush fairways, surrounded by native grasses and tall ponderosa pine trees. Dramatic elevation changes, links-style bunkers and USGA specification greens characterize the 7,000-yd, par-72 championship golf course.

Also Join us at The Rock, our full-service bar and grill that is open daily for a quick snack or delicious meal.

Name: Gosnells Golf Club WA

Name: The Hive Golf Lounge
Description:
Welcome to The Hive Golf Lounge, where golf enthusiasts indulge in an extraordinary indoor golfing experience. Immerse yourself in a world of cutting-edge technology, unmatched convenience, and a vibrant golfing community. Our lounge features state-of-the-art Trackman simulators, offering unparalleled accuracy and realism. Step into our spacious 18-foot bays with 11-foot ceilings, providing ample room for you to swing freely and unleash your true potential.
What sets The Hive Golf Lounge apart is our commitment to accessibility and flexibility. With 24-hour access, you can practice and play whenever inspiration strikes, catering to early birds, night owls, and everyone in between. Our member program adds even more value to your experience, granting you exclusive benefits such as discounted rates, priority bookings, and access to special events and tournaments. Join our community and connect with fellow golfers who share your passion for the game.
At The Hive Golf Lounge, we understand that time is precious. That's why we offer hourly bookings, ensuring that you can conveniently reserve a simulator for as long as you need. Whether you're looking to squeeze in a quick practice session during your lunch break or dedicate several hours to a full round of virtual golf, our user-friendly booking system makes it effortless.
Step into our lounge, and you'll be transported to some of the world's most iconic golf courses. Immerse yourself in breathtaking visuals, realistic sounds, and meticulously recreated environments, bringing the authenticity of the course right to your fingertips. From famous links courses to picturesque fairways nestled in stunning landscapes, you can explore a vast array of virtual destinations without leaving the comfort of our lounge.

The rural parkland location encourages a serene game of golf with buggy paths around the entirety of the course for ease of transportation, whatever the weather. Improve your game in the practice area before resting at the Carluke Clubhouse which, upon request, can cater to a range of events the year around. This course requires attention and respect, while proven testing for lower handicap golfers the course can be lenient to the less experienced but attentive golf player. Memorable holes at Carluke include “Glenburn” (the 11th) and the “Hill of Hope” (the 12th).

Name: Castlerock Golf Club
Description:
Castlerock Golf Club is one of Northern Ireland’s best-kept secrets—an authentic links gem nestled on the rugged Causeway Coast, just 20 minutes from Royal Portrush and within easy reach of Belfast International and City of Derry airports.

Founded in 1901, Castlerock offers a truly memorable experience for international golfers seeking championship links golf without the crowds. The Club features 27 holes of classic links: the revered Mussenden Course, shaped by the legendary Harry Colt, and the Bann Course, a picturesque 9-hole layout ideal for shorter itineraries or warm-up rounds.

Castlerock has hosted a range of top-tier events, including the ISPS Handa World Invitational—a global tournament tri-sanctioned by the DP World Tour, LPGA Tour, and Ladies European Tour—as well as the Irish Amateur Close Championship and Ulster Strokeplay. This world-class pedigree makes it a perfect addition to any tour operator’s premier Northern Ireland itinerary.

Visitors receive a warm welcome and enjoy a relaxed, golfer-focused experience. Our firm fairways, fast greens, and towering dunes deliver a true links test, all set against a dramatic Atlantic backdrop. Off the course, we offer a welcoming clubhouse, top-quality dining, and a state-of-the-art indoor performance studio for lessons, custom fitting, and all-weather practice—led by a PGA Fellow Professional.

Whether you’re crafting a luxury golf tour, building a Causeway Coast classic, or looking to introduce clients to hidden gems beyond the marquee names, Castlerock Golf Club is a must-play stop that consistently exceeds expectations.

World-class links. Warm Irish hospitality. And a location that connects effortlessly to the best of Northern Ireland.

Name: Golf Santa Marina
Description:
Diseñado por el famoso jugador de golf cántabro, Severiano Ballesteros, el campo de golf de Santa Marina es uno de los campos más emblemáticos de la Comunidad de Cantabria.

Golf Santa Marina se encuentra ubicado en un paraíso natural, en pleno corazón del Parque Natural de Oyambre, desde el cual se puede disfrutar de la naturaleza y los hermosos paisajes sin ninguna casa alrededor.

Con un recorrido de 18 hoyos, Santa Marina ofrece un campo moderno y desafiante con una gran variedad de hoyos, pensado para adaptarse a todo tipo de jugadores.

Además, el club ofrece diversos servicios, como por ejemplo, un campo de prácticas, pistas de pádel, pistas de croquet, un club social, restaurante, terraza y diferentes áreas para la celebración de eventos.

El diseño del campo por parte del gran Severiano Ballesteros, sus diversos servicios e instalaciones y su localización, son las principales características que atraen a los amantes del golf a este maravilloso campo de Cantabria.
Location: San Vicente de la Barquera, Cantabria

Name: Petite Suisse Country Club
Description:
Welcome to Petite Suisse Country Club, situated in the picturesque village of Christnach, Luxembourg, within the UNESCO-recognized Natur- & Geopark Mëllerdall, often referred to as the Little Switzerland of Luxembourg. Conveniently located just 2 km from the breathtaking waterfalls and a mere 15 minutes from the German border, our club provides a tranquil setting where nature and sport harmoniously intertwine.

Our esteemed 18-hole, Par 70 golf course, celebrated for its technical intricacies, is seamlessly integrated into the natural landscape. Its primarily flat layout ensures accessibility for all ages, complemented by the availability of golf carts. The course has proudly hosted the professional EPD-Tour tournament in the past. The first nine holes feature a parkland design enveloped by lush forests, while the latter nine present a more demanding challenge, complete with water hazards.

Our outstanding training center features a 9-hole Pitch & Putt course, perfect for beginners and those looking to refine their technique. The PSCC clubhouse offers dedicated reception services for members and their guests, an exquisite gourmet restaurant, and well-appointed locker rooms.

Join us at Petite Suisse Country Club for an unparalleled experience that blends golf, tradition, and innovation.

Name: Sharon Country Club
Description:
In a town known for its wildlife sanctuaries, parks, and walking trails, Sharon Country Club is a refuge for people who are passionate about golf, friendship, and fun. Our private country club provides its members, families, and guests with an extraordinary facility for golf, socializing, and entertaining.  With a unique and challenging golf course and a brand-new clubhouse (opened Spring of 2020), Sharon Country Club maintains a warm and relaxed environment upholding its 125-year legacy.

Sharon Country Club is one of a number of iconic Massachusetts golf courses including Brookline, Pine Brook, Wellesley, Needham, Franklin, and Thorny Lea designed in the 1920s by Wayne Stiles. A contemporary of Donald Ross, Stiles designed courses to use the features of the natural landscape. The results are rolling fairways and greens with false fronts protected by mounded bunkers.

The course includes 10 holes of challenging golf. Outstanding conditions from the tee box, to rolling close-cropped fairways, and fast and true greens are maintained from the April opening until the first snow of December. The club also features exceptional practice facilities including a driving range with grass and mat tees and a short game practice area featuring sand bunkers, chipping areas and putting green.

Name: The Buckhorn Golf Course
Description:
A short 30 minute ride up I-10, and you're far enough away to enjoy yourself, but still close enough to get back in time for dinner. The championship layout is situated to take perfect advantage of the land's natural attributes – elevation changes, clear water creeks, stands of live oak, and, of course, vista views.

What makes The Buckhorn so much fun? It’s the friendly design that includes over 100 feet of natural elevation change; pristine creeks, ponds and valleys, stands of live oak trees and incredible vistas in the Hill Country.  It’s generous fairways and large undulating greens, which make for excellent variety and challenge!  Unrivaled greens, superb golf course conditioning and a tranquil setting all mean that you will have a golf course that delivers a spectacularly fun hill country golf experience, day in and day out, whether you’re a weekend warrior or a scratch player. 

Working on your game and wanting to practice?  The Buckhorn boasts an expansive practice facility.  With over an acre of practice tee, the hitting surface is always in great shape. Quality range balls, Tifdwarf target greens and a short game area complete with bunkers and a chipping green, make it the perfect place to warm up, hone your game or even take up the great game of golf.

We operate StoneRidge Golf Club which is a Bobby Weed designed heathland links golf course in Stillwater, Minnesota.  StoneRidge is consistently ranked as the top public access golf course in the Minneapolis-St. Paul region and also the home of Danny's Kitchen + Bar.

Our flagship development, PGA MSP, is the award-winning and first of its kind indoor golf facility located at the MSP Airport which opened in 2015.  We took over food and beverage operations with the development of Ike's Clubhouse in 2019 and are an affiliate of the Priority Pass network.

We formerly managed and assisted ownership with the exit of GreyStone Golf Club; a Tom Lehman designed facility in Sauk Centre, Minnesota.

Name: OSKOMA TRZASKOWO GOLF CLUB
Description:
Oskoma Trzaskowo to jedyne takie miejsce w Wielkopolsce. Położone 20 kilometrów od zgiełku Poznania, zachwyca ciszą i bliskością natury. 

 

Nasze 9-cio dołkowe pole jest doskonałym miejscem dla początkujących i ciekawym wyzwaniem dla zaawansowanych golfistów. Naszym powodem do dumy jest również fakt, że posiadamy jedną z najpiękniejszych akademii golfa na terenie całej Polski. 

Panuje u nas rodzinna atmosfera, dzięki czemu każdy znajdzie swoje miejsce i poczuje się jak w domu. Pomożemy Ci zagłębić się w tajniki golfowych rozgrywek oraz rozbudzić entuzjazm w każdej kolejnej rozgrywce. 

 

Oskoma Trzaskowo to nie tylko pole golfowe, ale także rozbudowane zaplecze restauracyjne i rekreacyjne, w którym możesz zregenerować siły po stresującym dniu. Zapraszamy na smaczne posiłki, na które można przyjść z całą rodziną bez jakiejkolwiek okazji, a także zachęcamy do zorganizowania u nas imprezy okolicznościowej w pięknym miejscu, otoczonym Puszczą Zielonka. 

Zapraszamy do skorzystania z naszej oferty, gwarantujemy wiele radości i satysfakcji na każdym poziomie zaawansowania gry w golfa. Czekamy na Ciebie i Twoich bliskich!

Name: Rivers Edge Golf Course Bend
Description:
River’s Edge is an affordable public 18-hole golf course centrally located within the city limits of Bend, Oregon.  The course is owned by the homeowners surrounding the course and is operated as an Oregon non-profit organization governed by a board of directors.   All proceeds from operations are returned to the course for improvement and beautification.

The golf course has been a Central Oregon favorite since its inception in 1987.  River's Edge has some of the finest views in the area and the beauty of the Deschutes River.   Our ponds and waterfalls are stunning.

River’s Edge is a challenging golf course. Many of our course improvements in 2022 and 2023 involved earth-moving for the purpose of making the course more enjoyable for the average golfer.  We have cleared and trimmed many obstructive trees, reconditioned and re-designed several of the bunkers, and re-graded many areas to prevent well-hit balls from rolling unfairly. 

Five tees on each hole provide options for long-hitters and short-hitters alike.  We also offer forward tees for youth and beginning golfers.

Join us at Golf On Costa del Sol and elevate your golfing journey. Tee up for greatness!

Description:
The NGCOA Canada Foundation was established under the stewardship of the National Golf Course Owners Association Canada to strengthen the Canadian golf community through charitable giving, education, and sustainability initiatives.

The Foundation is dedicated to supporting individuals and families within the golf industry, providing financial assistance to those facing unexpected hardships and funding education for future industry leaders.

Name: Gowrie Farm
Description:
Gowrie Farm is a privately owned golf and lifestyle estate based in Nottingham Road, a key destination along KwaZulu-Natal’s Midlands Meander.

Known for its Scottish-inspired championship golf course and peaceful natural surrounds, Gowrie Farm offers a unique combination of classic Midlands charm and versatile hospitality - ideal for corporate groups, golf getaways, small conferences, and countryside retreats.

Our on-site lodge accommodation offers comfortable, farm-style lodging with views over the estate and golf course, while our new conference and event facilities are tailored for focused strategy sessions, team-building escapes, and executive retreats. Guests also enjoy access to our relaxed Clubhouse, scenic walking trails, trout dams, and secure, tranquil environment.

We are centrally positioned in Nottingham Road, with easy access to artisan experiences, top schools, private healthcare, and essential services.

Whether you're planning a midweek business break, a group golf tour, or a quiet working retreat, Gowrie Farm delivers refined simplicity, personal service, and a setting that balances productivity with peace.

Enquiries: info@gowriefarm.co.za
Website: www.gowrie.co.za

Name: Nevada County Country Club
Description:
Nestled in the heart of California’s Gold Country, Nevada County Country Club has been a picturesque haven for golf enthusiasts since its establishment in 1926. Situated in Grass Valley, just a stone’s throw from Highway 49, this historic golf course offers a serene and scenic setting for players to enjoy. With its rich history and beautiful surroundings, it’s a cherished gem for both locals and visitors alike.
Our semi-private 9-hole golf course welcomes the public daily after noon. With five distinctive sets of tees, men, women and junior golfers can enjoy a full 18-hole round (par 68 for men, par 70 for women). 

Additional services include golf cart rental (electric and pull carts available), club rentals, tournament hosting, and a well-stocked Pro Shop offering equipment, balls, accessories, and clothing for golfers of all levels.

Name: Golfclub München-Riem
Description:
9-HOLE CHAMPIONSHIP COURSE
A PLEASURE FOR BOTH EXPERTS AND BEGINNERS

Set against the impressive backdrop of the Munich-Riem racecourse—and extending beyond it—the nine fairways of our championship course offer a unique golfing experience. The Par-70 course, measuring 5,302 meters for men and 4,586 meters for women (both over 18 holes), is both a true challenge and a pure delight.

Large water hazards, more than 30 bunkers strategically protecting the greens, and a varied course design will make any golfer’s heart beat faster. Skilled players must combine precision with a well-thought-out strategy to maintain their handicap. Beginners, on the other hand, have multiple ways to reach their goal—perfection is not required on every shot.

Enjoy your rounds in our little oasis in the heart of Munich!

Name: Fairway Golf Peiner Hof
Description:
Wir lieben Golf. Für uns ist es mehr als nur ein Sport – es ist ein Lebensgefühl. Wenn du die Lindenallee hinunterfährst - so unmittelbar vor den Toren der Stadt Hamburg - lässt du den Alltag hinter dir. Frisch gemähtes Gras, weite Fairways, tiefe Atemzüge und die Geräusche von Insekten und anderen Tieren. Hier beginnt dein Kurzurlaub – für eine Runde oder nur einen Moment. Das schönste am Peiner Hof: Bei uns darfst du so sein, wie du bist! 

Der Golfplatz Fairway Peiner Hof nordwestlich von Hamburg und nur 20 Auto-Minuten von der Innenstadt entfernt sowie 15 Minuten mit der Nordbahn vom Bahnhof Hamburg-Dammtor, liegt idyllisch an der Pinnau und besticht durch eine Kombination aus altem Baumbestand und der typischen norddeutschen Knicklandschaft. 
Der 18-Loch Platz ist anspruchsvoll gestaltet, mit zahlreichen Wasserhindernissen, Doglegs und strategisch platzierten Bunkern. Neben der Driving Range und den Übungsbereichen für Anfänger und sportliche Golfer bietet ein 3-Loch Academy Platz weitere Trainingsmöglichkeiten. Golf fordert dich körperlich, stärkt Herz und Kreislauf, trainiert deine Resilienz – und verbindet Menschen wie kaum ein anderer Sport. Wir geben jeden Tag unser Bestes, damit du mit einem Lächeln nach Hause fährst – und gerne wiederkommst.

#FairwayNachHamburg

Name: Songbird Hills Golf Club
Description:
Opening mid-season, on July 29, 1992, Songbird Hills was the culmination of a lifetime dream of Hal Hoffman, a long-time resident of the Hartland area.

Hal began designing the course more than twenty years before construction began in 1990, long before he even owned the land.

But Hal continued to pursue the purchase of this particular farm because, as he said, he "knew where the golf holes were."

The Clubhouse, completed in 1996, is a spacious facility with a Golf Shop, a Golfer's Bar & Grill, year-round Banquet Room and all the normal amenities one expects at a professionally managed club.

An outdoor Pavilion accommodates large and small outing groups.

A refreshment Gazebo was constructed in 2002, located on top of the hill at the center of the course, between the 9th and 10th holes.

Over the years, many new projects have been undertaken, including redesigning the 17th green, creating an additional water hazard on hole 13, enlarging the parking lots, building a number of new teeing areas and adding extensive flower beds - just to name a few.

Songbird Hills has an extensive junior program involving over 200 young golfers each season. Even with a schedule of morning and afternoon adult leagues as well as numerous group outings and various special events, there are still plenty of tee times available for golfers who want to enjoy a round of golf "where the 150 yard markers are bluebird houses."

Name: Sherwood Golf & Country Club
Description:
Sherwood Golf and Country Club rests on over 1,000 acres of pristine Nova Scotia wilderness, a true hidden gem!

Less than an hour from Halifax, stay right on the golf course in one of our seventeen cozy chalets, nestled between the holes for a truly immersive experience. Our contemporary chalets range from 2-5 bedrooms, featuring a fully equipped kitchen, making it a real home away from home.

Perfect for corporate retreats, team-building getaways, and group outings, Sherwood takes care of all the details. From booking logistics and tee times to meeting spaces and catered experiences so you can focus on building connections and achieving your business goals.

With attractive stay & play packages, Sherwood is the ideal destination to unwind, network, and recharge in a natural setting, where business and leisure blend seamlessly.

Name: Silverlakes Golf & Country Club
Description:
Just 40 minutes north of Toronto, tucked into gently rolling countryside, lies Silver Lakes Golf & Country Club - an 18-hole gem carved from 200 acres of mature forest and framed by the meandering Holland River. 

A four-star, par-72 championship layout, Silver Lakes was designed to USGA standards by R. F. Moote and has long earned praise as one of the GTA’s top courses. 

From its tree-lined fairways and sculpted greens to its tranquil ponds and strategically placed bunkers, every hole feels distinct, blending challenge with natural beauty. 

Wetlands play into the design on twelve holes, and abundant wildlife, herons, deer and songbirds move freely across the landscape, giving each round a sense of serenity and escape. 

One standout feature: a 7-acre Aqua Range, where golfers launch drives over water to floating targets - a rare and exciting practice experience. 

Complementing the course are refined amenities: a welcoming clubhouse, fully equipped pro shop, well-maintained practice areas (chipping, putting, bunkers), and event facilities that suit weddings, corporate outings, or tournaments. 

Whether you’re a seasoned golfer seeking a memorable challenge or someone looking to escape the city for a peaceful round, Silver Lakes offers a rare marriage of aesthetic grace and sporting integrity.

Name: Landvetter Inomhusgolf
Description:
Härrydas första och inomhusgolf finns på ullbergsvägen 2 i Landvetter.

Vi erbjuder bokningsbara Trackman 4 golf simulatorer. Man bokar enklast via sweetspot, via vår instagram eller kontaktar oss på info@landvetterinomusgolf.se.

Vi kan även erbjuda roliga afterwork för företag eller kompisgänget. I vår lokal har vi darttavla samt pingisbord. Vi kommer även att prata med catering firmor för att erbjuda god lagad mat till våra afterwork kunder.

Dessa golfsimulatorer är perfekt för dig som vill lära dig mer om din golfsving, din bollträff eller helt enkelt bara vill spela någon av 100+ banor som finns på trackman.

Välkommen in!

Name: South Bay Golf Club
Description:
South Bay Golf Club is an indoor golf facility in Hermosa Beach, California.
We offer a premium indoor golf experience with five hitting bays powered by Trackman iO technology. We cater to golfers of all skill levels and abilities.  Our top-tier facility is a great place to play, practice or host community events. Our membership model ensures a personalized and exclusive experience. Join us to sharpen your skills and be part of a passionate golf community!

Name: Golf Central Magazine
Description: A quarter-century strong: The USA's exclusive female-owned and published magazine, featuring golf turf, travel, philanthropy, and lifestyle!

Name: Dortmunder Golfclub e.V.
Description:
Stadtnah zwischen der Reichsmark und der Hohensyburg gelegen, genießen Mitglieder und Gäste seit 1956 das Golfspiel auf unserem anspruchsvollen 18-Loch Meisterschaftsplatz.

Das Areal ist eingesäumt von Lärchen, Eichen und einer, über Jahrzehnte gewachsenen Mischwaldkultur. Erhöht angelegte Grüns, Wasserhindernisse und der wiederkehrende Blick auf die Syburg machen den ganz besonderen Reiz des Platzes aus.

Name: Club de Tenis Buena Vista
Description:
Bienvenidos al Club de Tenis Buena Vista

Donde la pasión por el deporte y la convivencia social se encuentran en un entorno inigualable. Fundado en 1984, nuestro Club es mucho más que un lugar para practicar tenis; es un espacio donde se fomenta el bienestar, la elegancia y la excelencia.

Con una privilegiada vista que abarca tanto la ciudad como los majestuosos nevados, el Club de Tenis Buena Vista ofrece un ambiente sereno y revitalizante, ideal para disfrutar de una experiencia deportiva completa. Aquí, nuestros socios no solo perfeccionan su juego, sino que también encuentran un refugio para desconectarse de la rutina diaria, conectar con amigos y familiares, y disfrutar de una amplia gama de actividades sociales y recreativas.

Name: FORE U - Indoor Golf & Golfathletics
Description:
Im Fore U verfolgen wir u.a. einen ganzheitlichen Ansatz um dein Golfspiel auf das nächste Level zu heben.
Trackman Indoor Golf Simulator der neuesten Generation, Golfathletik Training, Golflehrer, Personal Fitness Training auch für Nicht-Golfer.

Name: Harrogate Golf Club
Description: Harrogate is the setting for a picturesque parkland course laid out on gently undulating, wooded terrain with tree-lined fairways, it is renowned as an enjoyable test of golf for players of all abilities.

Name: VG CORP
Description: Established in 2016, Vietnam Golf Corporation (VG Corp) stands as a leading force in Vietnam's golf industry. VG Corp specializes in providing products, services and golf solutions to serve Vietnam's vibrant golf community. VG Corp's ecosystem is including vHandicap application with nearly 100,000 golfers; GolfNews - the multimedia channel delivering diverse and valuable information to golf enthusiasts; VG Events - the organizer of tournaments in the Asian Development Tour system in Vietnam, the professional VGA Tour system and the non-professional Vietnam Amateur Series system; Hidden Castle Golf Club - luxury indoor golf technology system. VG Corp is also an important partner of the Vietnam Golf Association.

Name: Club El Soto
Description:
Club fundado en 1969 por un grupo de familias que buscaban la oportunidad de estar en un ambiente privado, cercano, de confianza y amable. En 1976 se inaugura nuestro edificio social, que es una obra formidable, destacado ejemplo de la arquitectura del Movimiento Moderno en la capital burgalesa. Un edificio que nunca va a pasar de moda para un Club con larga trayectoria.
A lo largo de todos estos años, el Club ha continuado creciendo y renovándose para seguir ofreciendo a sus socios el ambiente cercano y cuidado que motivó su fundación. El Club el Soto es un lugar de reunión para familiares, amigos/as y profesionales, una ubicación ideal para el descanso, práctica deportiva, el recreo y el disfrute de jardines, parques, restaurantes, salones, piscinas...

Name: Royal Golf Club de Belgique
Description: Le Royal Golf Club de Belgique, fondé en 1906, est situé dans l'une des plus belles réserves naturelles de Belgique, composée d'une variété d'arbres provenant de l'Arboretum de Tervuren, à proximité.

Name: Golfbaan Crimpenerhout
Description: Golfbaan Crimpenerhout ligt in een prachtig aangelegd waterrijk gebied met spannende bunkers, ontworpen door de bekende Belgische baanarchitect Bruno Steensels, biedt een perfecte uitdaging voor de beginnende en geoefende golfers. Wij bieden golf voor iedereen, laagdrempelig, uitdagend en vooral met veel plezier!

Name: GOLF DE ANDRATX
Description:
Golf de Andratx es un campo de golf de ensueño en el sudoeste de Mallorca.
Este recorrido, apto para campeonatos, de 18 hoyos, con sus cuatro hoyos par 5 y siete lagos figura, arquitectónica y técnicamente, entre los campos más destacados y exigentes del Mediterráneo.

Name: Golf de la Gruyère SA
Description: Le Golf et Hôtel de La Gruyère, domine un paysage vallonné, magnifié par les sommets des Préalpes fribourgeoises et le Lac

Name: Beaverstown Golf Club
Description: Beaverstown Golf Club is a beautiful parkland golf course in Donabate, North County Dublin. It has a unique design and excellent sand-based greens. The course is laid out on 32 acres of parkland with 20 mature apple trees bordering the shores of Roganstown estuary and nature reserve.

Name: Quarry Oaks Golf Club
Description: Quarry Oaks Golf Club is one of the top Nebraska golf courses and is an amazing 18-hole, par-71 championship golf course.  Quarry Oaks sits on the Platte River and is located between Lincoln and Omaha, near South Bend and Ashland, Nebraska.

Name: Golf Next
Description: Golf Next es la newsletter personal de David Sánchez, Chief Marketing Officer de Golfmanager, donde reflexiona sobre temas de interés actual en torno a la innovación, la tecnología y el marketing en la industria del golf.

Name: GolfLoft AG
Description:
Bei uns werden drei unterschiedliche Jahresmitgliedschaften angeboten. 

1. Standard für CHF 680.- | 2 Stunden pro Woche spielen
2. Premium für CHF 980.- | 4 Stunden pro Woche spielen plus 4 Gästetickets
3. VIP für CHF 1480.- | unbegrenzte Spielzeit Woche spielen plus 8 Gästetickets

Bei Interesse stehen wir dir sehr gerne zur Verfügung!

Kontaktiere das GolfLoft Team

Name: Harjattula Golf Oy
Description:
Harjattulan täysimittainen championship-tason kenttä tarjoaa pelinautintoa kaikentasoisille pelaajille. Vaihtelevassa maastossa polveileva kenttä on yksi Suomen pisimmistä, pituus klubiteeltä on 5885 metriä. Kentän on suunnitellut arkkitehti Kosti Kuronen.

Harjattula Golf tarjoaa myös erinomaisen harjoittelualueen, josta löytyvät driving range, putting, chipping ja pitching green sekä harjoitusbunkkerit. Harjattula Golf sijaitsee Kakskerran saarella, 22 kilometrin päässä Turun keskustasta. Harjattulasta löytyy myös venesatama, joten auton sijaan tänne pääset myös kätevästi vesitse.

Harjattulan kenttä on osakepohjainen ja pelaajien omistama. Osakkeita on yhdenlaisia ja yksi osake antaa yhden pelioikeuden. Pelioikeuden voit myös vuokrata. Kentän ylläpitämiseksi jokaiselta osakkeenomistajalta peritään vuotuinen hoitovastike.

Name: Roskilde Golf Klub
Description: Roskilde Golf Klub er en af landets større golfklubber beliggende bynært i Roskilde

Name: Burnley Golf Club Corporate & Events
Description:
We have a fantastic James Braid golf course set in amazing countryside int he heart of East Lancashire 

We offer Brilliant Golf Facilities
Amazing Club House Facilities
On Site Catering for all events including: -
Weddings
Funerals
Birthdays
Business Events

We can cater to any needs you have and have a wide range of set options as well

Name: COLD SPRINGS GOLF & COUNTRY CLUB
Description: COLD SPRINGS GOLF & COUNTRY CLUB is a company based out of 6500 CLUBHOUSE DR, PLACERVILLE, California, United States.

Name: Scraptoft Golf Club
Description:
Scraptoft Golf Club is a beautiful parkland course on the outskirts of Leicester. Renowned for its great condition, lush fairways and fast Green's.

Our aim is that members and visitors enjoy a memorable golf experience and whether you are looking for golf membership, a society golf venue or function hire, Scraptoft Golf Club is the perfect location.

Name: LWCC: Lake Wisconsin Country Club
Description:
Lake WI Country Club: From Fairways to Feasts, Cocktails to Celebrations!

Swing into excellence on our stunning fairways, then indulge in delectable feasts paired with refreshing cocktails. Whether you're toasting a special event or just enjoying the day, Lake WI offers the perfect blend of scenic views, gourmet dining, and unforgettable moments.

Name: studiogolf GmbH
Description: studiogolf ist dein Zuhause für jeden Abschlag. Erlebe realitätsnahes Golfvergnügen bei jedem Wetter mit modernster Trackman-Simulator Technologie – 365 Tage im Jahr. Privat, gemütlich und ganz nach deinem Tempo.

Name: Golf On The Murray
Description:
Golf On The Murray represents seven spectacular golf courses following the rise and fall of the natural Murray River landscape. Corowa Golf Club, Yarrawonga Mulwala Golf Club Resort, Club Tocumwal, Cobram Barooga Golf Club, Rich River Golf Club, cluBarham Golf & Sports and Murray Downs Golf and Country Club. There’s a course for every player, from first timers to weekend golfers, and skilled professionals looking for a challenge. Putt from perfectly manicured greens surrounded by untouched bushland with no one but curious kangaroos for company.

Walk in the footsteps of Australia’s greatest golfers on pristine fairways winding the length of the Murray River.  A report by the Australian Golf Industry Council revealed that the Murray River region is the most frequently visited golf destination by avid golf tourists in Australia. And for good reason, with spectacular weather, picturesque surroundings and some truly memorable golf, the whole region has something for golfers of all skill levels. The Murray region is the perfect destination to tee off all year round with seasonal stay-play deals at each club that will keep you coming back.

Name: Raspberry Falls Golf & Hunt
Description: Located in Leesburg, Virginia, you will find Raspberry Falls Golf & Hunt Club, a spectacular course with all the marks of what makes for an exceptional round of golf. As you encounter our rambling streams, bunkers, stone walls and spectacular rolling terrain, you're almost going to feel that you've traveled across the Atlantic to play golf in the British Isles. And yet you are in Virginia's horse country, with vistas of the Catoctin Mountains in the background. The course was built in 1996, laid out by Gary Player Design, opening that same year to quickly become one of the most popular daily-fee courses in the Washington DC Area.

Name: UGOLF Etangs de Fiac
Description: Le Golf des Etangs de Fiac s’étend sur un magnifique domaine de 70 hectares autour de 12 étangs en région Midi-Pyrénées, dans le Tarn (81). Situé à 1h de Toulouse et 30 minutes de Castres, dans le Pays de Caucagne, le golf des Etangs de Fiac est un régal technique et visuel. Il est l’un des parcours les plus intéressants de Midi-Pyrénées.

Name: The Worcestershire Golf Club
Description: Established in 1879, The Worcestershire Golf Club is proud to be the oldest club in Worcestershire and one of the oldest in England.

Name: Royal Malta Golf Club
Description: Welcome to Royal Malta Golf Club, where we pride ourselves on offering a beautiful, resort-style environment designed with our members in mind. Our contemporary clubhouse, driving range, and restaurant with stunning views are all part of the experience. Committed to personalised service and a warm, inviting atmosphere, we provide the perfect setting for leisure, socialising, and making lasting memories.

Name: Golfclub Erlen
Description: Inmitten einer sanfthügeligen Obstbau-Landschaft im idyllischen Thurgau gelegen bietet der Golfclub Erlen einen sehr hohen Freizeit- und Erholungswert.

Name: Tee Circle Hub
Description:
Tee Circle Hub nace con una idea clara: convertir el golf en una herramienta real para impulsar relaciones profesionales, generar nuevas oportunidades y crear un ecosistema empresarial diferente en A Coruña.

Hemos desarrollado un espacio premium de golf indoor en pleno centro, con vistas al mar, diseñado para que cualquier profesional —juegue o no juegue habitualmente— pueda disfrutar de una experiencia cuidada, moderna y orientada a conectar con otras personas de forma natural. El nivel no importa; lo relevante es el ambiente, la conversación y la posibilidad de abrir puertas.

El Hub integra simulación avanzada, formación, eventos privados y paquetes corporativos, y se ha creado como punto de encuentro para empresas, directivos y emprendedores que buscan un entorno distinto al habitual. Un espacio donde se combinan deporte, tecnología, negocios y una manera más humana de relacionarse.

Queremos que la comunidad lo viva, lo pruebe y entienda el potencial que tiene incorporar el golf al entorno empresarial: reuniones distintas, experiencias que generan confianza y un formato que en otros países ya se utiliza para atracción de talento, fidelización y desarrollo comercial.

Nuestra visión es construir un Hub que evolucione con la comunidad: sesiones de juego, formación con profesionales, contenidos, afterworks, torneos internos, encuentros privados entre empresas y nuevas formas de activar marca dentro del espacio.

Tee Circle Hub es más que un simulador. Es una nueva manera de relacionarse en el ámbito profesional, en un entorno inspirador y bien cuidado.

Name: Laughlin Ranch Golf Club
Description: Laughlin Ranch Golf Club is a premier golf destination, open to the public, and is the top rated golf course in Laughlin, NV & Bullhead City, AZ. Enjoy our exquisite blend of top-notch golf, exceptional dining, and a tranquil salon and spa experience in a captivating and scenic environment. Whether you're playing the golf course, enjoying happy hour or hosting your dream wedding, your cherished memories will be created at "The Ranch".

Name: Fredericia Golf Club
Description: Centralt i landet finder du Fredericia Golf Club - en oase af glæde og samvær. Oplev den mindeværdige bane, den venlige atmosfære og de naturskønne omgivelser.

Name: Mountain Valley Golf Course
Description: Mountain Valley Golf Course is a public golf course that provides exceptional family-oriented recreational and social facilities, activities, and services. Golf Digest Magazine rated Mountain Valley 4.5 stars as a best value course based on conditions and rates. Our course is home to two 18-hole Championship Public Golf Courses and Seasons Restaurant, Banquet Venue, and Party Deck. Plan your relaxing, scenic getaway with a Play and Stay Package and enjoy free shuttle service to the new nearby Comfort Inn and Suites.

Name: Skövde Golfklubb
Description:
Skövde Golfklubb ligger i framkant på golfupplevelse, idrotten golf och det mänskliga mötet. På anläggningen driver vi hållbarhetsfrågor genom att bl a arbeta med elektrifiering och biodiversitet. 

Här vill vi skapa framtidens ambassadörer, både på och utanför golfbanan. Det gör vi genom en kvalitativ ungdomsverksamhet. 

Klubben bidrar ekonomiskt, socialt och med hälsa till närområdet. Tillsammans med Skövde Kommun driver vi mjuka och fysiska frågor för utveckling.

Utveckla dig och din golf! Varmt välkommen till Skövde GK

Name: Pilgrim's Run Golf Club
Description: Pilgrim's Run may be the best kept secret in West Michigan golf. The course layout is challenging and beautiful. 'Golf Digest' selected it 4th among the 'Best New Affordable' courses for 1999.

Name: Odyssey Golf Foundation Golf Course
Description:
The Odyssey Golf Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization that provides both the therapeutic and recreational benefits of golf to veterans, active military personnel, and children and adults with special needs.
Through the use of our golf course and professional staff, the Odyssey Golf Foundation provides free golf instruction, practice and education to participants.
The Odyssey Golf Foundation also works with other 501(c)(3) organizations in order to assist with their fundraising activities through the use of our facilities and services.

Name: les 3S du clou
Description:
Un lieu de rencontre pour les professionnels
Tout comme le parcours, le club House et l'accueil, notre nouveau club affaires 3s du clou se doit d'être convivial et bienveillant. 

Il a pour but de faciliter la mise en relation, de créer un réseau de partenaires et de développer le business autour de passions communes, le golf "SWING", les plaisirs gourmands "SAVEUR" tous nos "SUCCÉS".

Name: Breton Bay Golf & Country Club
Description:
We are a championship golf course located in beautiful St. Mary's County, Maryland. 

We are a semi-privately owned club offering golf, swim and tennis.  Our fully stocked golf shop has everything you need for your day of golf.  The range and practice green allow you to get in a few strokes before heading out on the course.
  
The Ironwood Grill, located within the clubhouse, is open to the public for breakfast, lunch and dinner, with a stunning view of Breton Bay.  It's a great place to stop in for a meal and some drinks before, during or after your round of golf, or anytime you want to catch up with friends. 

Our competition sized pool, with a diving area and a separate toddler pool, as well as a snack bar, offer a wonderful relief from the summer heat.  We have 4 tennis courts, one of which is also a pickleball court.  

Visit our website to find out about memberships or call 301-475-2300 for information about having us host an outing for your organization.

Name: Vineland Greens
Description: Transforming your backyard into a premium putting green offers a luxurious and practical way to improve your golf game from the comfort of your home. Whether you’re an avid golfer looking to refine your skills, or you simply want a premium entertainment feature on your property, a professionally installed backyard putting green provides a dedicated space for practice that enhances both your game and your property.

Name: COVENTRY HEARSALL GOLF CLUB (1924) LIMITED
Description: COVENTRY HEARSALL GOLF CLUB (1924) LIMITED is a Golf Course based out of 33 Beechwood Ave, Coventry CV5 6DF.

Name: Golf ADRIATIC | PGA National Croatia
Description: The Golf course Adriatic was opened in 2009 as a part of the first Croatian five-star luxury coastal golf and spa resort. Located near Savudrija, in the Umag countryside of north-western Istria, the golf course is currently the only golf course on the beautiful Istrian peninsula.  The 18 holes Championship course, PAR 72, 6360 meters, is settled over 80 hectares and is characterized by a challenging layout. The golf course is just by the sea and is open all year round. With an exceptional five-star luxury Kempinski Hotel Adriatic, the private beach and the new Petram Resort by its side within a walking distance, Golf Adriatic is a must-visit and point of return for golf enthusiasts.

Name: La Colombera Golf Club
Description:
Un paradiso nel verde collocato in un contesto di rara bellezza naturalistica, situato in una posizione strategica a poca distanza dall’uscita dell’autostrada A35 Brebemi che collega Milano a Brescia. L’atmosfera rilassata e accogliente di questo golf club permette a persone di ogni età e abilità tecnica di incontrarsi per giocare e per trascorrere momenti di divertimento e relax in un ambiente familiare e informale.

Fondato nel 2007, la Colombera Golf Club comprende un campo da 9 buche e grazie alla conformazione del verde e alla presenza di laghetti contribuiscono a rendere questo campo tecnico particolarmente apprezzato e stimolante per tutti i tipi di giocatori.
Ha subito un processo di riqualificazione, attraverso la società Borgosesia spa, che comprendono il  miglioramento e la manutenzione del campo, restyling della reception. Si sta procedendo con la riconversione delle abitazioni in 10 camere ad uso ricettivo. La struttura  è stata riscritta alla federazione italiana golf.

Name: The Captain's Club Golf & Event Center
Description:
- A True Michigan Golf Experience -

Located in Grand Blanc, Michigan, The Captain’s Club offers a premium public 18-hole golf course within the Woodfield Community. Designed by the legendary 1989 Ryder Club captain, Raymond Floyd, the course is surrounded by protected wetlands and wildlife that never disappoints!

The clubhouse restaurant, STIX at the Captain's Club, is open to the public, all year round. It features a beautiful veranda that overlooks the driving range. The restaurant is the perfect place to host small, intimate private events.

The clubhouse is best known in the area as a top venue to host weddings, corporate events and social events.

Name: The 19th
Description:
En The 19th Madrid redefinimos la experiencia del golf.
Ubicados en el exclusivo centro comercial ABC Serrano, contamos con 7 simuladores Foresight de última generación, una zona exclusiva para members y un bar con ambiente sofisticado para disfrutar de afterworks y eventos privados.
Somos el punto de encuentro perfecto para empresas y profesionales que buscan experiencias únicas de teambuilding, networking y entretenimiento de alto nivel.
- Tecnología Foresight
- Bar & Lounge premium
- Eventos corporativos, afterworks y presentaciones privadas

The19th Madrid — Golf. Networking. Experiencia.

Name: Golf de Montereau La Forteresse
Description: Le golf grandeur nature. Goutez au plaisir du golf et découvrez un havre de paix dans un cadre historique, au cœur d'une nature préservée, verdoyante et paisible, à seulement 1 heure de Paris,  20 minutes de Fontainebleau, 30 minutes de Sens et 7 minutes de Montereau. Le Domaine de la Forteresse s’étend sur 98 hectares et vous offre un dessin varié, aussi beau que technique. L’originalité de chaque trou vous permettra de découvrir un grand nombre de situations de jeu au fur et à mesure du parcours. Au travers des bois, des vallons, au bord des plans d’eau, vous apprécierez les 18 trous de ce parcours praticable toute l'année, pour les joueurs expérimentés comme pour les débutants.

Name: ROCHESTER & COBHAM PARK GOLF CLUB LIMITED (THE)
Description: ROCHESTER & COBHAM PARK GOLF CLUB  is a members-owned golf club based out of PARK PALE BY ROCHESTER, KENT, United Kingdom.

Name: The Golfing Counsellor
Description:
I have been a golfer for 30 years (Handicap 12) and a Counsellor for 10 and I think that the golf course is the perfect place for a mental health check in.   

The golf course, as well as other outdoor settings, can provide a relaxing and comfortable environment for individuals to discuss their mental health concerns with a counsellor.

Engaging in physical activity, such as playing golf, can be beneficial for mental health as it helps to reduce stress and improve overall mood. Moreover, being outside in nature can help individuals feel more relaxed, calm, and rejuvenated, which can enhance the effectiveness of counselling sessions

Name: Cuscowilla on Lake Oconee
Description: Nestled about 70miles east of Atlanta on the serene shores of Lake Oconee, Cuscowilla is an exclusive, private residential and golf community sprawling across roughly 750 acres with 6½–7miles of picturesque shoreline. Home to Georgia’s only Bill Coore & Ben Crenshaw–designed golf course, the community offers an authentic Southern-living experience rich with hospitality, natural beauty, and timeless lifestyle value.

Name: Dunbar Golf Club
Description: DUNBAR GOLF CLUB is a company based out of EAST LINKS, DUNBAR, United Kingdom.

Name: Eagle Golf
Description:
Avec Eagle, le rêve devient réalité.

Première application qui connecte les amateurs aux joueurs de golf professionnels, Eagle offre la chance de vivre des moments uniques sur le green 

Réservez une journée ou une demi-journée aux côtés d’un joueur du circuit européen, entrez dans son univers et vivez une expérience inoubliable.

Notre mission : rendre possible le rêve de partager un parcours avec un joueur professionnel, et transformer chaque partie en un souvenir d’exception.

Parce qu’au-delà du sport, le golf est un art de vivre : passion, rencontres, émotions.

 Téléchargez l’application et rejoignez-nous sur le green : https://www.eaglegolf.fr

Name: BAYWOOD GOLF & COUNTRY CLUB
Description:
Play like a pro at Baywood Golf & Country Club. Manicured and Well-Designed Courses. Combine The Very Best Of Nature & Sport At Our Friendly Golf Course & Club.
We are an 18 hole Private, Golf and Country club nestled in the majestic Redwoods of Northern California.  We offer our members a club house, pool, bar, full dining facility and offer many special events and an exceptional wedding venue.

Name: Harding Park Women's Golf Club
Description: Harding Park Women's Golf Club aims to introduce and promote golf by providing an inclusive and friendly community to all members. We create a social environment that fosters friendships on and off the course. We support all levels from absolute beginners to competitive athletes.

Name: Hasses Padelcenter Vetlanda
Description:
Vi tar din padelupplevelse till en ny nivå.

En toppmodern hall som tilltalar både nybörjare, motionärer & tävlingsspelare med 2 centercourts, 1 dubbel & 1 singelbana.

Plus 1 utomhusbana (Ormaskog Padel) Ej vid hallen utan på adress: Stora Röslida 2 via google maps.

Destinationen i Vetlanda för padel, vänskap & affärer. Din nya mötesplats!

Name: Langesø Golf A/S
Description: Spil golf omkranset af smuk natur på en skovbane, der giver en uforglemmelig golf- og naturoplevelse.

Name: Turfile
Description: Turfile is a GIS platform designed for Golf Course Superintendents. Map infrastructure, manage tasks, and record to build a robust knowledge base. Turfile allows grounds teams to manage property assets in a modern - smart satellite interface with limitless customizability.

Name: Premium Golf Simulators NZ Ltd
Description:
Do you play as much as you would like?
Are you improving as quick as you would like?
Can you get to the driving range or course in 2 mins and be hitting shots?
We make all of this possible with launch monitors and full golf simulators.

Name: Golf d'Etretat
Description:
Centenaire célébré en 2008, le golf d’Etretat est classé régulièrement parmi les meilleurs golfs français. La beauté de son parcours, son prestigieux trou n° 10 et sa vue imprenable sur la mer à chacun de ses 18 trous ne sont pas ses seules caractéristiques.

Son parcours, technique et varié, est partiellement revu tous les ans afin de rester imprévisible et étonnant. Il est accessible aux golfeurs de tous niveaux, mais peut être redouté des meilleurs quand son pire ennemi, le vent, s’invite.

Après votre partie, vous pourrez commenter vos exploits au 19éme trou du clubhouse. Disposant d’une terrasse et d’une vue panoramique sur la mer, le bar/restaurant vous proposera différents choix de menus. Et enfin, après votre périple golfique, vous pourrez découvrir le centre ville et la promenade « Perrey » où de nombreux artistes trouvèrent leur inspiration dans ce paysage d’exception : Maurice Blanc et son personnage Arsène Lupin, Guy de Maupassant, le compositeur Offenbach, ou encore les peintres Corot, Boudin et Monet.

Site labellisé « Normandie Qualité Tourisme » et « Qualité Tourisme ».

Name: Thaxted Park Golf Club
Description:
Thaxted Park Golf Club is located in the Southern suburb of Woodcroft only 20 km from Adelaide’s CBD. The Club was officially opened in 1964. The course layout takes advantage of the rolling hills, offering views to the sea and many of the tree-lined fairways are interwoven with the creeks and dams which attract an abundance of wildlife.

With a range of memberships to suit all categories of players.

The Club offers outstanding membership privileges and opportunities, including a challenging golf course, modern clubhouse with extensive bar and bistro facilities and a challenging golf program for players of all levels.

Members receive a 10% discount on all food and beverages purchased from the bar and restaurant. A compulsory hospitality levy of $100 is issued to encourage Members to utilise the Clubhouse facilities. This amount may be spent on drinks at the bar and food in the restaurant.

Most importantly, we aim to provide a Club environment with a warm, welcoming and friendly atmosphere.

The Club has excellent practice facilities. Range balls are available to Members at the 200-metre practice range, and all Members have access to an extensive short-game facility and warm-up nets.

Name: The Gate Golf Club
Description:
Opening in late 2026, The Gate Golf Club will bring a fresh perspective to the golfing community in Naples, Florida. Led by a passionate team of local Neapolitans, this non-profit organization is driven by a shared love for golf and a commitment to creating a lasting impact on the community. 

The Gate Golf Club is dedicated to making the game of golf more accessible by offering a public 9-hole golf course and practice complex for families, children, and players of all skill levels throughout Southwest Florida.

Here, guests will have the opportunity to learn and enjoy the game in a relaxed, welcoming environment. Our state-of-the-art practice facilities, complete with covered hitting bays, ensure players can sharpen their skills day or night, rain or shine. The Gate Golf Club will also be home to a modern restaurant and a community-focused Pavilion, offering spaces for gathering, dining, and enjoying the scenic surroundings.

At the heart of The Gate Golf Club will be our dynamic 9-hole, par-35 course designed by legendary golfer Peter Jacobsen. Featuring top-tier TifEagle putting greens and Celebration Bermuda fairways, the course will offer a premier experience for golfers of all levels.

Our cutting-edge practice range will feature 30 covered hitting bays outfitted with comfortable lounge seating and Trackman technology, providing an unparalleled practice environment. For an added challenge, players can enjoy an illuminated, 18-hole Himalayas-style putting course, making practice and play enjoyable day and night.

The Gate Golf Club is proud to support First Tee – Naples/Collier, a non-profit organization that teaches juniors important life skills, character, and values through golf. As the future headquarters of First Tee – Naples/Collier, we are committed to fostering a love for the game while inspiring the next generation.

Driving growth & connection in Arizona, our annual tournament is more than a day on the course. It’s a curated gathering designed to spark conversations, strengthen partnerships, and elevate the region’s business ecosystem.

Memberships are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. Members enjoy secure, keyless entry, a climate-controlled environment, and a comfortable, home-like space built for serious or casual play.

Swing365 offers the flexibility of bringing your own food/drink and guests are welcome to play alongside members for a nominal fee.

Try a Swing365 membership today and you will be glad that you kept your swing going in the off-season!

Name: The Golf Club At Moffett Field
Description:
The Golf Club at Moffett Field - Mountain View, CA

In a twist of irony, the original, very-flat course was named the “Hill Course” in honor of Captain Arthur S. Hill, the Commanding Officer at Moffett when the facility opened in 1959. Designed by Bob E. Baldock, the course began as a 9-hole venue before expanding to 18-holes 10 years later.

The Golf Club at Moffett Field is more than a fair test of golf in the Bay Area. It’s location at the now NASA-leased Moffett Air Field is an experience all its own – sitting adjacent to the iconic Hangar 1 and airfield. With views of the surrounding mountains and San Francisco Bay in the back ground.

Every registered golfer will earn a custom made 1TGOLF Gold, Silver or Bronze Medal for recognition of their overall field position and receive a unique Digital Certificate at the end of the 2023 National Golf Challenge.

Name: Golf the Bellarine
Description:
Our members hail from six renowned clubs, each boasting its own proud history and loyal member base. We all share a deep affection for the game, the welcoming people, and the easygoing lifestyle that make the Bellarine Peninsula an ideal place to live, work, and play golf. In partnership with Contours Agency, we’ve come together as Golf the Bellarine to celebrate this spirit.

By coming together as Golf the Bellarine, we aim to showcase everything that makes golf here distinctive. Our undulating, windswept dunes. Stands of tea tree and Moonah framing seaside holes. Lakes, creeks and inlets cleverly interwoven into the golf experience. And our welcoming clubhouses where golf gives way to great times spent together.

This is golf, Bellarine style. A place where challenging, beautiful courses meet good company and good cheer. Where local members happily share all we have to offer with visitors who soon feel like family.

Our clubs have each contributed to Bellarine golf for generations. Now, through Golf the Bellarine, we’re writing the next chapter together. We invite you to come experience golf’s definitive blend of camaraderie, natural beauty, and timeless play.
