Name: Mijas Golf Internacional S.A.U
Description:
Mijas Golf Club es un campo de golf en Málaga, más concretamente, uno de los 52 campos de los que en la actualidad conforman la provincia.
Durante la últimas décadas, Mijas Golf Club se ha convertido en uno de los campos de golf en la Costa del Sol más populares y reconocidos por el magnífico estado de sus campos, así como por el excelente servicio que brinda a sus clientes.

Los Campos

Mijas Golf Club consta de 2 campos de 18 hoyos cada uno, además de zona de prácticas trackman range, proshop y restaurante.

 Los Lagos y Los Olivos, están localizados en el valle del Golf de Mijas, al norte de Fuengirola, a tan sólo 20 minutos del aeropuerto de Málaga y a 3.5 kilómetros del mar.

Los Lagos totalmente reconstruido en el año 2012, manteniendo el diseño original de Robert Trent Jones. El contraste entre los suaves contornos de Los Lagos y la impactante presencia de nuestro “Puente-bola” no dejan a nadie indiferente, y consiguen que tradición e innovación estén presentes en un mismo paisaje.


Golf, turismo y gastronomía

La firma de Robert Trent Jones Sr es uno de los mayores sellos de calidad que puede darse en el mundo del golf. En España sólo seis campos llevan su firma.

Turismo y Golf

Si es un apasionado del golf y de la cultura, de la buena climatología y de la gastronomía, dejese sorprender por la Costa del Sol. Además, su buena comunicación te permitirá visitarla viajando por mar, aire y tierra.

Name: Trysting Tree Golf Club
Description:
Since its grand opening in the summer of 1988, the spacious Trysting Tree Golf Club, located just five minutes from the Oregon State campus, has been the home of the Beavers' men's and women's golf programs. It has become one of the Northwest's finest public golf courses and one of the nation's premier collegiate facilities.

Trysting Tree Golf Club is a versatile golf course varying in lengths from 5,500-7,000 yards and carries a par 72. Oregon State coaches and student-athletes enjoy the luxury of the program's own three-hole, par-3 golf course and their own covered end of the driving range and short-game practice area. They also have a dedicated team room called the "Beaver Den" on the second level of the club's dining area.

Trysting Tree has been the host site of the men's and women's NCAA West Regional Championships in 2001, the men's Pac-12 Championship in 2002 and 2012, and the women's Pac-12 Championship in 2003 and 2014.

Name: Links365, LLC
Description: A private golf oasis open 24/7/365 for you to enjoy with friends, elevate your game, and play iconic courses.

Name: Golf de Casteljaloux
Description:
À 45 minutes d’Agen et à 1 heure de Bordeaux, le Golf 18 trous Par 72 de Casteljaloux au cœur de la Nouvelle-Aquitaine en Lot-et-Garonne vous propose un parcours dessiné par Michel Gayon en 1989 qui vous offrira de superbes vues panoramiques sur le lac de Clarens.



En plein cœur d’un des poumons de l’Europe que constitue la Forêt des Landes de Gascogne, le parcours vous surprendra au fil de ses 6007 mètres avec ses fairways ondulés et ses greens surélevés au beau milieu des pins maritimes. Un parcours équilibré et jouable toute l’année, fait assez rare dans la région. Un terrain parfaitement drainé et des sols sablonneux qui seront l’occasion de partager de beaux moments, seul, entre amis ou en famille.

Name: Emerald Lake Golf Club
Description:
Gather, Dine, and Play at one of the Charlotte Area's premier public courses!

Our 18 hole golf course, established in 1996, offers a challenging layout with four sets of tees, rolling terrain and a sparkling 12-acre lake centered on the property. 

Gather
Emerald Lake features multiple flexible gathering spaces, with the ability to host groups of 10 to 250 attendees. Our 5,000 square foot venue The View, constructed in 2017, is the perfect backdrop for meetings, speakers, and celebrations! 

Dine
Emerald Lake offers a variety of options for dining. Our Grill on the Turn is open every day serving fresh burgers, hotdogs, and brats to golfers during their round. Our LakeView Tavern and Grill features a welcoming indoor bar and dining space and attached patio overlooking our sparking Emerald Lake and the 18th green. Friendly faces serve up refreshing specialty cocktails, cold craft beers, and delicious appetizers, sandwiches, pizza and entrees.  

Play
Emerald Lake provides a feast for the eyes and a rejuvenation of the spirit while the golfer enjoys the challenging layout and fast greens. 
Our professional golf staff can plan and execute golf outings for small or large groups. A variety of formats are available for group or tournament play. Social, corporate, or charity fundraising groups will enjoy our fantastic outing amenities and food and beverage services.

Description:
Established in 2011, GolfLux has emerged as Asia’s leading golf tour operator, crafting exceptional golfing experiences across the continent’s most spectacular courses. With nearly 20 years of experience in the golf and tourism industry, we have in hand the most complete services in Vietnam, Thailand, Cambodia, Malaysia, Indonesia, Singapore, the Philippines, Hong Kong, Sri Lanka, and the UAE.

Description:

Nestled within Craft Barcelona, this exclusive club offers an intimate atmosphere where cigar enthusiasts can connect, relax, and savor curated experiences.

Our mission is to create a unique space where tradition meets modern luxury, blending the rich heritage of cigars with a welcoming environment. Members enjoy access to a thoughtfully designed venue, a handpicked selection of premium cigars, an exceptional menu of paired beverages, and a personalized service that caters to their preferences.

Membership at The Craft Cigar Club goes beyond access; it opens the door to a community of like-minded individuals who share a passion for quality and authenticity. Whether you're a seasoned aficionado or just beginning your journey into the world of cigars, The Craft Cigar Club offers a welcoming space to explore, learn, and indulge.

Whether your club is public, semi-private, or private we can show you how our specialized procurement solutions can help you save money while providing a relationship, quality-based service that will help with bottom-line revenue growth and controlled costs.

Name: Golfclub Augsburg e.V.
Description: In Burgwalden, vor den Toren Augsburgs, empfängt Sie im Golfclub Augsburg das einzigartige Panorama des Naturparks Westliche Wälder. Umgeben von einem prachtvollen Nadel- und Laubwald sind die Spielbahnen harmonisch in die Natur eingebettet. Vor dieser Kulisse ist eine Runde Golf in unserem Club sportlicher und romantischer Genuss zugleich.

Name: WOLF GOLF CLUB
Description:
The Wolf Golf Club is home to an 18-hole course that meets all international standards. It's located in the Dzūkija region of Lithuania, 19 kilometers away from the scenic SPA town of Druskininkai.

A round of golf at the Wolf Golf Club offers a unique opportunity to play an exhilarating round on a traditional Scottish links-type golf course based in Lithuania. The course gets its charm from the beautiful Dzūkija region where it is set, as well as the ingenuity of its designers: golf course architect Johan Benestam from Sweden and Robert Pedigo from the United States. The course strikes a perfect balance between parkland and links courses.

The surrounding scenery is breathtaking - a massive pine forest shields the course from harsh winds on the west, while the rest of the course overlooks the astonishing horizons and rolling plains of southern Lithuania. If you’re up for a challenge, look no further: the Wolf golf course contains around 80 bunkers, keeping the players on their toes. Many require a creative game strategy to make a speedy escape. Vilkės stream runs right through the course, further enhancing the landscape and offering a challenge for the players!

The captivating design of the course at the Wolf Golf Club originates from how well it combines multiple natural obstacles and in turn provides the grounds for a great round. This heathland course combines the best features of local nature; the architects let nature shape their vision for the golf course, creating a relaxing atmosphere for golf players of all levels.

Name: Green Golf indoor studio
Description: GreenGolf indoor studio nabízí hru na simulátoru TrackMan 4 který je v současnosti nejlepším simulátorem na trhu. TrackMan vyhodnotí každý úder prostřednictvím 31 metrik, díky kterým začnete chápat svou hru. Každý golfista má zde prostor pro trénink, ale i pro zábavu. Name: Golf Union of Iceland
Description:
The Golf Union of Iceland is founded 14th of August in 1942 by the three golf clubs in Iceland at that time, The Akureyri golf club, The Reykjavík golf club and the Vestman Island golf club. The task of the Golf Union is to encourage the development of golf in Iceland and be responsible for the sport to the relevant governing bodies in the country.

The Golf Union of Iceland is a member of the Internatioanl Golf Federation, European Golf Association, The R&A and the International Olympic Committee through the National Olympic Commitee of Iceland.

There are 65 golf courses throughout the country whereas 61 of them are members of the Golf Union of Iceland. There are three 27 hole course, fifteen 18 hole golf courses, two 12 hole courses  and forty 9 hole golf course in the country. The population in Iceland is just below 400.000 inhabitants and 25.000 golfers are registered in golf clubs within the Golf Union. It is estimated by puplic research that about 35.000 individuals play golf regularily every year or about 10% of the population.

The golf season in Iceland is of course depending on weather,but usually first courses open in April and the season is usually 5-6 months.

With one of the shortest playable seasons in the golf industry the Icelandic golf market continues to prove their strength in terms of participation, rounds played and player development. As a nation of of just under 400 thousand people they currently have the highest golf participation rate of about 9%. Another impressive figure statistics is the 33% share of the golfing population that is represented by females.

He is available to answer all your questions, advise you on the best golf courses for your level of ability and help you organise your dream trip. You won’t be just another number, but a valued traveller whose needs and wishes are taken into account.

Don’t hesitate to contact us and book your golf holiday in Spain with Xavier. You will be greeted by a passionate professional who will do his utmost to make your stay an exceptional experience, combining world-class golf, exquisite cuisine and discovering the beauty of the Mijas region.

Accomodation is available The club's proximity to Zagreb ensures easy access for both local and international visitors, making it an ideal venue for tournaments, corporate events, and leisure visits.
Accommodation is available in various levels of hotels, ranging from luxury to more budget-friendly options, located in the city center or near the facility, ensuring comfort and convenience for all visitors.

Zagreb, the capital of Croatia, is a vibrant city known for its rich history, stunning architecture, and lively cultural scene. Visitors can explore its charming medieval Old Town, iconic landmarks such as St. Mark's Church and the Zagreb Cathedral, as well as enjoy the city's renowned museums, galleries, and thriving food scene. With its combination of modern urban life and historical charm, Zagreb offers the perfect complement to a golf getaway.

Description:
Gentle’s Corp is an exclusive society built on discipline, ambition, and legacy. We are not a typical organization — we are a private circle of gentlemen who move with intention, operate with presence, and uphold standards that most overlook. Our purpose is simple: to create impact while carrying ourselves with the dignity of true gentlemen.

We are a collective that blends tradition with modern purpose. Gentle’s Corp functions as both a fraternity of like-minded men and a satirical “corporation” — structured in form, yet unconventional in spirit. We may not operate as a conventional business, but our identity as a team is defined by professionalism, exclusivity, and refined ambition.

Our members come together to build community, raise funds for meaningful causes, and host events that bring people into our world — from tournaments and gatherings to philanthropic efforts. Every role within Gentle’s Corp reflects a core strength: strategy, finance, storytelling, discipline, or culture. Together, those strengths form a brotherhood that is unified by one code — conduct, loyalty, and legacy above all else.

Gentle’s Corp is not open to everyone. Membership is earned, not requested. We are not built for followers, but for leaders who understand that legacy matters more than recognition, and that presence is stronger than noise.

We are not a corporation by law, but we are a corporation by spirit — structured, intentional, and enduring.

Gentle’s Corp — Not a real corporation. A real movement.

We blend tradition with innovation, integrating technology-inspired enhancements such as golf simulators, digital swing tools, indoor practice spaces, and data-informed training experiences. These additions expand opportunities for year-round engagement—from professional development events and winter corporate leagues to simulator tournaments and team-building challenges.

Beyond corporate programming, River Downs is committed to being a community-centered destination. We offer family-friendly activities, seasonal events, youth learning programs, private event spaces, and food and beverage experiences designed to bring neighbors together. From local fundraisers and school events to wellness-focused gatherings, our vision is to serve as a place where connection happens naturally.

Whether hosting a corporate outing, launching a leadership retreat, planning a team offsite, or simply enjoying time with colleagues, River Downs provides a welcoming space built around people, purpose, and shared experiences. We are proud to serve the Maryland, DC, and Virginia region and excited to grow with the community as we prepare for our full reopening in 2026.

Name: Shelter Island Country Club
Description:

Perched atop rolling terrain with sweeping views of the surrounding island, our 9-hole public course offers an inviting, community-focused golf experience that blends tradition with charm. Nestled in the heart of Shelter Island, just a ferry ride away from the Hamptons and some of the most iconic golf destinations in the world, SICC has carved out its own legacy over more than a century.

Goat Hill is more than just a course—it's a cultural fixture. Our staff, many of whom are multigenerational Islanders, embody the welcoming and spirited character of Shelter Island itself. Whether you're a local junior golfer, a summer regular, or a visiting pro seeking a relaxed round, you’ll find warm company and a vibrant atmosphere here. It’s not unusual to see well-known golf professionals dropping by for a loop, drawn by the club’s authenticity, pace, and old-school appeal.

The layout is fun, fast, and deceptively tricky. With quirky greens, dramatic elevation changes, and postcard-worthy sunsets, the course is a perfect blend of casual and competitive. 

Shelter Island Country Club is where golf meets community—welcoming, unpretentious, and proudly local. Whether you’re swinging through for a round or seeking to be part of something rooted in tradition and camaraderie, Goat Hill is the place.

Name: SwingWise LLC
Description:
Our Mission

At SwingWise, our mission is to empower golfers of all skill levels to achieve their best by providing real-time, personalized caddie advice tailored to their unique playing style, skill level, and goals. We are passionate about revolutionizing the way golfers approach the course, delivering the same level of strategic insights and precision guidance once reserved for the pros.

We believe that every golfer deserves access to advanced tools that not only make the game more enjoyable but also significantly improve performance. Through innovative AI technology, SwingWise bridges the gap between recreational players and professional-level expertise, making data-driven decision-making accessible, actionable, and easy to use.

Our commitment goes beyond lowering scores—it’s about instilling confidence, enhancing the golfing experience, and helping players unlock their true potential. Whether you’re a beginner seeking to break 100 or a seasoned golfer chasing scratch status, SwingWise is your ultimate partner in mastering the art and strategy of the game.

We are here to transform how you play golf, one swing at a time, with cutting-edge technology, a relentless focus on improvement, and a deep respect for the traditions of the game. Welcome to the future of golf, where every shot is guided by intelligence and every player has the opportunity to elevate their performance.

The Story Behind SwingWise

SwingWise's founder is a lifelong golfer, in fact, it's been a part of his life for over four decades! All of those years were filled with countless rounds and the tireless pursuit to be a scratch golfer.

In 2023, a pivotal realization transformed his game: true improvement requires more than just skill—it demands a strategic approach. By embracing advanced course management techniques, he uncovered the key to consistently improving scores and making par or better. This inspired the creation of SwingWise, designed to share these powerful strategies.

Name: Golf Sport Park Groß-Zimmern
Description:
Golf Sport Park Groß-Zimmern – Natur, Herausforderung & Genuss

Erleben Sie Golf in einer atemberaubenden Kulisse! Am Rande des Odenwaldes fügt sich der Golf Sport Park Groß-Zimmern harmonisch in die sanfte Hügellandschaft ein. Auf bis zu 202 Metern über dem Meeresspiegel genießen Sie einen beeindruckenden Panoramablick über den Odenwald, die Ausläufer des Spessarts und bis hin zum Taunus.

Unser 18-Loch-Meisterschaftsplatz:
Die abwechslungsreiche Anlage erstreckt sich über zwei Ebenen und bietet sowohl strategische Herausforderungen als auch einzigartige Naturerlebnisse. Die untere Ebene, direkt unterhalb des Clubhauses, ist von mehreren Wasserhindernissen geprägt. Die obere Ebene, etwa 20 Meter höher, bildet ein weitläufiges Hochplateau. Mit einer Gesamtlänge von 5.848 Metern und angenehm kurzen Wegen verspricht dieser Platz ein dynamisches Spiel für alle Leistungsstufen.

Öffentlicher 9-Loch Kurzplatz – Perfekt für Einsteiger & Profis:
Unser öffentlicher 9-Loch-Platz besteht aus reinen Par-3-Bahnen mit Längen zwischen 51 und 171 Metern. Hier können Sie ohne Handicap und Clubmitgliedschaft gegen eine Tagesgebühr spielen. Die sanft hügelige Gestaltung sorgt für ein spannendes Spiel – auch für erfahrene Golfer.

Description:
Lakota Links Golf Course, formerly named Lakota Canyon Ranch Golf Club, opened for play in May 2004, offering 18 holes of world class golf with stunning views of rugged Western Colorado canyons and natural terrain. Designed by Nationally renowned architect James Engh, Lakota Links provides a rare opportunity to enjoy amazing golf at the doorway of some of Colorado’s most breathtaking mountain vistas.

Located in New Castle, Colorado, just below the Flat Tops Wilderness Area, and easily accessed right along the Interstate 70 corridor, Lakota Links is one of the most spectacular Colorado golf courses that is easily playable in a day trip from the Aspen, Vail and Grand Junction areas. Lakota Links’ 7111-yard layout promises to be enjoyable for all levels of golf. Exciting features players face at Lakota are the elevated tee boxes on occasion dropping 100 feet to the fairway.

But the Lakota Links experience goes beyond golf. Our clubhouse serves as a versatile venue for private parties, weddings, and corporate events, offering the perfect setting to celebrate special occasions. At the heart of our social offerings is our bar and grill, where guests can enjoy a delicious meal or unwind with drinks. Whether you’re watching the big game on one of our 5 big-screen TVs or hosting an event in our beautiful space, Lakota Links is more than a golf course—it’s a destination for unforgettable experiences.

Lakota Links accolades from national media and locals alike: 
- Golf Digest: One of Colorado state’s 25 highest ranked courses
- NBC’s Golf Pass: “Top Courses in Colorado” three years in a row & “Top 25 Friendliest Courses in the U.S.”
- Glenwood PI Local’s Choice: #1 in Garfield County

Our aim is simple: to connect everyday golfers with the experts they see every week, sparking down-to-earth chats that offer a glimpse into the life of a golf pro while opening up fresh ways for these pros to engage with their community. Whether it’s sharing course management tips, wild stories from the tour, or how golf shaped their path, Backswing Blueprint serves up a laid-back look at the game and the people who live it.

Name: ACE HUNTER
Description:
ACE HUNTER is the world’s first high-stakes, tech-enabled national Par 3 golf league open to golfers of all skill levels. 

High-level overview of how it works

Golfers walk up to a Par 3 tee box at one of our partner courses, open the ACE HUNTER app, select their skill tier, and place a wager on their shot. 

From there, our patent-pending tee-box camera system records their swing, while our AI-powered flagstick device instantly verifies whether the ball lands within a scoring zone or goes in the hole for an ace, with prize amounts tied directly to the outcome.

Results and payouts are immediate, insured, and 100% verified. Absolutely no manual oversight or verification needed. 

For golfers, that means the chance to win cash prizes up to $100,000, compete against other golfers and climb course, state, and national leaderboards, and qualify for ACE HUNTER tournaments, with chances to win additional prizes, such as all-inclusive golf vacations to courses like St. Andrews.

For our partner golf courses, ACE HUNTER is a new cost-free revenue stream. They pay nothing to integrate our tech, yet they earn 25%+ of all wagers placed on their course, while also driving engagement and repeat play.

Our patent-pending AI/ML technology opens the door for golfers of all skill levels to compete at both the local and national levels, while simultaneously providing partner courses with a zero-cost, zero-risk revenue stream that drives engagement and repeat play. 

We're launching ACE HUNTER next spring with 10 courses in Indiana, with plans to roll out nationally by the end of the 2026 season  

And for context on the market opportunity, at just 5% adoption, ACE HUNTER is a $500+ million a year opportunity.

 If you're a course and interested in joining our waitlist, please send me an email to chris@acehunter.golf

In 1892, Charles Blair Macdonald, the grandfather of American golf, designed the first nine holes west of the Allegheny Mountains in Downers Grove, Illinois, at Belmont Road. At this original site of the Chicago Golf Club, Macdonald designed nine more holes for the course in 1893, making it the first 18-hole course in the United States.

Today, the Belmont Golf Club is a scenic 9-hole par 36 course featuring mature trees, natural areas, elevation and water hazards. A driving range with 24 hitting stations, a practice putting green, sand trap and chipping area includes a 10-station covered shelter.

Built for the game

Fifty grass hitting stations on the driving range. Dedicated bunker practice. Two expansive putting greens that roll true. A fully stocked pro shop with everything you need. When you're serious about your game, details matter.

The Reid Park difference

Wooded areas and strategically placed ponds don't just frame each hole—they punish lazy shots and reward smart play. Every round demands course management, club selection, and the mental game that separates golf from mere recreation.

VÄHÄN AJETUT KYTÄJÄ GOLFIN OSAKKEET, NYT LAAKKOSELTA
Omistamalla Kytäjä Golfin osakkeen varmistat itsellesi tai yrityksellesi pelioikeuden Suomen arvostetuimmille kentille, nautit ensiluokkaisista palveluista ja saat käyttöösi huippuluokan osakasedut.

Laakkoset ovat alansa tunnettuja ammattilaisia, joiden innovatiivisella liiketoiminnalla on ollut merkittävä vaikutus autokaupan alaan edistäen standardien ja käytäntöjen kehittymistä.

Laakkosten tahdonvoima sekä suuret visiot näkyvät vahvasti myös Suomen golfissa. Laakkosten tarina Kytäjällä alkaa vuonna 1994 veljesten Reinon ja Yrjön ihastuttua Kytäjän metsiin ja hankittuaan Kytäjän Kartanon. Laakkosille oli tärkeää pitää perinteinen maaseutu eläväisenä sekä toimia yhteistyössä luonnon kanssa. Niin maata kuin metsää hoidettiin vastuullisesti ja kestävästi. Laakkosten kädenjälkeä on myös nykyisten alueen asukkaiden kunnallistekniikka.

Yrjö Laakkoselle Kytäjä Golf oli suuri visio, unelma maailmanluokan golfkeskuksesta. Vuosien ponnistelun ja kehittämisen jälkeen pienestä, mutta historiallisesti merkittävästä Kytäjästä on kasvanut maailmanlaajuisesti varteenotettava matkakohde ja tänä päivänä Kytäjä Golf on noussut rankingeissä Pohjois-Euroopan parhaaksi golfkeskukseksi. Laakkosten arvot näkyvät edelleen vahvasti Kytäjän vastuullisuudessa, luontoarvoissa sekä arvossa, jota Kytäjä Golf pystyy tarjoamaan asiakkailleen.

Name: Garfield Golf Club
Description:
Located just 20 minutes from Pakenham in the heart of West Gippsland, Garfield Golf Club is a welcoming, community-focused club offering an exceptional golfing experience for players of all levels. Established in 1929, our course has become a favourite for members and visitors alike, combining tradition with a friendly, down-to-earth atmosphere.

Our 18-hole, par-69 course is renowned for its pristine greens, excellent drainage, and year-round playability. Whether you’re looking for a casual round, a competitive game, or a group booking, the course is designed to deliver enjoyable play in a scenic setting.

We proudly welcome green-fee players, members, social groups, and corporate bookings, ensuring everyone feels part of the Garfield community. Our friendly clubhouse and team create a relaxed environment for golfers to connect, celebrate, and enjoy the game both on and off the course.

Our Services & Facilities:
- Memberships: Flexible options for players of all levels, with access to competitions, events, and member-exclusive benefits.
- Green Fees: Affordable and accessible casual play, with tee times available year-round.
- Group & Corporate Golf: Packages for social clubs, workplace events, and community groups.
- Clubhouse Facilities: A welcoming space for post-game relaxation, functions, and social events.
- Events & Competitions: Regularly hosted tournaments and social golf days to bring people together.

At Garfield Golf Club, we’re committed to delivering more than just golf. We strive to foster a sense of belonging, promote an active lifestyle, and create memorable experiences for everyone who visits.

Whether you’re a seasoned golfer, a newcomer to the sport, or simply looking for a friendly place to enjoy a round, Garfield Golf Club is here to welcome you.

Description:
About Bird Life Golf

Welcome to Bird Life Golf – where precision meets passion in the world of golf.

At Bird Life Golf, we're more than just a golf product company. We're innovators, enthusiasts, and, most importantly, avid golfers. Our commitment is not just to the game but to all those who play it, from the enthusiastic novice to the seasoned pro.

Our flagship product, the "Birdie Bomb" golf ball, exemplifies our dedication to cutting-edge technology and performance. Engineered as a 4-layer tournament golf ball, it's designed to excel in competitive environments while offering exceptional value for routine practice rounds. With a soft urethane outer shell, the Birdie Bomb guarantees superior backspin, stability, and protection. Its 332 meticulously arranged dimples ensure unmatched trajectory and accuracy, making it the choice of golfers everywhere.

But our commitment doesn't stop with the Birdie Bomb. Our range of products and services is carefully curated to ensure you get the very best in golfing equipment and merchandise. Every product we offer aligns with our mission to provide exceptional golf products and services that enhance the game for all players.

So, whether you're in search of top-tier equipment, expertly curated merchandise, or unmatched customer service, Bird Life Golf is here to elevate your golfing experience. Let us inspire you to perform your best and enjoy every moment on the green.

Join us on this journey and see why Bird Life Golf is fast becoming the preferred name in golf.

Name: Le Portage Golf Club
Description:
Le Portage will help you find the greatness in your golf game, amid scenic surroundings which feature Cape Breton at its best. As visiting golfers quickly discover, the golf experience at Le Portage extends beyond the fairways and greens into our home community – the culturally rich French Acadian community of Chéticamp.

A memorable golf vacation at Le Portage starts with 18 holes set on a plateau overlooking the Gulf of St. Lawrence, with majestic views of the world famous Cabot Trail and surrounding mountains. Known as a challenging course, you will want to play Le Portage again and again. After your round, mingle with local club members and enjoy food and refreshments in our licensed clubhouse.

When the sun sets, take in the sights, sounds and tastes of Chéticamp. Dine on fresh seafood in one of our restaurants, laugh along during live theatre performances and tap your feet to the beat of local music in our pubs. For the non-golfers in your party, this seaside village boasts whale watching tours, craft shops, museums, beaches and hiking excursions in the National Park.

Le Portage is located in the only francophone region on The Cabot Trail, making this Golf Cape Breton course a unique cultural experience for golfers and non-golfers alike.

Name: Fjällbacka Tennis & Äventyrsgolf
Description:
Fjällbacka Tennis & Padel, eller "Minigolfen" som den kallas i folkmun, är en anläggning som går långt bak i tiden. Här har det bland annat spelats tennis sen 50-talet. 

2018 tog familjerna Hagberg och Larsson över driften av anläggningen. De tog över en anläggning med en nyrenoverad minigolfbana och planen var att utveckla hela anläggningen i samma kvalité fast med än mer sport i fokus. 
 
Inför säsongen 2018 byttes således den gamla grustennisbanan ut mot en hardcourt tennisbana från Greenset som är störst på ATP-touren. Samma år uppfördes också ett nytt café och shop med tillhörande utomhuslounge. 
 
Året senare var det dags för nästa projekt. Några minigolfhål togs bort och flyttades för att göra plats för en padelbana. Banan levererades av Padel Total med sk "mondogräs". 

Säsongen 2023 tog vi anläggningen ytterligare en nivå. Terassen blev nyrenoverad och sträcker sig numera längs med hela tennisbanan, kiosken har flyttats för att ge än mer plats för våra sittande gäster som nu kan avnjuta en alkoholhaltig dryck samt en matbit i vår loungemiljö i och med vårat alkoholtillstånd. Som att det inte vore nog, utökade vi minigolfbanan med ett helt nybyggt hål som gör att vi nu erbjuder 13st unika hål. Idag drivs anläggningen av bröderna Emil och Fabian Hagberg.

Description: Located in the Ozark foothills just south of Washington, MO in Krakow, Franklin County Country Club provides it's members with an 18-hole golf course, full service restaurant and zero entry pool. Name: FORE Elite Golf
Description:
FORE Elite Golf is building Palm Beach County’s first tech-driven luxury golf club.

Our concept pairs tour-grade simulator technology with Full Swing Pro 2.0 bays and Full Swing VG2 Virtual Greens with a private-club environment designed for today’s discerning golfer. We are currently in pre-launch and building early brand awareness. Follow us here to track the rollout, see membership updates, and learn how FORE Elite Golf is setting a new standard for performance, privacy, and prestige in the indoor golf space.

Name: OnCourse Turf Solutions
Description:
At OnCourse Turf Solutions, we live and breathe turf. With decades of combined experience in golf course management, our team of seasoned veterans is dedicated to helping you create the perfect playing surface. We understand the unique challenges of maintaining a golf course or athletic facility, from unpredictable weather to tight budgets. We offer a comprehensive list of services designed to alleviate your facility's labor burden while enhancing overall turf health and playability. Our expert team will work closely with you to identify areas for improvement, implement customized solutions, and provide ongoing support to ensure your facility looks its best all season long.

Specializing in precision spray applications, the OnCourse team utilizes cutting edge GPS technology, allowing us to minimize waste, reduce environmental impact, and deliver superior results for our clients.

Don't let staffing shortages hold you back. OnCourse Turf Solutions provides reliable contract labor and specialized services to keep your business thriving.

Description:
Located on historic Route 66 in Webb City—just minutes from Joplin—TeeTime is Southwest Missouri’s premier entertainment and top golf destination. Enjoy a climate-controlled driving range, a full sports bar and restaurant, and spacious indoor and outdoor dining.

From patio events, live concerts, and games like pickleball and cornhole to date nights, friendly get-togethers, or perfecting your swing—every visit offers great food, good times, and a welcoming atmosphere.

It is a fair and enjoyable test for any level of golfer. The course is situated on extremely well-drained soil and barring freak weather conditions it is open 52 weeks a year.

Name: The Virtual Golf Tour
Description:
Welcome to The Virtual Golf Tour.  Here we have created a the ultimate in competitive indoor golf experiences for the benefit of indoor golf centres, their members, private simulator owners and golfers of all abilities across the globe.  The Virtual Golf Tour is a global enterprises that organises virtual golf tournaments and events using Trackman Golf’s golf simulator technology.  With a focus on Order of Merit events, corporate engagements and Trackman Range challenges, The Virtual Golf Tour aims to cater for golfers of all levels whilst supporting a sustainable business model for our host venues and sponsors.

Whether your an individual golfer at any level, a company or organisation with a community of golfers, a golf society or club, an indoor virtual golf venue or hospitality venue seeking a new and exciting way to engage a golfing audience, The Virtual Golf Tour brings to life an immersive golfing experience using state of the art golf simulator technology.   Sign up for events, tournaments or membership, visit one of hundreds of indoor golf centres using Trackman Golf technology worldwide and take part to win real cash prizes, the latest golf gear and gadgets, amazing golf experiences and golf travel opportunities.

Win our Order of Merit or Winter Series events and you have the chance to play some of the world’s most prestigious golf venues for real, on the golf course!

Sound good?  Then let’s get started…

Name: The Links At Spruce Grove
Description: The Links at Spruce Grove is an 18-hole championship golf course located just minutes west of Edmonton. Featuring tree-lined fairways, varied terrain, generous bent grass greens, and challenging hazards, the course welcomes players of all skill levels. The Links is a favorite tournament facility among Edmonton golf courses, thanks to its exceptional, consistent conditions and friendly, accommodating staff. Established in 1983 and owned by Melcor Developments, the Links of Spruce Grove offers a premium golfing experience in a beautiful and welcoming setting.

Name: Next Level Golf
Description:
Next Level Golf specialiseert zich in structurele groepslessen met een gezellige groep op een vast tijdstip in de week. Wij geloven dat, om je spel te verbeteren, naast je (wekelijkse) rondje ook een stuk training en coaching nodig is. Wij bieden het hele jaar rond groepslessen aan.

Of je nog nooit hebt gegolft of hard bezig ben je spel en handicap te verbeteren, je vindt het allemaal bij de Next Level Golf. Met een team van enthousiaste golfprofessionals en specialisten helpen we dagelijks weer golfers van elk niveau.

Name: Turfwise.co.uk
Description:
TurfWise is the smarter way to run golf course maintenance and turf operations. Built by industry professionals for greenkeepers and course managers, TurfWise replaces spreadsheets, whiteboards, and disconnected tools with a single, organised platform that streamlines planning, scheduling, asset management, agronomy insights, safety compliance, and financial tracking.

Our mission is simple: give turf professionals the tools they need to run their courses more efficiently, collaboratively, and strategically. With TurfWise, teams gain real-time visibility, powerful data intelligence, and a system designed around the way they work — not the way legacy software thinks they should.

Founded to empower turf operations with modern technology, TurfWise helps clubs of all sizes reduce waste, improve team coordination, and make informed decisions with confidence.

Name: Puget Sound Golf Club LLC

Name: Virtual Greens
Description:
Virtual Greens is a premier mobile golf simulator rental company that brings the excitement of golf directly to you at the comfort of your home. We supply all the equipment needed for your event, ensuring a seamless and enjoyable experience for you and your guests.

Virtual Greens is perfect for your next birthday party, tailgate, corporate event, etc. Please reach out to our team today to learn more!

Name: SUNLIGHT WATERS COUNTRY CLUB INC
Description:
In addition to many permanent residents, others who seek to enjoy a get away from the stressful walks of a busy life purchase here to enjoy the sun and endless views that our location offers.  The Club is a Not for Profit registered corporation in Washington state.  It is governed by the members with an elected Board of Trustees.  The Board hires a Facility Manager to oversee the grounds and the corporate day to day operations.  There are more than 300 registered lots in three divisions.  Owners with property for sale are welcome to publish their listing on the Community Classifieds page. 

Members pay assessments (dues) that facilitate the club operations and all expenses related to the upkeep and maintenance of the club owned buildings and common areas.  Water is billed by Water District 7 while electricity is provided and billed by Puget Sound Energy.  Members in good standing have access to the clubhouse and pool through the use of electronic key cards.  

You are only minutes away from multiple Cascades opportunities for hiking, fishing, snowmobiling and site seeing that is second to none!  On Morrison Canyon with views of the Stuart Peaks, Sunlight Waters Country Club is located about 90 minutes from downtown Bellevue, 10 minutes past Cle Elum, 25 minutes to Ellensburg and about 1 hour to Leavenworth, WA, a popular travel destination.  Mountain activities include a host of year around fun things to do such as downhill skiing, snowboarding, hiking, cross country skiing, snowmobiling, and fishing.  Hiking in the fall is one of the most talked about activities in all the Pacific Northwest. 

After you have had a day of fun, return to the peace and tranquility of Sunlight Waters.  Those who come for the weekend hate to leave, as they enjoy the peace and quiet of just catching up and watching Mother Nature at her finest!  Become a permanent resident and look forward to coming 'home'.

Name: Zion Golf Club, Bistro & Bar
Description:
Zion Golf Club: Indoor Golf, Bar, and Bistro

Welcome to Zion Golf Club, your ultimate destination for golf enthusiasts and social seekers alike! Combining cutting-edge indoor golf simulators with a stylish bar and bistro, Zion Golf Club offers an immersive experience for players of all skill levels.

Indoor Golf
Step into a world of precision and fun with our state-of-the-art golf simulators, featuring some of the world’s most iconic courses. Whether you're here to practice your swing, compete with friends, or learn the game, our simulators provide realistic gameplay in a comfortable, climate-controlled setting.

Bar and Bistro
After your round, unwind at our inviting bar and bistro. Savor a curated menu of fresh, flavorful dishes and a selection of craft cocktails, local beers, and fine wines. Whether you're celebrating a win, enjoying a casual evening out, or hosting a gathering, Zion Golf Club’s bistro creates the perfect atmosphere to relax and connect.

Community and Events
Zion Golf Club is more than just a venue; it’s a community. Join us for golf leagues, tournaments, and special events that bring players together. With our private event spaces, Zion is also the ideal spot for corporate outings, parties, and celebrations.

At Zion Golf Club, we bring the game and the gathering together. Play, dine, and enjoy—all under one roof.

Name: Swing 365 Golf - Wichita
Description:
Swing 365 is a private, 24/7 indoor golf simulator experience powered by Full Swing technology — the same trusted by top PGA pros. It’s designed for golfers who want flexibility, privacy, and a realistic way to play and practice anytime they choose.

Memberships are month-to-month, and members enjoy secure access, a climate-controlled space, and a personal, home-like golf environment.

Name: Quadrant Golf
Description:
Welcome to Quadrant Golf, where golf enthusiasts of all levels come to experience the ultimate indoor golfing adventure. Nestled in the heart of the Garden Route, our state-of-the-art facility offers a golfing experience like no other.

Whether you’re a seasoned pro looking to fine-tune your swing, a beginner eager to learn the game, or simply seeking a fun and social activity, we have something for everyone. Immerse yourself in a world of meticulously designed golf courses, cutting-edge golf simulation technology powered by Trackman, and a welcoming atmosphere that makes every visit an unforgettable tee-time. Escape the elements, perfect your game, and enjoy the camaraderie of fellow golf enthusiasts.

Come swing into action with us, and discover why Quadrant Golf is the premier destination for golf lovers.

Name: Laurel Lane Country Club
Description: Laurel Lane Country Club, a public golf course in West Kingston, Rhode Island, offers an 18-hole, par-71 course spanning 6128 yards. Established for over 60 years, it boasts a driving range, restaurant and bar, event venue, pro shop, and practice putting green. Known as the "GEM of South County," Laurel Lane is renowned for its delicious food, friendly staff, and wrap-around deck for outdoor dining. The club also features a banquet room for events.

Name: River Downs Golf and Event Center
Description:
Discover River Downs! When you arrive at River Downs Golf Club, you know you’ve discovered a special place. Nestled in the hills of Finksburg, MD just outside Baltimore County, this scenic and challenging course possesses some of the most interesting and exciting holes on the east coast. River Downs Golf Club is perfect for the experienced golfer looking for the next challenge, or beginner golfers looking to improve their game.

Designed by Arthur Hills with passionate golfers in mind, River Downs features an 18-hole, par 72 championship layout certain to challenge players of all skill and experience levels. Come test your skills and conquer one of the most challenging courses in the mid-Atlantic.  River Downs features 150 feet of elevation change from the highest to the lowest point on the course.

Here at River Downs, we offer the full golf experience. In addition to our acclaimed course we have practice facilities, membership opportunities and one of the friendliest staffs in the industry.

River Downs is a neighborhood inclusive, socially and environmentally conscience golf course that offers its guests and members a great golf course, modern facilities, competitive golf, and a welcoming clubhouse where everyone will enjoy their golfing, social, or entertainment experiences.

Name: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN ĐẦU TƯ PHÁT TRIỂN GOLF LONG AN
Description:

Name: Trevon Lee Trevino Branch
Description: Description The famous soccer and robotics camps have taken on a new expertise. We have PGA experts advising our collegiate athletes on how to teach golf.  You want to hit chip shots like tiger woods. You want to drive the golf ball like Rory Mcllory. Putt like Jordan Spieth. Hit those irons flush. Sweep the long clubs of the grass. Learn how to take a divot in front of the ball. Learn course management and strategy. Raise your sand wedge early to hit out of the bunker. Find a simple repeatable swing to score below par. Tee to green will be easy when you never miss the fairways. Effortlessly take the club back and learn how to release the clubhead unconsciously. Your backswing and follow-through will line up perfectly. Keep your swing on plane. Learn simple steps to swing long irons and wedges with consistency. Par 3 courses are a great way to begin your journey. We have a number of courses designed to help young players attain the perfect stance no matter where the ball lies. If the ball is in the rough, below your feet or above your feet we can show you where to position the ball in your stance. On a downslope or upslope will make little difference when you practice pitch shots and chip shots with our expert teachers. Golf lessons have never been so easy. We will help fit your golf clubs and make sure you have the perfect grip to allow you to swing the club effortlessly. Do you want extra distance? We can teach you how to shift your weight at the perfect time. Trevon Branch has assembled a group of golf instructors who specialize in each area of the game. Birdies, eagles and pars will be standard scores for any golf course. Perfect your short game Find out more at https://trevonbranchgolf.wordpress.com

Name: Masters of Golf Moments
Description:
Welcome to Masters of Golf Moments - Where Every Swing Tells a Story!

Are you passionate about the game of golf? Do you live for those perfect drives, precise putts, and unforgettable moments on the course? Then you've found your community!

Masters of Golf Moments is your go-to destination for all things golf-related. Whether you're a seasoned pro, a weekend warrior, or simply an avid fan, our page is dedicated to celebrating the beauty, skill, and camaraderie that define this timeless sport.

Join us as we delve into the world of golf, sharing insightful tips on improving your game, discussing the latest news and trends from the golfing world, and showcasing inspiring stories of triumph and perseverance from players around the globe.

But that's not all - we're also your one-stop shop for all things golf gear and accessories! From stylish apparel to cutting-edge equipment, we'll keep you updated on the latest products and innovations to take your game to the next level.

So whether you're here to sharpen your skills, stay informed, or simply connect with fellow golf enthusiasts, Masters of Golf Moments is the place to be. Let's tee off together and create unforgettable moments on and off the course!

Join our community today and become a part of the Masters of Golf Moments family. Together, let's celebrate the passion, precision, and pure joy of golfing excellence!

Name: Intrago Indoorgolf
Description:
Attention all golf enthusiasts! Are you tired of being stuck inside during the winter months? Well, look no further because Intrago is here to save the day. Our indoor golf facility in Munich-Perlach is the perfect destination for all your golfing needs.
With our state-of-the-art golf simulators, you can play on famous courses from around the world, all while staying warm and comfortable. And our simulator technology allows you to analyze and improve every stroke.
But that's not all! We also offer a variety of amenities to make your visit as pleasant as possible. Take a break between strokes and refresh yourself with a variety of drinks, or grab a bite to eat from one of our partners. And if you're looking to improve your skills, we offer lessons from experienced golf teachers.
Our facility is suitable for golfers of all skill levels and we offer both individual and group bookings. Plus, we regularly host golf tournaments and events, giving you the chance to compete against others and have some fun.
At Intrago, we believe that playing golf should be an experience, not just a game. So come visit us and find out why we're Munich's most popular indoor golf facility. Book your tee time today!

Name: ALE GOLFKLUBB
Description:
Vår 18-hålsbana öppnades 1992. Den är byggd på gammal historisk jordbruksmark som en gång tillhörde Alfhems Kungsgård med anor från 1300-talet. Banan följer de naturliga skiftningar i landskapet och har genom att jorden har brukats i århundraden en naturlig avrinning och dränering av regnvatten. Detta gör att vi kan hålla en hög kvalitet under en lång säsong.

Banan är en utmanande park- och skogsbana med inslag av vatten och är rankad som en av de bättre banorna i Göteborgsdistriktet. Mycket uppskattad av såväl medlemmar som gäster. 2021 hade vi besök av medlemmar från inte mindre än 300 golfklubbar.

Name: Bluegreen Rhuys Kerver
Description:
Situé sur la presqu’île de Rhuys fermant au sud la baie de Quiberon et le golfe du Morbihan, le golf Bluegreen Rhuys-Kerver et son 18 trous se trouvent à moins de 3km du port de pêche d’Arzon et à 15km du centre de Vannes.

Avec l’océan Atlantique comme ligne d’horizon, survolé par les oiseaux de la réserve naturelle de Rhuys (hérons, aigrettes, mouettes, goélands), le golf Bluegreen Rhuys-Kerver offre aux joueurs la possibilité d’évoluer dans un paysage sauvage et authentique : sans doute l’un des plus beaux golfs de Bretagne. Les abonnés apprécient particulièrement l’esprit familial et chaleureux que leur apporte l’équipe ainsi que la beauté du paysage et de la faune qui s’y rencontrent.

Créé en 1986, le golf possède 60 hectares de terrain, des centaines d’arbres résineux et feuillus et il offre des difficultés variables. Le golf de Rhuys Kerver est un golf technique où il faut souvent jouer avec le vent. Se trouvant entre terre et mer, il offre un espace de jeu entrecoupé de nombreux plans d’eau et de fossés. Le parcours est également long et propose aux joueurs un défi golfique qu’ils soient débutants comme experts.

Designed by Harry Colt (Wentworth, Sunningdale), and re-structured by Hawtree (Sunningdale, Trump International), it has holes of character and well groomed greens full of intricate subtleties, never easy to read even to the most experienced.

Whether you are planning a wedding reception, birthday party, anniversary or any other social event, Goring & Streatley provides the perfect venue for you and your guests. Situated on the upper floor of the clubhouse is our recently refurbished main restaurant, which is fully air-conditioned and can seat up to 120 people.

At Goring & Streatley Golf Club we have a choice of rooms available for conferences, training, and meetings, all complete with audio-visual aids and free wi-fi.

Name: Golf Course Graveyard
Description:
Golf Course Graveyard is dedicated to preserving the legacy of golf courses that have become an integral part of the sport's rich history. Our mission goes beyond honoring the past—we strive to pay tribute to courses that have gracefully retired from the game.

Golf courses are more than just places to play; they are where memories are created, challenges are met, and friendships are formed. Sadly, time can bring the closure of these beloved courses, leaving behind nostalgia and stories that deserve to be remembered.

We believe that every course, no matter its size or fame, contributes to the evolution of golf. At Golf Course Graveyard, we work to ensure these stories continue to inspire future generations. Through carefully curated content, we celebrate the history, design, and unique features of these courses, bringing their moments and impact on the sport to life.

Join us as we honor these courses and their legacies. Explore our collection, delve into their stories, and relive the memories woven into their fairways.

Thank you for supporting our mission to celebrate the enduring spirit of golf by preserving its past.

Name: Archives@Work
Description:
We help country clubs turn their archives into a strategic resource that will increase club pride, enhance the club brand, and attract new members.

WE HELP BRING CLUB ARCHIVES TO LIFE
All too often a club's artifacts and memorabilia sit stagnant in a box, file cabinet or display case. We partner with clubs to find the stories behind those artifacts and bring them to life – through written content, custom artwork, displays, and exhibits.

WE HELP CLUBS ORGANIZE, PRESERVE, AND EXHIBIT THIER ARCHIVES
We assist clubs with the purchase of archival, acid-free storage supplies like boxes, sleeves, folders, and envelopes. We help sort through archives and create organized categories, series and collections that make finding items fast. Easily accessible archives will stimulate their use and help spread your club's history.

WE ARE A TEAM OF EXPERTS
There are many skills needed to properly research, organize, protect and display archives. We have assemble a team of expert archivists, writers, restorers, framers, exhibit designers, artists, printers, and more to help put your archives to work.

Email me at: gia@archivesatwork.com

Description: I fell in love with the game of golf. My first job after high school was at the local golf course as a cart kid. I spent my whole summer at the course and I've done the same ever since. In 14 years, I've only become more obsessed. Hambruch Golf was born in 2025 and the goal is simple. 1. Name: Grove + Green
Description:
Grove + Green is the new standard in golf essentials.

FROM THE FOUNDER

I've spent my life in motion — as a triathlete, adventurer, and golfer. Through years of training and outdoor pursuits, I learned how small discomforts can quietly steal moments from the things you love.

On the golf course, it was scorching cart seats and accessories that just didn't measure up. That's when Grove + Green was born.

WHAT WE MAKE

We create premium golf essentials with obsessive attention to detail. European craftsmanship. Innovative materials. Thoughtful design.

Our cart seat towels are crafted from breathable European terry cloth. Precision-engineered to stay in place. Designed in bold, modern colors that elevate your experience on the course.

We make intentional decisions so you don't have to. Products that work invisibly, beautifully, round after round.

WHERE WE'RE GOING

Starting with cart seat towels, we're building a collection of golf essentials for the modern golfer. From the course to the clubhouse, we're elevating the details that matter.

BUILT IN PUBLIC

From our debut at the 2025 PGA Show to partnerships with premier clubs across North America, we're building something different — one round at a time.

The best products don't demand your attention — they give you the freedom to focus on what matters.

A new standard for golf essentials.

Steph Fauquier, Founder

---

 Founded in Toronto, Canada  
 Made in Europe  
 Club partnerships: hello@groveandgreen.com  
 Follow our journey: @groveandgreen

Our goal is to build confidence in our golfers, so they can use their skill set and achieve greater accomplishments both nationally and internationally.

  Our founder, Ernest Wee, has always had a passion for the game of golf. Since he began playing at the age of two, he has won many awards and championships. In 2005, he won first place in the National Inter School Golf Championship, and in the same year was awarded the Singapore Sports Council South Zone Colours Award. Name: Super Golf
Description:
At Super Golf, you and your group have your very own hitting bay, complete with a big couch, artificial turf mat, screens, clubs and balls—everything you could need, ready from the get-go. The space is comfortable and well-heated (because yes, we’re open all year long!), so you can hit shots out at coloured targets, while taking in the chill vibes, music and laughter all around.

So, is it golf? Yes—and no. With Toptracer technology, every shot is broadcast live on your screen. You’ll have access to all the technical data you can imagine and there are a number of virtual courses to play through if you’re interested. But you can also let off some steam destroying virtual enemies or taking a little fishing trip, if that’s more your speed. Plus, you can eat and drink while you play. The polo shirt and Bermuda shorts are definitely not mandatory, but you can still wear them if you want! Because at Super Golf, fun matters most.

Name: PureStrike Golf Tees
Description:
In golf, every strike counts and playing from a tee is one of the few advantages that the game of golf gives us during a round. And not all golf tees are created equal!

Our fundamental difference is that PureStrike golf tees deliver a straighter strike with less ball curve.

And independent robotized swing testing has confirmed this.

We put PureStrike to the test against 5 top brand performance tees at Golf Laboratories in San Diego, the world leader in golf equipment testing. Using a state of the art robot called LDRIC after Tiger Eldrick Woods, swing and flight performance data is captured on the most sophisticated technology available with precision and consistency. And PureStrike is in 1st place on straighter strike (measured in dispersion) and distance.

Name: Monticello Golf Association
Description:
The Monticello Golf Club was legally organized as a corporation on January 3, 1922, when the Illinois Secretary of State signed the certificate. The petitioners were A.C. Edie, L.C. Burgess, Witt England and Burl Edie.

On March 1, 1922 the 60 original stockholders of the Monticello Golf Club purchased 27 acres of land from Mary I. Dighton for $12,000. Each of the 60 stockholders put in $200 for the investment.

The golf course had sand greens. The circular greens were a little smaller than the ones today and had an inch or so of fine sand mixed with oil. The oil served to keep the sand from blowing away and gave a surface some thickness. The hole was in the center of the green. A wooden board on edge, with a handle, was used to drag the sand to make it smooth, when one was ready to putt.

Although very few sand green golf courses exist today, they were common in those days. LeRoy, Farmer City, Villa Grove and Sullivan all had similar courses until after World War II. Those courses were gradually changed to modern day bent grass greens.

Before our sand was replaced with grass greens, the course holes were played in a different order than today. The fifth hole today was the first hole. After playing the five holes on the North side of the course, golfers teed off on their number six, which is now our first hole. The finishing hole was our current number four. The layout of the hole was even longer than it is today. It was a par 6, making an 18-hole round par 74.

The first clubhouse facility was a screed in house.  A second club house severed the club from 1963 – 2016 which housed a bar, dining room, apartment upstairs, and a large patio.  The second club house was demolished to make way for the current clubhouse opened spring of 2017.

The Knobs and Fodderstack Nines were designed by Rees Jones, recognized today as one of America’s leading golf course architects. The Chimney Top Nine was designed by Edward Lawrence Packard and opened for play in 1994.

The course has Bent Grass greens, Riviera Bermuda Grass fairways, a continuous golf cart path system throughout the 27-hole course. There are 100 sand bunkers and six water hazards to challenge your accuracy and skill.

Mit innovativen Konzepten und hochwertigen Produkten – insbesondere auf Basis von Meeresalgen – schaffen wir widerstandsfähige, gesunde Spielflächen für Golf und Sport.
Unser Leitgedanke: „A concept that plays better.“

Name: Pinseeker Travels
Description: We plan your golf trips for you, so your only responsibility is to arrive at the destination. Tee times, accommodation, rental cars and even dinner reservations will all be taken care of for you, so you can focus on hitting the ball straight.
Location: Northland, Auckland, Hamilton, Taupo, Wellington, Christchurch, Queenstown, Dunedin

Name: Council Greens Golf Course, Inc.
Description: Council Greens Golf Course, nestled between Council and Cutty Mountains in Council, Idaho, offers a picturesque 9-hole mountain golfing experience. Managed by the Council Greens Homeowners Association, our challenging 3,236-yard (par 37) course caters to all skill levels amidst stunning natural beauty. With well-maintained fairways, friendly staff, and a breathtaking backdrop, Council Greens is a hidden gem for seasoned golfers and visitors alike. Book your tee time today to discover the unique charm of mountain golf in Idaho.
